authors_text: Congcong Li,Xinyao Wang,Dexiang Hong,Yufei Wang,Libo Zhang,Tiejian Luo,Longyin Wen
title: Structured Context Transformer for Generic Event Boundary Detection
title_zh: 用于通用事件边界检测的结构化上下文转换器
abstract: Generic Event Boundary Detection (GEBD) aims to detect moments where humans naturally perceive as event boundaries. In this paper, we present Structured Context Transformer (or SC-Transformer) to solve the GEBD task, which can be trained in an end-to-end fashion. Specifically, we use the backbone convolutional neural network (CNN) to extract the features of each video frame. To capture temporal context information of each frame, we design the structure context transformer (SC-Transformer) by re-partitioning input frame sequence. Note that, the overall computation complexity of SC-Transformer is linear to the video length. After that, the group similarities are computed to capture the differences between frames. Then, a lightweight fully convolutional network is used to determine the event boundaries based on the grouped similarity maps. To remedy the ambiguities of boundary annotations, the Gaussian kernel is adopted to preprocess the ground-truth event boundaries to further boost the accuracy. Extensive experiments conducted on the challenging Kinetics-GEBD and TAPOS datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Generic Event Boundary Detection (GEBD) aims to detect moments where humans naturally perceive as event boundaries. In this paper, we present Structured Context Transformer (or SC-Transformer) to solve the GEBD task, which can be trained in an end-to-end fashion. Specifically, we use the backbone convolutional neural network (CNN) to extract the features of each video frame. To capture temporal context information of each frame, we design the structure context transformer (SC-Transformer) by re-partitioning input frame sequence. Note that, the overall computation complexity of SC-Transformer is linear to the video length. After that, the group similarities are computed to capture the differences between frames. Then, a lightweight fully convolutional network is used to determine the event boundaries based on the grouped similarity maps. To remedy the ambiguities of boundary annotations, the Gaussian kernel is adopted to preprocess the ground-truth event boundaries to further boost the accuracy. Extensive experiments conducted on the challenging Kinetics-GEBD and TAPOS datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 通用事件边界检测（GEBD）旨在检测人类自然感知为事件边界的时刻。在本文中，我们提出了结构化上下文转换器（或 SC-Transformer）来解决 GEBD 任务，它可以以端到端的方式进行训练。具体来说，我们使用主干卷积神经网络（CNN）来提取每个视频帧的特征。为了捕获每帧的时间上下文信息，我们通过重新划分输入帧序列来设计结构上下文变换器（SC-Transformer）。请注意，SC-Transformer 的整体计算复杂度与视频长度呈线性关系。之后，计算组相似度以捕获帧之间的差异。然后，使用轻量级全卷积网络根据分组的相似性图确定事件边界。为了弥补边界标注的模糊性，采用高斯核对真实事件边界进行预处理，以进一步提高准确性。在具有挑战性的 Kinetics-GEBD 和 TAPOS 数据集上进行的大量实验证明了所提出的方法与最先进的方法相比的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结构化上下文变换器（SC-Transformer），用于检测视频中人类自然感知的事件边界。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在捕捉视频时间上下文信息时存在效率不足或复杂度过高的问题，需设计更高效的模型以提升事件边界检测性能。
AI.method: 方法包含CNN提取帧特征、SC-Transformer通过重新划分帧序列捕捉时间上下文、组相似度计算差异、轻量全卷积网络判定边界，并采用高斯核预处理标注以提升准确性。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-GEBD和TAPOS数据集上实验验证了SC-Transformer的有效性，优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SC-Transformer通过线性复杂度设计与标注预处理策略，在事件边界检测任务中实现了高效且精准的性能提升。

authors_text: Shivani Naik,Arjun Kumar,Nitinesh Yadav,K. M. Santosh
title: Wireless Self-Powered Visual and NDE low-Cost Inspection System For Small Diameter Live Gas Distribution Mains
title_zh: 适用于小直径燃气分配干线的无线自供电视觉和 NDE 低成本检查系统
comment: 2 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2201.10468, arXiv:2205.09973
comments: 2 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2201.10468, arXiv:2205.09973
abstract: The arrangement of an in-pipe climbing robot that works using a sharp transmission part to explore complex relationship of lines. Standard wheeled/continued in-pipe climbing robots are leaned to slip and take while researching in pipe turns. The instrument helps in achieving the really unavoidable consequence of getting out slip and drag in the robot tracks during progression. The proposed transmission likes the useful uttermost scopes of the standard two-yield transmission, which is fostered the fundamental time for a transmission with three outcomes. The instrument decisively changes the track velocities of the robot considering the powers applied on each track inside the line relationship, by getting out the fundamental for any wonderful control. The entertainment of the robot crossing in the line network in different direction and in pipe-turns without slip shows the proposed course of action's ampleness.
summary: The arrangement of an in-pipe climbing robot that works using a sharp transmission part to explore complex relationship of lines. Standard wheeled/continued in-pipe climbing robots are leaned to slip and take while researching in pipe turns. The instrument helps in achieving the really unavoidable consequence of getting out slip and drag in the robot tracks during progression. The proposed transmission likes the useful uttermost scopes of the standard two-yield transmission, which is fostered the fundamental time for a transmission with three outcomes. The instrument decisively changes the track velocities of the robot considering the powers applied on each track inside the line relationship, by getting out the fundamental for any wonderful control. The entertainment of the robot crossing in the line network in different direction and in pipe-turns without slip shows the proposed course of action's ampleness.
abstract_zh: 管道内攀爬机器人的布置，利用尖锐的传动部件来探索复杂的线条关系。标准轮式/连续式管道内攀爬机器人在研究管道转弯时倾向于滑动和采取。该仪器有助于实现在行进过程中消除机器人轨道中不可避免的滑动和阻力的结果。所提出的传输类似于标准双输出传输的最大有用范围，这为具有三个输出的传输提供了基本时间。该仪器考虑到线关系内每个轨道上施加的功率，通过找出任何完美控制的基础来决定性地改变机器人的轨道速度。机器人在不同方向的线路网络中穿越以及在没有滑移的管道转弯中的娱乐性显示了所提出的行动方案的丰富性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于小直径燃气管道的无线自供电视觉与无损检测低成本检测系统，通过改进管道爬行机器人的传动结构解决其在弯管中易打滑的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统管道爬行机器人在复杂管道转弯处易发生打滑和拖拽，影响检测效率和安全性，亟需改进传动结构以提升其运动稳定性。
AI.method: 设计一种三输出传动系统，通过实时调整轨道速度并结合管道内力分布，实现机器人在不同方向及弯管中的无滑动移动。
AI.result: 实验验证了该机器人可在复杂管道网络中稳定运行，有效避免了传统机器人因打滑导致的轨迹偏差问题。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为小直径燃气管道的高效安全检测提供了可行方案，其传动结构设计显著提升了管道机器人的运动控制能力。

authors_text: Yanmeng Wang,Jun Bai,Ye Wang,Jianfei Zhang,Wenge Rong,Zongcheng Ji,Shaojun Wang,Jing Xiao
title: Enhancing Dual-Encoders with Question and Answer Cross-Embeddings for Answer Retrieval
title_zh: 通过问答交叉嵌入增强双编码器以进行答案检索
abstract: Dual-Encoders is a promising mechanism for answer retrieval in question answering (QA) systems. Currently most conventional Dual-Encoders learn the semantic representations of questions and answers merely through matching score. Researchers proposed to introduce the QA interaction features in scoring function but at the cost of low efficiency in inference stage. To keep independent encoding of questions and answers during inference stage, variational auto-encoder is further introduced to reconstruct answers (questions) from question (answer) embeddings as an auxiliary task to enhance QA interaction in representation learning in training stage. However, the needs of text generation and answer retrieval are different, which leads to hardness in training. In this work, we propose a framework to enhance the Dual-Encoders model with question answer cross-embeddings and a novel Geometry Alignment Mechanism (GAM) to align the geometry of embeddings from Dual-Encoders with that from Cross-Encoders. Extensive experimental results show that our framework significantly improves Dual-Encoders model and outperforms the state-of-the-art method on multiple answer retrieval datasets.
summary: Dual-Encoders is a promising mechanism for answer retrieval in question answering (QA) systems. Currently most conventional Dual-Encoders learn the semantic representations of questions and answers merely through matching score. Researchers proposed to introduce the QA interaction features in scoring function but at the cost of low efficiency in inference stage. To keep independent encoding of questions and answers during inference stage, variational auto-encoder is further introduced to reconstruct answers (questions) from question (answer) embeddings as an auxiliary task to enhance QA interaction in representation learning in training stage. However, the needs of text generation and answer retrieval are different, which leads to hardness in training. In this work, we propose a framework to enhance the Dual-Encoders model with question answer cross-embeddings and a novel Geometry Alignment Mechanism (GAM) to align the geometry of embeddings from Dual-Encoders with that from Cross-Encoders. Extensive experimental results show that our framework significantly improves Dual-Encoders model and outperforms the state-of-the-art method on multiple answer retrieval datasets.
abstract_zh: 双编码器是问答 (QA) 系统中答案检索的一种很有前途的机制。目前大多数传统的双编码器仅通过匹配分数来学习问题和答案的语义表示。研究人员提出在评分函数中引入QA交互特征，但代价是推理阶段效率低下。为了在推理阶段保持问题和答案的独立编码，进一步引入变分自动编码器，从问题（答案）嵌入中重建答案（问题），作为辅助任务，以增强训练阶段表示学习中的 QA 交互。然而文本生成和答案检索的需求不同，导致训练难度较大。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个框架，通过问题答案交叉嵌入来增强双编码器模型，并提出一种新颖的几何对齐机制（GAM），以将双编码器的嵌入几何与交叉编码器的嵌入几何对齐。大量的实验结果表明，我们的框架显着改进了双编码器模型，并且在多个答案检索数据集上优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种增强双编码器模型的方法，通过问题与答案的交叉嵌入及几何对齐机制提升答案检索效果。
AI.motivation: 传统双编码器模型在推理阶段效率低下，且引入QA交互特征时面临生成与检索任务目标不一致的训练困难。
AI.method: 设计交叉嵌入框架结合几何对齐机制（GAM），通过重构问答嵌入空间对齐双编码器与交叉编码器的表示几何结构。
AI.result: 在多个答案检索数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过解耦编码与几何对齐有效增强了双编码器模型的表示能力与检索性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种增强双编码器模型的方法，通过问题与答案的交叉嵌入及几何对齐机制提升答案检索效果。
ai_content.motivation: 传统双编码器模型在推理阶段效率低下，且引入QA交互特征时面临生成与检索任务目标不一致的训练困难。

search_text: Enhancing Dual-Encoders with Question and Answer Cross-Embeddings for Answer Retrieval 通过问答交叉嵌入增强双编码器以进行答案检索 Dual-Encoders is a promising mechanism for answer retrieval in question answering (QA) systems. Currently most conventional Dual-Encoders learn the semantic representations of questions and answers merely through matching score. Researchers proposed to introduce the QA interaction features in scoring function but at the cost of low efficiency in inference stage. To keep independent encoding of questions and answers during inference stage, variational auto-encoder is further introduced to reconstruct answers (questions) from question (answer) embeddings as an auxiliary task to enhance QA interaction in representation learning in training stage. However, the needs of text generation and answer retrieval are different, which leads to hardness in training. In this work, we propose a framework to enhance the Dual-Encoders model with question answer cross-embeddings and a novel Geometry Alignment Mechanism (GAM) to align the geometry of embeddings from Dual-Encoders with that from Cross-Encoders. Extensive experimental results show that our framework significantly improves Dual-Encoders model and outperforms the state-of-the-art method on multiple answer retrieval datasets. 双编码器是问答 (QA) 系统中答案检索的一种很有前途的机制。目前大多数传统的双编码器仅通过匹配分数来学习问题和答案的语义表示。研究人员提出在评分函数中引入QA交互特征，但代价是推理阶段效率低下。为了在推理阶段保持问题和答案的独立编码，进一步引入变分自动编码器，从问题（答案）嵌入中重建答案（问题），作为辅助任务，以增强训练阶段表示学习中的 QA 交互。然而文本生成和答案检索的需求不同，导致训练难度较大。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个框架，通过问题答案交叉嵌入来增强双编码器模型，并提出一种新颖的几何对齐机制（GAM），以将双编码器的嵌入几何与交叉编码器的嵌入几何对齐。大量的实验结果表明，我们的框架显着改进了双编码器模型，并且在多个答案检索数据集上优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种增强双编码器模型的方法，通过问题与答案的交叉嵌入及几何对齐机制提升答案检索效果。 Yanmeng Wang,Jun Bai,Ye Wang,Jianfei Zhang,Wenge Rong,Zongcheng Ji,Shaojun Wang,Jing Xiao cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Chi Zhang,Lijuan Liu,Xiaoxue Zang,Frederick Liu,Hao Zhang,Xinying Song,Jindong Chen
title: DETR++: Taming Your Multi-Scale Detection Transformer
title_zh: DETR++：驯服您的多尺度检测变压器
comment: T4V: Transformers for Vision workshop @ CVPR 2022
comments: T4V: Transformers for Vision workshop @ CVPR 2022
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) have dominated the field of detection ever since the success of AlexNet in ImageNet classification [12]. With the sweeping reform of Transformers [27] in natural language processing, Carion et al. [2] introduce the Transformer-based detection method, i.e., DETR. However, due to the quadratic complexity in the self-attention mechanism in the Transformer, DETR is never able to incorporate multi-scale features as performed in existing CNN-based detectors, leading to inferior results in small object detection. To mitigate this issue and further improve performance of DETR, in this work, we investigate different methods to incorporate multi-scale features and find that a Bi-directional Feature Pyramid (BiFPN) works best with DETR in further raising the detection precision. With this discovery, we propose DETR++, a new architecture that improves detection results by 1.9% AP on MS COCO 2017, 11.5% AP on RICO icon detection, and 9.1% AP on RICO layout extraction over existing baselines.
summary: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) have dominated the field of detection ever since the success of AlexNet in ImageNet classification [12]. With the sweeping reform of Transformers [27] in natural language processing, Carion et al. [2] introduce the Transformer-based detection method, i.e., DETR. However, due to the quadratic complexity in the self-attention mechanism in the Transformer, DETR is never able to incorporate multi-scale features as performed in existing CNN-based detectors, leading to inferior results in small object detection. To mitigate this issue and further improve performance of DETR, in this work, we investigate different methods to incorporate multi-scale features and find that a Bi-directional Feature Pyramid (BiFPN) works best with DETR in further raising the detection precision. With this discovery, we propose DETR++, a new architecture that improves detection results by 1.9% AP on MS COCO 2017, 11.5% AP on RICO icon detection, and 9.1% AP on RICO layout extraction over existing baselines.
abstract_zh: 自从 AlexNet 在 ImageNet 分类中取得成功以来，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 一直主导着检测领域 [12]。随着 Transformers [27] 在自然语言处理方面的彻底改革，Carion 等人。 [2]介绍了基于Transformer的检测方法，即DETR。然而，由于 Transformer 中自注意力机制的二次复杂度，DETR 永远无法像现有基于 CNN 的检测器那样融合多尺度特征，导致小物体检测结果较差。为了缓解这个问题并进一步提高 DETR 的性能，在这项工作中，我们研究了合并多尺度特征的不同方法，并发现双向特征金字塔（BiFPN）与 DETR 结合使用效果最好，可以进一步提高检测精度。有了这一发现，我们提出了 DETR++，这是一种新架构，与现有基线相比，它在 MS COCO 2017 上将检测结果提高了 1.9% AP，在 RICO 图标检测上提高了 11.5% AP，在 RICO 布局提取上提高了 9.1% AP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DETR++，通过引入双向特征金字塔（BiFPN）改进DETR模型，以解决其在多尺度目标检测中的不足。
AI.motivation: DETR因自注意力机制的二次复杂度无法有效利用多尺度特征，导致小目标检测性能不足，需改进其多尺度特征融合能力。
AI.method: 在DETR架构中集成双向特征金字塔（BiFPN），以增强多尺度特征的提取与融合能力。
AI.result: 在MS COCO 2017数据集上提升1.9% AP，在RICO图标检测和布局提取任务中分别提升11.5%和9.1% AP。
AI.conclusion: BiFPN有效提升了DETR的多尺度检测能力，证明了DETR++在目标检测任务中的优越性。

authors_text: Junnan Li,Silvio Savarese,Steven C. H. Hoi
title: Masked Unsupervised Self-training for Label-free Image Classification
title_zh: 用于无标签图像分类的屏蔽无监督自我训练
abstract: State-of-the-art computer vision models are mostly trained with supervised learning using human-labeled images, which limits their scalability due to the expensive annotation cost. While self-supervised representation learning has achieved impressive progress, it still requires a second stage of finetuning on labeled data. On the other hand, models pre-trained with large-scale text-image supervision (e.g., CLIP) have enabled zero-shot transfer to downstream image classification tasks. However, the zero-shot performance of CLIP-like models are often insufficient for real-world adoption. In this paper, we aim to leverage the abundant unlabeled data from a target domain to improve the performance of a pre-trained zero-shot classifier, by unsupervised finetuning of the pre-trained model. We propose Masked Unsupervised Self-Training (MUST), a new unsupervised adaptation method which leverages two different and complementary sources of training signals: pseudo-labels and raw images. MUST jointly optimizes three objectives to learn both class-level global feature and pixel-level local feature and enforces a regularization between the two. We demonstrate the efficacy of MUST on a variety of downstream tasks, where it improves upon CLIP by a large margin. MUST also outperforms supervised few-shot adaptation methods. It achieves a top-1 accuracy of 77.7% on ImageNet using ViT-B, +9.4% higher than CLIP, and +6.2% higher than 16-shot CLIP adaptation. Our code is available at https://github.com/salesforce/MUST.
summary: State-of-the-art computer vision models are mostly trained with supervised learning using human-labeled images, which limits their scalability due to the expensive annotation cost. While self-supervised representation learning has achieved impressive progress, it still requires a second stage of finetuning on labeled data. On the other hand, models pre-trained with large-scale text-image supervision (e.g., CLIP) have enabled zero-shot transfer to downstream image classification tasks. However, the zero-shot performance of CLIP-like models are often insufficient for real-world adoption. In this paper, we aim to leverage the abundant unlabeled data from a target domain to improve the performance of a pre-trained zero-shot classifier, by unsupervised finetuning of the pre-trained model. We propose Masked Unsupervised Self-Training (MUST), a new unsupervised adaptation method which leverages two different and complementary sources of training signals: pseudo-labels and raw images. MUST jointly optimizes three objectives to learn both class-level global feature and pixel-level local feature and enforces a regularization between the two. We demonstrate the efficacy of MUST on a variety of downstream tasks, where it improves upon CLIP by a large margin. MUST also outperforms supervised few-shot adaptation methods. It achieves a top-1 accuracy of 77.7% on ImageNet using ViT-B, +9.4% higher than CLIP, and +6.2% higher than 16-shot CLIP adaptation. Our code is available at https://github.com/salesforce/MUST.
abstract_zh: 最先进的计算机视觉模型大多是使用人工标记图像通过监督学习进行训练的，由于昂贵的注释成本，这限制了它们的可扩展性。虽然自监督表示学习取得了令人印象深刻的进展，但它仍然需要对标记数据进行第二阶段的微调。另一方面，通过大规模文本图像监督（例如 CLIP）预训练的模型已经实现了向下游图像分类任务的零样本传输。然而，类 CLIP 模型的零样本性能通常不足以满足现实世界的采用。在本文中，我们的目标是通过对预训练模型进行无监督微调，利用目标域中丰富的未标记数据来提高预训练零样本分类器的性能。我们提出了掩模无监督自训练（MUST），这是一种新的无监督适应方法，它利用两种不同且互补的训练信号源：伪标签和原始图像。必须联合优化三个目标，以学习类级全局特征和像素级局部特征，并强制两者之间的正则化。我们展示了 MUST 在各种下游任务上的功效，它比 CLIP 有了很大的改进。必须优于有监督的小样本适应方法。它使用 ViT-B 在 ImageNet 上实现了 77.7% 的 top-1 准确率，比 CLIP 高 9.4%，比 16-shot CLIP 适应高 6.2%。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/salesforce/MUST 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需标签的图像分类方法，通过无监督微调提升预训练零样本分类器的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型依赖人工标注数据或零样本性能不足，而无监督方法可利用目标领域的大量未标记数据进行优化。
AI.method: 提出Masked Unsupervised Self-Training (MUST) 方法，结合伪标签和原始图像，联合优化三个目标以学习全局和局部特征并施加正则化。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上使用ViT-B实现77.7%的top-1准确率，较CLIP提升9.4%，优于16-shot CLIP适应方法6.2%。
AI.conclusion: MUST通过无监督适应有效提升了预训练模型在无标签数据下的分类性能，优于现有零样本和少样本方法。

We demonstrate the efficacy of MUST on a variety of downstream tasks, where it improves upon CLIP by a large margin. MUST also outperforms supervised few-shot adaptation methods. It achieves a top-1 accuracy of 77.7% on ImageNet using ViT-B, +9.4% higher than CLIP, and +6.2% higher than 16-shot CLIP adaptation. Our code is available at https://github.com/salesforce/MUST. 最先进的计算机视觉模型大多是使用人工标记图像通过监督学习进行训练的，由于昂贵的注释成本，这限制了它们的可扩展性。虽然自监督表示学习取得了令人印象深刻的进展，但它仍然需要对标记数据进行第二阶段的微调。另一方面，通过大规模文本图像监督（例如 CLIP）预训练的模型已经实现了向下游图像分类任务的零样本传输。然而，类 CLIP 模型的零样本性能通常不足以满足现实世界的采用。在本文中，我们的目标是通过对预训练模型进行无监督微调，利用目标域中丰富的未标记数据来提高预训练零样本分类器的性能。我们提出了掩模无监督自训练（MUST），这是一种新的无监督适应方法，它利用两种不同且互补的训练信号源：伪标签和原始图像。必须联合优化三个目标，以学习类级全局特征和像素级局部特征，并强制两者之间的正则化。我们展示了 MUST 在各种下游任务上的功效，它比 CLIP 有了很大的改进。必须优于有监督的小样本适应方法。它使用 ViT-B 在 ImageNet 上实现了 77.7% 的 top-1 准确率，比 CLIP 高 9.4%，比 16-shot CLIP 适应高 6.2%。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/salesforce/MUST 获取。 本文提出了一种无需标签的图像分类方法，通过无监督微调提升预训练零样本分类器的性能。 Junnan Li,Silvio Savarese,Steven C. H. Hoi cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yichen Liu,Jiawei Chen,Defang Chen,Zhehui Zhou,Yan Feng,Can Wang
title: Confidence-aware Self-Semantic Distillation on Knowledge Graph Embedding
title_zh: 知识图嵌入的置信感知自语义蒸馏
abstract: Knowledge Graph Embedding (KGE), which projects entities and relations into continuous vector spaces, has garnered significant attention. Although high-dimensional KGE methods offer better performance, they come at the expense of significant computation and memory overheads. Decreasing embedding dimensions significantly deteriorates model performance. While several recent efforts utilize knowledge distillation or non-Euclidean representation learning to augment the effectiveness of low-dimensional KGE, they either necessitate a pre-trained high-dimensional teacher model or involve complex non-Euclidean operations, thereby incurring considerable additional computational costs. To address this, this work proposes Confidence-aware Self-Knowledge Distillation (CSD) that learns from the model itself to enhance KGE in a low-dimensional space. Specifically, CSD extracts knowledge from embeddings in previous iterations, which would be utilized to supervise the learning of the model in the next iterations. Moreover, a specific semantic module is developed to filter reliable knowledge by estimating the confidence of previously learned embeddings. This straightforward strategy bypasses the need for time-consuming pre-training of teacher models and can be integrated into various KGE methods to improve their performance. Our comprehensive experiments on six KGE backbones and four datasets underscore the effectiveness of the proposed CSD.
summary: Knowledge Graph Embedding (KGE), which projects entities and relations into continuous vector spaces, has garnered significant attention. Although high-dimensional KGE methods offer better performance, they come at the expense of significant computation and memory overheads. While several recent efforts utilize knowledge distillation or non-Euclidean representation learning to augment the effectiveness of low-dimensional KGE, they either necessitate a pre-trained high-dimensional teacher model or involve complex non-Euclidean operations, thereby incurring considerable additional computational costs. To address this, this work proposes Confidence-aware Self-Knowledge Distillation (CSD) that learns from the model itself to enhance KGE in a low-dimensional space. Specifically, CSD extracts knowledge from embeddings in previous iterations, which would be utilized to supervise the learning of the model in the next iterations. Moreover, a specific semantic module is developed to filter reliable knowledge by estimating the confidence of previously learned embeddings. This straightforward strategy bypasses the need for time-consuming pre-training of teacher models and can be integrated into various KGE methods to improve their performance. Our comprehensive experiments on six KGE backbones and four datasets underscore the effectiveness of the proposed CSD.
abstract_zh: 知识图嵌入（KGE）将实体和关系投影到连续向量空间中，引起了人们的广泛关注。尽管高维 KGE 方法提供了更好的性能，但它们是以大量计算和内存开销为代价的。减少嵌入维度会显着降低模型性能。虽然最近的一些努力利用知识蒸馏或非欧几里德表示学习来增强低维 KGE 的有效性，但它们要么需要预先训练的高维教师模型，要么涉及复杂的非欧几里德操作，从而产生相当大的额外计算成本。为了解决这个问题，这项工作提出了置信感知自知识蒸馏（CSD），它从模型本身中学习以增强低维空间中的 KGE。具体来说，CSD 从先前迭代中的嵌入中提取知识，这些知识将用于监督下一次迭代中模型的学习。此外，还开发了一个特定的语义模块，通过估计先前学习的嵌入的置信度来过滤可靠的知识。这种简单的策略无需对教师模型进行耗时的预训练，并且可以集成到各种 KGE 方法中以提高其性能。我们对六个 KGE 主干网和四个数据集进行的综合实验强调了所提出的 CSD 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自信感知的自知识蒸馏方法（CSD），用于在低维空间中提升知识图谱嵌入（KGE）性能。
AI.motivation: 高维KGE方法计算开销大，而低维方法性能下降明显。现有方法依赖预训练教师模型或复杂非欧几里得操作，成本较高。
AI.method: CSD通过模型自身先前迭代的嵌入知识监督后续学习，并引入语义模块评估嵌入置信度以过滤可靠知识，无需预训练教师模型。
AI.result: 在六个KGE框架和四个数据集上的实验验证了CSD的有效性，显著提升了低维KGE性能。
AI.conclusion: CSD方法有效解决了低维KGE性能下降问题，具有无需预训练和通用性强的优势。

authors_text: Xiaomei Wang,Alec Smith,Bruce Keller,Farzan Sasangohar
title: Mobile Health Solution for College Student Mental Health: Interview Study and Design Requirement Analysis
title_zh: 大学生心理健康移动健康解决方案：访谈研究与设计需求分析
abstract: Background: Mental health problems are prevalent in college students. The COVID-19 pandemic exacerbated the problems, and created a surge in the popularity of telehealth and mobile health solutions. Despite that mobile health is a promising approach to help students with mental health needs, few studies exist in investigating key features students need in a mental health self-management tool. Objective: The objective of our study was to identified key requirements and features for the design of a student-centered mental health self-management tool. Methods: An interview study was first conducted to understand college students' needs and preferences on a mental health self-management tool. Functional information requirement analysis was then conducted to translate the needs into design implications. Results: A total of 153 university students were recruited for the semi-structured interview. The participants mentioned several features including coping techniques, artificial intelligence, time management, tracking, and communication with others. Participant's preferences on usability and privacy settings were also collected. The desired functions were analyzed and turned into design-agnostic information requirements. Conclusions: This study documents findings from interviews with university students to understand their needs and preferences for a tool to help with self-management of mental health.
summary: Background: Mental health problems are prevalent in college students. Participant's preferences on usability and privacy settings were also collected. The desired functions were analyzed and turned into design-agnostic information requirements. Conclusions: This study documents findings from interviews with university students to understand their needs and preferences for a tool to help with self-management of mental health.
abstract_zh: 背景：大学生心理健康问题普遍存在。 COVID-19 大流行加剧了这些问题，并导致远程医疗和移动医疗解决方案的普及激增。尽管移动健康是帮助学生满足心理健康需求的一种很有前景的方法，但很少有研究调查学生心理健康自我管理工具所需的关键功能。目的：我们研究的目的是确定设计以学生为中心的心理健康自我管理工具的关键要求和特征。方法：首先进行访谈研究，了解大学生对心理健康自我管理工具的需求和偏好。然后进行功能信息需求分析，将需求转化为设计含义。结果：共有153名大学生被纳入半结构化面试。参与者提到了一些功能，包括应对技巧、人工智能、时间管理、跟踪和与他人的沟通。还收集了参与者对可用性和隐私设置的偏好。对所需功能进行分析并将其转化为与设计无关的信息需求。结论：本研究记录了对大学生的采访结果，以了解他们对帮助心理健康自我管理的工具的需求和偏好。

AI.tldr: 本文通过访谈研究和需求分析，确定大学生心理健康自我管理工具的关键设计需求。
AI.motivation: 大学生心理健康问题普遍存在，新冠疫情加剧了这一问题，但现有研究缺乏对移动健康工具核心功能需求的探讨。
AI.method: 采用半结构化访谈收集153名大学生需求，结合功能信息需求分析法提炼设计要素。
AI.result: 识别出应对技巧、人工智能、时间管理、状态追踪、社交沟通等核心功能，同时收集到可用性与隐私设置偏好数据。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为开发符合大学生需求的心理健康自我管理工具提供了设计依据和功能指引。

authors_text: Hao Fu,Guotai Wang,Wenhui Lei,Wei Xu,Qianfei Zhao,Shichuan Zhang,Kang Li,Shaoting Zhang
title: HMRNet: High and Multi-Resolution Network with Bidirectional Feature Calibration for Brain Structure Segmentation in Radiotherapy
title_zh: HMRNet：具有双向特征校准的高分辨率多分辨率网络，用于放射治疗中的脑结构分割
comment: 11 pages, 6 figures, Accepted by IEEE JBHI
comments: 11 pages, 6 figures, Accepted by IEEE JBHI
abstract: Accurate segmentation of Anatomical brain Barriers to Cancer spread (ABCs) plays an important role for automatic delineation of Clinical Target Volume (CTV) of brain tumors in radiotherapy. Despite that variants of U-Net are state-of-the-art segmentation models, they have limited performance when dealing with ABCs structures with various shapes and sizes, especially thin structures (e.g., the falx cerebri) that span only few slices. To deal with this problem, we propose a High and Multi-Resolution Network (HMRNet) that consists of a multi-scale feature learning branch and a high-resolution branch, which can maintain the high-resolution contextual information and extract more robust representations of anatomical structures with various scales. We further design a Bidirectional Feature Calibration (BFC) block to enable the two branches to generate spatial attention maps for mutual feature calibration. Considering the different sizes and positions of ABCs structures, our network was applied after a rough localization of each structure to obtain fine segmentation results. Experiments on the MICCAI 2020 ABCs challenge dataset showed that: 1) Our proposed two-stage segmentation strategy largely outperformed methods segmenting all the structures in just one stage; 2) The proposed HMRNet with two branches can maintain high-resolution representations and is effective to improve the performance on thin structures; 3) The proposed BFC block outperformed existing attention methods using monodirectional feature calibration. Our method won the second place of ABCs 2020 challenge and has a potential for more accurate and reasonable delineation of CTV of brain tumors.
summary: Accurate segmentation of Anatomical brain Barriers to Cancer spread (ABCs) plays an important role for automatic delineation of Clinical Target Volume (CTV) of brain tumors in radiotherapy. Despite that variants of U-Net are state-of-the-art segmentation models, they have limited performance when dealing with ABCs structures with various shapes and sizes, especially thin structures (e.g., the falx cerebri) that span only few slices. To deal with this problem, we propose a High and Multi-Resolution Network (HMRNet) that consists of a multi-scale feature learning branch and a high-resolution branch, which can maintain the high-resolution contextual information and extract more robust representations of anatomical structures with various scales. We further design a Bidirectional Feature Calibration (BFC) block to enable the two branches to generate spatial attention maps for mutual feature calibration. Considering the different sizes and positions of ABCs structures, our network was applied after a rough localization of each structure to obtain fine segmentation results. Experiments on the MICCAI 2020 ABCs challenge dataset showed that: 1) Our proposed two-stage segmentation strategy largely outperformed methods segmenting all the structures in just one stage; 2) The proposed HMRNet with two branches can maintain high-resolution representations and is effective to improve the performance on thin structures; 3) The proposed BFC block outperformed existing attention methods using monodirectional feature calibration. Our method won the second place of ABCs 2020 challenge and has a potential for more accurate and reasonable delineation of CTV of brain tumors.
abstract_zh: 准确分割脑部癌症扩散屏障（ABC）对于放射治疗中脑肿瘤临床靶区（CTV）的自动描绘具有重要作用。尽管 U-Net 的变体是最先进的分割模型，但在处理具有各种形状和大小的 ABC 结构时，尤其是仅跨越几个切片的薄结构（例如大脑镰）时，它们的性能有限。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种高分辨率多分辨率网络（HMRNet），它由多尺度特征学习分支和高分辨率分支组成，可以维护高分辨率上下文信息并提取各种尺度解剖结构的更鲁棒的表示。我们进一步设计了一个双向特征校准（BFC）块，使两个分支能够生成空间注​​意图以进行相互特征校准。考虑到 ABC 结构的不同大小和位置，我们的网络在对每个结构进行粗定位后应用，以获得精细的分割结果。在 MICCAI 2020 ABCs 挑战数据集上的实验表明：1）我们提出的两阶段分割策略在很大程度上优于仅在一个阶段中分割所有结构的方法； 2）所提出的具有两个分支的HMRNet可以保持高分辨率表示，并且可以有效提高薄结构上的性能； 3）所提出的 BFC 块优于使用单向特征校准的现有注意方法。我们的方法赢得了 ABCs 2020 挑战赛的第二名，具有更准确、更合理地描绘脑肿瘤 CTV 的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HMRNet网络，用于放射治疗中脑肿瘤临床靶区（CTV）的自动分割，特别针对解剖屏障（ABCs）结构的精确分割。
AI.motivation: 现有U-Net等模型在分割形状大小不一、尤其是薄层结构（如大脑镰）的ABCs时表现有限，需改进分割精度。
AI.method: 设计包含多尺度特征学习分支和高分辨率分支的HMRNet，并引入双向特征校准（BFC）模块实现跨分支特征交互，结合两阶段分割策略提升薄结构分割效果。
AI.result: 在MICCAI 2020 ABCs数据集上，HMRNet在薄结构分割和整体性能上优于单阶段方法，获得挑战赛第二名。
AI.conclusion: HMRNet通过双分支架构与双向特征校准有效提升了脑结构分割精度，为CTV勾画提供更可靠的技术支持。

search_text: HMRNet: High and Multi-Resolution Network with Bidirectional Feature Calibration for Brain Structure Segmentation in Radiotherapy HMRNet：具有双向特征校准的高分辨率多分辨率网络，用于放射治疗中的脑结构分割 Accurate segmentation of Anatomical brain Barriers to Cancer spread (ABCs) plays an important role for automatic delineation of Clinical Target Volume (CTV) of brain tumors in radiotherapy. Despite that variants of U-Net are state-of-the-art segmentation models, they have limited performance when dealing with ABCs structures with various shapes and sizes, especially thin structures (e.g., the falx cerebri) that span only few slices. To deal with this problem, we propose a High and Multi-Resolution Network (HMRNet) that consists of a multi-scale feature learning branch and a high-resolution branch, which can maintain the high-resolution contextual information and extract more robust representations of anatomical structures with various scales. We further design a Bidirectional Feature Calibration (BFC) block to enable the two branches to generate spatial attention maps for mutual feature calibration. Considering the different sizes and positions of ABCs structures, our network was applied after a rough localization of each structure to obtain fine segmentation results. Experiments on the MICCAI 2020 ABCs challenge dataset showed that: 1) Our proposed two-stage segmentation strategy largely outperformed methods segmenting all the structures in just one stage; 2) The proposed HMRNet with two branches can maintain high-resolution representations and is effective to improve the performance on thin structures; 3) The proposed BFC block outperformed existing attention methods using monodirectional feature calibration. Our method won the second place of ABCs 2020 challenge and has a potential for more accurate and reasonable delineation of CTV of brain tumors. 准确分割脑部癌症扩散屏障（ABC）对于放射治疗中脑肿瘤临床靶区（CTV）的自动描绘具有重要作用。尽管 U-Net 的变体是最先进的分割模型，但在处理具有各种形状和大小的 ABC 结构时，尤其是仅跨越几个切片的薄结构（例如大脑镰）时，它们的性能有限。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种高分辨率多分辨率网络（HMRNet），它由多尺度特征学习分支和高分辨率分支组成，可以维护高分辨率上下文信息并提取各种尺度解剖结构的更鲁棒的表示。我们进一步设计了一个双向特征校准（BFC）块，使两个分支能够生成空间注​​意图以进行相互特征校准。考虑到 ABC 结构的不同大小和位置，我们的网络在对每个结构进行粗定位后应用，以获得精细的分割结果。在 MICCAI 2020 ABCs 挑战数据集上的实验表明：1）我们提出的两阶段分割策略在很大程度上优于仅在一个阶段中分割所有结构的方法； 2）所提出的具有两个分支的HMRNet可以保持高分辨率表示，并且可以有效提高薄结构上的性能； 3）所提出的 BFC 块优于使用单向特征校准的现有注意方法。我们的方法赢得了 ABCs 2020 挑战赛的第二名，具有更准确、更合理地描绘脑肿瘤 CTV 的潜力。 本文提出HMRNet网络，用于放射治疗中脑肿瘤临床靶区（CTV）的自动分割，特别针对解剖屏障（ABCs）结构的精确分割。 Hao Fu,Guotai Wang,Wenhui Lei,Wei Xu,Qianfei Zhao,Shichuan Zhang,Kang Li,Shaoting Zhang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Angie Boggust,Harini Suresh,Hendrik Strobelt,John V. Guttag,Arvind Satyanarayan
title: Saliency Cards: A Framework to Characterize and Compare Saliency Methods
title_zh: 显着性卡：表征和比较显着性方法的框架
comment: Published at FAccT 2023, 19 pages, 8 figures, 2 tables
comments: Published at FAccT 2023, 19 pages, 8 figures, 2 tables
abstract: Saliency methods are a common class of machine learning interpretability techniques that calculate how important each input feature is to a model's output. We find that, with the rapid pace of development, users struggle to stay informed of the strengths and limitations of new methods and, thus, choose methods for unprincipled reasons (e.g., popularity). Moreover, despite a corresponding rise in evaluation metrics, existing approaches assume universal desiderata for saliency methods (e.g., faithfulness) that do not account for diverse user needs. In response, we introduce saliency cards: structured documentation of how saliency methods operate and their performance across a battery of evaluative metrics. Through a review of 25 saliency method papers and 33 method evaluations, we identify 10 attributes that users should account for when choosing a method. We group these attributes into three categories that span the process of computing and interpreting saliency: methodology, or how the saliency is calculated; sensitivity, or the relationship between the saliency and the underlying model and data; and, perceptibility, or how an end user ultimately interprets the result. By collating this information, saliency cards allow users to more holistically assess and compare the implications of different methods. Through nine semi-structured interviews with users from various backgrounds, including researchers, radiologists, and computational biologists, we find that saliency cards provide a detailed vocabulary for discussing individual methods and allow for a more systematic selection of task-appropriate methods. Moreover, with saliency cards, we are able to analyze the research landscape in a more structured fashion to identify opportunities for new methods and evaluation metrics for unmet user needs.

We find that, with the rapid pace of development, users struggle to stay informed of the strengths and limitations of new methods and, thus, choose methods for unprincipled reasons (e.g., popularity). Moreover, despite a corresponding rise in evaluation metrics, existing approaches assume universal desiderata for saliency methods (e.g., faithfulness) that do not account for diverse user needs. In response, we introduce saliency cards: structured documentation of how saliency methods operate and their performance across a battery of evaluative metrics. Through a review of 25 saliency method papers and 33 method evaluations, we identify 10 attributes that users should account for when choosing a method. We group these attributes into three categories that span the process of computing and interpreting saliency: methodology, or how the saliency is calculated; sensitivity, or the relationship between the saliency and the underlying model and data; and, perceptibility, or how an end user ultimately interprets the result. By collating this information, saliency cards allow users to more holistically assess and compare the implications of different methods. Through nine semi-structured interviews with users from various backgrounds, including researchers, radiologists, and computational biologists, we find that saliency cards provide a detailed vocabulary for discussing individual methods and allow for a more systematic selection of task-appropriate methods. Moreover, with saliency cards, we are able to analyze the research landscape in a more structured fashion to identify opportunities for new methods and evaluation metrics for unmet user needs.
abstract_zh: 显着性方法是一类常见的机器学习可解释性技术，用于计算每个输入特征对模型输出的重要性。我们发现，随着发展速度的快速发展，用户很难了解新方法的优点和局限性，因此会出于无原则的原因（例如流行）选择方法。此外，尽管评估指标相应增加，但现有方法假设了显着性方法（例如忠实度）的普遍需求，而没有考虑到不同的用户需求。作为回应，我们引入了显着性卡：关于显着性方法如何运作及其在一系列评估指标中的表现的结构化文档。通过回顾 25 篇显着性方法论文和 33 种方法评估，我们确定了用户在选择方法时应考虑的 10 个属性。我们将这些属性分为三类，涵盖计算和解释显着性的过程：方法论，或如何计算显着性；敏感性，或显着性与基础模型和数据之间的关系；以及可感知性，或者最终用户如何最终解释结果。通过整理这些信息，显着性卡使用户能够更全面地评估和比较不同方法的影响。通过对来自不同背景的用户（包括研究人员、放射科医生和计算生物学家）进行九次半结构化访谈，我们发现显着性卡提供了用于讨论个体方法的详细词汇，并允许更系统地选择适合任务的方法。此外，通过显着卡，我们能够以更加结构化的方式分析研究领域，以确定新方法的机会和未满足的用户需求的评估指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Saliency Cards的框架，用于系统化地表征和比较机器学习中的显著性方法。
AI.motivation: 随着显著性方法的快速迭代，用户难以全面了解其优缺点，常因流行度而非原则选择方法。现有评估指标未充分考虑多样化用户需求，导致方法选择缺乏系统性。
AI.method: 通过分析25篇显著性方法论文和33项评估，提取10个关键属性并归类为方法论、敏感性和可感知性三类，构建结构化文档（Saliency Cards）。结合九位跨领域用户的半结构化访谈验证框架有效性。
AI.result: 识别出影响方法选择的10个核心属性，验证Saliency Cards能提升用户讨论深度与方法选择系统性，并揭示研究领域中的方法与评估指标缺口。
AI.conclusion: Saliency Cards为用户提供了系统评估和比较显著性方法的工具，同时为未来方法开发和评估指标设计指明了方向，弥合了技术发展与用户需求间的鸿沟。

authors_text: Mario Alfonso Prado-Romero,Giovanni Stilo
title: GRETEL: A unified framework for Graph Counterfactual Explanation Evaluation
title_zh: GRETEL：图反事实解释评估的统一框架
abstract: Machine Learning (ML) systems are a building part of the modern tools which impact our daily life in several application domains. Due to their black-box nature, those systems are hardly adopted in application domains (e.g. health, finance) where understanding the decision process is of paramount importance. Explanation methods were developed to explain how the ML model has taken a specific decision for a given case/instance. Graph Counterfactual Explanations (GCE) is one of the explanation techniques adopted in the Graph Learning domain. The existing works of Graph Counterfactual Explanations diverge mostly in the problem definition, application domain, test data, and evaluation metrics, and most existing works do not compare exhaustively against other counterfactual explanation techniques present in the literature. We present GRETEL, a unified framework to develop and test GCE methods in several settings. GRETEL is a highly extensible evaluation framework which promotes the Open Science and the evaluations reproducibility by providing a set of well-defined mechanisms to integrate and manage easily: both real and synthetic datasets, ML models, state-of-the-art explanation techniques, and evaluation measures. To present GRETEL, we show the experiments conducted to integrate and test several synthetic and real datasets with several existing explanation techniques and base ML models.
summary: Machine Learning (ML) systems are a building part of the modern tools which impact our daily life in several application domains. Due to their black-box nature, those systems are hardly adopted in application domains (e.g. health, finance) where understanding the decision process is of paramount importance. Explanation methods were developed to explain how the ML model has taken a specific decision for a given case/instance. Graph Counterfactual Explanations (GCE) is one of the explanation techniques adopted in the Graph Learning domain. The existing works of Graph Counterfactual Explanations diverge mostly in the problem definition, application domain, test data, and evaluation metrics, and most existing works do not compare exhaustively against other counterfactual explanation techniques present in the literature. We present GRETEL, a unified framework to develop and test GCE methods in several settings. GRETEL is a highly extensible evaluation framework which promotes the Open Science and the evaluations reproducibility by providing a set of well-defined mechanisms to integrate and manage easily: both real and synthetic datasets, ML models, state-of-the-art explanation techniques, and evaluation measures. To present GRETEL, we show the experiments conducted to integrate and test several synthetic and real datasets with several existing explanation techniques and base ML models.
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 系统是现代工具的组成部分，在多个应用领域影响着我们的日常生活。由于其黑盒性质，这些系统很难在理解决策过程至关重要的应用领域（例如健康、金融）中采用。开发了解释方法来解释机器学习模型如何针对给定案例/实例做出特定决策。图反事实解释（GCE）是图学习领域采用的解释技术之一。图反事实解释的现有工作主要在问题定义、应用领域、测试数据和评估指标方面存在分歧，并且大多数现有工作没有与文献中存在的其他反事实解释技术进行详尽的比较。我们提出了 GRETEL，一个在多种环境下开发和测试 GCE 方法的统一框架。 GRETEL 是一个高度可扩展的评估框架，通过提供一组明确的机制来轻松集成和管理：真实和合成数据集、ML 模型、最先进的解释技术和评估措施，从而促进开放科学和评估的可重复性。为了展示 GRETEL，我们展示了通过几种现有的解释技术和基本 ML 模型来集成和测试几个合成数据集和真实数据集而进行的实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GRETEL框架，用于统一评估图反事实解释方法，促进开放科学和可重复性研究。
AI.motivation: 现有图反事实解释方法在问题定义、数据集、评估指标等方面缺乏统一标准，导致方法间比较困难且结果不可复现。
AI.method: 构建高度可扩展的GRETEL框架，集成真实/合成数据集、机器学习模型、前沿解释技术及评估指标，支持多场景测试与对比。
AI.result: 通过实验验证GRETEL可有效整合多种数据集与解释方法，展示其在不同设置下的适用性与评估能力。
AI.conclusion: GRETEL为图反事实解释研究提供了标准化评估工具，推动该领域方法的系统性比较与优化。

authors_text: Na Huang,Yu-Hong Dai,Dominique Orban,Michael A Saunders
title: A semi-conjugate gradient method for solving unsymmetric positive definite linear systems
title_zh: 求解非对称正定线性系统的半共轭梯度法
abstract: The conjugate gradient (CG) method is a classic Krylov subspace method for solving symmetric positive definite linear systems. We introduce an analogous semi-conjugate gradient (SCG) method for unsymmetric positive definite linear systems. Unlike CG, SCG requires the solution of a lower triangular linear system to produce each semi-conjugate direction. We prove that SCG is theoretically equivalent to the full orthogonalization method (FOM), which is based on the Arnoldi process and converges in a finite number of steps. Because SCG's triangular system increases in size each iteration, we study a sliding window implementation (SWI) to improve efficiency, and show that the directions produced are still locally semi-conjugate. A counterexample illustrates that SWI is different from the direct incomplete orthogonalization method (DIOM), which is FOM with a sliding window. Numerical experiments from the convection-diffusion equation and other applications show that SCG is robust and that the sliding window implementation SWI allows SCG to solve large systems efficiently.
summary: The conjugate gradient (CG) method is a classic Krylov subspace method for solving symmetric positive definite linear systems. We introduce an analogous semi-conjugate gradient (SCG) method for unsymmetric positive definite linear systems. Unlike CG, SCG requires the solution of a lower triangular linear system to produce each semi-conjugate direction. We prove that SCG is theoretically equivalent to the full orthogonalization method (FOM), which is based on the Arnoldi process and converges in a finite number of steps. Because SCG's triangular system increases in size each iteration, we study a sliding window implementation (SWI) to improve efficiency, and show that the directions produced are still locally semi-conjugate. A counterexample illustrates that SWI is different from the direct incomplete orthogonalization method (DIOM), which is FOM with a sliding window. Numerical experiments from the convection-diffusion equation and other applications show that SCG is robust and that the sliding window implementation SWI allows SCG to solve large systems efficiently.
abstract_zh: 共轭梯度（CG）方法是求解对称正定线性系统的经典 Krylov 子空间方法。我们引入了一种用于非对称正定线性系统的类似半共轭梯度（SCG）方法。与 CG 不同，SCG 需要求解下三角线性系统来产生每个半共轭方向。我们证明SCG在理论上等价于完全正交化方法（FOM），它基于Arnoldi过程并在有限步数内收敛。由于 SCG 的三角系统每次迭代的尺寸都会增加，因此我们研究了滑动窗口实现 (SWI) 以提高效率，并表明产生的方向仍然是局部半共轭的。一个反例说明SWI与直接不完全正交化方法（DIOM）不同，DIOM是带有滑动窗口的FOM。对流扩散方程和其他应用的数值实验表明，SCG 具有鲁棒性，并且滑动窗口实现 SWI 允许 SCG 有效地求解大型系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半共轭梯度法（SCG）用于求解非对称正定线性系统，并引入滑动窗口实现（SWI）以提高计算效率。
AI.motivation: 传统共轭梯度法（CG）仅适用于对称正定系统，而实际问题中存在大量非对称正定系统，需扩展求解方法；同时需优化现有方法的计算效率以适应大规模问题。
AI.method: 提出SCG方法，通过求解下三角线性系统生成半共轭方向，并证明其与FOM方法理论等价；设计滑动窗口实现（SWI）减少计算量，同时保持方向的局部半共轭性。
AI.result: 数值实验表明SCG方法在求解对流-扩散方程等实际问题中表现稳健，SWI实现显著提升大规模系统的求解效率。
AI.conclusion: SCG方法为非对称正定系统提供了有效求解方案，SWI实现平衡了计算效率与收敛性，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Yujie Lu,Weixi Feng,Wanrong Zhu,Wenda Xu,Xin Eric Wang,Miguel Eckstein,William Yang Wang
title: Neuro-Symbolic Procedural Planning with Commonsense Prompting
title_zh: 具有常识提示的神经符号程序规划
abstract: Procedural planning aims to implement complex high-level goals by decomposition into sequential simpler low-level steps. Although procedural planning is a basic skill set for humans in daily life, it remains a challenge for large language models (LLMs) that lack a deep understanding of the cause-effect relations in procedures. Previous methods require manual exemplars to acquire procedural planning knowledge from LLMs in the zero-shot setting. However, such elicited pre-trained knowledge in LLMs induces spurious correlations between goals and steps, which impair the model generalization to unseen tasks. In contrast, this paper proposes a neuro-symbolic procedural PLANner (PLAN) that elicits procedural planning knowledge from the LLMs with commonsense-infused prompting. To mitigate spurious goal-step correlations, we use symbolic program executors on the latent procedural representations to formalize prompts from commonsense knowledge bases as a causal intervention toward the Structural Causal Model. Both automatic and human evaluations on WikiHow and RobotHow show the superiority of PLAN on procedural planning without further training or manual exemplars.
summary: Procedural planning aims to implement complex high-level goals by decomposition into sequential simpler low-level steps. Although procedural planning is a basic skill set for humans in daily life, it remains a challenge for large language models (LLMs) that lack a deep understanding of the cause-effect relations in procedures. Previous methods require manual exemplars to acquire procedural planning knowledge from LLMs in the zero-shot setting. However, such elicited pre-trained knowledge in LLMs induces spurious correlations between goals and steps, which impair the model generalization to unseen tasks. In contrast, this paper proposes a neuro-symbolic procedural PLANner (PLAN) that elicits procedural planning knowledge from the LLMs with commonsense-infused prompting. To mitigate spurious goal-step correlations, we use symbolic program executors on the latent procedural representations to formalize prompts from commonsense knowledge bases as a causal intervention toward the Structural Causal Model. Both automatic and human evaluations on WikiHow and RobotHow show the superiority of PLAN on procedural planning without further training or manual exemplars.
abstract_zh: 程序规划旨在通过分解为连续的更简单的低级步骤来实现复杂的高级目标。尽管程序规划是人类日常生活中的一项基本技能，但对于缺乏对程序中因果关系的深入理解的大型语言模型（LLM）来说，它仍然是一个挑战。以前的方法需要手动范例才能在零样本设置中从法学硕士那里获取程序规划知识。然而，这种在法学硕士中引出的预先训练的知识会导致目标和步骤之间的虚假相关性，从而损害模型对未见过的任务的泛化。相比之下，本文提出了一种神经符号程序规划器（PLAN），通过注入常识的提示从法学硕士中引出程序规划知识。为了减轻虚假的目标步骤相关性，我们在潜在的程序表示上使用符号程序执行器，将常识知识库的提示形式化，作为对结构因果模型的因果干预。 WikiHow 和 RobotHow 上的自动评估和人工评估都显示了 PLAN 在程序规划方面的优越性，无需进一步培训或手动示例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需手动示例的神经符号程序规划方法PLAN，通过常识提示和因果干预提升大语言模型的程序规划能力。
AI.motivation: 现有程序规划方法依赖手动示例获取知识，导致模型产生虚假目标-步骤关联，影响泛化能力。需探索无需人工干预的因果推理方法。
AI.method: 设计神经符号规划器PLAN，结合常识知识库提示与符号程序执行器，通过结构因果模型对潜在程序表示进行因果干预。
AI.result: 在WikiHow和RobotHow数据集上，PLAN在自动评估和人工评估中均优于基线方法，且无需额外训练或手动示例。
AI.conclusion: PLAN通过整合常识推理与符号执行有效解决了程序规划中的因果关系建模问题，为零样本程序规划提供了新思路。

search_text: Neuro-Symbolic Procedural Planning with Commonsense Prompting 具有常识提示的神经符号程序规划 Procedural planning aims to implement complex high-level goals by decomposition into sequential simpler low-level steps. Although procedural planning is a basic skill set for humans in daily life, it remains a challenge for large language models (LLMs) that lack a deep understanding of the cause-effect relations in procedures. Previous methods require manual exemplars to acquire procedural planning knowledge from LLMs in the zero-shot setting. However, such elicited pre-trained knowledge in LLMs induces spurious correlations between goals and steps, which impair the model generalization to unseen tasks. In contrast, this paper proposes a neuro-symbolic procedural PLANner (PLAN) that elicits procedural planning knowledge from the LLMs with commonsense-infused prompting. To mitigate spurious goal-step correlations, we use symbolic program executors on the latent procedural representations to formalize prompts from commonsense knowledge bases as a causal intervention toward the Structural Causal Model. Both automatic and human evaluations on WikiHow and RobotHow show the superiority of PLAN on procedural planning without further training or manual exemplars. 程序规划旨在通过分解为连续的更简单的低级步骤来实现复杂的高级目标。尽管程序规划是人类日常生活中的一项基本技能，但对于缺乏对程序中因果关系的深入理解的大型语言模型（LLM）来说，它仍然是一个挑战。以前的方法需要手动范例才能在零样本设置中从法学硕士那里获取程序规划知识。然而，这种在法学硕士中引出的预先训练的知识会导致目标和步骤之间的虚假相关性，从而损害模型对未见过的任务的泛化。相比之下，本文提出了一种神经符号程序规划器（PLAN），通过注入常识的提示从法学硕士中引出程序规划知识。为了减轻虚假的目标步骤相关性，我们在潜在的程序表示上使用符号程序执行器，将常识知识库的提示形式化，作为对结构因果模型的因果干预。 WikiHow 和 RobotHow 上的自动评估和人工评估都显示了 PLAN 在程序规划方面的优越性，无需进一步培训或手动示例。 本文提出了一种无需手动示例的神经符号程序规划方法PLAN，通过常识提示和因果干预提升大语言模型的程序规划能力。 Yujie Lu,Weixi Feng,Wanrong Zhu,Wenda Xu,Xin Eric Wang,Miguel Eckstein,William Yang Wang cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Amy K. Heger,Liz B. Marquis,Mihaela Vorvoreanu,Hanna Wallach,Jennifer Wortman Vaughan
title: Understanding Machine Learning Practitioners' Data Documentation Perceptions, Needs, Challenges, and Desiderata
title_zh: 了解机器学习从业者的数据文档感知、需求、挑战和愿望
comment: Camera-ready preprint of paper accepted to CSCW 2022
comments: Camera-ready preprint of paper accepted to CSCW 2022
abstract: Data is central to the development and evaluation of machine learning (ML) models. However, the use of problematic or inappropriate datasets can result in harms when the resulting models are deployed. To encourage responsible AI practice through more deliberate reflection on datasets and transparency around the processes by which they are created, researchers and practitioners have begun to advocate for increased data documentation and have proposed several data documentation frameworks. However, there is little research on whether these data documentation frameworks meet the needs of ML practitioners, who both create and consume datasets. To address this gap, we set out to understand ML practitioners' data documentation perceptions, needs, challenges, and desiderata, with the goal of deriving design requirements that can inform future data documentation frameworks. We conducted a series of semi-structured interviews with 14 ML practitioners at a single large, international technology company. We had them answer a list of questions taken from datasheets for datasets (Gebru, 2021). Our findings show that current approaches to data documentation are largely ad hoc and myopic in nature. Participants expressed needs for data documentation frameworks to be adaptable to their contexts, integrated into their existing tools and workflows, and automated wherever possible. Despite the fact that data documentation frameworks are often motivated from the perspective of responsible AI, participants did not make the connection between the questions that they were asked to answer and their responsible AI implications. In addition, participants often had difficulties prioritizing the needs of dataset consumers and providing information that someone unfamiliar with their datasets might need to know. Based on these findings, we derive seven design requirements for future data documentation frameworks.

However, the use of problematic or inappropriate datasets can result in harms when the resulting models are deployed. To encourage responsible AI practice through more deliberate reflection on datasets and transparency around the processes by which they are created, researchers and practitioners have begun to advocate for increased data documentation and have proposed several data documentation frameworks. However, there is little research on whether these data documentation frameworks meet the needs of ML practitioners, who both create and consume datasets. To address this gap, we set out to understand ML practitioners' data documentation perceptions, needs, challenges, and desiderata, with the goal of deriving design requirements that can inform future data documentation frameworks. We conducted a series of semi-structured interviews with 14 ML practitioners at a single large, international technology company. We had them answer a list of questions taken from datasheets for datasets (Gebru, 2021). Our findings show that current approaches to data documentation are largely ad hoc and myopic in nature. Participants expressed needs for data documentation frameworks to be adaptable to their contexts, integrated into their existing tools and workflows, and automated wherever possible. Despite the fact that data documentation frameworks are often motivated from the perspective of responsible AI, participants did not make the connection between the questions that they were asked to answer and their responsible AI implications. In addition, participants often had difficulties prioritizing the needs of dataset consumers and providing information that someone unfamiliar with their datasets might need to know. Based on these findings, we derive seven design requirements for future data documentation frameworks.
abstract_zh: 数据是机器学习 (ML) 模型开发和评估的核心。然而，在部署生成的模型时，使用有问题或不适当的数据集可能会造成损害。为了通过更仔细地反思数据集和数据创建过程的透明度来鼓励负责任的人工智能实践，研究人员和从业者已经开始倡导增加数据文档，并提出了几个数据文档框架。然而，关于这些数据文档框架是否满足创建和使用数据集的机器学习从业者的需求，很少有研究。为了弥补这一差距，我们着手了解机器学习从业者的数据文档感知、需求、挑战和愿望，目标是导出可以为未来数据文档框架提供信息的设计要求。我们对一家大型国际科技公司的 14 名机器学习从业者进行了一系列半结构化访谈。我们让他们回答从数据集数据表中提取的一系列问题（Gebru，2021）。我们的研究结果表明，当前的数据记录方法本质上很大程度上是临时的和短视的。参与者表示需要数据文档框架适应他们的背景，集成到他们现有的工具和工作流程中，并尽可能实现自动化。尽管数据文档框架通常是从负责任的人工智能的角度出发的，但参与者并没有将他们被要求回答的问题与其负责任的人工智能的影响联系起来。此外，参与者通常难以优先考虑数据集使用者的需求，也难以提供不熟悉其数据集的人可能需要了解的信息。基于这些发现，我们得出了未来数据文档框架的七个设计要求。

AI.tldr: 本文通过访谈机器学习从业者，研究其在数据文档方面的认知、需求、挑战及期望，以指导未来数据文档框架的设计。
AI.motivation: 现有数据文档框架未充分满足从业者需求，缺乏对其实际应用场景和挑战的研究，需通过调研明确改进方向。
AI.method: 对某国际科技公司14名机器学习从业者进行半结构化访谈，基于数据集资料表（Datasheets for Datasets）的问题清单收集反馈。
AI.result: 当前数据文档实践多为临时性且局限；从业者需框架具备适应性、工具集成性及自动化能力，但未意识到文档与负责任AI的关联，且难以优先满足数据使用者需求。
AI.conclusion: 提出未来数据文档框架的七项设计要求，强调需结合实际工作流程并提升从业者对负责任AI的关联认知。

authors_text: Hongwei Wang,Zixuan Zhang,Sha Li,Jiawei Han,Yizhou Sun,Hanghang Tong,Joseph P. Olive,Heng Ji
title: Schema-Guided Event Graph Completion
title_zh: 模式引导的事件图完成
abstract: We tackle a new task, event graph completion, which aims to predict missing event nodes for event graphs. Existing link prediction or graph completion methods have difficulty dealing with event graphs because they are usually designed for a single large graph such as a social network or a knowledge graph, rather than multiple small dynamic event graphs. Moreover, they can only predict missing edges rather than missing nodes. In this work, we propose to utilize event schema, a template that describes the stereotypical structure of event graphs, to address the above issues. Our schema-guided event graph completion approach first maps an instance event graph to a subgraph of the schema graph by a heuristic subgraph matching algorithm. Then it predicts whether a candidate event node in the schema graph should be added to the instantiated schema subgraph by characterizing two types of local topology of the schema graph: neighbors of the candidate node and the subgraph, and paths that connect the candidate node and the subgraph. These two modules are later combined together for the final prediction. We also propose a self-supervised strategy to construct training samples, as well as an inference algorithm that is specifically designed to complete event graphs. Extensive experimental results on four datasets demonstrate that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance, with 4.3% to 19.4% absolute F1 gains over the best baseline method on the four datasets.
summary: We tackle a new task, event graph completion, which aims to predict missing event nodes for event graphs. Existing link prediction or graph completion methods have difficulty dealing with event graphs because they are usually designed for a single large graph such as a social network or a knowledge graph, rather than multiple small dynamic event graphs. Moreover, they can only predict missing edges rather than missing nodes. In this work, we propose to utilize event schema, a template that describes the stereotypical structure of event graphs, to address the above issues. Our schema-guided event graph completion approach first maps an instance event graph to a subgraph of the schema graph by a heuristic subgraph matching algorithm. Then it predicts whether a candidate event node in the schema graph should be added to the instantiated schema subgraph by characterizing two types of local topology of the schema graph: neighbors of the candidate node and the subgraph, and paths that connect the candidate node and the subgraph. These two modules are later combined together for the final prediction. We also propose a self-supervised strategy to construct training samples, as well as an inference algorithm that is specifically designed to complete event graphs. Extensive experimental results on four datasets demonstrate that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance, with 4.3% to 19.4% absolute F1 gains over the best baseline method on the four datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们处理一项新任务，即事件图补全，旨在预测事件图缺失的事件节点。现有的链接预测或图补全方法难以处理事件图，因为它们通常是针对单个大型图（例如社交网络或知识图）而不是多个小型动态事件图而设计的。此外，它们只能预测缺失的边，而不能预测缺失的节点。在这项工作中，我们建议利用事件模式（一种描述事件图的刻板结构的模板）来解决上述问题。我们的模式引导事件图完成方法首先通过启发式子图匹配算法将实例事件图映射到模式图的子图。然后，它通过表征模式图的两种类型的局部拓扑：候选节点和子图的邻居，以及连接候选节点和子图的路径，来预测是否应该将模式图中的候选事件节点添加到实例化的模式子图中。随后将这两个模块组合在一起进行最终预测。我们还提出了一种构建训练样本的自监督策略，以及一种专门为完成事件图而设计的推理算法。四个数据集上的大量实验结果表明，我们提出的方法实现了最先进的性能，与四个数据集上的最佳基线方法相比，绝对 F1 增益提高了 4.3% 至 19.4%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件模式引导的事件图补全方法，用于预测事件图中缺失的事件节点。
AI.motivation: 现有图补全方法难以处理多小动态事件图，且仅能预测缺失边而非节点，因此需要利用事件模式结构解决该问题。
AI.method: 通过启发式子图匹配将实例图映射到模式图，结合候选节点的邻居关系与路径信息进行预测，并设计自监督训练策略与专用推理算法。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上实现4.3%-19.4%的绝对F1值提升，达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 事件模式引导方法能有效解决多小动态事件图的节点补全问题，实验验证了其优越性。

motivation: 现有图补全方法难以处理多小动态事件图，且仅能预测缺失边而非节点，因此需要利用事件模式结构解决该问题。
method: 通过启发式子图匹配将实例图映射到模式图，结合候选节点的邻居关系与路径信息进行预测，并设计自监督训练策略与专用推理算法。
result: 在四个数据集上实现4.3%-19.4%的绝对F1值提升，达到当时最优性能。
conclusion: 事件模式引导方法能有效解决多小动态事件图的节点补全问题，实验验证了其优越性。
search_text: Schema-Guided Event Graph Completion 模式引导的事件图完成 We tackle a new task, event graph completion, which aims to predict missing event nodes for event graphs. Existing link prediction or graph completion methods have difficulty dealing with event graphs because they are usually designed for a single large graph such as a social network or a knowledge graph, rather than multiple small dynamic event graphs. Moreover, they can only predict missing edges rather than missing nodes. In this work, we propose to utilize event schema, a template that describes the stereotypical structure of event graphs, to address the above issues. Our schema-guided event graph completion approach first maps an instance event graph to a subgraph of the schema graph by a heuristic subgraph matching algorithm. Then it predicts whether a candidate event node in the schema graph should be added to the instantiated schema subgraph by characterizing two types of local topology of the schema graph: neighbors of the candidate node and the subgraph, and paths that connect the candidate node and the subgraph. These two modules are later combined together for the final prediction. We also propose a self-supervised strategy to construct training samples, as well as an inference algorithm that is specifically designed to complete event graphs. Extensive experimental results on four datasets demonstrate that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance, with 4.3% to 19.4% absolute F1 gains over the best baseline method on the four datasets. 我们处理一项新任务，即事件图补全，旨在预测事件图缺失的事件节点。现有的链接预测或图补全方法难以处理事件图，因为它们通常是针对单个大型图（例如社交网络或知识图）而不是多个小型动态事件图而设计的。此外，它们只能预测缺失的边，而不能预测缺失的节点。在这项工作中，我们建议利用事件模式（一种描述事件图的刻板结构的模板）来解决上述问题。我们的模式引导事件图完成方法首先通过启发式子图匹配算法将实例事件图映射到模式图的子图。然后，它通过表征模式图的两种类型的局部拓扑：候选节点和子图的邻居，以及连接候选节点和子图的路径，来预测是否应该将模式图中的候选事件节点添加到实例化的模式子图中。随后将这两个模块组合在一起进行最终预测。我们还提出了一种构建训练样本的自监督策略，以及一种专门为完成事件图而设计的推理算法。四个数据集上的大量实验结果表明，我们提出的方法实现了最先进的性能，与四个数据集上的最佳基线方法相比，绝对 F1 增益提高了 4.3% 至 19.4%。 本文提出了一种基于事件模式引导的事件图补全方法，用于预测事件图中缺失的事件节点。 Hongwei Wang,Zixuan Zhang,Sha Li,Jiawei Han,Yizhou Sun,Hanghang Tong,Joseph P. Olive,Heng Ji cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Zhiwei Deng,Olga Russakovsky
title: Remember the Past: Distilling Datasets into Addressable Memories for Neural Networks
title_zh: 记住过去：将数据集提炼成神经网络的可寻址存储器
abstract: We propose an algorithm that compresses the critical information of a large dataset into compact addressable memories. These memories can then be recalled to quickly re-train a neural network and recover the performance (instead of storing and re-training on the full original dataset). Building upon the dataset distillation framework, we make a key observation that a shared common representation allows for more efficient and effective distillation. Concretely, we learn a set of bases (aka ``memories'') which are shared between classes and combined through learned flexible addressing functions to generate a diverse set of training examples. This leads to several benefits: 1) the size of compressed data does not necessarily grow linearly with the number of classes; 2) an overall higher compression rate with more effective distillation is achieved; and 3) more generalized queries are allowed beyond recalling the original classes. We demonstrate state-of-the-art results on the dataset distillation task across six benchmarks, including up to 16.5% and 9.7% in retained accuracy improvement when distilling CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 respectively. We then leverage our framework to perform continual learning, achieving state-of-the-art results on four benchmarks, with 23.2% accuracy improvement on MANY. The code is released on our project webpage https://github.com/princetonvisualai/RememberThePast-DatasetDistillation.
summary: We propose an algorithm that compresses the critical information of a large dataset into compact addressable memories. These memories can then be recalled to quickly re-train a neural network and recover the performance (instead of storing and re-training on the full original dataset). Building upon the dataset distillation framework, we make a key observation that a shared common representation allows for more efficient and effective distillation. Concretely, we learn a set of bases (aka ``memories'') which are shared between classes and combined through learned flexible addressing functions to generate a diverse set of training examples. This leads to several benefits: 1) the size of compressed data does not necessarily grow linearly with the number of classes; 2) an overall higher compression rate with more effective distillation is achieved; and 3) more generalized queries are allowed beyond recalling the original classes. We demonstrate state-of-the-art results on the dataset distillation task across six benchmarks, including up to 16.5% and 9.7% in retained accuracy improvement when distilling CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 respectively. We then leverage our framework to perform continual learning, achieving state-of-the-art results on four benchmarks, with 23.2% accuracy improvement on MANY. The code is released on our project webpage https://github.com/princetonvisualai/RememberThePast-DatasetDistillation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种算法，将大型数据集的关键信息压缩到紧凑的可寻址存储器中。然后可以调用这些记忆来快速重新训练神经网络并恢复性能（而不是在完整的原始数据集上存储和重新训练）。在数据集蒸馏框架的基础上，我们进行了一个关键观察，即共享的通用表示可以实现更高效和有效的蒸馏。具体来说，我们学习一组在类之间共享的基础（又名“记忆”），并通过学习的灵活寻址函数组合起来，生成一组不同的训练示例。这带来了几个好处：1）压缩数据的大小不一定随着类的数量线性增长； 2) 实现整体更高的压缩率和更有效的蒸馏； 3）除了回忆原始类之外，还允许进行更广义的查询。我们在六个基准测试中展示了数据集蒸馏任务的最先进结果，其中在蒸馏 CIFAR10 和 CIFAR100 时，保留精度分别提高了 16.5% 和 9.7%。然后，我们利用我们的框架进行持续学习，在四个基准上取得了最先进的结果，在许多基准上准确率提高了 23.2%。该代码发布在我们的项目网页 https://github.com/princetonvisualai/RememberThePast-DatasetDistillation 上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种算法，将大型数据集的关键信息压缩为紧凑的可寻址记忆，用于快速重新训练神经网络并恢复性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需存储并重新训练完整数据集，效率低下。本文旨在通过共享表示提升数据集蒸馏效率，减少存储需求并支持更通用的查询。
AI.method: 学习跨类别的共享记忆基（memories），通过可学习的灵活寻址函数组合生成多样化训练样本，实现非线性增长的数据压缩和更高效的蒸馏。
AI.result: 在六个基准测试中取得最先进结果，CIFAR10和CIFAR100的保留准确率分别提升16.5%和9.7%；在四个持续学习基准中，MANY任务准确率提升23.2%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过高效记忆压缩和灵活查询机制，显著提升了数据集蒸馏和持续学习性能，为大规模数据处理提供了新思路。

authors_text: Hunter Lang,Aravindan Vijayaraghavan,David Sontag
title: Training Subset Selection for Weak Supervision
title_zh: 弱监督的训练子集选择
abstract: Existing weak supervision approaches use all the data covered by weak signals to train a classifier. We show both theoretically and empirically that this is not always optimal. Intuitively, there is a tradeoff between the amount of weakly-labeled data and the precision of the weak labels. We explore this tradeoff by combining pretrained data representations with the cut statistic (Muhlenbach et al., 2004) to select (hopefully) high-quality subsets of the weakly-labeled training data. Subset selection applies to any label model and classifier and is very simple to plug in to existing weak supervision pipelines, requiring just a few lines of code. We show our subset selection method improves the performance of weak supervision for a wide range of label models, classifiers, and datasets. Using less weakly-labeled data improves the accuracy of weak supervision pipelines by up to 19% (absolute) on benchmark tasks.
summary: Existing weak supervision approaches use all the data covered by weak signals to train a classifier. We show both theoretically and empirically that this is not always optimal. Intuitively, there is a tradeoff between the amount of weakly-labeled data and the precision of the weak labels. We explore this tradeoff by combining pretrained data representations with the cut statistic (Muhlenbach et al., 2004) to select (hopefully) high-quality subsets of the weakly-labeled training data. Subset selection applies to any label model and classifier and is very simple to plug in to existing weak supervision pipelines, requiring just a few lines of code. We show our subset selection method improves the performance of weak supervision for a wide range of label models, classifiers, and datasets. Using less weakly-labeled data improves the accuracy of weak supervision pipelines by up to 19% (absolute) on benchmark tasks.
abstract_zh: 现有的弱监督方法使用弱信号覆盖的所有数据来训练分类器。我们从理论上和经验上表明这并不总是最佳的。直观上，弱标签数据的数量和弱标签的精度之间存在权衡。我们通过将预训练数据表示与切割统计量相结合来探索这种权衡（Muhlenbach 等人，2004），以选择（希望）弱标记训练数据的高质量子集。子集选择适用于任何标签模型和分类器，并且非常容易插入现有的弱监督管道，只需要几行代码。我们展示了我们的子集选择方法提高了各种标签模型、分类器和数据集的弱监督性能。在基准任务中，使用较少的弱标签数据可以将弱监督管道的准确性提高高达 19%（绝对值）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过选择高质量弱标注数据子集来提升弱监督学习性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督方法使用全部弱标注数据训练分类器，但数据量与弱标签精度存在权衡，直接使用全部数据可能引入噪声影响性能。
AI.method: 结合预训练数据表示与cut统计量（Cut Statistic）筛选弱标注数据子集，该方法兼容任意标签模型和分类器，易于集成到现有弱监督流程中。
AI.result: 在多种标签模型、分类器和数据集上验证，该方法使弱监督流程在基准任务中的准确率提升最高达19%（绝对值）。
AI.conclusion: 通过减少低质量弱标注数据的干扰，子集选择方法能有效提升弱监督学习的准确性，为弱监督流程优化提供简单有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Charles Huang,Varun Vasudevan,Oscar Pastor-Serrano,Md Tauhidul Islam,Yusuke Nomura,Piotr Dubrowski,Jen-Yeu Wang,Joseph B. Schulz,Yong Yang,Lei Xing
title: Learning Image Representations for Content Based Image Retrieval of Radiotherapy Treatment Plans
title_zh: 学习用于放射治疗计划的基于内容的图像检索的图像表示
abstract: Objective: Knowledge based planning (KBP) typically involves training an end-to-end deep learning model to predict dose distributions. However, training end-to-end methods may be associated with practical limitations due to the limited size of medical datasets that are often used. To address these limitations, we propose a content based image retrieval (CBIR) method for retrieving dose distributions of previously planned patients based on anatomical similarity. Approach: Our proposed CBIR method trains a representation model that produces latent space embeddings of a patient's anatomical information. The latent space embeddings of new patients are then compared against those of previous patients in a database for image retrieval of dose distributions. All source code for this project is available on github. Main Results: The retrieval performance of various CBIR methods is evaluated on a dataset consisting of both publicly available plans and clinical plans from our institution. This study compares various encoding methods, ranging from simple autoencoders to more recent Siamese networks like SimSiam, and the best performance was observed for the multitask Siamese network. Significance: Applying CBIR to inform subsequent treatment planning potentially addresses many limitations associated with end-to-end KBP. Our current results demonstrate that excellent image retrieval performance can be obtained through slight changes to previously developed Siamese networks. We hope to integrate CBIR into automated planning workflow in future works, potentially through methods like the MetaPlanner framework.

The latent space embeddings of new patients are then compared against those of previous patients in a database for image retrieval of dose distributions. abstract_zh: 目标：基于知识的规划（KBP）通常涉及训练端到端深度学习模型来预测剂量分布。然而，由于经常使用的医学数据集的大小有限，训练端到端方法可能会受到实际限制。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种基于内容的图像检索（CBIR）方法，用于根据解剖相似性检索先前计划的患者的剂量分布。方法：我们提出的 CBIR 方法训练一个表示模型，该模型产生患者解剖信息的潜在空间嵌入。然后将新患者的潜在空间嵌入与数据库中先前患者的潜在空间嵌入进行比较，以进行剂量分布的图像检索。该项目的所有源代码均可在 github 上获取。主要结果：各种 CBIR 方法的检索性能在由公开可用的计划和我们机构的临床计划组成的数据集上进行评估。这项研究比较了各种编码方法，从简单的自动编码器到更新的 Siamese 网络（如 SimSiam），并观察到多任务 Siamese 网络的最佳性能。意义：应用 CBIR 为后续治疗计划提供信息可能会解决与端到端 KBP 相关的许多限制。我们目前的结果表明，通过对先前开发的暹罗网络进行轻微改变，可以获得出色的图像检索性能。我们希望在未来的工作中将 CBIR 集成到自动化规划工作流程中，可能通过 MetaPlanner 框架等方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于内容的图像检索（CBIR）方法，用于放射治疗计划的剂量分布预测，以解决端到端知识基于计划（KBP）方法在医疗数据集有限时的局限性。
AI.motivation: 端到端KBP方法因医疗数据集规模有限而存在实际训练限制，需通过CBIR方法利用现有患者数据提升剂量分布预测效率。
AI.method: 训练模型生成患者解剖信息的潜在空间嵌入，通过比较新患者与数据库中患者的嵌入实现剂量分布检索，采用自编码器及多任务Siamese网络等编码方法。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和临床数据上验证，多任务Siamese网络在CBIR方法中表现最佳，证明了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CBIR可有效克服端到端KBP的限制，未来计划将其整合至自动化治疗规划流程（如MetaPlanner框架）中。

authors_text: Hang Yuan,Shing Chan,Andrew P. Creagh,Catherine Tong,Aidan Acquah,David A. Clifton,Aiden Doherty
title: Self-supervised Learning for Human Activity Recognition Using 700,000 Person-days of Wearable Data
title_zh: 使用 700,000 人日的可穿戴数据进行人类活动识别的自我监督学习
abstract: Advances in deep learning for human activity recognition have been relatively limited due to the lack of large labelled datasets. In this study, we leverage self-supervised learning techniques on the UK-Biobank activity tracker dataset--the largest of its kind to date--containing more than 700,000 person-days of unlabelled wearable sensor data. Our resulting activity recognition model consistently outperformed strong baselines across seven benchmark datasets, with an F1 relative improvement of 2.5%-100% (median 18.4%), the largest improvements occurring in the smaller datasets. In contrast to previous studies, our results generalise across external datasets, devices, and environments. Our open-source model will help researchers and developers to build customisable and generalisable activity classifiers with high performance.
summary: Advances in deep learning for human activity recognition have been relatively limited due to the lack of large labelled datasets. In this study, we leverage self-supervised learning techniques on the UK-Biobank activity tracker dataset--the largest of its kind to date--containing more than 700,000 person-days of unlabelled wearable sensor data. Our resulting activity recognition model consistently outperformed strong baselines across seven benchmark datasets, with an F1 relative improvement of 2.5%-100% (median 18.4%), the largest improvements occurring in the smaller datasets. In contrast to previous studies, our results generalise across external datasets, devices, and environments. Our open-source model will help researchers and developers to build customisable and generalisable activity classifiers with high performance.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏大型标记数据集，人类活动识别的深度学习进展相对有限。在这项研究中，我们利用 UK-Biobank 活动跟踪器数据集（迄今为止同类数据中最大的）的自我监督学习技术，其中包含超过 700,000 个人日的未标记可穿戴传感器数据。我们生成的活动识别模型在七个基准数据集上始终优于强大的基线，F1 相对改进为 2.5%-100%（中位数 18.4%），最大的改进发生在较小的数据集中。与之前的研究相比，我们的结果概括了外部数据集、设备和环境。我们的开源模型将帮助研究人员和开发人员构建高性能的可定制和通用的活动分类器。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出利用自监督学习方法，结合70万个人日的可穿戴设备数据，提升人类活动识别模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法因缺乏大规模标注数据集，在活动识别领域进展受限，需探索无需标注数据的训练方式。
AI.method: 基于UK-Biobank的未标注可穿戴传感器数据，采用自监督学习技术训练活动识别模型。
AI.result: 模型在七个基准数据集上表现优于现有方法，F1分数提升2.5%-100%（中位数18.4%），且具备跨设备、跨环境的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 开源模型为研究者提供高性能、可定制的通用活动分类框架，推动该领域发展。

authors_text: Jonas Oppenlaender
title: The Creativity of Text-to-Image Generation
title_zh: 文本到图像生成的创造力
abstract: Text-guided synthesis of images has made a giant leap towards becoming a mainstream phenomenon. With text-to-image generation systems, anybody can create digital images and artworks. This provokes the question of whether text-to-image generation is creative. This paper expounds on the nature of human creativity involved in text-to-image art (so-called "AI art") with a specific focus on the practice of prompt engineering. The paper argues that the current product-centered view of creativity falls short in the context of text-to-image generation. A case exemplifying this shortcoming is provided and the importance of online communities for the creative ecosystem of text-to-image art is highlighted. The paper provides a high-level summary of this online ecosystem drawing on Rhodes' conceptual four P model of creativity. Challenges for evaluating the creativity of text-to-image generation and opportunities for research on text-to-image generation in the field of Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) are discussed.
summary: Text-guided synthesis of images has made a giant leap towards becoming a mainstream phenomenon. With text-to-image generation systems, anybody can create digital images and artworks. This provokes the question of whether text-to-image generation is creative. This paper expounds on the nature of human creativity involved in text-to-image art (so-called "AI art") with a specific focus on the practice of prompt engineering. The paper argues that the current product-centered view of creativity falls short in the context of text-to-image generation. A case exemplifying this shortcoming is provided and the importance of online communities for the creative ecosystem of text-to-image art is highlighted. The paper provides a high-level summary of this online ecosystem drawing on Rhodes' conceptual four P model of creativity. Challenges for evaluating the creativity of text-to-image generation and opportunities for research on text-to-image generation in the field of Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) are discussed.
abstract_zh: 文本引导的图像合成已经朝着成为主流现象迈出了巨大的一步。借助文本到图像生成系统，任何人都可以创建数字图像和艺术品。这就引发了一个问题：文本到图像的生成是否具有创造性。本文阐述了文本到图像艺术（所谓的“人工智能艺术”）中人类创造力的本质，特别关注即时工程的实践。该论文认为，当前以产品为中心的创造力观点在文本到图像生成的背景下存在不足。提供了一个案例来说明这一缺点，并强调了在线社区对于文本到图像艺术的创意生态系统的重要性。该论文借鉴罗兹的创造力概念 4P 模型，对该在线生态系统进行了高度概括。讨论了评估文本到图像生成的创造力的挑战以及人机交互（HCI）领域中文本到图像生成的研究机会。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨文本到图像生成技术（AI艺术）的创造性本质，重点分析提示工程实践及现有创造力评估框架的局限性，并探讨在线社区对创意生态系统的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着文本到图像生成技术的普及，其是否具备创造性成为核心问题。传统以产品为中心的创造力观难以解释该领域的人机协作特性，需重新审视创造力的定义与评估方式。
AI.method: 通过案例分析与Rhodes的四P模型（人、过程、产品、环境），结合在线社区的实践，探讨文本到图像生成中的创造力构成及评估挑战。
AI.result: 论证了传统创造力框架的不足，揭示在线社区对创意生态的关键作用，并提出人机交互领域需关注生成过程、用户参与及社会文化因素的跨学科研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 文本到图像生成的创造性需超越单纯的产品视角，应重视人类提示工程、协作社区及技术-社会互动的综合研究，为未来HCI领域提供新的研究机遇。

ai_content.tldr: 本文探讨文本到图像生成技术（AI艺术）的创造性本质，重点分析提示工程实践及现有创造力评估框架的局限性，并探讨在线社区对创意生态系统的影响。
ai_content.motivation: 随着文本到图像生成技术的普及，其是否具备创造性成为核心问题。传统以产品为中心的创造力观难以解释该领域的人机协作特性，需重新审视创造力的定义与评估方式。
ai_content.method: 通过案例分析与Rhodes的四P模型（人、过程、产品、环境），结合在线社区的实践，探讨文本到图像生成中的创造力构成及评估挑战。
ai_content.result: 论证了传统创造力框架的不足，揭示在线社区对创意生态的关键作用，并提出人机交互领域需关注生成过程、用户参与及社会文化因素的跨学科研究方向。
ai_content.conclusion: 文本到图像生成的创造性需超越单纯的产品视角，应重视人类提示工程、协作社区及技术-社会互动的综合研究，为未来HCI领域提供新的研究机遇。

ai_content_json.tldr: 本文探讨文本到图像生成技术（AI艺术）的创造性本质，重点分析提示工程实践及现有创造力评估框架的局限性，并探讨在线社区对创意生态系统的影响。
