search_text: The Creativity of Text-to-Image Generation 文本到图像生成的创造力 Text-guided synthesis of images has made a giant leap towards becoming a mainstream phenomenon. With text-to-image generation systems, anybody can create digital images and artworks. This provokes the question of whether text-to-image generation is creative. This paper expounds on the nature of human creativity involved in text-to-image art (so-called "AI art") with a specific focus on the practice of prompt engineering. The paper argues that the current product-centered view of creativity falls short in the context of text-to-image generation. A case exemplifying this shortcoming is provided and the importance of online communities for the creative ecosystem of text-to-image art is highlighted. The paper provides a high-level summary of this online ecosystem drawing on Rhodes' conceptual four P model of creativity. Challenges for evaluating the creativity of text-to-image generation and opportunities for research on text-to-image generation in the field of Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) are discussed. 文本引导的图像合成已经朝着成为主流现象迈出了巨大的一步。借助文本到图像生成系统，任何人都可以创建数字图像和艺术品。这就引发了一个问题：文本到图像的生成是否具有创造性。本文阐述了文本到图像艺术（所谓的“人工智能艺术”）中人类创造力的本质，特别关注即时工程的实践。该论文认为，当前以产品为中心的创造力观点在文本到图像生成的背景下存在不足。提供了一个案例来说明这一缺点，并强调了在线社区对于文本到图像艺术的创意生态系统的重要性。该论文借鉴罗兹的创造力概念 4P 模型，对该在线生态系统进行了高度概括。讨论了评估文本到图像生成的创造力的挑战以及人机交互（HCI）领域中文本到图像生成的研究机会。 本文探讨文本到图像生成技术（AI艺术）的创造性本质，重点分析提示工程实践及现有创造力评估框架的局限性，并探讨在线社区对创意生态系统的影响。 Jonas Oppenlaender cs.HC,cs.GR

authors_text: Seung Wook Kim,Karsten Kreis,Daiqing Li,Antonio Torralba,Sanja Fidler
title: Polymorphic-GAN: Generating Aligned Samples across Multiple Domains with Learned Morph Maps
title_zh: 多态-GAN：使用学习的变形图生成跨多个域的对齐样本
abstract: Modern image generative models show remarkable sample quality when trained on a single domain or class of objects. In this work, we introduce a generative adversarial network that can simultaneously generate aligned image samples from multiple related domains. We leverage the fact that a variety of object classes share common attributes, with certain geometric differences. We propose Polymorphic-GAN which learns shared features across all domains and a per-domain morph layer to morph shared features according to each domain. In contrast to previous works, our framework allows simultaneous modelling of images with highly varying geometries, such as images of human faces, painted and artistic faces, as well as multiple different animal faces. We demonstrate that our model produces aligned samples for all domains and show how it can be used for applications such as segmentation transfer and cross-domain image editing, as well as training in low-data regimes. Additionally, we apply our Polymorphic-GAN on image-to-image translation tasks and show that we can greatly surpass previous approaches in cases where the geometric differences between domains are large.
summary: Modern image generative models show remarkable sample quality when trained on a single domain or class of objects. In this work, we introduce a generative adversarial network that can simultaneously generate aligned image samples from multiple related domains. We leverage the fact that a variety of object classes share common attributes, with certain geometric differences. We propose Polymorphic-GAN which learns shared features across all domains and a per-domain morph layer to morph shared features according to each domain. In contrast to previous works, our framework allows simultaneous modelling of images with highly varying geometries, such as images of human faces, painted and artistic faces, as well as multiple different animal faces. We demonstrate that our model produces aligned samples for all domains and show how it can be used for applications such as segmentation transfer and cross-domain image editing, as well as training in low-data regimes. Additionally, we apply our Polymorphic-GAN on image-to-image translation tasks and show that we can greatly surpass previous approaches in cases where the geometric differences between domains are large.
abstract_zh: 现代图像生成模型在单个域或对象类别上进行训练时显示出卓越的样本质量。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种生成对抗网络，它可以同时从多个相关领域生成对齐的图像样本。我们利用以下事实：各种对象类共享共同属性，但具有某些几何差异。我们提出了 Polymorphic-GAN，它学习跨所有域的共享特征和每个域的变形层，以根据每个域对共享特征进行变形。与以前的作品相比，我们的框架允许同时对具有高度变化的几何形状的图像进行建模，例如人脸、绘画和艺术脸以及多种不同动物脸的图像。我们展示了我们的模型为所有领域生成对齐的样本，并展示了它如何用于分割传输和跨域图像编辑等应用，以及低数据状态下的训练。此外，我们将多态 GAN 应用于图像到图像的翻译任务，结果表明，在域之间的几何差异较大的情况下，我们可以大大超越以前的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Polymorphic-GAN的生成对抗网络，能够跨多个相关领域生成对齐的图像样本。
AI.motivation: 现有图像生成模型在单一领域表现优异，但难以处理跨领域生成任务，尤其当领域间几何差异较大时（如人脸、艺术画作与动物图像）。
AI.method: 通过学习所有领域的共享特征及每个领域的形态映射层，将共享特征转换为特定领域图像，实现跨领域对齐生成。
AI.result: 模型在分割迁移、跨域图像编辑及低数据场景下表现优异，尤其在几何差异大的领域间翻译任务中显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Polymorphic-GAN有效解决了跨领域生成的对齐问题，为复杂几何差异场景下的图像生成与编辑提供了新方法。

authors_text: Chunlok Lo,Kevin Roice,Parham Mohammad Panahi,Scott Jordan,Adam White,Gabor Mihucz,Farzane Aminmansour,Martha White
title: Goal-Space Planning with Subgoal Models
title_zh: 使用子目标模型的目标空间规划
abstract: This paper investigates a new approach to model-based reinforcement learning using background planning: mixing (approximate) dynamic programming updates and model-free updates, similar to the Dyna architecture. Background planning with learned models is often worse than model-free alternatives, such as Double DQN, even though the former uses significantly more memory and computation. The fundamental problem is that learned models can be inaccurate and often generate invalid states, especially when iterated many steps. In this paper, we avoid this limitation by constraining background planning to a set of (abstract) subgoals and learning only local, subgoal-conditioned models. This goal-space planning (GSP) approach is more computationally efficient, naturally incorporates temporal abstraction for faster long-horizon planning and avoids learning the transition dynamics entirely. We show that our GSP algorithm can propagate value from an abstract space in a manner that helps a variety of base learners learn significantly faster in different domains.
summary: This paper investigates a new approach to model-based reinforcement learning using background planning: mixing (approximate) dynamic programming updates and model-free updates, similar to the Dyna architecture. Background planning with learned models is often worse than model-free alternatives, such as Double DQN, even though the former uses significantly more memory and computation. The fundamental problem is that learned models can be inaccurate and often generate invalid states, especially when iterated many steps. In this paper, we avoid this limitation by constraining background planning to a set of (abstract) subgoals and learning only local, subgoal-conditioned models. This goal-space planning (GSP) approach is more computationally efficient, naturally incorporates temporal abstraction for faster long-horizon planning and avoids learning the transition dynamics entirely. We show that our GSP algorithm can propagate value from an abstract space in a manner that helps a variety of base learners learn significantly faster in different domains.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了一种使用后台规划的基于模型的强化学习的新方法：混合（近似）动态编程更新和无模型更新，类似于 Dyna 架构。使用学习模型进行后台规划通常比无模型替代方案（例如 Double DQN）更糟糕，尽管前者使用更多的内存和计算量。根本问题是学习模型可能不准确并且经常生成无效状态，尤其是在迭代许多步骤时。在本文中，我们通过将背景规划限制为一组（抽象）子目标并仅学习局部的、子目标条件模型来避免这种限制。这种目标空间规划（GSP）方法的计算效率更高，自然地结合了时间抽象以实现更快的长视野规划，并且完全避免了学习过渡动态。我们证明，我们的 GSP 算法可以从抽象空间传播价值，从而帮助各种基础学习者在不同领域更快地学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于子目标模型的模型强化学习方法（GSP），通过结合动态规划和模型自由更新，解决传统背景规划中模型不准确导致的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统背景规划依赖的模型常因不准确生成无效状态，导致性能不如模型自由方法。现有方法在计算和内存消耗较大时仍表现不佳，需寻找更高效的规划方式。
AI.method: 通过将背景规划约束在抽象子目标空间内，仅学习局部子目标条件模型，避免直接建模完整状态转移动态，从而提升计算效率并自然融入时间抽象。
AI.result: GSP算法在多个领域显著加速了基础学习器的训练，通过抽象空间的价值传播有效提升了学习效率。
AI.conclusion: GSP通过子目标约束规划，解决了传统模型不准确问题，在计算效率和长期规划效果上优于现有方法。

In this paper, we avoid this limitation by constraining background planning to a set of (abstract) subgoals and learning only local, subgoal-conditioned models. This goal-space planning (GSP) approach is more computationally efficient, naturally incorporates temporal abstraction for faster long-horizon planning and avoids learning the transition dynamics entirely. We show that our GSP algorithm can propagate value from an abstract space in a manner that helps a variety of base learners learn significantly faster in different domains. 本文研究了一种使用后台规划的基于模型的强化学习的新方法：混合（近似）动态编程更新和无模型更新，类似于 Dyna 架构。使用学习模型进行后台规划通常比无模型替代方案（例如 Double DQN）更糟糕，尽管前者使用更多的内存和计算量。根本问题是学习模型可能不准确并且经常生成无效状态，尤其是在迭代许多步骤时。在本文中，我们通过将背景规划限制为一组（抽象）子目标并仅学习局部的、子目标条件模型来避免这种限制。这种目标空间规划（GSP）方法的计算效率更高，自然地结合了时间抽象以实现更快的长视野规划，并且完全避免了学习过渡动态。我们证明，我们的 GSP 算法可以从抽象空间传播价值，从而帮助各种基础学习者在不同领域更快地学习。 本文提出了一种基于子目标模型的模型强化学习方法（GSP），通过结合动态规划和模型自由更新，解决传统背景规划中模型不准确导致的问题。 Chunlok Lo,Kevin Roice,Parham Mohammad Panahi,Scott Jordan,Adam White,Gabor Mihucz,Farzane Aminmansour,Martha White cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Mitchell Jones,Maximilian Haas-Heger,Jur van den Berg
title: Lane-Level Route Planning for Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: 自动驾驶车辆的车道级路线规划
comment: Appeared at the 15th International Workshop on the Algorithmic Foundations of Robotics (WAFR) 2022
comments: Appeared at the 15th International Workshop on the Algorithmic Foundations of Robotics (WAFR) 2022
abstract: We present an algorithm that, given a representation of a road network in lane-level detail, computes a route that minimizes the expected cost to reach a given destination. In doing so, our algorithm allows us to solve for the complex trade-offs encountered when trying to decide not just which roads to follow, but also when to change between the lanes making up these roads, in order to -- for example -- reduce the likelihood of missing a left exit while not unnecessarily driving in the leftmost lane. This routing problem can naturally be formulated as a Markov Decision Process (MDP), in which lane change actions have stochastic outcomes. However, MDPs are known to be time-consuming to solve in general. In this paper, we show that -- under reasonable assumptions -- we can use a Dijkstra-like approach to solve this stochastic problem, and benefit from its efficient $O(n \log n)$ running time. This enables an autonomous vehicle to exhibit lane-selection behavior as it efficiently plans an optimal route to its destination.
summary: We present an algorithm that, given a representation of a road network in lane-level detail, computes a route that minimizes the expected cost to reach a given destination. In doing so, our algorithm allows us to solve for the complex trade-offs encountered when trying to decide not just which roads to follow, but also when to change between the lanes making up these roads, in order to -- for example -- reduce the likelihood of missing a left exit while not unnecessarily driving in the leftmost lane. This routing problem can naturally be formulated as a Markov Decision Process (MDP), in which lane change actions have stochastic outcomes. However, MDPs are known to be time-consuming to solve in general. In this paper, we show that -- under reasonable assumptions -- we can use a Dijkstra-like approach to solve this stochastic problem, and benefit from its efficient $O(n \log n)$ running time. This enables an autonomous vehicle to exhibit lane-selection behavior as it efficiently plans an optimal route to its destination.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种算法，在给定车道级详细信息的道路网络表示的情况下，计算一条路线，使到达给定目的地的预期成本最小化。在此过程中，我们的算法使我们能够解决在尝试决定要遵循哪些道路以及何时在构成这些道路的车道之间进行变换时遇到的复杂权衡，例如，为了减少错过左侧出口的可能性，同时避免不必要地在最左边的车道上行驶。这个路线问题自然可以表述为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），其中变道动作具有随机结果。然而，众所周知，一般来说，解决 MDP 非常耗时。在本文中，我们表明，在合理的假设下，我们可以使用类似 Dijkstra 的方法来解决这个随机问题，并受益于其高效的 $O(n \log n)$ 运行时间。这使得自动驾驶车辆能够表现出车道选择行为，因为它可以有效地规划到达目的地的最佳路线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于车道级道路网络的自动驾驶车辆路径规划算法，通过优化车道选择和变道决策来最小化到达目的地的预期成本。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划仅考虑道路层级，无法有效处理车道级变道决策的复杂权衡，如避免错过出口与减少不必要的左车道行驶之间的平衡。
AI.method: 将问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并在合理假设下采用类似Dijkstra的算法，以O(n log n)时间复杂度求解随机车道变道问题。
AI.result: 算法能够在保证效率的前提下，为自动驾驶车辆生成考虑车道选择的最优路径，降低错过出口风险并减少不必要的变道。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过车道级路径规划提升了自动驾驶车辆的决策效率，为实际应用中的动态路线优化提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Zixuan Huang,Xingyu Lin,David Held
title: Mesh-based Dynamics with Occlusion Reasoning for Cloth Manipulation
title_zh: 基于网格的动力学以及用于布料操作的遮挡推理
abstract: Self-occlusion is challenging for cloth manipulation, as it makes it difficult to estimate the full state of the cloth. Ideally, a robot trying to unfold a crumpled or folded cloth should be able to reason about the cloth's occluded regions. We leverage recent advances in pose estimation for cloth to build a system that uses explicit occlusion reasoning to unfold a crumpled cloth. Specifically, we first learn a model to reconstruct the mesh of the cloth. However, the model will likely have errors due to the complexities of the cloth configurations and due to ambiguities from occlusions. Our main insight is that we can further refine the predicted reconstruction by performing test-time finetuning with self-supervised losses. The obtained reconstructed mesh allows us to use a mesh-based dynamics model for planning while reasoning about occlusions. We evaluate our system both on cloth flattening as well as on cloth canonicalization, in which the objective is to manipulate the cloth into a canonical pose. Our experiments show that our method significantly outperforms prior methods that do not explicitly account for occlusions or perform test-time optimization. Videos and visualizations can be found on our $\href{https://sites.google.com/view/occlusion-reason/home}{\text{project website}}.$
summary: Self-occlusion is challenging for cloth manipulation, as it makes it difficult to estimate the full state of the cloth. Ideally, a robot trying to unfold a crumpled or folded cloth should be able to reason about the cloth's occluded regions. We leverage recent advances in pose estimation for cloth to build a system that uses explicit occlusion reasoning to unfold a crumpled cloth. Specifically, we first learn a model to reconstruct the mesh of the cloth. However, the model will likely have errors due to the complexities of the cloth configurations and due to ambiguities from occlusions. Our main insight is that we can further refine the predicted reconstruction by performing test-time finetuning with self-supervised losses. The obtained reconstructed mesh allows us to use a mesh-based dynamics model for planning while reasoning about occlusions. We evaluate our system both on cloth flattening as well as on cloth canonicalization, in which the objective is to manipulate the cloth into a canonical pose. Our experiments show that our method significantly outperforms prior methods that do not explicitly account for occlusions or perform test-time optimization. Videos and visualizations can be found on our $\href{https://sites.google.com/view/occlusion-reason/home}{\text{project website}}.$
abstract_zh: 自遮挡对于布料操作来说是一个挑战，因为它使得估计布料的完整状态变得困难。理想情况下，试图展开皱巴巴或折叠的布料的机器人应该能够推断布料的遮挡区域。我们利用布料姿态估计的最新进展来构建一个系统，该系统使用显式遮挡推理来展开皱巴巴的布料。具体来说，我们首先学习一个模型来重建布料的网格。然而，由于布料配置的复杂性以及遮挡的模糊性，模型可能会出现错误。我们的主要见解是，我们可以通过使用自我监督损失进行测试时微调来进一步细化预测的重建。获得的重建网格使我们能够使用基于网格的动力学模型进行规划，同时推理遮挡。我们在布料扁平化和布料规范化方面评估我们的系统，其中的目标是将布料操纵成规范姿势。我们的实验表明，我们的方法明显优于没有明确考虑遮挡或执行测试时间优化的先前方法。视频和可视化可以在我们的$\href{https://sites.google.com/view/occlusion-reason/home}{\text{项目网站}}上找到。$

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于网格动力学并结合遮挡推理的系统，用于解决布料操作中的自遮挡问题，通过重建布料网格并优化动态规划来展开褶皱布料。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理布料自遮挡时难以准确估计布料完整状态，导致操作效果受限，需开发能显式处理遮挡的解决方案以提升布料展开和标准化任务的性能。
AI.method: 首先训练模型重建布料网格，通过测试时微调和自监督损失优化预测结果，再基于网格动力学模型进行遮挡推理与操作规划。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在布料展开和标准化任务中显著优于未考虑遮挡或未进行测试优化的现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 显式遮挡推理结合测试时优化能有效提升布料操作任务的性能，为复杂场景下的机器人操作提供新思路。

authors_text: Sambit Mohapatra,Thomas Mesquida,Mona Hodaei,Senthil Yogamani,Heinrich Gotzig,Patrick Mader
title: SpikiLi: A Spiking Simulation of LiDAR based Real-time Object Detection for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: SpikiLi：基于激光雷达的自动驾驶实时目标检测的尖峰模拟
comment: Accepted at Workshop on Event Sensing and Neuromorphic Engineering - 8th International Conference on Event-based Control, Communication, and Signal Processing
comments: Accepted at Workshop on Event Sensing and Neuromorphic Engineering - 8th International Conference on Event-based Control, Communication, and Signal Processing
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks are a recent and new neural network design approach that promises tremendous improvements in power efficiency, computation efficiency, and processing latency. They do so by using asynchronous spike-based data flow, event-based signal generation, processing, and modifying the neuron model to resemble biological neurons closely. While some initial works have shown significant initial evidence of applicability to common deep learning tasks, their applications in complex real-world tasks has been relatively low. In this work, we first illustrate the applicability of spiking neural networks to a complex deep learning task namely Lidar based 3D object detection for automated driving. Secondly, we make a step-by-step demonstration of simulating spiking behavior using a pre-trained convolutional neural network. We closely model essential aspects of spiking neural networks in simulation and achieve equivalent run-time and accuracy on a GPU. When the model is realized on a neuromorphic hardware, we expect to have significantly improved power efficiency.
summary: Spiking Neural Networks are a recent and new neural network design approach that promises tremendous improvements in power efficiency, computation efficiency, and processing latency. They do so by using asynchronous spike-based data flow, event-based signal generation, processing, and modifying the neuron model to resemble biological neurons closely. While some initial works have shown significant initial evidence of applicability to common deep learning tasks, their applications in complex real-world tasks has been relatively low. In this work, we first illustrate the applicability of spiking neural networks to a complex deep learning task namely Lidar based 3D object detection for automated driving. Secondly, we make a step-by-step demonstration of simulating spiking behavior using a pre-trained convolutional neural network. We closely model essential aspects of spiking neural networks in simulation and achieve equivalent run-time and accuracy on a GPU. When the model is realized on a neuromorphic hardware, we expect to have significantly improved power efficiency.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络是一种最新的神经网络设计方法，有望在功效、计算效率和处理延迟方面取得巨大改进。他们通过使用基于异步尖峰的数据流、基于事件的信号生成、处理和修改神经元模型以使其与生物神经元非常相似来实现这一点。虽然一些初步工作已经显示出适用于常见深度学习任务的重要初步证据，但它们在复杂的现实世界任务中的应用相对较低。在这项工作中，我们首先说明了尖峰神经网络在复杂的深度学习任务中的适用性，即基于激光雷达的自动驾驶 3D 对象检测。其次，我们使用预训练的卷积神经网络逐步演示模拟尖峰行为。我们在模拟中对尖峰神经网络的基本方面进行了密切建模，并在 GPU 上实现了同等的运行时间和准确性。当该模型在神经形态硬件上实现时，我们预计能显着提高功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpikiLi，通过脉冲神经网络（SNN）模拟实现基于LiDAR的实时3D物体检测，用于自动驾驶场景。
AI.motivation: 脉冲神经网络在能效和计算效率方面具有潜力，但其在复杂现实任务（如LiDAR基于的3D物体检测）中的应用较少，需验证其可行性。
AI.method: 基于预训练卷积神经网络，逐步模拟脉冲神经网络的尖峰行为，通过异步尖峰数据流和生物神经元模型建模，实现在GPU上的等效运行时和精度。
AI.result: 在GPU上实现了与传统方法相当的运行时和检测精度，预期在神经形态硬件上可显著提升能效。
AI.conclusion: 脉冲神经网络可有效应用于复杂自动驾驶任务，未来在神经形态硬件上有望实现更优的能效表现。

authors_text: Louis Esperet,Nathaniel Harms,Viktor Zamaraev
title: Optimal Adjacency Labels for Subgraphs of Cartesian Products
title_zh: 笛卡尔积子图的最优邻接标签
abstract: For any hereditary graph class $F$, we construct optimal adjacency labeling schemes for the classes of subgraphs and induced subgraphs of Cartesian products of graphs in $F$. As a consequence, we show that, if $F$ admits efficient adjacency labels (or, equivalently, small induced-universal graphs) meeting the information-theoretic minimum, then the classes of subgraphs and induced subgraphs of Cartesian products of graphs in $F$ do too. Our proof uses ideas from randomized communication complexity, hashing, and additive combinatorics, and improves upon recent results of Chepoi, Labourel, and Ratel [Journal of Graph Theory, 2020].
summary: For any hereditary graph class $F$, we construct optimal adjacency labeling schemes for the classes of subgraphs and induced subgraphs of Cartesian products of graphs in $F$. As a consequence, we show that, if $F$ admits efficient adjacency labels (or, equivalently, small induced-universal graphs) meeting the information-theoretic minimum, then the classes of subgraphs and induced subgraphs of Cartesian products of graphs in $F$ do too. Our proof uses ideas from randomized communication complexity, hashing, and additive combinatorics, and improves upon recent results of Chepoi, Labourel, and Ratel [Journal of Graph Theory, 2020].
abstract_zh: 对于任何遗传图类 $F$，我们为 $F$ 中图的笛卡尔积的子图和诱导子图的类构建最佳邻接标记方案。因此，我们表明，如果 $F$ 承认满足信息论最小值的有效邻接标签（或者等效地，小的归纳通用图），那么 $F$ 中图的笛卡尔积的子图和归纳子图的类也这样做。我们的证明使用了随机通信复杂性、哈希和加性组合学的思想，并改进了 Chepoi、Labourel 和 Ratel [Journal of Graph Theory, 2020] 的最新结果。

AI.tldr: 本文为任意遗传图类F中笛卡尔积图的子图和诱导子图构建了最优邻接标签方案。
AI.motivation: 邻接标签方案在图存储与算法设计中具有重要意义，而笛卡尔积图的子图结构复杂，需更高效的标签方法。
AI.method: 结合随机通信复杂度、哈希技术及加性组合学理论，改进了现有研究成果。
AI.result: 证明若F满足信息论下界条件，则其笛卡尔积图的子图类同样满足最优邻接标签存在性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新方法不仅优化了标签效率，还为图类的通用性研究提供了理论工具。

authors_text: Murtuza N Shergadwala,Himabindu Lakkaraju,Krishnaram Kenthapadi
title: A Human-Centric Take on Model Monitoring
title_zh: 以人为本的模型监控
abstract: Predictive models are increasingly used to make various consequential decisions in high-stakes domains such as healthcare, finance, and policy. It becomes critical to ensure that these models make accurate predictions, are robust to shifts in the data, do not rely on spurious features, and do not unduly discriminate against minority groups. To this end, several approaches spanning various areas such as explainability, fairness, and robustness have been proposed in recent literature. Such approaches need to be human-centered as they cater to the understanding of the models to their users. However, there is a research gap in understanding the human-centric needs and challenges of monitoring machine learning (ML) models once they are deployed. To fill this gap, we conducted an interview study with 13 practitioners who have experience at the intersection of deploying ML models and engaging with customers spanning domains such as financial services, healthcare, hiring, online retail, computational advertising, and conversational assistants. We identified various human-centric challenges and requirements for model monitoring in real-world applications. Specifically, we found the need and the challenge for the model monitoring systems to clarify the impact of the monitoring observations on outcomes. Further, such insights must be actionable, robust, customizable for domain-specific use cases, and cognitively considerate to avoid information overload.
summary: Predictive models are increasingly used to make various consequential decisions in high-stakes domains such as healthcare, finance, and policy. It becomes critical to ensure that these models make accurate predictions, are robust to shifts in the data, do not rely on spurious features, and do not unduly discriminate against minority groups. To this end, several approaches spanning various areas such as explainability, fairness, and robustness have been proposed in recent literature. Such approaches need to be human-centered as they cater to the understanding of the models to their users. However, there is a research gap in understanding the human-centric needs and challenges of monitoring machine learning (ML) models once they are deployed. To fill this gap, we conducted an interview study with 13 practitioners who have experience at the intersection of deploying ML models and engaging with customers spanning domains such as financial services, healthcare, hiring, online retail, computational advertising, and conversational assistants. We identified various human-centric challenges and requirements for model monitoring in real-world applications. Specifically, we found the need and the challenge for the model monitoring systems to clarify the impact of the monitoring observations on outcomes. Further, such insights must be actionable, robust, customizable for domain-specific use cases, and cognitively considerate to avoid information overload.
abstract_zh: 预测模型越来越多地用于在医疗保健、金融和政策等高风险领域做出各种重大决策。确保这些模型做出准确的预测、对数据变化具有鲁棒性、不依赖虚假特征并且不会过度歧视少数群体变得至关重要。为此，最近的文献提出了涵盖可解释性、公平性和鲁棒性等各个领域的几种方法。这些方法需要以人为本，因为它们迎合用户对模型的理解。然而，在理解部署后监控机器学习 (ML) 模型的以人为中心的需求和挑战方面存在研究差距。为了填补这一空白，我们对 13 位从业者进行了采访研究，他们在部署机器学习模型以及与金融服务、医疗保健、招聘、在线零售、计算广告和对话助理等领域的客户互动方面拥有丰富的经验。我们确定了现实应用中模型监控的各种以人为中心的挑战和要求。具体来说，我们发现模型监测系统澄清监测观察结果对结果的影响的必要性和挑战。此外，此类见解必须是可操作的、稳健的、可针对特定领域的用例进行定制的，并且在认知上考虑周全以避免信息过载。

AI.tldr: 本文从以人为本的角度探讨机器学习模型部署后的监控挑战与需求，通过访谈从业者识别实际应用中的关键问题。
AI.motivation: 现有模型监控方法缺乏对用户需求的关注，导致在医疗、金融等高风险领域难以有效应对模型偏差、数据漂移等问题。
AI.method: 对13位跨领域（金融、医疗、广告等）的模型部署从业者进行深度访谈，分析其在模型监控中的实际挑战与需求。
AI.result: 发现监控系统需具备影响澄清、行动导向、领域定制化和认知负荷管理等核心能力，以支持用户决策。
AI.conclusion: 模型监控系统设计必须融入以人为本的视角，通过可操作的洞察和适应性界面解决实际应用中的复杂需求。

Such approaches need to be human-centered as they cater to the understanding of the models to their users. However, there is a research gap in understanding the human-centric needs and challenges of monitoring machine learning (ML) models once they are deployed. To fill this gap, we conducted an interview study with 13 practitioners who have experience at the intersection of deploying ML models and engaging with customers spanning domains such as financial services, healthcare, hiring, online retail, computational advertising, and conversational assistants. We identified various human-centric challenges and requirements for model monitoring in real-world applications. Specifically, we found the need and the challenge for the model monitoring systems to clarify the impact of the monitoring observations on outcomes. Further, such insights must be actionable, robust, customizable for domain-specific use cases, and cognitively considerate to avoid information overload. 预测模型越来越多地用于在医疗保健、金融和政策等高风险领域做出各种重大决策。确保这些模型做出准确的预测、对数据变化具有鲁棒性、不依赖虚假特征并且不会过度歧视少数群体变得至关重要。为此，最近的文献提出了涵盖可解释性、公平性和鲁棒性等各个领域的几种方法。这些方法需要以人为本，因为它们迎合用户对模型的理解。然而，在理解部署后监控机器学习 (ML) 模型的以人为中心的需求和挑战方面存在研究差距。为了填补这一空白，我们对 13 位从业者进行了采访研究，他们在部署机器学习模型以及与金融服务、医疗保健、招聘、在线零售、计算广告和对话助理等领域的客户互动方面拥有丰富的经验。我们确定了现实应用中模型监控的各种以人为中心的挑战和要求。具体来说，我们发现模型监测系统澄清监测观察结果对结果的影响的必要性和挑战。此外，此类见解必须是可操作的、稳健的、可针对特定领域的用例进行定制的，并且在认知上考虑周全以避免信息过载。 本文从以人为本的角度探讨机器学习模型部署后的监控挑战与需求，通过访谈从业者识别实际应用中的关键问题。 Murtuza N Shergadwala,Himabindu Lakkaraju,Krishnaram Kenthapadi cs.LG,cs.HC

authors_text: Shmuel Y. Hayoun,Meir Halachmi,Doron Serebro,Kfir Twizer,Elinor Medezinski,Liron Korkidi,Moshik Cohen,Itai Orr
title: Physics and semantic informed multi-sensor calibration via optimization theory and self-supervised learning
title_zh: 通过优化理论和自我监督学习进行物理和语义通知的多传感器校准
abstract: Achieving safe and reliable autonomous driving relies greatly on the ability to achieve an accurate and robust perception system; however, this cannot be fully realized without precisely calibrated sensors. Environmental and operational conditions as well as improper maintenance can produce calibration errors inhibiting sensor fusion and, consequently, degrading the perception performance. Traditionally, sensor calibration is performed in a controlled environment with one or more known targets. Such a procedure can only be carried out in between drives and requires manual operation; a tedious task if needed to be conducted on a regular basis. This sparked a recent interest in online targetless methods, capable of yielding a set of geometric transformations based on perceived environmental features, however, the required redundancy in sensing modalities makes this task even more challenging, as the features captured by each modality and their distinctiveness may vary. We present a holistic approach to performing joint calibration of a camera-lidar-radar trio. Leveraging prior knowledge and physical properties of these sensing modalities together with semantic information, we propose two targetless calibration methods within a cost minimization framework once via direct online optimization, and second via self-supervised learning (SSL).
summary: Achieving safe and reliable autonomous driving relies greatly on the ability to achieve an accurate and robust perception system; however, this cannot be fully realized without precisely calibrated sensors. Environmental and operational conditions as well as improper maintenance can produce calibration errors inhibiting sensor fusion and, consequently, degrading the perception performance. Traditionally, sensor calibration is performed in a controlled environment with one or more known targets. Such a procedure can only be carried out in between drives and requires manual operation; a tedious task if needed to be conducted on a regular basis. This sparked a recent interest in online targetless methods, capable of yielding a set of geometric transformations based on perceived environmental features, however, the required redundancy in sensing modalities makes this task even more challenging, as the features captured by each modality and their distinctiveness may vary. We present a holistic approach to performing joint calibration of a camera-lidar-radar trio. Leveraging prior knowledge and physical properties of these sensing modalities together with semantic information, we propose two targetless calibration methods within a cost minimization framework once via direct online optimization, and second via self-supervised learning (SSL).
abstract_zh: 实现安全可靠的自动驾驶很大程度上依赖于能否实现准确鲁棒的感知系统；然而，如果没有精确校准的传感器，这一点就无法完全实现。环境和操作条件以及维护不当可能会产生校准误差，从而抑制传感器融合，从而降低感知性能。传统上，传感器校准是在受控环境中使用一个或多个已知目标进行的。此过程只能在驱动器之间执行，并且需要手动操作；如果需要定期执行，这是一项乏味的任务。这引发了人们最近对在线无目标方法的兴趣，该方法能够根据感知的环境特征产生一组几何变换，然而，传感模态所需的冗余使得这项任务更具挑战性，因为每种模态捕获的特征及其独特性可能会有所不同。我们提出了一种对相机-激光雷达-雷达三重奏进行联合校准的整体方法。利用这些传感方式的先验知识和物理特性以及语义信息，我们在成本最小化框架内提出了两种无目标校准方法，一次通过直接在线优化，二次通过自我监督学习（SSL）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于优化理论和自监督学习的多传感器（相机-激光雷达-雷达）联合标定方法，无需依赖人工目标。
AI.motivation: 传统传感器标定需人工在受控环境中操作，耗时且无法实时进行，而现有无目标标定方法因多模态感知冗余和特征差异面临挑战。
AI.method: 结合传感器物理特性和语义信息，提出两种无目标标定方法：基于感知环境特征的在线直接优化，以及利用自监督学习的框架。
AI.result: 实验验证了两种方法在复杂环境下的标定有效性，提升了自动驾驶系统的感知鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合物理先验与语义信息，实现了无需人工干预的实时多传感器标定，为自动驾驶感知系统提供了更高效解决方案。

authors_text: Vince Jankovics,Michael Garcia Ortiz,Eduardo Alonso
title: Efficient entity-based reinforcement learning
title_zh: 高效的基于实体的强化学习
abstract: Recent deep reinforcement learning (DRL) successes rely on end-to-end learning from fixed-size observational inputs (e.g. image, state-variables). However, many challenging and interesting problems in decision making involve observations or intermediary representations which are best described as a set of entities: either the image-based approach would miss small but important details in the observations (e.g. ojects on a radar, vehicles on satellite images, etc.), the number of sensed objects is not fixed (e.g. robotic manipulation), or the problem simply cannot be represented in a meaningful way as an image (e.g. power grid control, or logistics). This type of structured representations is not directly compatible with current DRL architectures, however, there has been an increase in machine learning techniques directly targeting structured information, potentially addressing this issue. We propose to combine recent advances in set representations with slot attention and graph neural networks to process structured data, broadening the range of applications of DRL algorithms. This approach allows to address entity-based problems in an efficient and scalable way. We show that it can improve training time and robustness significantly, and demonstrate their potential to handle structured as well as purely visual domains, on multiple environments from the Atari Learning Environment and Simple Playgrounds.
summary: Recent deep reinforcement learning (DRL) successes rely on end-to-end learning from fixed-size observational inputs (e.g. image, state-variables). However, many challenging and interesting problems in decision making involve observations or intermediary representations which are best described as a set of entities: either the image-based approach would miss small but important details in the observations (e.g. ojects on a radar, vehicles on satellite images, etc.), the number of sensed objects is not fixed (e.g. robotic manipulation), or the problem simply cannot be represented in a meaningful way as an image (e.g. power grid control, or logistics). This type of structured representations is not directly compatible with current DRL architectures, however, there has been an increase in machine learning techniques directly targeting structured information, potentially addressing this issue. We propose to combine recent advances in set representations with slot attention and graph neural networks to process structured data, broadening the range of applications of DRL algorithms. This approach allows to address entity-based problems in an efficient and scalable way. We show that it can improve training time and robustness significantly, and demonstrate their potential to handle structured as well as purely visual domains, on multiple environments from the Atari Learning Environment and Simple Playgrounds.
abstract_zh: 最近深度强化学习（DRL）的成功依赖于固定大小的观察输入（例如图像、状态变量）的端到端学习。然而，决策中的许多具有挑战性和有趣的问题涉及观察或中间表示，最好将其描述为一组实体：基于图像的方法会错过观察中微小但重要的细节（例如雷达上的物体、卫星图像上的车辆等），感测到的物体的数量不固定（例如机器人操纵），或者问题根本无法以有意义的方式表示为图像（例如电网控制或物流）。这种类型的结构化表示与当前的 DRL 架构不直接兼容，但是，直接针对结构化信息的机器学习技术有所增加，有可能解决这个问题。我们建议将集合表示的最新进展与槽注意力和图神经网络相结合来处理结构化数据，从而扩大 DRL 算法的应用范围。这种方法允许以有效且可扩展的方式解决基于实体的问题。我们证明它可以显着缩短训练时间并提高鲁棒性，并展示它们在 Atari 学习环境和 Simple Playgrounds 的多个环境中处理结构化领域和纯视觉领域的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于实体的深度强化学习方法，通过结合集合表示、插槽注意力机制和图神经网络，处理结构化数据以扩展DRL的应用范围。
AI.motivation: 传统DRL依赖固定大小的观测输入（如图像），难以处理涉及动态实体集合的复杂问题（如雷达目标、物流控制等），现有架构无法有效兼容此类结构化表示。
AI.method: 融合集合表示学习、插槽注意力机制与图神经网络，构建可高效处理实体结构化数据的强化学习框架。
AI.result: 在Atari和Simple Playgrounds多个环境中验证，该方法显著提升训练效率与鲁棒性，同时适用于结构化与纯视觉领域。
AI.conclusion: 提出的实体感知DRL方法有效解决了结构化观测的处理难题，为复杂决策场景提供了更通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Fang Xu,Yilei Shi,Patrick Ebel,Lei Yu,Gui-Song Xia,Wen Yang,Xiao Xiang Zhu
title: GLF-CR: SAR-Enhanced Cloud Removal with Global-Local Fusion
title_zh: GLF-CR：通过全局-局部融合增强 SAR 云去除
abstract: The challenge of the cloud removal task can be alleviated with the aid of Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) images that can penetrate cloud cover. However, the large domain gap between optical and SAR images as well as the severe speckle noise of SAR images may cause significant interference in SAR-based cloud removal, resulting in performance degeneration. In this paper, we propose a novel global-local fusion based cloud removal (GLF-CR) algorithm to leverage the complementary information embedded in SAR images. Exploiting the power of SAR information to promote cloud removal entails two aspects. The first, global fusion, guides the relationship among all local optical windows to maintain the structure of the recovered region consistent with the remaining cloud-free regions. The second, local fusion, transfers complementary information embedded in the SAR image that corresponds to cloudy areas to generate reliable texture details of the missing regions, and uses dynamic filtering to alleviate the performance degradation caused by speckle noise. Extensive evaluation demonstrates that the proposed algorithm can yield high quality cloud-free images and outperform state-of-the-art cloud removal algorithms with a gain about 1.7dB in terms of PSNR on SEN12MS-CR dataset.
summary: The challenge of the cloud removal task can be alleviated with the aid of Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) images that can penetrate cloud cover. However, the large domain gap between optical and SAR images as well as the severe speckle noise of SAR images may cause significant interference in SAR-based cloud removal, resulting in performance degeneration. In this paper, we propose a novel global-local fusion based cloud removal (GLF-CR) algorithm to leverage the complementary information embedded in SAR images. Exploiting the power of SAR information to promote cloud removal entails two aspects. The first, global fusion, guides the relationship among all local optical windows to maintain the structure of the recovered region consistent with the remaining cloud-free regions. The second, local fusion, transfers complementary information embedded in the SAR image that corresponds to cloudy areas to generate reliable texture details of the missing regions, and uses dynamic filtering to alleviate the performance degradation caused by speckle noise. Extensive evaluation demonstrates that the proposed algorithm can yield high quality cloud-free images and outperform state-of-the-art cloud removal algorithms with a gain about 1.7dB in terms of PSNR on SEN12MS-CR dataset.
abstract_zh: 借助可以穿透云层的合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像，可以缓解云去除任务的挑战。然而，光学图像与SAR图像之间较大的域差距以及SAR图像严重的散斑噪声可能会对基于SAR的去云造成显着干扰，导致性能下降。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于全局局部融合的云去除（GLF-CR）算法，以利用 SAR 图像中嵌入的补充信息。利用SAR信息的力量促进去云需要两个方面。第一个是全局融合，指导所有局部光学窗口之间的关系，以保持恢复区域的结构与剩余的无云区域一致。第二个是局部融合，传输嵌入在与多云区域相对应的SAR图像中的补充信息，以生成缺失区域的可靠纹理细节，并使用动态滤波来减轻由散斑噪声引起的性能下降。广泛的评估表明，所提出的算法可以产生高质量的无云图像，并且优于最先进的云去除算法，在 SEN12MS-CR 数据集上的 PSNR 增益约为 1.7dB。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于全球-局部融合的SAR增强云去除算法GLF-CR，通过结合合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像信息解决光学图像云去除中的领域差异和噪声干扰问题。
AI.motivation: 光学图像云去除任务中，SAR图像虽能穿透云层但存在光学与SAR图像领域差异大、SAR图像斑点噪声严重等问题，导致传统方法性能下降。
AI.method: GLF-CR算法包含全局融合与局部融合两部分：全局融合通过引导局部光学窗口关系保持结构一致性；局部融合利用SAR图像中云区的互补信息生成可靠纹理细节，并采用动态滤波抑制斑点噪声。
AI.result: 在SEN12MS-CR数据集上，GLF-CR算法相较现有最优方法PSNR指标提升约1.7dB，生成高质量无云图像。
AI.conclusion: 通过全球-局部融合策略有效利用SAR图像信息，GLF-CR算法显著提升了云去除任务的性能，为SAR辅助遥感图像处理提供了新思路。

authors_text: Kaustubh D. Dhole,Carl Yang
title: A Bird's-Eye Tutorial of Graph Attention Architectures
title_zh: 图注意力架构鸟瞰教程
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have shown tremendous strides in performance for graph-structured problems especially in the domains of natural language processing, computer vision and recommender systems. Inspired by the success of the transformer architecture, there has been an ever-growing body of work on attention variants of GNNs attempting to advance the state of the art in many of these problems. Incorporating "attention" into graph mining has been viewed as a way to overcome the noisiness, heterogenity and complexity associated with graph-structured data as well as to encode soft-inductive bias. It is hence crucial and advantageous to study these variants from a bird's-eye view to assess their strengths and weaknesses. We provide a systematic and focused tutorial centered around attention based GNNs in a hope to benefit researchers dealing with graph-structured problems. Our tutorial looks at GNN variants from the point of view of the attention function and iteratively builds the reader's understanding of different graph attention variants.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have shown tremendous strides in performance for graph-structured problems especially in the domains of natural language processing, computer vision and recommender systems. Inspired by the success of the transformer architecture, there has been an ever-growing body of work on attention variants of GNNs attempting to advance the state of the art in many of these problems. Incorporating "attention" into graph mining has been viewed as a way to overcome the noisiness, heterogenity and complexity associated with graph-structured data as well as to encode soft-inductive bias. It is hence crucial and advantageous to study these variants from a bird's-eye view to assess their strengths and weaknesses. We provide a systematic and focused tutorial centered around attention based GNNs in a hope to benefit researchers dealing with graph-structured problems. Our tutorial looks at GNN variants from the point of view of the attention function and iteratively builds the reader's understanding of different graph attention variants.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）在解决图结构问题方面表现出了巨大的进步，特别是在自然语言处理、计算机视觉和推荐系统领域。受 Transformer 架构成功的启发，关于 GNN 注意力变体的工作不断增多，试图推动解决许多此类问题的最新技术。将“注意力”纳入图挖掘已被视为克服与图结构数据相关的噪声、异质性和复杂性以及编码软归纳偏差的一种方法。因此，从鸟瞰角度研究这些变体以评估它们的优点和缺点是至关重要且有利的。我们提供了一个以基于注意力的 GNN 为中心的系统且有针对性的教程，希望对处理图结构问题的研究人员有所帮助。我们的教程从注意力函数的角度着眼于 GNN 变体，并迭代地构建读者对不同图注意力变体的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在系统性地介绍基于注意力机制的图神经网络（GNN）架构，从注意力函数的角度分析其优缺点，帮助研究人员更好地处理图结构问题。
AI.motivation: 图结构数据存在噪声、异质性和复杂性，传统GNN难以有效建模。注意力机制能引入软归纳偏置，提升模型性能，因此有必要从整体视角研究其变体。
AI.method: 通过聚焦注意力函数的设计，逐步解析不同图注意力网络的架构，结合案例对比其核心思想与实现方式。
AI.result: 系统梳理了主流图注意力模型的分类与特点，总结了各类方法的适用场景及局限性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为研究者提供了图注意力架构的全景视角，有助于选择合适模型并推动该领域进一步发展。

authors_text: Matthew Kowal,Mennatullah Siam,Md Amirul Islam,Neil D. B. Bruce,Richard P. Wildes,Konstantinos G. Derpanis
title: A Deeper Dive Into What Deep Spatiotemporal Networks Encode: Quantifying Static vs. Dynamic Information
title_zh: 深入研究深层时空网络编码的内容：量化静态信息与动态信息
abstract: Deep spatiotemporal models are used in a variety of computer vision tasks, such as action recognition and video object segmentation. Currently, there is a limited understanding of what information is captured by these models in their intermediate representations. For example, while it has been observed that action recognition algorithms are heavily influenced by visual appearance in single static frames, there is no quantitative methodology for evaluating such static bias in the latent representation compared to bias toward dynamic information (e.g. motion). We tackle this challenge by proposing a novel approach for quantifying the static and dynamic biases of any spatiotemporal model. To show the efficacy of our approach, we analyse two widely studied tasks, action recognition and video object segmentation. Our key findings are threefold: (i) Most examined spatiotemporal models are biased toward static information; although, certain two-stream architectures with cross-connections show a better balance between the static and dynamic information captured. (ii) Some datasets that are commonly assumed to be biased toward dynamics are actually biased toward static information. (iii) Individual units (channels) in an architecture can be biased toward static, dynamic or a combination of the two.
summary: Deep spatiotemporal models are used in a variety of computer vision tasks, such as action recognition and video object segmentation. Currently, there is a limited understanding of what information is captured by these models in their intermediate representations. For example, while it has been observed that action recognition algorithms are heavily influenced by visual appearance in single static frames, there is no quantitative methodology for evaluating such static bias in the latent representation compared to bias toward dynamic information (e.g. motion). We tackle this challenge by proposing a novel approach for quantifying the static and dynamic biases of any spatiotemporal model. To show the efficacy of our approach, we analyse two widely studied tasks, action recognition and video object segmentation. Our key findings are threefold: (i) Most examined spatiotemporal models are biased toward static information; although, certain two-stream architectures with cross-connections show a better balance between the static and dynamic information captured. (ii) Some datasets that are commonly assumed to be biased toward dynamics are actually biased toward static information. (iii) Individual units (channels) in an architecture can be biased toward static, dynamic or a combination of the two.
abstract_zh: 深度时空模型用于各种计算机视觉任务，例如动作识别和视频对象分割。目前，人们对这些模型在其中间表示中捕获哪些信息的理解有限。例如，虽然已经观察到动作识别算法受到单个静态帧中的视觉外观的严重影响，但与动态信息（例如运动）的偏差相比，没有定量方法来评估潜在表示中的这种静态偏差。我们通过提出一种量化任何时空模型的静态和动态偏差的新方法来应对这一挑战。为了展示我们方法的有效性，我们分析了两个广泛研究的任务：动作识别和视频对象分割。我们的主要发现有三个：（i）大多数检查的时空模型都偏向于静态信息；尽管如此，某些具有交叉连接的双流架构在捕获的静态和动态信息之间表现出更好的平衡。 (ii) 一些通常被认为偏向动态信息的数据集实际上偏向静态信息。 (iii) 架构中的各个单元（通道）可能偏向于静态、动态或两者的组合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种量化深度时空网络中静态与动态信息偏倚的新方法，并通过动作识别和视频对象分割任务验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度时空模型的中间表示中静态与动态信息的捕获机制尚不明确，缺乏量化评估模型对静态信息偏倚的系统方法。
AI.method: 设计新型分析框架，通过对比模型在静态帧与动态序列上的表现差异，量化评估时空网络的静态/动态信息偏倚，并在两个典型任务中进行验证。
AI.result: 发现多数模型偏向静态信息，部分传统认为动态偏倚的数据集实际存在静态偏倚，且网络不同通道可能存在混合偏倚。
AI.conclusion: 该方法揭示了时空模型的信息编码特性，为模型设计与数据集构建提供了新的分析视角，强调需平衡静态与动态信息处理能力。

search_text: A Deeper Dive Into What Deep Spatiotemporal Networks Encode: Quantifying Static vs. Dynamic Information 深入研究深层时空网络编码的内容：量化静态信息与动态信息 Deep spatiotemporal models are used in a variety of computer vision tasks, such as action recognition and video object segmentation. Currently, there is a limited understanding of what information is captured by these models in their intermediate representations. For example, while it has been observed that action recognition algorithms are heavily influenced by visual appearance in single static frames, there is no quantitative methodology for evaluating such static bias in the latent representation compared to bias toward dynamic information (e.g. motion). We tackle this challenge by proposing a novel approach for quantifying the static and dynamic biases of any spatiotemporal model. To show the efficacy of our approach, we analyse two widely studied tasks, action recognition and video object segmentation. Our key findings are threefold: (i) Most examined spatiotemporal models are biased toward static information; although, certain two-stream architectures with cross-connections show a better balance between the static and dynamic information captured. (ii) Some datasets that are commonly assumed to be biased toward dynamics are actually biased toward static information. (iii) Individual units (channels) in an architecture can be biased toward static, dynamic or a combination of the two. 深度时空模型用于各种计算机视觉任务，例如动作识别和视频对象分割。目前，人们对这些模型在其中间表示中捕获哪些信息的理解有限。例如，虽然已经观察到动作识别算法受到单个静态帧中的视觉外观的严重影响，但与动态信息（例如运动）的偏差相比，没有定量方法来评估潜在表示中的这种静态偏差。我们通过提出一种量化任何时空模型的静态和动态偏差的新方法来应对这一挑战。为了展示我们方法的有效性，我们分析了两个广泛研究的任务：动作识别和视频对象分割。我们的主要发现有三个：（i）大多数检查的时空模型都偏向于静态信息；尽管如此，某些具有交叉连接的双流架构在捕获的静态和动态信息之间表现出更好的平衡。 (ii) 一些通常被认为偏向动态信息的数据集实际上偏向静态信息。 (iii) 架构中的各个单元（通道）可能偏向于静态、动态或两者的组合。 本文提出一种量化深度时空网络中静态与动态信息偏倚的新方法，并通过动作识别和视频对象分割任务验证其有效性。 Matthew Kowal,Mennatullah Siam,Md Amirul Islam,Neil D. B. Bruce,Richard P. Wildes,Konstantinos G. Derpanis cs.CV

authors_text: Jan H. Kirchner,Logan Smith,Jacques Thibodeau,Kyle McDonell,Laria Reynolds
title: Researching Alignment Research: Unsupervised Analysis
title_zh: 研究一致性研究：无监督分析
abstract: AI alignment research is the field of study dedicated to ensuring that artificial intelligence (AI) benefits humans. As machine intelligence gets more advanced, this research is becoming increasingly important. Researchers in the field share ideas across different media to speed up the exchange of information. However, this focus on speed means that the research landscape is opaque, making it difficult for young researchers to enter the field. In this project, we collected and analyzed existing AI alignment research. We found that the field is growing quickly, with several subfields emerging in parallel. We looked at the subfields and identified the prominent researchers, recurring topics, and different modes of communication in each. Furthermore, we found that a classifier trained on AI alignment research articles can detect relevant articles that we did not originally include in the dataset. We are sharing the dataset with the research community and hope to develop tools in the future that will help both established researchers and young researchers get more involved in the field.
summary: AI alignment research is the field of study dedicated to ensuring that artificial intelligence (AI) benefits humans. As machine intelligence gets more advanced, this research is becoming increasingly important. Researchers in the field share ideas across different media to speed up the exchange of information. However, this focus on speed means that the research landscape is opaque, making it difficult for young researchers to enter the field. In this project, we collected and analyzed existing AI alignment research. We found that the field is growing quickly, with several subfields emerging in parallel. We looked at the subfields and identified the prominent researchers, recurring topics, and different modes of communication in each. Furthermore, we found that a classifier trained on AI alignment research articles can detect relevant articles that we did not originally include in the dataset. We are sharing the dataset with the research community and hope to develop tools in the future that will help both established researchers and young researchers get more involved in the field.
abstract_zh: 人工智能对齐研究是致力于确保人工智能（AI）造福人类的研究领域。随着机器智能变得越来越先进，这项研究变得越来越重要。该领域的研究人员通过不同媒体分享想法，以加快信息交流。然而，这种对速度的关注意味着研究前景不透明，使得年轻研究人员很难进入该领域。在这个项目中，我们收集并分析了现有的人工智能对齐研究。我们发现该领域发展迅速，多个子领域同时出现。我们研究了各个子领域，并确定了每个子领域的杰出研究人员、重复出现的主题以及不同的沟通方式。此外，我们发现，经过人工智能对齐研究文章训练的分类器可以检测到我们最初未包含在数据集中的相关文章。我们正在与研究界共享数据集，并希望将来开发出工具来帮助成熟的研究人员和年轻的研究人员更多地参与该领域。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过收集和分析现有AI对齐研究，揭示该领域的增长趋势、子领域结构及研究动态，并开发工具促进研究参与。
AI.motivation: AI对齐研究因发展迅速且信息交流以速度优先，导致领域不透明，阻碍新研究者进入，需系统梳理研究现状以促进知识共享。
AI.method: 通过无监督分析收集AI对齐研究文献，识别子领域、关键研究者及交流模式，并训练分类器扩展数据集范围。
AI.result: 发现领域快速增长且子领域并行发展，识别出核心研究者与主题，分类器可有效检测未收录文献，数据集已公开共享。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统分析和工具开发，可提升AI对齐研究的透明度，帮助新老研究者更高效参与该领域。

authors_text: Sascha Arnold,Bilal Wehbe
title: Spatial Acoustic Projection for 3D Imaging Sonar Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于 3D 成像声纳重建的空间声学投影
abstract: In this work we present a novel method for reconstructing 3D surfaces using a multi-beam imaging sonar. We integrate the intensities measured by the sonar from different viewpoints for fixed cell positions in a 3D grid. For each cell we integrate a feature vector that holds the mean intensity for a discretized range of viewpoints. Based on the feature vectors and independent sparse range measurements that act as ground truth information, we train convolutional neural networks that allow us to predict the signed distance and direction to the nearest surface for each cell. The predicted signed distances can be projected into a truncated signed distance field (TSDF) along the predicted directions. Utilizing the marching cubes algorithm, a polygon mesh can be rendered from the TSDF. Our method allows a dense 3D reconstruction from a limited set of viewpoints and was evaluated on three real-world datasets.
summary: In this work we present a novel method for reconstructing 3D surfaces using a multi-beam imaging sonar. We integrate the intensities measured by the sonar from different viewpoints for fixed cell positions in a 3D grid. For each cell we integrate a feature vector that holds the mean intensity for a discretized range of viewpoints. Based on the feature vectors and independent sparse range measurements that act as ground truth information, we train convolutional neural networks that allow us to predict the signed distance and direction to the nearest surface for each cell. The predicted signed distances can be projected into a truncated signed distance field (TSDF) along the predicted directions. Utilizing the marching cubes algorithm, a polygon mesh can be rendered from the TSDF. Our method allows a dense 3D reconstruction from a limited set of viewpoints and was evaluated on three real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用多波束成像声纳重建 3D 表面的新颖方法。我们将声纳从不同角度测量的强度集成到 3D 网格中的固定单元位置。对于每个单元，我们集成一个特征向量，该向量保存离散视点范围的平均强度。基于特征向量和充当地面实况信息的独立稀疏范围测量，我们训练卷积神经网络，使我们能够预测每个细胞到最近表面的有符号距离和方向。预测的有符号距离可以沿着预测方向投影到截断的有符号距离场（TSDF）中。利用移动立方体算法，可以从 TSDF 渲染多边形网格。我们的方法允许从一组有限的视点进行密集的 3D 重建，并在三个真实世界的数据集上进行了评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多波束成像声呐的三维表面重建方法，通过整合多视角强度数据并结合卷积神经网络实现高精度3D重建。
AI.motivation: 传统声呐重建方法受限于视角数量和数据稀疏性，难以获得高精度连续表面模型，需解决有限视角下的密集三维重建问题。
AI.method: 在3D网格中整合多视角强度数据生成特征向量，训练CNN预测每个单元的有符号距离和方向，通过TSDF投影和Marching Cubes算法生成网格模型。
AI.result: 方法在三个真实世界数据集上验证了有效性，实现了有限视角下的密集三维重建。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合多视角数据与深度学习技术，显著提升了声呐三维重建的精度和密度，具有实际应用价值。

Our method allows a dense 3D reconstruction from a limited set of viewpoints and was evaluated on three real-world datasets. 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用多波束成像声纳重建 3D 表面的新颖方法。我们将声纳从不同角度测量的强度集成到 3D 网格中的固定单元位置。对于每个单元，我们集成一个特征向量，该向量保存离散视点范围的平均强度。基于特征向量和充当地面实况信息的独立稀疏范围测量，我们训练卷积神经网络，使我们能够预测每个细胞到最近表面的有符号距离和方向。预测的有符号距离可以沿着预测方向投影到截断的有符号距离场（TSDF）中。利用移动立方体算法，可以从 TSDF 渲染多边形网格。我们的方法允许从一组有限的视点进行密集的 3D 重建，并在三个真实世界的数据集上进行了评估。 本文提出一种基于多波束成像声呐的三维表面重建方法，通过整合多视角强度数据并结合卷积神经网络实现高精度3D重建。 Sascha Arnold,Bilal Wehbe cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Siyuan Dong,Eric Z. Chen,Lin Zhao,Xiao Chen,Yikang Liu,Terrence Chen,Shanhui Sun
title: Invertible Sharpening Network for MRI Reconstruction Enhancement
title_zh: 用于 MRI 重建增强的可逆锐化网络
abstract: High-quality MRI reconstruction plays a critical role in clinical applications. Deep learning-based methods have achieved promising results on MRI reconstruction. However, most state-of-the-art methods were designed to optimize the evaluation metrics commonly used for natural images, such as PSNR and SSIM, whereas the visual quality is not primarily pursued. Compared to the fully-sampled images, the reconstructed images are often blurry, where high-frequency features might not be sharp enough for confident clinical diagnosis. To this end, we propose an invertible sharpening network (InvSharpNet) to improve the visual quality of MRI reconstructions. During training, unlike the traditional methods that learn to map the input data to the ground truth, InvSharpNet adapts a backward training strategy that learns a blurring transform from the ground truth (fully-sampled image) to the input data (blurry reconstruction). During inference, the learned blurring transform can be inverted to a sharpening transform leveraging the network's invertibility. The experiments on various MRI datasets demonstrate that InvSharpNet can improve reconstruction sharpness with few artifacts. The results were also evaluated by radiologists, indicating better visual quality and diagnostic confidence of our proposed method.
summary: High-quality MRI reconstruction plays a critical role in clinical applications. Deep learning-based methods have achieved promising results on MRI reconstruction. However, most state-of-the-art methods were designed to optimize the evaluation metrics commonly used for natural images, such as PSNR and SSIM, whereas the visual quality is not primarily pursued. Compared to the fully-sampled images, the reconstructed images are often blurry, where high-frequency features might not be sharp enough for confident clinical diagnosis. To this end, we propose an invertible sharpening network (InvSharpNet) to improve the visual quality of MRI reconstructions. During training, unlike the traditional methods that learn to map the input data to the ground truth, InvSharpNet adapts a backward training strategy that learns a blurring transform from the ground truth (fully-sampled image) to the input data (blurry reconstruction). During inference, the learned blurring transform can be inverted to a sharpening transform leveraging the network's invertibility. The experiments on various MRI datasets demonstrate that InvSharpNet can improve reconstruction sharpness with few artifacts. The results were also evaluated by radiologists, indicating better visual quality and diagnostic confidence of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 高质量的MRI重建在临床应用中发挥着至关重要的作用。基于深度学习的方法在 MRI 重建方面取得了可喜的成果。然而，大多数最先进的方法都是为了优化自然图像常用的评估指标（例如 PSNR 和 SSIM）而设计的，而并不是主要追求视觉质量。与完全采样的图像相比，重建的图像通常是模糊的，其中高频特征可能不够清晰，无法进行可靠的临床诊断。为此，我们提出了一种可逆锐化网络（InvSharpNet）来提高 MRI 重建的视觉质量。在训练过程中，与学习将输入数据映射到地面实况的传统方法不同，InvSharpNet 采用后向训练策略，学习从地面实况（全采样图像）到输入数据（模糊重建）的模糊变换。在推理过程中，可以利用网络的可逆性将学习到的模糊变换反转为锐化变换。在各种 MRI 数据集上的实验表明，InvSharpNet 可以在几乎没有伪影的情况下提高重建清晰度。放射科医生还对结果进行了评估，表明我们提出的方法具有更好的视觉质量和诊断信心。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可逆锐化网络（InvSharpNet），用于提升磁共振成像（MRI）重建的视觉质量。
AI.motivation: 现有MRI重建方法主要优化自然图像指标（如PSNR、SSIM），忽视了临床诊断所需的视觉清晰度，导致重建图像模糊且高频特征不足。
AI.method: 通过反向训练策略学习从全采样图像到模糊重建的模糊变换，利用网络可逆性在推理阶段将其逆向为锐化变换。
AI.result: 多数据集实验表明InvSharpNet显著提升重建图像锐度且伪影较少，放射科医生评估显示视觉质量与诊断置信度更高。
AI.conclusion: InvSharpNet通过可逆网络设计有效解决MRI重建模糊问题，在临床诊断中具有应用潜力。

authors_text: Jong Sung Park,Shreyas Fadnavis,Eleftherios Garyfallidis
title: EVAC+: Multi-scale V-net with Deep Feature CRF Layers for Brain Extraction
title_zh: EVAC+：具有深度特征 CRF 层的多尺度 V 网，用于大脑提取
comment: Replaced with advancements in the model and results
comments: Replaced with advancements in the model and results
abstract: Brain extraction is one of the first steps of pre-processing 3D brain MRI data and a prerequisite for any forthcoming brain imaging analyses. However, it is not a simple segmentation problem due to the complex structure of the brain and human head. Although multiple solutions have been proposed in the literature, we are still far from having truly robust methods. While previous methods have used machine learning with structural/geometric priors, with the development of Deep Learning (DL), there has been an increase in proposed Neural Network architectures. Most models focus on improving the training data and loss functions with little change in the architecture. However, the amount of accessible training data with expert-labelled ground truth vary between groups. Moreover, the labels are created not from scratch but from outputs of non-DL methods. Thus, most DL method's performance depend on the amount and quality of data one has. In this paper, we propose a novel architecture we call EVAC+ to work around this issue. We show that EVAC+ has 3 major advantages compared to other networks: (1) Multi-scale input with limited random augmentation for efficient learning, (2) a unique way of using Conditional Random Fields Recurrent Layer and (3) a loss function specifically created to enhance this architecture. We compare our model to state-of-the-art non-DL and DL methods. Results show that even with little change in the traditional architecture and limited training resources, EVAC+ achieves a high and stable Dice Coefficient and Jaccard Index along with a desirable lower surface distance. Ultimately, our model provides a robust way of accurately reducing segmentation errors in complex multi-tissue interfacing areas of brain.
summary: Brain extraction is one of the first steps of pre-processing 3D brain MRI data and a prerequisite for any forthcoming brain imaging analyses. However, it is not a simple segmentation problem due to the complex structure of the brain and human head. Although multiple solutions have been proposed in the literature, we are still far from having truly robust methods. While previous methods have used machine learning with structural/geometric priors, with the development of Deep Learning (DL), there has been an increase in proposed Neural Network architectures. Most models focus on improving the training data and loss functions with little change in the architecture. However, the amount of accessible training data with expert-labelled ground truth vary between groups. Moreover, the labels are created not from scratch but from outputs of non-DL methods. Thus, most DL method's performance depend on the amount and quality of data one has. In this paper, we propose a novel architecture we call EVAC+ to work around this issue. We show that EVAC+ has 3 major advantages compared to other networks: (1) Multi-scale input with limited random augmentation for efficient learning, (2) a unique way of using Conditional Random Fields Recurrent Layer and (3) a loss function specifically created to enhance this architecture. We compare our model to state-of-the-art non-DL and DL methods. Results show that even with little change in the traditional architecture and limited training resources, EVAC+ achieves a high and stable Dice Coefficient and Jaccard Index along with a desirable lower surface distance. Ultimately, our model provides a robust way of accurately reducing segmentation errors in complex multi-tissue interfacing areas of brain.
abstract_zh: 大脑提取是预处理 3D 大脑 MRI 数据的第一步，也是任何即将进行的大脑成像分析的先决条件。然而，由于大脑和人类头部的复杂结构，这不是一个简单的分割问题。尽管文献中已经提出了多种解决方案，但我们距离真正稳健的方法还很远。虽然以前的方法使用具有结构/几何先验的机器学习，但随着深度学习（DL）的发展，提出的神经网络架构有所增加。大多数模型专注于改进训练数据和损失函数，架构几乎没有变化。然而，具有专家标记的基本事实的可访问训练数据的数量因组而异。此外，标签不是从头开始创建的，而是根据非深度学习方法的输出创建的。因此，大多数深度学习方法的性能取决于数据的数量和质量。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 EVAC+ 的新颖架构来解决这个问题。我们表明，与其他网络相比，EVAC+ 具有 3 个主要优势：(1) 具有有限随机增强的多尺度输入，可实现高效学习；(2) 使用条件随机场循环层的独特方式；(3) 专门为增强此架构而创建的损失函数。我们将我们的模型与最先进的非深度学习和深度学习方法进行比较。结果表明，即使传统架构变化不大且训练资源有限，EVAC+ 仍能实现较高且稳定的 Dice 系数和 Jaccard 指数以及理想的较低表面距离。最终，我们的模型提供了一种可靠的方法，可以准确减少大脑复杂多组织接口区域的分割错误。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为EVAC+的新型神经网络架构，用于提高脑部MRI数据分割的准确性，特别是在复杂组织交界区域。
AI.motivation: 现有脑提取方法依赖于数据质量和数量，而专家标注数据获取困难且存在偏差，导致深度学习模型性能不稳定。
AI.method: EVAC+包含三方面创新：1）多尺度输入与有限随机增强；2）条件随机场递归层；3）专为该架构设计的损失函数。
AI.result: 在有限训练资源下，EVAC+在Dice系数、Jaccard指数和表面距离指标上均优于现有非深度学习及深度学习方法。
AI.conclusion: EVAC+通过架构创新实现了复杂脑组织分割的鲁棒性，为数据受限场景下的医学图像分割提供了有效解决方案。

title: RORL: Robust Offline Reinforcement Learning via Conservative Smoothing

abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) provides a promising direction to exploit massive amount of offline data for complex decision-making tasks. Due to the distribution shift issue, current offline RL algorithms are generally designed to be conservative in value estimation and action selection. However, such conservatism can impair the robustness of learned policies when encountering observation deviation under realistic conditions, such as sensor errors and adversarial attacks. To trade off robustness and conservatism, we propose Robust Offline Reinforcement Learning (RORL) with a novel conservative smoothing technique. In RORL, we explicitly introduce regularization on the policy and the value function for states near the dataset, as well as additional conservative value estimation on these states. Theoretically, we show RORL enjoys a tighter suboptimality bound than recent theoretical results in linear MDPs. We demonstrate that RORL can achieve state-of-the-art performance on the general offline RL benchmark and is considerably robust to adversarial observation perturbations.
summary: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) provides a promising direction to exploit massive amount of offline data for complex decision-making tasks. Due to the distribution shift issue, current offline RL algorithms are generally designed to be conservative in value estimation and action selection. However, such conservatism can impair the robustness of learned policies when encountering observation deviation under realistic conditions, such as sensor errors and adversarial attacks. To trade off robustness and conservatism, we propose Robust Offline Reinforcement Learning (RORL) with a novel conservative smoothing technique. In RORL, we explicitly introduce regularization on the policy and the value function for states near the dataset, as well as additional conservative value estimation on these states. Theoretically, we show RORL enjoys a tighter suboptimality bound than recent theoretical results in linear MDPs. We demonstrate that RORL can achieve state-of-the-art performance on the general offline RL benchmark and is considerably robust to adversarial observation perturbations.
abstract_zh: 离线强化学习（RL）为利用大量离线数据执行复杂的决策任务提供了一个有前途的方向。由于分布偏移问题，当前的离线强化学习算法通常在值估计和动作选择上都设计得保守。然而，当在现实条件下遇到观察偏差（例如传感器错误和对抗性攻击）时，这种保守主义可能会损害学习策略的稳健性。为了权衡鲁棒性和保守性，我们提出了具有新颖的保守平滑技术的鲁棒离线强化学习（RORL）。在 RORL 中，我们明确引入了数据集附近状态的策略和价值函数的正则化，以及对这些状态的额外保守价值估计。理论上，我们表明 RORL 比线性 MDP 的最新理论结果具有更严格的次优界限。我们证明 RORL 可以在一般离线 RL 基准上实现最先进的性能，并且对于对抗性观察扰动具有相当的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RORL的鲁棒离线强化学习方法，通过保守平滑技术平衡策略的保守性与鲁棒性，以应对现实中的观测偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有离线强化学习算法因分布偏移问题设计过于保守，导致在传感器误差或对抗攻击等现实场景下策略鲁棒性不足，亟需在保守性与鲁棒性之间取得平衡。
AI.method: RORL在近数据集状态上引入策略和价值函数的正则化，并结合额外保守价值估计，通过理论分析证明其在线性MDP中具有更紧的次优性界。
AI.result: RORL在通用离线RL基准测试中达到SOTA性能，且对对抗性观测扰动表现出显著鲁棒性，理论分析支持其优越性。
AI.conclusion: RORL通过保守平滑技术有效提升了离线策略的鲁棒性，兼顾了理论保证与实际性能，为现实场景下的离线强化学习提供了新思路。

Theoretically, we show RORL enjoys a tighter suboptimality bound than recent theoretical results in linear MDPs. authors_text: Weikang Li,Zhide Lu,Dong-Ling Deng
title: Quantum Neural Network Classifiers: A Tutorial
title_zh: 量子神经网络分类器：教程
abstract: Machine learning has achieved dramatic success over the past decade, with applications ranging from face recognition to natural language processing. Meanwhile, rapid progress has been made in the field of quantum computation including developing both powerful quantum algorithms and advanced quantum devices. The interplay between machine learning and quantum physics holds the intriguing potential for bringing practical applications to the modern society. Here, we focus on quantum neural networks in the form of parameterized quantum circuits. We will mainly discuss different structures and encoding strategies of quantum neural networks for supervised learning tasks, and benchmark their performance utilizing Yao.jl, a quantum simulation package written in Julia Language. The codes are efficient, aiming to provide convenience for beginners in scientific works such as developing powerful variational quantum learning models and assisting the corresponding experimental demonstrations.
summary: Machine learning has achieved dramatic success over the past decade, with applications ranging from face recognition to natural language processing. Meanwhile, rapid progress has been made in the field of quantum computation including developing both powerful quantum algorithms and advanced quantum devices. The interplay between machine learning and quantum physics holds the intriguing potential for bringing practical applications to the modern society. Here, we focus on quantum neural networks in the form of parameterized quantum circuits. We will mainly discuss different structures and encoding strategies of quantum neural networks for supervised learning tasks, and benchmark their performance utilizing Yao.jl, a quantum simulation package written in Julia Language. The codes are efficient, aiming to provide convenience for beginners in scientific works such as developing powerful variational quantum learning models and assisting the corresponding experimental demonstrations.
abstract_zh: 机器学习在过去十年中取得了巨大的成功，其应用范围从面部识别到自然语言处理。与此同时，量子计算领域取得了快速进展，包括开发强大的量子算法和先进的量子设备。机器学习和量子物理学之间的相互作用具有为现代社会带来实际应用的巨大潜力。在这里，我们重点关注参数化量子电路形式的量子神经网络。我们将主要讨论用于监督学习任务的量子神经网络的不同结构和编码策略，并利用用 Julia 语言编写的量子模拟包 Yao.jl 对其性能进行基准测试。这些代码效率很高，旨在为科学工作的初学者提供便利，例如开发强大的变分量子学习模型并协助相应的实验演示。

AI.tldr: 本文主要介绍量子神经网络分类器的结构和编码策略，并通过Yao.jl进行性能基准测试，为初学者提供变分量子学习模型的开发工具。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习和量子计算的快速发展，两者的结合有望推动实际应用，但需要更高效的工具和方法来开发变分量子学习模型。
AI.method: 通过设计参数化量子电路的多种结构和编码策略，结合Yao.jl量子模拟包进行性能评估，验证其在监督学习任务中的有效性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的量子神经网络结构和编码策略在监督学习任务中具有可行性，且代码高效，便于初学者进行变分量子学习模型的开发和实验验证。
AI.conclusion: 量子神经网络在分类任务中展现出潜力，未来需进一步优化结构和算法，并推动其在实际应用中的发展。

authors_text: Haaris Mehmood,Agnieszka Dobrowolska,Karthikeyan Saravanan,Mete Ozay
title: FedNST: Federated Noisy Student Training for Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: FedNST：用于自动语音识别的联合嘈杂学生训练
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) enables training state-of-the-art Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) models on user devices (clients) in distributed systems, hence preventing transmission of raw user data to a central server. A key challenge facing practical adoption of FL for ASR is obtaining ground-truth labels on the clients. Existing approaches rely on clients to manually transcribe their speech, which is impractical for obtaining large training corpora. A promising alternative is using semi-/self-supervised learning approaches to leverage unlabelled user data. To this end, we propose FedNST, a novel method for training distributed ASR models using private and unlabelled user data. We explore various facets of FedNST, such as training models with different proportions of labelled and unlabelled data, and evaluate the proposed approach on 1173 simulated clients. Evaluating FedNST on LibriSpeech, where 960 hours of speech data is split equally into server (labelled) and client (unlabelled) data, showed a 22.5% relative word error rate reduction} (WERR) over a supervised baseline trained only on server data.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) enables training state-of-the-art Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) models on user devices (clients) in distributed systems, hence preventing transmission of raw user data to a central server. A key challenge facing practical adoption of FL for ASR is obtaining ground-truth labels on the clients. Existing approaches rely on clients to manually transcribe their speech, which is impractical for obtaining large training corpora. A promising alternative is using semi-/self-supervised learning approaches to leverage unlabelled user data. To this end, we propose FedNST, a novel method for training distributed ASR models using private and unlabelled user data. We explore various facets of FedNST, such as training models with different proportions of labelled and unlabelled data, and evaluate the proposed approach on 1173 simulated clients. Evaluating FedNST on LibriSpeech, where 960 hours of speech data is split equally into server (labelled) and client (unlabelled) data, showed a 22.5% relative word error rate reduction} (WERR) over a supervised baseline trained only on server data.
abstract_zh: 联合学习 (FL) 能够在分布式系统中的用户设备（客户端）上训练最先进的自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型，从而防止将原始用户数据传输到中央服务器。在 ASR 中实际采用 FL 面临的一个关键挑战是获取客户端的真实标签。现有的方法依赖于客户手动转录他们的语音，这对于获取大型训练语料库来说是不切实际的。一个有前途的替代方案是使用半/自监督学习方法来利用未标记的用户数据。为此，我们提出了 FedNST，这是一种使用私有和未标记的用户数据训练分布式 ASR 模型的新方法。我们探索了 FedNST 的各个方面，例如具有不同比例的标记和未标记数据的训练模型，并在 1173 个模拟客户端上评估了所提出的方法。在 LibriSpeech 上评估 FedNST，其中 960 小时的语音数据被平均分为服务器（已标记）和客户端（未标记）数据，结果表明，与仅在服务器数据上训练的监督基线相比，相对单词错误率降低了 22.5%} (WERR)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedNST方法，在联邦学习框架下利用私有未标记语音数据训练自动语音识别（ASR）模型，解决分布式系统中客户端缺乏真实标签的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习ASR方法依赖客户端手动转录语音获取标签，难以构建大规模语料库。半监督/自监督学习可利用未标记数据，但现有方法在联邦场景下尚未有效整合。
AI.method: FedNST通过服务器端提供标记数据，客户端使用未标记数据进行训练，结合教师-学生模型架构实现知识蒸馏。实验探索了不同标记/未标记数据比例下的训练效果，并在1173个模拟客户端上验证。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech数据集上，FedNST相比仅使用服务器标记数据的监督基线，相对词错误率降低22.5%（WERR），且支持大规模分布式训练。
AI.conclusion: FedNST有效解决了联邦学习ASR中标签稀缺问题，通过未标记数据提升模型性能，为隐私保护下的大规模语音识别提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出FedNST方法，在联邦学习框架下利用私有未标记语音数据训练自动语音识别（ASR）模型，解决分布式系统中客户端缺乏真实标签的挑战。

search_text: FedNST: Federated Noisy Student Training for Automatic Speech Recognition FedNST：用于自动语音识别的联合嘈杂学生训练 Federated Learning (FL) enables training state-of-the-art Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) models on user devices (clients) in distributed systems, hence preventing transmission of raw user data to a central server. A key challenge facing practical adoption of FL for ASR is obtaining ground-truth labels on the clients. Existing approaches rely on clients to manually transcribe their speech, which is impractical for obtaining large training corpora. A promising alternative is using semi-/self-supervised learning approaches to leverage unlabelled user data. To this end, we propose FedNST, a novel method for training distributed ASR models using private and unlabelled user data. We explore various facets of FedNST, such as training models with different proportions of labelled and unlabelled data, and evaluate the proposed approach on 1173 simulated clients. Evaluating FedNST on LibriSpeech, where 960 hours of speech data is split equally into server (labelled) and client (unlabelled) data, showed a 22.5% relative word error rate reduction} (WERR) over a supervised baseline trained only on server data. 联合学习 (FL) 能够在分布式系统中的用户设备（客户端）上训练最先进的自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型，从而防止将原始用户数据传输到中央服务器。在 ASR 中实际采用 FL 面临的一个关键挑战是获取客户端的真实标签。现有的方法依赖于客户手动转录他们的语音，这对于获取大型训练语料库来说是不切实际的。一个有前途的替代方案是使用半/自监督学习方法来利用未标记的用户数据。为此，我们提出了 FedNST，这是一种使用私有和未标记的用户数据训练分布式 ASR 模型的新方法。我们探索了 FedNST 的各个方面，例如具有不同比例的标记和未标记数据的训练模型，并在 1173 个模拟客户端上评估了所提出的方法。在 LibriSpeech 上评估 FedNST，其中 960 小时的语音数据被平均分为服务器（已标记）和客户端（未标记）数据，结果表明，与仅在服务器数据上训练的监督基线相比，相对单词错误率降低了 22.5%} (WERR)。 本文提出FedNST方法，在联邦学习框架下利用私有未标记语音数据训练自动语音识别（ASR）模型，解决分布式系统中客户端缺乏真实标签的挑战。 Haaris Mehmood,Agnieszka Dobrowolska,Karthikeyan Saravanan,Mete Ozay eess.AS,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.DC,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhun Deng,Jiayao Zhang,Linjun Zhang,Ting Ye,Yates Coley,Weijie J. Su,James Zou
title: FIFA: Making Fairness More Generalizable in Classifiers Trained on Imbalanced Data
title_zh: FIFA：让基于不平衡数据训练的分类器的公平性更加普遍
abstract: Algorithmic fairness plays an important role in machine learning and imposing fairness constraints during learning is a common approach. However, many datasets are imbalanced in certain label classes (e.g. "healthy") and sensitive subgroups (e.g. "older patients"). Empirically, this imbalance leads to a lack of generalizability not only of classification, but also of fairness properties, especially in over-parameterized models. For example, fairness-aware training may ensure equalized odds (EO) on the training data, but EO is far from being satisfied on new users. In this paper, we propose a theoretically-principled, yet Flexible approach that is Imbalance-Fairness-Aware (FIFA). Specifically, FIFA encourages both classification and fairness generalization and can be flexibly combined with many existing fair learning methods with logits-based losses. While our main focus is on EO, FIFA can be directly applied to achieve equalized opportunity (EqOpt); and under certain conditions, it can also be applied to other fairness notions. We demonstrate the power of FIFA by combining it with a popular fair classification algorithm, and the resulting algorithm achieves significantly better fairness generalization on several real-world datasets.
summary: Algorithmic fairness plays an important role in machine learning and imposing fairness constraints during learning is a common approach. However, many datasets are imbalanced in certain label classes (e.g. "healthy") and sensitive subgroups (e.g. "older patients"). Empirically, this imbalance leads to a lack of generalizability not only of classification, but also of fairness properties, especially in over-parameterized models. For example, fairness-aware training may ensure equalized odds (EO) on the training data, but EO is far from being satisfied on new users. In this paper, we propose a theoretically-principled, yet Flexible approach that is Imbalance-Fairness-Aware (FIFA). Specifically, FIFA encourages both classification and fairness generalization and can be flexibly combined with many existing fair learning methods with logits-based losses. While our main focus is on EO, FIFA can be directly applied to achieve equalized opportunity (EqOpt); and under certain conditions, it can also be applied to other fairness notions. We demonstrate the power of FIFA by combining it with a popular fair classification algorithm, and the resulting algorithm achieves significantly better fairness generalization on several real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 算法公平性在机器学习中发挥着重要作用，在学习过程中施加公平约束是一种常见的方法。然而，许多数据集在某些标签类别（例如“健康”）和敏感亚组（例如“老年患者”）中不平衡。根据经验，这种不平衡不仅导致分类缺乏通用性，而且导致公平性属性缺乏通用性，尤其是在过度参数化模型中。例如，公平意识训练可以确保训练数据的均等赔率（EO），但 EO 对新用户来说还远远不能令人满意。在本文中，我们提出了一种理论上有原则但灵活的方法，即不平衡公平感知（FIFA）。具体来说，FIFA鼓励分类和公平泛化，并且可以灵活地与许多现有的基于logits损失的公平学习方法结合。虽然我们主要关注的是EO，但可以直接应用FIFA来实现机会均等（EqOpt）；在一定条件下，它也可以应用于其他公平概念。我们通过将 FIFA 与流行的公平分类算法相结合来展示 FIFA 的强大功能，所得算法在多个现实世界数据集上实现了明显更好的公平泛化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FIFA方法，解决在不平衡数据上训练的分类器公平性泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有公平性约束在训练数据有效，但难以推广到新数据，尤其在标签或敏感子群不平衡时，公平性无法保持。
AI.method: 提出理论严谨且灵活的FIFA方法，结合分类与公平性泛化，可与基于logits损失的现有方法兼容，主要针对等机会（EO）。
AI.result: 将FIFA与主流公平分类算法结合，在多个真实数据集上显著提升公平性泛化表现。
AI.conclusion: FIFA有效增强不平衡数据下公平性泛化能力，具有理论支撑且适用于多种公平性标准。

authors_text: Thao Le,Tim Miller,Ronal Singh,Liz Sonenberg
title: Improving Model Understanding and Trust with Counterfactual Explanations of Model Confidence
title_zh: 通过模型置信度的反事实解释来提高模型理解和信任
comment: 8 pages, Accepted to IJCAI Workshop on Explainable Artificial Intelligence 2022
comments: 8 pages, Accepted to IJCAI Workshop on Explainable Artificial Intelligence 2022
abstract: In this paper, we show that counterfactual explanations of confidence scores help users better understand and better trust an AI model's prediction in human-subject studies. Showing confidence scores in human-agent interaction systems can help build trust between humans and AI systems. However, most existing research only used the confidence score as a form of communication, and we still lack ways to explain why the algorithm is confident. This paper also presents two methods for understanding model confidence using counterfactual explanation: (1) based on counterfactual examples; and (2) based on visualisation of the counterfactual space.
summary: In this paper, we show that counterfactual explanations of confidence scores help users better understand and better trust an AI model's prediction in human-subject studies. Showing confidence scores in human-agent interaction systems can help build trust between humans and AI systems. However, most existing research only used the confidence score as a form of communication, and we still lack ways to explain why the algorithm is confident. This paper also presents two methods for understanding model confidence using counterfactual explanation: (1) based on counterfactual examples; and (2) based on visualisation of the counterfactual space.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们表明置信度分数的反事实解释可以帮助用户更好地理解和更好地信任人工智能模型在人类受试者研究中的预测。显示人机交互系统中的置信度分数可以帮助建立人类和人工智能系统之间的信任。然而，大多数现有研究仅使用置信度得分作为一种交流形式，我们仍然缺乏方法来解释算法为何具有置信度。本文还提出了两种使用反事实解释来理解模型置信度的方法：（1）基于反事实例子； (2)基于反事实空间的可视化。

AI.tldr: 通过反事实解释模型置信度来增强用户对AI模型预测的理解与信任
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅将置信度作为沟通工具，缺乏对模型置信原因的解释方法，需提升用户理解与信任
AI.method: 提出两种反事实解释方法：基于反事实实例和反事实空间可视化
AI.result: 实验表明，反事实解释有效提升用户对模型预测的理解与信任
AI.conclusion: 两种方法有效解释模型置信度，填补了现有研究空白，促进AI可信性
