authors_text: Ioannis Tsaknakis,Bhavya Kailkhura,Sijia Liu,Donald Loveland,James Diffenderfer,Anna Maria Hiszpanski,Mingyi Hong
title: Zeroth-Order SciML: Non-intrusive Integration of Scientific Software with Deep Learning
title_zh: 零阶 SciML：科学软件与深度学习的非侵入式集成
abstract: Using deep learning (DL) to accelerate and/or improve scientific workflows can yield discoveries that are otherwise impossible. Unfortunately, DL models have yielded limited success in complex scientific domains due to large data requirements. In this work, we propose to overcome this issue by integrating the abundance of scientific knowledge sources (SKS) with the DL training process. Existing knowledge integration approaches are limited to using differentiable knowledge source to be compatible with first-order DL training paradigm. In contrast, our proposed approach treats knowledge source as a black-box in turn allowing to integrate virtually any knowledge source. To enable an end-to-end training of SKS-coupled-DL, we propose to use zeroth-order optimization (ZOO) based gradient-free training schemes, which is non-intrusive, i.e., does not require making any changes to the SKS. We evaluate the performance of our ZOO training scheme on two real-world material science applications. We show that proposed scheme is able to effectively integrate scientific knowledge with DL training and is able to outperform purely data-driven model for data-limited scientific applications. We also discuss some limitations of the proposed method and mention potentially worthwhile future directions.
summary: Using deep learning (DL) to accelerate and/or improve scientific workflows can yield discoveries that are otherwise impossible. Unfortunately, DL models have yielded limited success in complex scientific domains due to large data requirements. In this work, we propose to overcome this issue by integrating the abundance of scientific knowledge sources (SKS) with the DL training process. Existing knowledge integration approaches are limited to using differentiable knowledge source to be compatible with first-order DL training paradigm. In contrast, our proposed approach treats knowledge source as a black-box in turn allowing to integrate virtually any knowledge source. To enable an end-to-end training of SKS-coupled-DL, we propose to use zeroth-order optimization (ZOO) based gradient-free training schemes, which is non-intrusive, i.e., does not require making any changes to the SKS. We evaluate the performance of our ZOO training scheme on two real-world material science applications. We show that proposed scheme is able to effectively integrate scientific knowledge with DL training and is able to outperform purely data-driven model for data-limited scientific applications. We also discuss some limitations of the proposed method and mention potentially worthwhile future directions.
abstract_zh: 使用深度学习 (DL) 加速和/或改进科学工作流程可以产生原本不可能的发现。不幸的是，由于数据需求量大，深度学习模型在复杂的科学领域取得的成功有限。在这项工作中，我们建议通过将丰富的科学知识源（SKS）与深度学习训练过程相结合来克服这个问题。现有的知识集成方法仅限于使用可微的知识源来与一阶深度学习训练范式兼容。相比之下，我们提出的方法将知识源视为黑匣子，从而允许集成几乎任何知识源。为了实现 SKS 耦合深度学习的端到端训练，我们建议使用基于零阶优化（ZOO）的无梯度训练方案，这是非侵入式的，即不需要对 SKS 进行任何更改。我们评估了 ZOO 培训计划在两个现实世界材料科学应用中的表现。我们表明，所提出的方案能够有效地将科学知识与深度学习训练相结合，并且能够在数据有限的科学应用中优于纯数据驱动模型。我们还讨论了所提出方法的一些局限性，并提到了潜在有价值的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非侵入式方法，通过零阶优化将科学知识源与深度学习结合，以解决科学领域数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在复杂科学领域因数据需求大而效果有限，现有方法依赖可微分的知识源，限制了科学软件的集成。
AI.method: 采用零阶优化（ZOO）进行梯度无关训练，将科学软件作为黑盒，无需修改其代码即可与深度学习模型端到端集成。
AI.result: 在两个材料科学应用中验证了方法有效性，表明其在数据有限场景下优于纯数据驱动模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功融合科学知识与深度学习，但存在局限性，未来需进一步优化和扩展应用场景。

search_text: Zeroth-Order SciML: Non-intrusive Integration of Scientific Software with Deep Learning 零阶 SciML：科学软件与深度学习的非侵入式集成 Using deep learning (DL) to accelerate and/or improve scientific workflows can yield discoveries that are otherwise impossible. Unfortunately, DL models have yielded limited success in complex scientific domains due to large data requirements. In this work, we propose to overcome this issue by integrating the abundance of scientific knowledge sources (SKS) with the DL training process. Existing knowledge integration approaches are limited to using differentiable knowledge source to be compatible with first-order DL training paradigm. In contrast, our proposed approach treats knowledge source as a black-box in turn allowing to integrate virtually any knowledge source. To enable an end-to-end training of SKS-coupled-DL, we propose to use zeroth-order optimization (ZOO) based gradient-free training schemes, which is non-intrusive, i.e., does not require making any changes to the SKS. We evaluate the performance of our ZOO training scheme on two real-world material science applications. We show that proposed scheme is able to effectively integrate scientific knowledge with DL training and is able to outperform purely data-driven model for data-limited scientific applications. We also discuss some limitations of the proposed method and mention potentially worthwhile future directions. 使用深度学习 (DL) 加速和/或改进科学工作流程可以产生原本不可能的发现。不幸的是，由于数据需求量大，深度学习模型在复杂的科学领域取得的成功有限。在这项工作中，我们建议通过将丰富的科学知识源（SKS）与深度学习训练过程相结合来克服这个问题。现有的知识集成方法仅限于使用可微的知识源来与一阶深度学习训练范式兼容。相比之下，我们提出的方法将知识源视为黑匣子，从而允许集成几乎任何知识源。为了实现 SKS 耦合深度学习的端到端训练，我们建议使用基于零阶优化（ZOO）的无梯度训练方案，这是非侵入式的，即不需要对 SKS 进行任何更改。我们评估了 ZOO 培训计划在两个现实世界材料科学应用中的表现。我们表明，所提出的方案能够有效地将科学知识与深度学习训练相结合，并且能够在数据有限的科学应用中优于纯数据驱动模型。我们还讨论了所提出方法的一些局限性，并提到了潜在有价值的未来方向。 本文提出一种非侵入式方法，通过零阶优化将科学知识源与深度学习结合，以解决科学领域数据不足的问题。 Ioannis Tsaknakis,Bhavya Kailkhura,Sijia Liu,Donald Loveland,James Diffenderfer,Anna Maria Hiszpanski,Mingyi Hong cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Christos Diou,Konstantinos Kyritsis,Vasileios Papapanagiotou,Ioannis Sarafis
title: Intake Monitoring in Free-Living Conditions: Overview and Lessons we Have Learned
title_zh: 自由生活条件下的摄入量监测：概述和我们学到的经验教训
abstract: The progress in artificial intelligence and machine learning algorithms over the past decade has enabled the development of new methods for the objective measurement of eating, including both the measurement of eating episodes as well as the measurement of in-meal eating behavior. These allow the study of eating behavior outside the laboratory in free-living conditions, without the need for video recordings and laborious manual annotations. In this paper, we present a high-level overview of our recent work on intake monitoring using a smartwatch, as well as methods using an in-ear microphone. We also present evaluation results of these methods in challenging, real-world datasets. Furthermore, we discuss use-cases of such intake monitoring tools for advancing research in eating behavior, for improving dietary monitoring, as well as for developing evidence-based health policies. Our goal is to inform researchers and users of intake monitoring methods regarding (i) the development of new methods based on commercially available devices, (ii) what to expect in terms of effectiveness, and (iii) how these methods can be used in research as well as in practical applications.
summary: The progress in artificial intelligence and machine learning algorithms over the past decade has enabled the development of new methods for the objective measurement of eating, including both the measurement of eating episodes as well as the measurement of in-meal eating behavior. These allow the study of eating behavior outside the laboratory in free-living conditions, without the need for video recordings and laborious manual annotations. In this paper, we present a high-level overview of our recent work on intake monitoring using a smartwatch, as well as methods using an in-ear microphone. We also present evaluation results of these methods in challenging, real-world datasets. Furthermore, we discuss use-cases of such intake monitoring tools for advancing research in eating behavior, for improving dietary monitoring, as well as for developing evidence-based health policies. Our goal is to inform researchers and users of intake monitoring methods regarding (i) the development of new methods based on commercially available devices, (ii) what to expect in terms of effectiveness, and (iii) how these methods can be used in research as well as in practical applications.
abstract_zh: 过去十年人工智能和机器学习算法的进步使得客观测量饮食的新方法得以开发，包括饮食事件的测量以及餐中饮食行为的测量。这些允许在实验室外自由生活的条件下研究饮食行为，而不需要视频记录和费力的手动注释。在本文中，我们对最近使用智能手表进行摄入监测的工作以及使用入耳式麦克风的方法进行了高度概述。我们还展示了这些方法在具有挑战性的现实世界数据集中的评估结果。此外，我们还讨论了此类摄入监测工具的用例，以推进饮食行为研究、改善饮食监测以及制定循证健康政策。我们的目标是向研究人员和用户介绍摄入量监测方法：(i) 基于市售设备开发新方法，(ii) 有效性预期，以及 (iii) 如何在研究和实际应用中使用这些方法。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了利用智能手表和耳内麦克风进行自由生活条件下的摄入监测方法，并评估其在真实环境中的效果，同时探讨其在饮食行为研究和健康政策中的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统饮食监测方法存在侵入性和劳动密集型问题，需开发非侵入性、自动化的自由生活监测工具以提升研究和应用效率。
AI.method: 采用智能手表传感器和耳内麦克风采集数据，结合AI算法分析进食事件及行为，无需人工标注。
AI.result: 在真实世界数据集中验证了方法的有效性，展示了其在不同场景下的适用性及准确性。
AI.conclusion: 基于商业设备的摄入监测方法在自由生活条件下有效，为饮食研究和健康干预提供了可行工具，未来需进一步优化算法和扩大应用范围。

authors_text: Jun Zhu,Céline Hudelot
title: Towards Job-Transition-Tag Graph for a Better Job Title Representation Learning
title_zh: 走向工作转换标签图以实现更好的职称表示学习
abstract: Works on learning job title representation are mainly based on \textit{Job-Transition Graph}, built from the working history of talents. However, since these records are usually messy, this graph is very sparse, which affects the quality of the learned representation and hinders further analysis. To address this specific issue, we propose to enrich the graph with additional nodes that improve the quality of job title representation. Specifically, we construct \textit{Job-Transition-Tag Graph}, a heterogeneous graph containing two types of nodes, i.e., job titles and tags (i.e., words related to job responsibilities or functionalities). Along this line, we reformulate job title representation learning as the task of learning node embedding on the \textit{Job-Transition-Tag Graph}. Experiments on two datasets show the interest of our approach.
summary: Works on learning job title representation are mainly based on \textit{Job-Transition Graph}, built from the working history of talents. However, since these records are usually messy, this graph is very sparse, which affects the quality of the learned representation and hinders further analysis. To address this specific issue, we propose to enrich the graph with additional nodes that improve the quality of job title representation. Specifically, we construct \textit{Job-Transition-Tag Graph}, a heterogeneous graph containing two types of nodes, i.e., job titles and tags (i.e., words related to job responsibilities or functionalities). Along this line, we reformulate job title representation learning as the task of learning node embedding on the \textit{Job-Transition-Tag Graph}. Experiments on two datasets show the interest of our approach.
abstract_zh: 学习职称表征的工作主要基于 \textit{Job-Transition Graph}，该图是根据人才的工作历史构建的。然而，由于这些记录通常是杂乱的，因此该图非常稀疏，这影响了学习表示的质量并阻碍了进一步的分析。为了解决这个具体问题，我们建议使用额外的节点来丰富图表，以提高职称表示的质量。具体来说，我们构建了 \textit{Job-Transition-Tag Graph}，这是一个包含两种类型节点的异构图，即职位名称和标签（即与工作职责或功能相关的单词）。沿着这条线，我们将职位表示学习重新表述为学习节点嵌入到 \textit{Job-Transition-Tag Graph} 上的任务。对两个数据集的实验表明了我们方法的兴趣。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种异构图结构——Job-Transition-Tag Graph，通过引入岗位标签节点优化职位名称表示学习。
AI.motivation: 传统基于工作履历构建的Job-Transition Graph存在数据杂乱导致的稀疏性问题，影响表示学习质量。
AI.method: 构建包含职位名称和功能标签两类节点的异构图，将职位表示学习转化为该图的节点嵌入学习任务。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上的实验验证了该方法在职位表示学习任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入语义标签节点增强图结构，能够提升职位名称的语义表示质量。

search_text: Towards Job-Transition-Tag Graph for a Better Job Title Representation Learning 走向工作转换标签图以实现更好的职称表示学习 Works on learning job title representation are mainly based on \textit{Job-Transition Graph}, built from the working history of talents. However, since these records are usually messy, this graph is very sparse, which affects the quality of the learned representation and hinders further analysis. To address this specific issue, we propose to enrich the graph with additional nodes that improve the quality of job title representation. Specifically, we construct \textit{Job-Transition-Tag Graph}, a heterogeneous graph containing two types of nodes, i.e., job titles and tags (i.e., words related to job responsibilities or functionalities). Along this line, we reformulate job title representation learning as the task of learning node embedding on the \textit{Job-Transition-Tag Graph}. Experiments on two datasets show the interest of our approach. 学习职称表征的工作主要基于 \textit{Job-Transition Graph}，该图是根据人才的工作历史构建的。然而，由于这些记录通常是杂乱的，因此该图非常稀疏，这影响了学习表示的质量并阻碍了进一步的分析。为了解决这个具体问题，我们建议使用额外的节点来丰富图表，以提高职称表示的质量。具体来说，我们构建了 \textit{Job-Transition-Tag Graph}，这是一个包含两种类型节点的异构图，即职位名称和标签（即与工作职责或功能相关的单词）。沿着这条线，我们将职位表示学习重新表述为学习节点嵌入到 \textit{Job-Transition-Tag Graph} 上的任务。对两个数据集的实验表明了我们方法的兴趣。 本文提出一种异构图结构——Job-Transition-Tag Graph，通过引入岗位标签节点优化职位名称表示学习。 Jun Zhu,Céline Hudelot cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Gene Chou,Ilya Chugunov,Felix Heide
title: GenSDF: Two-Stage Learning of Generalizable Signed Distance Functions
title_zh: GenSDF：可推广符号距离函数的两阶段学习
abstract: We investigate the generalization capabilities of neural signed distance functions (SDFs) for learning 3D object representations for unseen and unlabeled point clouds. Existing methods can fit SDFs to a handful of object classes and boast fine detail or fast inference speeds, but do not generalize well to unseen shapes. We introduce a two-stage semi-supervised meta-learning approach that transfers shape priors from labeled to unlabeled data to reconstruct unseen object categories. The first stage uses an episodic training scheme to simulate training on unlabeled data and meta-learns initial shape priors. The second stage then introduces unlabeled data with disjoint classes in a semi-supervised scheme to diversify these priors and achieve generalization. We assess our method on both synthetic data and real collected point clouds. Experimental results and analysis validate that our approach outperforms existing neural SDF methods and is capable of robust zero-shot inference on 100+ unseen classes. Code can be found at https://github.com/princeton-computational-imaging/gensdf.
summary: We investigate the generalization capabilities of neural signed distance functions (SDFs) for learning 3D object representations for unseen and unlabeled point clouds. Existing methods can fit SDFs to a handful of object classes and boast fine detail or fast inference speeds, but do not generalize well to unseen shapes. We introduce a two-stage semi-supervised meta-learning approach that transfers shape priors from labeled to unlabeled data to reconstruct unseen object categories. The first stage uses an episodic training scheme to simulate training on unlabeled data and meta-learns initial shape priors. The second stage then introduces unlabeled data with disjoint classes in a semi-supervised scheme to diversify these priors and achieve generalization. We assess our method on both synthetic data and real collected point clouds. Experimental results and analysis validate that our approach outperforms existing neural SDF methods and is capable of robust zero-shot inference on 100+ unseen classes. Code can be found at https://github.com/princeton-computational-imaging/gensdf.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了神经符号距离函数 (SDF) 的泛化能力，用于学习不可见和未标记点云的 3D 对象表示。现有方法可以将 SDF 适合少数对象类，并拥有精细的细节或快速的推理速度，但不能很好地推广到看不见的形状。我们引入了一种两阶段半监督元学习方法，该方法将形状先验从标记数据转移到未标记数据以重建未见过的对象类别。第一阶段使用情景训练方案来模拟对未标记数据的训练并元学习初始形状先验。然后，第二阶段在半监督方案中引入具有不相交类的未标记数据，以使这些先验多样化并实现泛化。我们根据合成数据和实际收集的点云评估我们的方法。实验结果和分析验证了我们的方法优于现有的神经 SDF 方法，并且能够对 100 多个未见过的类进行稳健的零样本推理。代码可以在 https://github.com/princeton-computational-imaging/gensdf 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GenSDF方法，通过两阶段半监督元学习，使神经符号距离函数（SDF）能够泛化到未见过的3D物体类别。
AI.motivation: 现有SDF方法虽能拟合少量物体类别或具备细节精度/推理速度优势，但难以泛化到新形状。需解决从标注数据到未标注数据的形状先验迁移问题。
AI.method: 两阶段半监督元学习：第一阶段通过情景训练模拟未标注数据，元学习初始形状先验；第二阶段引入不相交类别的未标注数据，扩展先验实现泛化。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实点云数据集上验证，方法优于现有SDF技术，可对100+未见过类别进行鲁棒零样本推理。
AI.conclusion: GenSDF通过两阶段半监督元学习有效提升了SDF的泛化能力，为未标注点云的3D重建提供了新思路。

authors_text: Omri Avrahami,Ohad Fried,Dani Lischinski
title: Blended Latent Diffusion
title_zh: 混合潜扩散
abstract: The tremendous progress in neural image generation, coupled with the emergence of seemingly omnipotent vision-language models has finally enabled text-based interfaces for creating and editing images. Handling generic images requires a diverse underlying generative model, hence the latest works utilize diffusion models, which were shown to surpass GANs in terms of diversity. One major drawback of diffusion models, however, is their relatively slow inference time. In this paper, we present an accelerated solution to the task of local text-driven editing of generic images, where the desired edits are confined to a user-provided mask. Our solution leverages a recent text-to-image Latent Diffusion Model (LDM), which speeds up diffusion by operating in a lower-dimensional latent space. We first convert the LDM into a local image editor by incorporating Blended Diffusion into it. Next we propose an optimization-based solution for the inherent inability of this LDM to accurately reconstruct images. Finally, we address the scenario of performing local edits using thin masks. We evaluate our method against the available baselines both qualitatively and quantitatively and demonstrate that in addition to being faster, our method achieves better precision than the baselines while mitigating some of their artifacts.
summary: The tremendous progress in neural image generation, coupled with the emergence of seemingly omnipotent vision-language models has finally enabled text-based interfaces for creating and editing images. Handling generic images requires a diverse underlying generative model, hence the latest works utilize diffusion models, which were shown to surpass GANs in terms of diversity. One major drawback of diffusion models, however, is their relatively slow inference time. In this paper, we present an accelerated solution to the task of local text-driven editing of generic images, where the desired edits are confined to a user-provided mask. Our solution leverages a recent text-to-image Latent Diffusion Model (LDM), which speeds up diffusion by operating in a lower-dimensional latent space. We first convert the LDM into a local image editor by incorporating Blended Diffusion into it. Next we propose an optimization-based solution for the inherent inability of this LDM to accurately reconstruct images. Finally, we address the scenario of performing local edits using thin masks. We evaluate our method against the available baselines both qualitatively and quantitatively and demonstrate that in addition to being faster, our method achieves better precision than the baselines while mitigating some of their artifacts.
abstract_zh: 神经图像生成的巨大进步，加上看似万能的视觉语言模型的出现，最终使得基于文本的界面能够用于创建和编辑图像。处理通用图像需要多样化的底层生成模型，因此最新的作品利用了扩散模型，该模型在多样性方面超越了 GAN。然而，扩散模型的一个主要缺点是其推理时间相对较慢。在本文中，我们针对通用图像的本地文本驱动编辑任务提出了一种加速解决方案，其中所需的编辑仅限于用户提供的蒙版。我们的解决方案利用了最新的文本到图像潜在扩散模型（LDM），该模型通过在低维潜在空间中操作来加速扩散。我们首先将混合扩散合并到 LDM 中，将其转换为本地图像编辑器。接下来，我们针对 LDM 固有的无法准确重建图像的问题提出了一种基于优化的解决方案。最后，我们解决使用薄蒙版执行本地编辑的场景。我们根据可用的基线定性和定量地评估我们的方法，并证明我们的方法除了速度更快之外，还比基线实现了更好的精度，同时减少了一些伪影。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于融合潜空间扩散模型的加速局部文本驱动图像编辑方法。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在图像生成多样性上优于GAN，但推理速度较慢，且现有方法在局部编辑和薄掩码处理上存在精度和效率问题。
AI.method: 利用潜空间扩散模型（LDM）降低计算维度，结合融合扩散技术实现局部编辑，并通过优化算法解决图像重建误差，特别针对薄掩码场景进行改进。
AI.result: 在保持编辑精度的同时，推理速度显著提升，并有效减少基线方法的伪影，定性和定量实验均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高效高质量的文本驱动局部图像编辑提供了可行方案，适用于实际应用中的实时编辑需求。

authors_text: Feng Li,Hao Zhang,Huaizhe xu,Shilong Liu,Lei Zhang,Lionel M. Ni,Heung-Yeung Shum
title: Mask DINO: Towards A Unified Transformer-based Framework for Object Detection and Segmentation
title_zh: Mask DINO：迈向基于 Transformer 的统一目标检测和分割框架
abstract: In this paper we present Mask DINO, a unified object detection and segmentation framework. Mask DINO extends DINO (DETR with Improved Denoising Anchor Boxes) by adding a mask prediction branch which supports all image segmentation tasks (instance, panoptic, and semantic). It makes use of the query embeddings from DINO to dot-product a high-resolution pixel embedding map to predict a set of binary masks. Some key components in DINO are extended for segmentation through a shared architecture and training process. Mask DINO is simple, efficient, and scalable, and it can benefit from joint large-scale detection and segmentation datasets. Our experiments show that Mask DINO significantly outperforms all existing specialized segmentation methods, both on a ResNet-50 backbone and a pre-trained model with SwinL backbone. Notably, Mask DINO establishes the best results to date on instance segmentation (54.5 AP on COCO), panoptic segmentation (59.4 PQ on COCO), and semantic segmentation (60.8 mIoU on ADE20K) among models under one billion parameters. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/IDEACVR/MaskDINO}.
summary: In this paper we present Mask DINO, a unified object detection and segmentation framework. Mask DINO extends DINO (DETR with Improved Denoising Anchor Boxes) by adding a mask prediction branch which supports all image segmentation tasks (instance, panoptic, and semantic). Some key components in DINO are extended for segmentation through a shared architecture and training process. Our experiments show that Mask DINO significantly outperforms all existing specialized segmentation methods, both on a ResNet-50 backbone and a pre-trained model with SwinL backbone. Notably, Mask DINO establishes the best results to date on instance segmentation (54.5 AP on COCO), panoptic segmentation (59.4 PQ on COCO), and semantic segmentation (60.8 mIoU on ADE20K) among models under one billion parameters. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/IDEACVR/MaskDINO}.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 Mask DINO，一个统一的对象检测和分割框架。 Mask DINO 通过添加支持所有图像分割任务（实例、全景和语义）的掩模预测分支来扩展 DINO（具有改进的去噪锚框的 DETR）。它利用 DINO 的查询嵌入对高分辨率像素嵌入图进行点积来预测一组二进制掩码。 DINO 中的一些关键组件通过共享架构和训练过程进行了扩展以进行分割。 Mask DINO 简单、高效且可扩展，并且可以受益于联合大规模检测和分割数据集。我们的实验表明，Mask DINO 在 ResNet-50 主干和具有 SwinL 主干的预训练模型上均显着优于所有现有的专业分割方法。值得注意的是，Mask DINO 在 10 亿个参数下的模型中建立了迄今为止在实例分割（COCO 上 54.5 AP）、全景分割（COCO 上 59.4 PQ）和语义分割（ADE20K 上 60.8 mIoU）方面的最佳结果。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/IDEACVR/MaskDINO} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Mask DINO，一个统一的基于Transformer的目标检测与分割框架。
AI.motivation: 现有分割方法通常需要独立模型，而本文旨在通过统一框架提升检测与分割任务的效率与性能。
AI.method: 在DINO基础上增加掩码预测分支，利用查询嵌入生成高分辨率像素嵌入图，通过共享架构与训练流程实现多任务学习。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上达到实例分割54.5 AP、全景分割59.4 PQ，在ADE20K上语义分割达60.8 mIoU，参数量低于10亿。
AI.conclusion: Mask DINO通过统一架构显著超越现有分割方法，为多任务学习提供了高效且可扩展的解决方案。

search_text: Mask DINO: Towards A Unified Transformer-based Framework for Object Detection and Segmentation Mask DINO：迈向基于 Transformer 的统一目标检测和分割框架 In this paper we present Mask DINO, a unified object detection and segmentation framework. Mask DINO extends DINO (DETR with Improved Denoising Anchor Boxes) by adding a mask prediction branch which supports all image segmentation tasks (instance, panoptic, and semantic). It makes use of the query embeddings from DINO to dot-product a high-resolution pixel embedding map to predict a set of binary masks. Some key components in DINO are extended for segmentation through a shared architecture and training process. Mask DINO is simple, efficient, and scalable, and it can benefit from joint large-scale detection and segmentation datasets. Our experiments show that Mask DINO significantly outperforms all existing specialized segmentation methods, both on a ResNet-50 backbone and a pre-trained model with SwinL backbone. Notably, Mask DINO establishes the best results to date on instance segmentation (54.5 AP on COCO), panoptic segmentation (59.4 PQ on COCO), and semantic segmentation (60.8 mIoU on ADE20K) among models under one billion parameters. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/IDEACVR/MaskDINO}. 在本文中，我们提出了 Mask DINO，一个统一的对象检测和分割框架。 Mask DINO 通过添加支持所有图像分割任务（实例、全景和语义）的掩模预测分支来扩展 DINO（具有改进的去噪锚框的 DETR）。它利用 DINO 的查询嵌入对高分辨率像素嵌入图进行点积来预测一组二进制掩码。 DINO 中的一些关键组件通过共享架构和训练过程进行了扩展以进行分割。 Mask DINO 简单、高效且可扩展，并且可以受益于联合大规模检测和分割数据集。我们的实验表明，Mask DINO 在 ResNet-50 主干和具有 SwinL 主干的预训练模型上均显着优于所有现有的专业分割方法。值得注意的是，Mask DINO 在 10 亿个参数下的模型中建立了迄今为止在实例分割（COCO 上 54.5 AP）、全景分割（COCO 上 59.4 PQ）和语义分割（ADE20K 上 60.8 mIoU）方面的最佳结果。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/IDEACVR/MaskDINO} 获取。 本文提出Mask DINO，一个统一的基于Transformer的目标检测与分割框架。 Feng Li,Hao Zhang,Huaizhe xu,Shilong Liu,Lei Zhang,Lionel M. Ni,Heung-Yeung Shum cs.CV

authors_text: Sagie Benaim,Frederik Warburg,Peter Ebert Christensen,Serge Belongie
title: Volumetric Disentanglement for 3D Scene Manipulation
title_zh: 用于 3D 场景操作的体积解缠
abstract: Recently, advances in differential volumetric rendering enabled significant breakthroughs in the photo-realistic and fine-detailed reconstruction of complex 3D scenes, which is key for many virtual reality applications. However, in the context of augmented reality, one may also wish to effect semantic manipulations or augmentations of objects within a scene. To this end, we propose a volumetric framework for (i) disentangling or separating, the volumetric representation of a given foreground object from the background, and (ii) semantically manipulating the foreground object, as well as the background. Our framework takes as input a set of 2D masks specifying the desired foreground object for training views, together with the associated 2D views and poses, and produces a foreground-background disentanglement that respects the surrounding illumination, reflections, and partial occlusions, which can be applied to both training and novel views. Our method enables the separate control of pixel color and depth as well as 3D similarity transformations of both the foreground and background objects. We subsequently demonstrate the applicability of our framework on a number of downstream manipulation tasks including object camouflage, non-negative 3D object inpainting, 3D object translation, 3D object inpainting, and 3D text-based object manipulation. Full results are given in our project webpage at https://sagiebenaim.github.io/volumetric-disentanglement/
summary: Recently, advances in differential volumetric rendering enabled significant breakthroughs in the photo-realistic and fine-detailed reconstruction of complex 3D scenes, which is key for many virtual reality applications. However, in the context of augmented reality, one may also wish to effect semantic manipulations or augmentations of objects within a scene. To this end, we propose a volumetric framework for (i) disentangling or separating, the volumetric representation of a given foreground object from the background, and (ii) semantically manipulating the foreground object, as well as the background. Our framework takes as input a set of 2D masks specifying the desired foreground object for training views, together with the associated 2D views and poses, and produces a foreground-background disentanglement that respects the surrounding illumination, reflections, and partial occlusions, which can be applied to both training and novel views. Our method enables the separate control of pixel color and depth as well as 3D similarity transformations of both the foreground and background objects. We subsequently demonstrate the applicability of our framework on a number of downstream manipulation tasks including object camouflage, non-negative 3D object inpainting, 3D object translation, 3D object inpainting, and 3D text-based object manipulation. Full results are given in our project webpage at https://sagiebenaim.github.io/volumetric-disentanglement/
abstract_zh: 最近，差分体积渲染的进步使得复杂 3D 场景的照片级真实感和精细细节重建取得了重大突破，这对于许多虚拟现实应用来说至关重要。然而，在增强现实的背景下，人们可能还希望实现场景内对象的语义操作或增强。为此，我们提出了一个体积框架，用于（i）从背景中解开或分离给定前景对象的体积表示，以及（ii）语义上操纵前景对象以及背景。我们的框架将一组 2D 掩模作为输入，指定训练视图所需的前景对象，以及相关的 2D 视图和姿势，并产生尊重周围照明、反射和部分遮挡的前景-背景解开，这可以应用于训练视图和新颖视图。我们的方法可以单独控制像素颜色和深度以及前景和背景对象的 3D 相似度变换。随后，我们展示了我们的框架在许多下游操作任务上的适用性，包括对象伪装、非负 3D 对象修复、3D 对象翻译、3D 对象修复和基于 3D 文本的对象操作。完整结果在我们的项目网页中给出：https://sagiebenaim.github.io/volumetric-disentanglement/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种体积解耦框架，用于分离3D场景中的前景与背景，并实现对两者的语义操作。
AI.motivation: 尽管微分体积渲染技术实现了复杂3D场景的高精度重建，但现有方法难以在增强现实场景中实现对物体的语义级操控与编辑。
AI.method: 通过输入2D掩码、视角图像及相机位姿，构建体积框架分离前景与背景，保留光照、反射及遮挡关系，并支持对颜色、深度及3D变换的独立控制。
AI.result: 框架在物体伪装、非负补全、3D翻译及文本驱动操作等任务中均取得有效结果，完整实验可见项目网页。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了3D场景中前景与背景的解耦与可控编辑，为增强现实应用提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Basil Mustafa,Carlos Riquelme,Joan Puigcerver,Rodolphe Jenatton,Neil Houlsby
title: Multimodal Contrastive Learning with LIMoE: the Language-Image Mixture of Experts
title_zh: LIMoE 多模态对比学习：专家的语言图像混合
abstract: Large sparsely-activated models have obtained excellent performance in multiple domains. However, such models are typically trained on a single modality at a time. We present the Language-Image MoE, LIMoE, a sparse mixture of experts model capable of multimodal learning. LIMoE accepts both images and text simultaneously, while being trained using a contrastive loss. MoEs are a natural fit for a multimodal backbone, since expert layers can learn an appropriate partitioning of modalities. However, new challenges arise; in particular, training stability and balanced expert utilization, for which we propose an entropy-based regularization scheme. Across multiple scales, we demonstrate remarkable performance improvement over dense models of equivalent computational cost. LIMoE-L/16 trained comparably to CLIP-L/14 achieves 78.6% zero-shot ImageNet accuracy (vs. 76.2%), and when further scaled to H/14 (with additional data) it achieves 84.1%, comparable to state-of-the-art methods which use larger custom per-modality backbones and pre-training schemes. We analyse the quantitative and qualitative behavior of LIMoE, and demonstrate phenomena such as differing treatment of the modalities and the organic emergence of modality-specific experts.
summary: Large sparsely-activated models have obtained excellent performance in multiple domains. However, such models are typically trained on a single modality at a time. We present the Language-Image MoE, LIMoE, a sparse mixture of experts model capable of multimodal learning. LIMoE accepts both images and text simultaneously, while being trained using a contrastive loss. MoEs are a natural fit for a multimodal backbone, since expert layers can learn an appropriate partitioning of modalities. However, new challenges arise; in particular, training stability and balanced expert utilization, for which we propose an entropy-based regularization scheme. Across multiple scales, we demonstrate remarkable performance improvement over dense models of equivalent computational cost. LIMoE-L/16 trained comparably to CLIP-L/14 achieves 78.6% zero-shot ImageNet accuracy (vs. 76.2%), and when further scaled to H/14 (with additional data) it achieves 84.1%, comparable to state-of-the-art methods which use larger custom per-modality backbones and pre-training schemes. We analyse the quantitative and qualitative behavior of LIMoE, and demonstrate phenomena such as differing treatment of the modalities and the organic emergence of modality-specific experts.
abstract_zh: 大型稀疏激活模型在多个领域获得了优异的性能。然而，此类模型通常一次只针对一种模式进行训练。我们提出了语言-图像 MoE，LIMoE，这是一种能够进行多模态学习的稀疏专家混合模型。 LIMoE 同时接受图像和文本，同时使用对比损失进行训练。 MoE 非常适合多模式骨干网，因为专家层可以学习适当的模式划分。然而，新的挑战出现了；特别是训练稳定性和平衡的专家利用，为此我们提出了基于熵的正则化方案。在多个尺度上，我们展示了相对于同等计算成本的密集模型的显着性能改进。与 CLIP-L/14 进行类似训练的 LIMoE-L/16 实现了 78.6% 的零样本 ImageNet 准确率（对比 76.2%），当进一步扩展到 H/14（带有附加数据）时，它达到了 84.1%，与使用更大的定制每模态主干和预训练方案的最先进方法相当。我们分析了 LIMoE 的定量和定性行为，并论证了模态的不同处理和特定模态专家的有机出现等现象。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LIMoE，一种通过对比损失训练的稀疏专家混合模型，用于同时处理图像和文本的多模态学习。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模稀疏激活模型通常仅针对单一模态训练，难以有效融合多模态数据，且存在训练稳定性与专家利用率不平衡的问题。
AI.method: 设计语言-图像混合专家（LIMoE）架构，结合对比损失与熵正则化方案，实现多模态数据联合训练及专家层的模态自适应划分。
AI.result: LIMoE-L/16在零样本ImageNet上达到78.6%准确率（优于CLIP-L/14的76.2%），扩展版H/14达84.1%，接近当前最优方法性能。
AI.conclusion: LIMoE通过稀疏专家机制有效融合多模态信息，在计算成本相当情况下超越密集模型，且展现出模态特异性专家的自然生成能力。

search_text: Multimodal Contrastive Learning with LIMoE: the Language-Image Mixture of Experts LIMoE 多模态对比学习：专家的语言图像混合 Large sparsely-activated models have obtained excellent performance in multiple domains. However, such models are typically trained on a single modality at a time. We present the Language-Image MoE, LIMoE, a sparse mixture of experts model capable of multimodal learning. LIMoE accepts both images and text simultaneously, while being trained using a contrastive loss. MoEs are a natural fit for a multimodal backbone, since expert layers can learn an appropriate partitioning of modalities. However, new challenges arise; in particular, training stability and balanced expert utilization, for which we propose an entropy-based regularization scheme. Across multiple scales, we demonstrate remarkable performance improvement over dense models of equivalent computational cost. LIMoE-L/16 trained comparably to CLIP-L/14 achieves 78.6% zero-shot ImageNet accuracy (vs. 76.2%), and when further scaled to H/14 (with additional data) it achieves 84.1%, comparable to state-of-the-art methods which use larger custom per-modality backbones and pre-training schemes. We analyse the quantitative and qualitative behavior of LIMoE, and demonstrate phenomena such as differing treatment of the modalities and the organic emergence of modality-specific experts. 大型稀疏激活模型在多个领域获得了优异的性能。然而，此类模型通常一次只针对一种模式进行训练。我们提出了语言-图像 MoE，LIMoE，这是一种能够进行多模态学习的稀疏专家混合模型。 LIMoE 同时接受图像和文本，同时使用对比损失进行训练。 MoE 非常适合多模式骨干网，因为专家层可以学习适当的模式划分。然而，新的挑战出现了；特别是训练稳定性和平衡的专家利用，为此我们提出了基于熵的正则化方案。在多个尺度上，我们展示了相对于同等计算成本的密集模型的显着性能改进。与 CLIP-L/14 进行类似训练的 LIMoE-L/16 实现了 78.6% 的零样本 ImageNet 准确率（对比 76.2%），当进一步扩展到 H/14（带有附加数据）时，它达到了 84.1%，与使用更大的定制每模态主干和预训练方案的最先进方法相当。我们分析了 LIMoE 的定量和定性行为，并论证了模态的不同处理和特定模态专家的有机出现等现象。 本文提出LIMoE，一种通过对比损失训练的稀疏专家混合模型，用于同时处理图像和文本的多模态学习。 Basil Mustafa,Carlos Riquelme,Joan Puigcerver,Rodolphe Jenatton,Neil Houlsby cs.CV

authors_text: Ankit Pensia,Varun Jog,Po-Ling Loh
title: Communication-constrained hypothesis testing: Optimality, robustness, and reverse data processing inequalities
title_zh: 通信受限的假设检验：最优性、鲁棒性和逆向数据处理不等式
comment: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Information Theory
comments: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Information Theory
abstract: We study hypothesis testing under communication constraints, where each sample is quantized before being revealed to a statistician. Without communication constraints, it is well known that the sample complexity of simple binary hypothesis testing is characterized by the Hellinger distance between the distributions. We show that the sample complexity of simple binary hypothesis testing under communication constraints is at most a logarithmic factor larger than in the unconstrained setting and this bound is tight. We develop a polynomial-time algorithm that achieves the aforementioned sample complexity. Our framework extends to robust hypothesis testing, where the distributions are corrupted in the total variation distance. Our proofs rely on a new reverse data processing inequality and a reverse Markov inequality, which may be of independent interest. For simple $M$-ary hypothesis testing, the sample complexity in the absence of communication constraints has a logarithmic dependence on $M$. We show that communication constraints can cause an exponential blow-up leading to $Ω(M)$ sample complexity even for adaptive algorithms.
summary: We study hypothesis testing under communication constraints, where each sample is quantized before being revealed to a statistician. Without communication constraints, it is well known that the sample complexity of simple binary hypothesis testing is characterized by the Hellinger distance between the distributions. We show that the sample complexity of simple binary hypothesis testing under communication constraints is at most a logarithmic factor larger than in the unconstrained setting and this bound is tight. We develop a polynomial-time algorithm that achieves the aforementioned sample complexity. Our framework extends to robust hypothesis testing, where the distributions are corrupted in the total variation distance. Our proofs rely on a new reverse data processing inequality and a reverse Markov inequality, which may be of independent interest. For simple $M$-ary hypothesis testing, the sample complexity in the absence of communication constraints has a logarithmic dependence on $M$. We show that communication constraints can cause an exponential blow-up leading to $Ω(M)$ sample complexity even for adaptive algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们研究在通信限制下的假设检验，其中每个样本在向统计学家透露之前都经过量化。在没有通信限制的情况下，众所周知，简单二元假设检验的样本复杂性由分布之间的海林格距离来表征。我们证明，在通信约束下，简单二元假设检验的样本复杂度至多比无约束设置下大一个对数因子，并且这个界限是严格的。我们开发了一种多项式时间算法，可以实现上述样本复杂性。我们的框架扩展到稳健的假设检验，其中分布在总变异距离中被破坏。我们的证明依赖于新的反向数据处理不等式和反向马尔可夫不等式，这可能具有独立的意义。对于简单的$M$元假设检验，在没有通信约束的情况下样本复杂度与$M$呈对数依赖关系。我们表明，即使对于自适应算法，通信限制也会导致指数爆炸，从而导致 $Ω(M)$ 样本复杂性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在通信约束下的假设检验问题，量化了样本复杂度并开发了相关算法。
AI.motivation: 通信约束在实际场景中普遍存在，但现有理论对通信限制下假设检验的样本复杂度分析尚不明确，需建立新的理论框架。
AI.method: 通过引入反向数据处理不等式和反向马尔可夫不等式，结合多项式时间算法设计，分析通信约束对样本复杂度的影响。
AI.result: 证明通信约束下二元假设检验样本复杂度仅比无约束场景多对数因子，且该界紧致；对于M元假设检验，通信约束可能导致样本复杂度指数级增长。
AI.conclusion: 通信约束显著影响假设检验的样本复杂度，提出的理论框架和算法为实际应用提供了理论保证，反向不等式可能具有独立研究价值。

authors_text: Tom Ron,Michal Weiler-Sagie,Tamir Hazan
title: Dual Decomposition of Convex Optimization Layers for Consistent Attention in Medical Images
title_zh: 凸优化层的双重分解以实现医学图像中的一致关注
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures. In proceedings of the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning, Baltimore, Maryland, USA, PMLR 162, 2022. Copyright 2022 by the author(s)
comments: 12 pages, 5 figures. In proceedings of the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning, Baltimore, Maryland, USA, PMLR 162, 2022. Copyright 2022 by the author(s)
abstract: A key concern in integrating machine learning models in medicine is the ability to interpret their reasoning. Popular explainability methods have demonstrated satisfactory results in natural image recognition, yet in medical image analysis, many of these approaches provide partial and noisy explanations. Recently, attention mechanisms have shown compelling results both in their predictive performance and in their interpretable qualities. A fundamental trait of attention is that it leverages salient parts of the input which contribute to the model's prediction. To this end, our work focuses on the explanatory value of attention weight distributions. We propose a multi-layer attention mechanism that enforces consistent interpretations between attended convolutional layers using convex optimization. We apply duality to decompose the consistency constraints between the layers by reparameterizing their attention probability distributions. We further suggest learning the dual witness by optimizing with respect to our objective; thus, our implementation uses standard back-propagation, hence it is highly efficient. While preserving predictive performance, our proposed method leverages weakly annotated medical imaging data and provides complete and faithful explanations to the model's prediction.
summary: A key concern in integrating machine learning models in medicine is the ability to interpret their reasoning. Popular explainability methods have demonstrated satisfactory results in natural image recognition, yet in medical image analysis, many of these approaches provide partial and noisy explanations. Recently, attention mechanisms have shown compelling results both in their predictive performance and in their interpretable qualities. A fundamental trait of attention is that it leverages salient parts of the input which contribute to the model's prediction. To this end, our work focuses on the explanatory value of attention weight distributions. We propose a multi-layer attention mechanism that enforces consistent interpretations between attended convolutional layers using convex optimization. We apply duality to decompose the consistency constraints between the layers by reparameterizing their attention probability distributions. We further suggest learning the dual witness by optimizing with respect to our objective; thus, our implementation uses standard back-propagation, hence it is highly efficient. While preserving predictive performance, our proposed method leverages weakly annotated medical imaging data and provides complete and faithful explanations to the model's prediction.
abstract_zh: 将机器学习模型整合到医学中的一个关键问题是解释其推理的能力。流行的可解释性方法在自然图像识别中表现出了令人满意的结果，但在医学图像分析中，其中许多方法提供了部分且有噪声的解释。最近，注意力机制在预测性能和可解释性方面都显示出了令人信服的结果。注意力的一个基本特征是它利用输入中有助于模型预测的显着部分。为此，我们的工作重点是注意力权重分布的解释价值。我们提出了一种多层注意力机制，该机制使用凸优化在参与的卷积层之间强制执行一致的解释。我们应用对偶性通过重新参数化层的注意力概率分布来分解层之间的一致性约束。我们进一步建议通过优化我们的目标来学习双重见证；因此，我们的实现使用标准反向传播，因此效率很高。在保持预测性能的同时，我们提出的方法利用弱注释的医学成像数据，并为模型的预测提供完整和忠实的解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于凸优化分层的双重分解方法，用于医学图像中的一致性注意力机制。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分析中需确保模型解释的可靠性，但现有方法存在解释不完整或噪声大的问题，而注意力机制的跨层一致性尚未被充分解决。
AI.method: 通过凸优化分解实现多层注意力机制的一致性约束，利用对偶性重参数化注意力分布，并通过标准反向传播学习对偶见证。
AI.result: 在保持预测性能的同时，利用弱标注医学图像数据生成完整且忠实的模型解释。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过凸优化分层实现医学图像注意力机制的跨层一致性，有效提升了模型解释的可靠性与效率。

We apply duality to decompose the consistency constraints between the layers by reparameterizing their attention probability distributions. While preserving predictive performance, our proposed method leverages weakly annotated medical imaging data and provides complete and faithful explanations to the model's prediction. 将机器学习模型整合到医学中的一个关键问题是解释其推理的能力。流行的可解释性方法在自然图像识别中表现出了令人满意的结果，但在医学图像分析中，其中许多方法提供了部分且有噪声的解释。最近，注意力机制在预测性能和可解释性方面都显示出了令人信服的结果。注意力的一个基本特征是它利用输入中有助于模型预测的显着部分。为此，我们的工作重点是注意力权重分布的解释价值。我们提出了一种多层注意力机制，该机制使用凸优化在参与的卷积层之间强制执行一致的解释。我们应用对偶性通过重新参数化层的注意力概率分布来分解层之间的一致性约束。我们进一步建议通过优化我们的目标来学习双重见证；因此，我们的实现使用标准反向传播，因此效率很高。在保持预测性能的同时，我们提出的方法利用弱注释的医学成像数据，并为模型的预测提供完整和忠实的解释。 本文提出一种基于凸优化分层的双重分解方法，用于医学图像中的一致性注意力机制。 Tom Ron,Michal Weiler-Sagie,Tamir Hazan cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yaodong Yu,Stephen Bates,Yi Ma,Michael I. Jordan
title: Robust Calibration with Multi-domain Temperature Scaling
title_zh: 具有多域温度缩放的稳健校准
abstract: Uncertainty quantification is essential for the reliable deployment of machine learning models to high-stakes application domains. Uncertainty quantification is all the more challenging when training distribution and test distribution are different, even the distribution shifts are mild. Despite the ubiquity of distribution shifts in real-world applications, existing uncertainty quantification approaches mainly study the in-distribution setting where the train and test distributions are the same. In this paper, we develop a systematic calibration model to handle distribution shifts by leveraging data from multiple domains. Our proposed method -- multi-domain temperature scaling -- uses the heterogeneity in the domains to improve calibration robustness under distribution shift. Through experiments on three benchmark data sets, we find our proposed method outperforms existing methods as measured on both in-distribution and out-of-distribution test sets.
summary: Uncertainty quantification is essential for the reliable deployment of machine learning models to high-stakes application domains. Uncertainty quantification is all the more challenging when training distribution and test distribution are different, even the distribution shifts are mild. Despite the ubiquity of distribution shifts in real-world applications, existing uncertainty quantification approaches mainly study the in-distribution setting where the train and test distributions are the same. In this paper, we develop a systematic calibration model to handle distribution shifts by leveraging data from multiple domains. Our proposed method -- multi-domain temperature scaling -- uses the heterogeneity in the domains to improve calibration robustness under distribution shift. Through experiments on three benchmark data sets, we find our proposed method outperforms existing methods as measured on both in-distribution and out-of-distribution test sets.
abstract_zh: 不确定性量化对于将机器学习模型可靠地部署到高风险应用领域至关重要。当训练分布和测试分布不同时，即使分布变化很小，不确定性量化也更具挑战性。尽管现实世界应用中分布变化普遍存在，但现有的不确定性量化方法主要研究训练分布和测试分布相同的分布内设置。在本文中，我们开发了一个系统校准模型，通过利用来自多个领域的数据来处理分布变化。我们提出的方法——多域温度缩放——利用域中的异质性来提高分布偏移下的校准鲁棒性。通过对三个基准数据集的实验，我们发现我们提出的方法在分布内和分布外测试集上都优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决机器学习模型在分布偏移情况下的鲁棒校准问题，通过多领域数据提升不确定性量化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有校准方法在训练和测试分布不一致时效果不佳，而实际应用中分布偏移普遍存在，需提升模型在不同领域下的校准鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出多领域温度缩放方法，利用多个领域的数据异质性来增强模型在分布偏移情况下的校准鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集的实验表明，该方法在同分布和异分布测试集上均优于现有校准方法。
AI.conclusion: 多领域温度缩放方法能有效提升模型在分布偏移场景下的校准性能，为实际应用中的不确定性量化提供更可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Yunsheng Ni,Depu Meng,Changqian Yu,Chengbin Quan,Dongchun Ren,Youjian Zhao
title: CORE: Consistent Representation Learning for Face Forgery Detection
title_zh: 核心：人脸伪造检测的一致表示学习
abstract: Face manipulation techniques develop rapidly and arouse widespread public concerns. Despite that vanilla convolutional neural networks achieve acceptable performance, they suffer from the overfitting issue. To relieve this issue, there is a trend to introduce some erasing-based augmentations. We find that these methods indeed attempt to implicitly induce more consistent representations for different augmentations via assigning the same label for different augmented images. However, due to the lack of explicit regularization, the consistency between different representations is less satisfactory. Therefore, we constrain the consistency of different representations explicitly and propose a simple yet effective framework, COnsistent REpresentation Learning (CORE). Specifically, we first capture the different representations with different augmentations, then regularize the cosine distance of the representations to enhance the consistency. Extensive experiments (in-dataset and cross-dataset) demonstrate that CORE performs favorably against state-of-the-art face forgery detection methods.
summary: Face manipulation techniques develop rapidly and arouse widespread public concerns. Despite that vanilla convolutional neural networks achieve acceptable performance, they suffer from the overfitting issue. To relieve this issue, there is a trend to introduce some erasing-based augmentations. We find that these methods indeed attempt to implicitly induce more consistent representations for different augmentations via assigning the same label for different augmented images. However, due to the lack of explicit regularization, the consistency between different representations is less satisfactory. Therefore, we constrain the consistency of different representations explicitly and propose a simple yet effective framework, COnsistent REpresentation Learning (CORE). Specifically, we first capture the different representations with different augmentations, then regularize the cosine distance of the representations to enhance the consistency. Extensive experiments (in-dataset and cross-dataset) demonstrate that CORE performs favorably against state-of-the-art face forgery detection methods.
abstract_zh: 人脸操纵技术发展迅速，引起了公众的广泛关注。尽管普通卷积神经网络实现了可接受的性能，但它们仍存在过度拟合问题。为了缓解这个问题，有一种趋势是引入一些基于擦除的增强。我们发现这些方法确实试图通过为不同的增强图像分配相同的标签来隐式地为不同的增强引入更一致的表示。然而，由于缺乏显式正则化，不同表示之间的一致性不太令人满意。因此，我们明确限制不同表示的一致性，并提出一个简单而有效的框架：一致表示学习（CORE）。具体来说，我们首先捕获具有不同增强的不同表示，然后正则化表示的余弦距离以增强一致性。大量实验（数据集内和跨数据集）表明，CORE 的性能优于最先进的人脸伪造检测方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CORE的一致性表征学习框架，用于提升人脸伪造检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络在人脸伪造检测中存在过拟合问题，现有基于擦除的数据增强方法因缺乏显式正则化导致表征一致性不足。
AI.method: 通过不同增强策略生成多组表征，利用余弦距离正则化显式约束表征间的一致性，构建CORE框架。
AI.result: 在多个数据集（包括跨数据集）的实验中，CORE方法优于当前最先进的检测技术。
AI.conclusion: CORE框架通过显式一致性约束有效提升了表征鲁棒性，在人脸伪造检测任务中具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Chi-Mao Fan,Tsung-Jung Liu,Kuan-Hsien Liu
title: Compound Multi-branch Feature Fusion for Real Image Restoration
title_zh: 用于真实图像恢复的复合多分支特征融合
abstract: Image restoration is a challenging and ill-posed problem which also has been a long-standing issue. However, most of learning based restoration methods are proposed to target one degradation type which means they are lack of generalization. In this paper, we proposed a multi-branch restoration model inspired from the Human Visual System (i.e., Retinal Ganglion Cells) which can achieve multiple restoration tasks in a general framework. The experiments show that the proposed multi-branch architecture, called CMFNet, has competitive performance results on four datasets, including image dehazing, deraindrop, and deblurring, which are very common applications for autonomous cars. The source code and pretrained models of three restoration tasks are available at https://github.com/FanChiMao/CMFNet.
summary: Image restoration is a challenging and ill-posed problem which also has been a long-standing issue. However, most of learning based restoration methods are proposed to target one degradation type which means they are lack of generalization. In this paper, we proposed a multi-branch restoration model inspired from the Human Visual System (i.e., Retinal Ganglion Cells) which can achieve multiple restoration tasks in a general framework. The experiments show that the proposed multi-branch architecture, called CMFNet, has competitive performance results on four datasets, including image dehazing, deraindrop, and deblurring, which are very common applications for autonomous cars. The source code and pretrained models of three restoration tasks are available at https://github.com/FanChiMao/CMFNet.
abstract_zh: 图像恢复是一个具有挑战性且不适定的问题，也是一个长期存在的问题。然而，大多数基于学习的恢复方法都是针对一种退化类型提出的，这意味着它们缺乏泛化性。在本文中，我们提出了一种受人类视觉系统（即视网膜神经节细胞）启发的多分支恢复模型，该模型可以在通用框架中实现多个恢复任务。实验表明，所提出的多分支架构（称为 CMFNet）在四个数据集上具有具有竞争力的性能结果，包括图像去雾、去雨滴和去模糊，这些是自动驾驶汽车非常常见的应用。三个恢复任务的源代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/FanChiMao/CMFNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受人类视觉系统启发的多分支特征融合模型CMFNet，用于解决真实场景下的多任务图像修复问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的图像修复方法通常针对单一退化类型，缺乏泛化能力，难以适应自动驾驶等复杂应用场景的多任务需求。
AI.method: 设计受视网膜神经节细胞启发的多分支架构，通过复合特征融合机制实现去雾、去雨滴、去模糊等多任务的统一处理框架。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上取得与专用方法相当的性能，代码和三个修复任务的预训练模型已开源，验证了方法的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 多分支特征融合架构有效提升了图像修复的泛化能力，为复杂场景下的多任务视觉处理提供了新思路。

motivation: 现有基于学习的图像修复方法通常针对单一退化类型，缺乏泛化能力，难以适应自动驾驶等复杂应用场景的多任务需求。
method: 设计受视网膜神经节细胞启发的多分支架构，通过复合特征融合机制实现去雾、去雨滴、去模糊等多任务的统一处理框架。
result: 在四个公开数据集上取得与专用方法相当的性能，代码和三个修复任务的预训练模型已开源，验证了方法的实用性。
conclusion: 多分支特征融合架构有效提升了图像修复的泛化能力，为复杂场景下的多任务视觉处理提供了新思路。
search_text: Compound Multi-branch Feature Fusion for Real Image Restoration 用于真实图像恢复的复合多分支特征融合 Image restoration is a challenging and ill-posed problem which also has been a long-standing issue. However, most of learning based restoration methods are proposed to target one degradation type which means they are lack of generalization. In this paper, we proposed a multi-branch restoration model inspired from the Human Visual System (i.e., Retinal Ganglion Cells) which can achieve multiple restoration tasks in a general framework. The experiments show that the proposed multi-branch architecture, called CMFNet, has competitive performance results on four datasets, including image dehazing, deraindrop, and deblurring, which are very common applications for autonomous cars. The source code and pretrained models of three restoration tasks are available at https://github.com/FanChiMao/CMFNet. 图像恢复是一个具有挑战性且不适定的问题，也是一个长期存在的问题。然而，大多数基于学习的恢复方法都是针对一种退化类型提出的，这意味着它们缺乏泛化性。在本文中，我们提出了一种受人类视觉系统（即视网膜神经节细胞）启发的多分支恢复模型，该模型可以在通用框架中实现多个恢复任务。实验表明，所提出的多分支架构（称为 CMFNet）在四个数据集上具有具有竞争力的性能结果，包括图像去雾、去雨滴和去模糊，这些是自动驾驶汽车非常常见的应用。三个恢复任务的源代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/FanChiMao/CMFNet 获取。 本文提出一种受人类视觉系统启发的多分支特征融合模型CMFNet，用于解决真实场景下的多任务图像修复问题。 Chi-Mao Fan,Tsung-Jung Liu,Kuan-Hsien Liu eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Sungeun An,Spencer Rugaber,Jennifer Hammock,Ashok K. Goel
title: Understanding Self-Directed Learning in an Online Laboratory
title_zh: 了解在线实验室中的自主学习
abstract: We described a study on the use of an online laboratory for self-directed learning by constructing and simulating conceptual models of ecological systems. In this study, we could observe only the modeling behaviors and outcomes; the learning goals and outcomes were unknown. We used machine learning techniques to analyze the modeling behaviors of 315 learners and 822 conceptual models they generated. We derive three main conclusions from the results. First, learners manifest three types of modeling behaviors: observation (simulation focused), construction (construction focused), and full exploration (model construction, evaluation and revision). Second, while observation was the most common behavior among all learners, construction without evaluation was more common for less engaged learners and full exploration occurred mostly for more engaged learners. Third, learners who explored the full cycle of model construction, evaluation and revision generated models of higher quality. These modeling behaviors provide insights into self-directed learning at large.
summary: We described a study on the use of an online laboratory for self-directed learning by constructing and simulating conceptual models of ecological systems. In this study, we could observe only the modeling behaviors and outcomes; the learning goals and outcomes were unknown. We used machine learning techniques to analyze the modeling behaviors of 315 learners and 822 conceptual models they generated. We derive three main conclusions from the results. First, learners manifest three types of modeling behaviors: observation (simulation focused), construction (construction focused), and full exploration (model construction, evaluation and revision). Second, while observation was the most common behavior among all learners, construction without evaluation was more common for less engaged learners and full exploration occurred mostly for more engaged learners. Third, learners who explored the full cycle of model construction, evaluation and revision generated models of higher quality. These modeling behaviors provide insights into self-directed learning at large.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了一项通过构建和模拟生态系统概念模型来使用在线实验室进行自主学习的研究。在这项研究中，我们只能观察建模行为和结果；学习目标和结果未知。我们使用机器学习技术分析了 315 名学习者的建模行为以及他们生成的 822 个概念模型。我们从结果中得出三个主要结论。首先，学习者表现出三种类型的建模行为：观察（以模拟为主）、构建（以构建为主）和充分探索（模型构建、评估和修正）。其次，虽然观察是所有学习者中最常见的行为，但对于参与度较低的学习者来说，没有评估的构建更为常见，而对于参与度较高的学习者来说，充分探索则主要发生。第三，探索模型构建、评估和修订全周期的学习者生成了更高质量的模型。这些建模行为提供了对整体自主学习的见解。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过在线实验室分析学习者构建生态概念模型的行为，探讨自我导向学习的模式与效果。
AI.motivation: 传统学习评估难以捕捉自我导向学习的动态过程，需通过在线实验室观察建模行为以揭示学习机制。
AI.method: 采用机器学习分析315名学习者生成的822个模型，识别其建模行为类型及与模型质量的关系。
AI.result: 发现三种建模行为（观察、构建、全周期探索），高参与度学习者更倾向全周期探索，该行为与模型质量正相关。
AI.conclusion: 学习者建模行为类型可作为自我导向学习效果的指标，教育设计应鼓励完整模型构建与评估循环。

authors_text: Fabrizia Auletta,Rachel W. Kallen,Mario di Bernardo,Micheal J. Richardson
title: Predicting and Understanding Human Action Decisions during Skillful Joint-Action via Machine Learning and Explainable-AI
title_zh: 通过机器学习和可解释人工智能来预测和理解熟练联合行动期间的人类行动决策
abstract: This study uses supervised machine learning (SML) and explainable artificial intelligence (AI) to model, predict and understand human decision-making during skillful joint-action. Long short-term memory networks were trained to predict the target selection decisions of expert and novice actors completing a dyadic herding task. Results revealed that the trained models were expertise specific and could not only accurately predict the target selection decisions of expert and novice herders but could do so at timescales that preceded an actor's conscious intent. To understand what differentiated the target selection decisions of expert and novice actors, we then employed the explainable-AI technique, SHapley Additive exPlanation, to identify the importance of informational features (variables) on model predictions. This analysis revealed that experts were more influenced by information about the state of their co-herders compared to novices. The utility of employing SML and explainable-AI techniques for investigating human decision-making is discussed.
summary: This study uses supervised machine learning (SML) and explainable artificial intelligence (AI) to model, predict and understand human decision-making during skillful joint-action. Long short-term memory networks were trained to predict the target selection decisions of expert and novice actors completing a dyadic herding task. Results revealed that the trained models were expertise specific and could not only accurately predict the target selection decisions of expert and novice herders but could do so at timescales that preceded an actor's conscious intent. To understand what differentiated the target selection decisions of expert and novice actors, we then employed the explainable-AI technique, SHapley Additive exPlanation, to identify the importance of informational features (variables) on model predictions. This analysis revealed that experts were more influenced by information about the state of their co-herders compared to novices. The utility of employing SML and explainable-AI techniques for investigating human decision-making is discussed.
abstract_zh: 这项研究使用监督机器学习 (SML) 和可解释的人工智能 (AI) 来建模、预测和理解人类在熟练的联合行动过程中的决策。训练长短期记忆网络来预测完成二元放牧任务的专家和新手的目标选择决策。结果显示，经过训练的模型具有特定的专业知识，不仅可以准确预测专家和新手牧民的目标选择决策，而且可以在行为者有意识意图之前的时间尺度上进行预测。为了了解专家和新手的目标选择决策有何不同，我们随后采用了可解释的人工智能技术 SHapley Additive exPlanation 来识别信息特征（变量）对模型预测的重要性。这项分析表明，与新手相比，专家更容易受到有关牧民状态信息的影响。讨论了采用 SML 和可解释的人工智能技术来研究人类决策的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过监督机器学习和可解释AI技术，预测并解析人类在协作任务中的决策机制，重点分析专家与新手的差异。
AI.motivation: 探索人类在复杂协作任务中决策的潜在机制，揭示专家与新手在信息处理上的差异，并验证机器学习与可解释AI在认知科学中的应用价值。
AI.method: 采用长短期记忆网络（LSTM）预测专家与新手在双人放牧任务中的目标选择决策，并通过SHapley Additive exPlanation（SHAP）方法解析模型预测的特征重要性。
AI.result: 模型能准确预测专家与新手的决策行为，且预测时间早于意识意图；SHAP分析显示专家更依赖同伴状态信息，而新手更关注任务相关变量。
AI.conclusion: 结合机器学习与可解释AI技术可有效解析人类决策机制，揭示专家与新手在协作中的信息处理差异，为认知科学和人机协作研究提供新方法。

authors_text: Alberto Bacchin,Filippo Berno,Emanuele Menegatti,Alberto Pretto
title: People Tracking in Panoramic Video for Guiding Robots
title_zh: 用于引导机器人的全景视频中的人员跟踪
comment: Accepted to 17th International Conference on Intelligent Autonomous Systems (IAS-17)
comments: Accepted to 17th International Conference on Intelligent Autonomous Systems (IAS-17)
abstract: A guiding robot aims to effectively bring people to and from specific places within environments that are possibly unknown to them. During this operation the robot should be able to detect and track the accompanied person, trying never to lose sight of her/him. A solution to minimize this event is to use an omnidirectional camera: its 360° Field of View (FoV) guarantees that any framed object cannot leave the FoV if not occluded or very far from the sensor. However, the acquired panoramic videos introduce new challenges in perception tasks such as people detection and tracking, including the large size of the images to be processed, the distortion effects introduced by the cylindrical projection and the periodic nature of panoramic images. In this paper, we propose a set of targeted methods that allow to effectively adapt to panoramic videos a standard people detection and tracking pipeline originally designed for perspective cameras. Our methods have been implemented and tested inside a deep learning-based people detection and tracking framework with a commercial 360° camera. Experiments performed on datasets specifically acquired for guiding robot applications and on a real service robot show the effectiveness of the proposed approach over other state-of-the-art systems. We release with this paper the acquired and annotated datasets and the open-source implementation of our method.
summary: A guiding robot aims to effectively bring people to and from specific places within environments that are possibly unknown to them. During this operation the robot should be able to detect and track the accompanied person, trying never to lose sight of her/him. A solution to minimize this event is to use an omnidirectional camera: its 360° Field of View (FoV) guarantees that any framed object cannot leave the FoV if not occluded or very far from the sensor. However, the acquired panoramic videos introduce new challenges in perception tasks such as people detection and tracking, including the large size of the images to be processed, the distortion effects introduced by the cylindrical projection and the periodic nature of panoramic images. In this paper, we propose a set of targeted methods that allow to effectively adapt to panoramic videos a standard people detection and tracking pipeline originally designed for perspective cameras. Our methods have been implemented and tested inside a deep learning-based people detection and tracking framework with a commercial 360° camera. Experiments performed on datasets specifically acquired for guiding robot applications and on a real service robot show the effectiveness of the proposed approach over other state-of-the-art systems. We release with this paper the acquired and annotated datasets and the open-source implementation of our method.
abstract_zh: 引导机器人的目的是有效地将人们带到和离开他们可能不知道的环境中的特定地点。在此操作过程中，机器人应该能够检测和跟踪陪同人员，尽量不丢失她/他的视线。最大限度地减少这种事件的解决方案是使用全向摄像头：其 360° 视场 (FoV) 保证任何框架对象在没有遮挡或距离传感器很远的情况下都无法离开 FoV。然而，获取的全景视频给人物检测和跟踪等感知任务带来了新的挑战，包括要处理的图像尺寸大、圆柱投影引入的失真效应以及全景图像的周期性。在本文中，我们提出了一组有针对性的方法，可以有效地适应全景视频，这是最初为透视相机设计的标准人物检测和跟踪管道。我们的方法已在基于深度学习的人员检测和跟踪框架内使用商用 360° 摄像头进行实施和测试。在专门获取的用于指导机器人应用的数据集和真实的服务机器人上进行的实验表明，所提出的方法相对于其他最先进的系统的有效性。我们通过本文发布了获取和注释的数据集以及我们方法的开源实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对全景视频中人员跟踪的方法，以提升引导机器人在未知环境中的导航能力。
AI.motivation: 引导机器人需在未知环境中持续跟踪人员，但全景视频存在图像尺寸大、畸变及周期性等挑战，传统方法难以直接应用。
AI.method: 通过改进标准检测跟踪流程，适配全景视频特性，包括处理柱面投影畸变、优化大规模图像处理，并基于深度学习框架与商用360°相机实现。
AI.result: 在专用数据集和实际服务机器人测试中，所提方法优于现有系统，同时公开数据集和开源代码。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了全景视频人员跟踪难题，为机器人导航提供了可靠方案并推动相关研究。

search_text: People Tracking in Panoramic Video for Guiding Robots 用于引导机器人的全景视频中的人员跟踪 A guiding robot aims to effectively bring people to and from specific places within environments that are possibly unknown to them. During this operation the robot should be able to detect and track the accompanied person, trying never to lose sight of her/him. A solution to minimize this event is to use an omnidirectional camera: its 360° Field of View (FoV) guarantees that any framed object cannot leave the FoV if not occluded or very far from the sensor. However, the acquired panoramic videos introduce new challenges in perception tasks such as people detection and tracking, including the large size of the images to be processed, the distortion effects introduced by the cylindrical projection and the periodic nature of panoramic images. In this paper, we propose a set of targeted methods that allow to effectively adapt to panoramic videos a standard people detection and tracking pipeline originally designed for perspective cameras. Our methods have been implemented and tested inside a deep learning-based people detection and tracking framework with a commercial 360° camera. Experiments performed on datasets specifically acquired for guiding robot applications and on a real service robot show the effectiveness of the proposed approach over other state-of-the-art systems. We release with this paper the acquired and annotated datasets and the open-source implementation of our method. 引导机器人的目的是有效地将人们带到和离开他们可能不知道的环境中的特定地点。在此操作过程中，机器人应该能够检测和跟踪陪同人员，尽量不丢失她/他的视线。最大限度地减少这种事件的解决方案是使用全向摄像头：其 360° 视场 (FoV) 保证任何框架对象在没有遮挡或距离传感器很远的情况下都无法离开 FoV。然而，获取的全景视频给人物检测和跟踪等感知任务带来了新的挑战，包括要处理的图像尺寸大、圆柱投影引入的失真效应以及全景图像的周期性。在本文中，我们提出了一组有针对性的方法，可以有效地适应全景视频，这是最初为透视相机设计的标准人物检测和跟踪管道。我们的方法已在基于深度学习的人员检测和跟踪框架内使用商用 360° 摄像头进行实施和测试。在专门获取的用于指导机器人应用的数据集和真实的服务机器人上进行的实验表明，所提出的方法相对于其他最先进的系统的有效性。我们通过本文发布了获取和注释的数据集以及我们方法的开源实现。 本文提出针对全景视频中人员跟踪的方法，以提升引导机器人在未知环境中的导航能力。 Alberto Bacchin,Filippo Berno,Emanuele Menegatti,Alberto Pretto cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Xiangjin Xie,Yangning Li,Wang Chen,Kai Ouyang,Li Jiang,Haitao Zheng
title: Global Mixup: Eliminating Ambiguity with Clustering
title_zh: 全局混淆：通过聚类消除歧义
abstract: Data augmentation with \textbf{Mixup} has been proven an effective method to regularize the current deep neural networks. Mixup generates virtual samples and corresponding labels at once through linear interpolation. However, this one-stage generation paradigm and the use of linear interpolation have the following two defects: (1) The label of the generated sample is directly combined from the labels of the original sample pairs without reasonable judgment, which makes the labels likely to be ambiguous. (2) linear combination significantly limits the sampling space for generating samples. To tackle these problems, we propose a novel and effective augmentation method based on global clustering relationships named \textbf{Global Mixup}. Specifically, we transform the previous one-stage augmentation process into two-stage, decoupling the process of generating virtual samples from the labeling. And for the labels of the generated samples, relabeling is performed based on clustering by calculating the global relationships of the generated samples. In addition, we are no longer limited to linear relationships but generate more reliable virtual samples in a larger sampling space. Extensive experiments for \textbf{CNN}, \textbf{LSTM}, and \textbf{BERT} on five tasks show that Global Mixup significantly outperforms previous state-of-the-art baselines. Further experiments also demonstrate the advantage of Global Mixup in low-resource scenarios.
summary: Data augmentation with \textbf{Mixup} has been proven an effective method to regularize the current deep neural networks. Mixup generates virtual samples and corresponding labels at once through linear interpolation. However, this one-stage generation paradigm and the use of linear interpolation have the following two defects: (1) The label of the generated sample is directly combined from the labels of the original sample pairs without reasonable judgment, which makes the labels likely to be ambiguous. (2) linear combination significantly limits the sampling space for generating samples. To tackle these problems, we propose a novel and effective augmentation method based on global clustering relationships named \textbf{Global Mixup}. Specifically, we transform the previous one-stage augmentation process into two-stage, decoupling the process of generating virtual samples from the labeling. And for the labels of the generated samples, relabeling is performed based on clustering by calculating the global relationships of the generated samples. In addition, we are no longer limited to linear relationships but generate more reliable virtual samples in a larger sampling space. Extensive experiments for \textbf{CNN}, \textbf{LSTM}, and \textbf{BERT} on five tasks show that Global Mixup significantly outperforms previous state-of-the-art baselines. Further experiments also demonstrate the advantage of Global Mixup in low-resource scenarios.
abstract_zh: 使用 \textbf{Mixup} 进行数据增强已被证明是规范当前深度神经网络的有效方法。 Mixup 通过线性插值一次性生成虚拟样本和相应的标签。然而，这种一阶段生成范式和线性插值的使用存在以下两个缺陷：（1）生成样本的标签是直接从原始样本对的标签组合而成，没有进行合理的判断，这使得标签容易产生歧义。 (2)线性组合极大地限制了生成样本的采样空间。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于全局聚类关系的新颖有效的增强方法，名为 \textbf{Global Mixup}。具体来说，我们将之前的一阶段增强过程转变为两阶段，将生成虚拟样本的过程与标签解耦。并且对于生成样本的标签，通过计算生成样本的全局关系，基于聚类进行重新标记。此外，我们不再局限于线性关系，而是在更大的采样空间中生成更可靠的虚拟样本。对 \textbf{CNN}、\textbf{LSTM} 和 \textbf{BERT} 在五项任务上的广泛实验表明，全局混合显着优于之前最先进的基线。进一步的实验还证明了 Global Mixup 在资源匮乏的场景中的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Global Mixup的新数据增强方法，通过聚类关系消除标签模糊性并扩大样本生成空间。
AI.motivation: 传统Mixup方法存在标签组合不合理导致的模糊性问题及线性插值限制采样空间的缺陷，需改进生成过程与标签分配机制。
AI.method: 将单阶段生成过程拆分为两阶段，解耦样本生成与标签分配，并通过全局聚类关系重新标注生成样本，采用非线性方式扩大采样空间。
AI.result: 在CNN、LSTM和BERT模型的五个任务中，Global Mixup显著优于现有方法，尤其在低资源场景下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: Global Mixup通过聚类驱动的标签重分配和扩展采样空间，有效提升了模型性能，尤其适用于数据稀缺场景。

authors_text: Mohit Sewak,Sanjay K. Sahay,Hemant Rathore
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Cybersecurity Threat Detection and Protection: A Review
title_zh: 用于网络安全威胁检测和保护的深度强化学习：综述
comment: ef:International Conference On Secure Knowledge Management In Artificial Intelligence Era. Springer, Cham, 2021
comments: ef:International Conference On Secure Knowledge Management In Artificial Intelligence Era. Springer, Cham, 2021
abstract: The cybersecurity threat landscape has lately become overly complex. Threat actors leverage weaknesses in the network and endpoint security in a very coordinated manner to perpetuate sophisticated attacks that could bring down the entire network and many critical hosts in the network. Increasingly advanced deep and machine learning-based solutions have been used in threat detection and protection. The application of these techniques has been reviewed well in the scientific literature. Deep Reinforcement Learning has shown great promise in developing AI-based solutions for areas that had earlier required advanced human cognizance. Different techniques and algorithms under deep reinforcement learning have shown great promise in applications ranging from games to industrial processes, where it is claimed to augment systems with general AI capabilities. These algorithms have recently also been used in cybersecurity, especially in threat detection and endpoint protection, where these are showing state-of-the-art results. Unlike supervised machines and deep learning, deep reinforcement learning is used in more diverse ways and is empowering many innovative applications in the threat defense landscape. However, there does not exist any comprehensive review of these unique applications and accomplishments. Therefore, in this paper, we intend to fill this gap and provide a comprehensive review of the different applications of deep reinforcement learning in cybersecurity threat detection and protection.

However, there does not exist any comprehensive review of these unique applications and accomplishments. Therefore, in this paper, we intend to fill this gap and provide a comprehensive review of the different applications of deep reinforcement learning in cybersecurity threat detection and protection.
abstract_zh: 网络安全威胁形势最近变得过于复杂。威胁行为者以非常协调的方式利用网络和端点安全中的弱点来持续进行复杂的攻击，这些攻击可能会导致整个网络和网络中的许多关键主机瘫痪。越来越先进的基于深度和机器学习的解决方案已用于威胁检测和保护。这些技术的应用已在科学文献中得到很好的评论。深度强化学习在为早期需要人类高级认知的领域开发基于人工智能的解决方案方面显示出了巨大的前景。深度强化学习下的不同技术和算法在从游戏到工业流程的应用中显示出了巨大的前景，据称可以增强具有通用人工智能功能的系统。这些算法最近也被用于网络安全，特别是在威胁检测和端点保护方面，这些算法显示出了最先进的结果。与监督机器和深度学习不同，深度强化学习的使用方式更加多样化，并为威胁防御领域的许多创新应用提供了支持。然而，目前还没有对这些独特的应用和成就进行任何全面的审查。因此，在本文中，我们打算填补这一空白，并对深度强化学习在网络安全威胁检测和保护中的不同应用进行全面回顾。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在全面回顾深度强化学习在网络安全威胁检测与防护中的应用。
AI.motivation: 当前网络安全威胁日益复杂，而深度强化学习在该领域的应用缺乏系统性综述，亟需填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，系统梳理深度强化学习在威胁检测与防护中的技术框架、算法应用及案例分析。
AI.result: 总结了深度强化学习在网络安全中的关键应用场景、技术优势及现有研究的不足。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习为网络安全提供了创新解决方案，未来需进一步优化算法适应性与实际部署效果。

search_text: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Cybersecurity Threat Detection and Protection: A Review 用于网络安全威胁检测和保护的深度强化学习：综述 The cybersecurity threat landscape has lately become overly complex. Threat actors leverage weaknesses in the network and endpoint security in a very coordinated manner to perpetuate sophisticated attacks that could bring down the entire network and many critical hosts in the network. Increasingly advanced deep and machine learning-based solutions have been used in threat detection and protection. The application of these techniques has been reviewed well in the scientific literature. Deep Reinforcement Learning has shown great promise in developing AI-based solutions for areas that had earlier required advanced human cognizance. Different techniques and algorithms under deep reinforcement learning have shown great promise in applications ranging from games to industrial processes, where it is claimed to augment systems with general AI capabilities. These algorithms have recently also been used in cybersecurity, especially in threat detection and endpoint protection, where these are showing state-of-the-art results. Unlike supervised machines and deep learning, deep reinforcement learning is used in more diverse ways and is empowering many innovative applications in the threat defense landscape. However, there does not exist any comprehensive review of these unique applications and accomplishments. Therefore, in this paper, we intend to fill this gap and provide a comprehensive review of the different applications of deep reinforcement learning in cybersecurity threat detection and protection. 网络安全威胁形势最近变得过于复杂。威胁行为者以非常协调的方式利用网络和端点安全中的弱点来持续进行复杂的攻击，这些攻击可能会导致整个网络和网络中的许多关键主机瘫痪。越来越先进的基于深度和机器学习的解决方案已用于威胁检测和保护。这些技术的应用已在科学文献中得到很好的评论。深度强化学习在为早期需要人类高级认知的领域开发基于人工智能的解决方案方面显示出了巨大的前景。深度强化学习下的不同技术和算法在从游戏到工业流程的应用中显示出了巨大的前景，据称可以增强具有通用人工智能功能的系统。这些算法最近也被用于网络安全，特别是在威胁检测和端点保护方面，这些算法显示出了最先进的结果。与监督机器和深度学习不同，深度强化学习的使用方式更加多样化，并为威胁防御领域的许多创新应用提供了支持。然而，目前还没有对这些独特的应用和成就进行任何全面的审查。因此，在本文中，我们打算填补这一空白，并对深度强化学习在网络安全威胁检测和保护中的不同应用进行全面回顾。 本文旨在全面回顾深度强化学习在网络安全威胁检测与防护中的应用。 Mohit Sewak,Sanjay K. Sahay,Hemant Rathore cs.CR,cs.AI

authors_text: Youngjin Kim,Tarunraj Singh
title: Energy-Time Optimal Control of Wheeled Mobile Robots
title_zh: 轮式移动机器人的能量-时间最优控制
abstract: This paper focuses on the energy-time optimal control of wheeled mobile robots undergoing point-to-point transitions in an obstacles free space. Two interchangeable models are used to arrive at the necessary conditions for optimality. The first formulation exploits the Hamiltonian, while the second formulation considers the first variation of the augmented cost to derive the necessary conditions for optimality. Jacobi elliptic functions are shown to parameterize the closed form solutions for the states, control and costates. Analysis of the optimal control reveal that they are constrained to lie on a cylinder whose circular cross-section is a function of the weight penalizing the relative costs of time and energy. The evolving optimal costates for the second formulation are shown to lie on the intersection of two cylinders. The optimal control for the wheeled mobile robot undergoing point-to-point motion is also developed where the linear velocity is constrained to be time-invariant. It is shown that the costates are constrained to lie on the intersection of a cylinder and an extruded parabola. Numerical results for various point-to-point maneuvers are presented to illustrate the change in the structure of the optimal trajectories as a function of the relative location of the terminal and initial states.
summary: This paper focuses on the energy-time optimal control of wheeled mobile robots undergoing point-to-point transitions in an obstacles free space. Two interchangeable models are used to arrive at the necessary conditions for optimality. The first formulation exploits the Hamiltonian, while the second formulation considers the first variation of the augmented cost to derive the necessary conditions for optimality. Jacobi elliptic functions are shown to parameterize the closed form solutions for the states, control and costates. Analysis of the optimal control reveal that they are constrained to lie on a cylinder whose circular cross-section is a function of the weight penalizing the relative costs of time and energy. The evolving optimal costates for the second formulation are shown to lie on the intersection of two cylinders. The optimal control for the wheeled mobile robot undergoing point-to-point motion is also developed where the linear velocity is constrained to be time-invariant. It is shown that the costates are constrained to lie on the intersection of a cylinder and an extruded parabola. Numerical results for various point-to-point maneuvers are presented to illustrate the change in the structure of the optimal trajectories as a function of the relative location of the terminal and initial states.
abstract_zh: 本文重点研究轮式移动机器人在无障碍空间中进行点对点转换的能量-时间最优控制。使用两个可互换的模型来达到最优性的必要条件。第一个公式利用了哈密顿量，而第二个公式则考虑了增广成本的第一个变化，以得出最优性的必要条件。雅可比椭圆函数被证明可以参数化状态、控制和辅数的封闭形式解。对最优控制的分析表明，它们被限制在一个圆柱体上，该圆柱体的圆形横截面是重量的函数，从而惩罚时间和能量的相对成本。第二个公式的演化最优坐标显示位于两个圆柱体的交点上。还开发了进行点对点运动的轮式移动机器人的最优控制，其中线速度被限制为时不变的。结果表明，肋骨被限制位于圆柱体和挤压抛物线的交点上。给出了各种点对点机动的数值结果，以说明最佳轨迹结构随终端状态和初始状态相对位置的变化。

AI.tldr: 本文研究轮式移动机器人在无障碍空间中点对点转移的能量-时间最优控制问题。
AI.motivation: 为轮式移动机器人设计兼顾能量效率与时间最优的控制策略，以应对实际应用中的动态环境需求。
AI.method: 通过哈密顿量和增广成本一阶变分两种模型推导最优条件，并利用雅可比椭圆函数参数化状态、控制量和共态变量的解析解。
AI.result: 发现控制量受限于由时间-能量权重决定的圆柱面，共态变量轨迹呈现圆柱与抛物线的交集特性，并通过数值仿真验证了轨迹结构随初始/终端状态变化的规律。
AI.conclusion: 提出的理论框架为轮式机器人最优控制提供了解析解结构，揭示了能量-时间权衡下的几何约束特性。

authors_text: Yongyi Su,Xun Xu,Kui Jia
title: Revisiting Realistic Test-Time Training: Sequential Inference and Adaptation by Anchored Clustering
title_zh: 重新审视现实的测试时训练：通过锚定聚类进行顺序推理和适应
abstract: Deploying models on target domain data subject to distribution shift requires adaptation. Test-time training (TTT) emerges as a solution to this adaptation under a realistic scenario where access to full source domain data is not available and instant inference on target domain is required. Despite many efforts into TTT, there is a confusion over the experimental settings, thus leading to unfair comparisons. In this work, we first revisit TTT assumptions and categorize TTT protocols by two key factors. Among the multiple protocols, we adopt a realistic sequential test-time training (sTTT) protocol, under which we further develop a test-time anchored clustering (TTAC) approach to enable stronger test-time feature learning. TTAC discovers clusters in both source and target domain and match the target clusters to the source ones to improve generalization. Pseudo label filtering and iterative updating are developed to improve the effectiveness and efficiency of anchored clustering. We demonstrate that under all TTT protocols TTAC consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on six TTT datasets. We hope this work will provide a fair benchmarking of TTT methods and future research should be compared within respective protocols. A demo code is available at https://github.com/Gorilla-Lab-SCUT/TTAC.
summary: Deploying models on target domain data subject to distribution shift requires adaptation. Test-time training (TTT) emerges as a solution to this adaptation under a realistic scenario where access to full source domain data is not available and instant inference on target domain is required. Despite many efforts into TTT, there is a confusion over the experimental settings, thus leading to unfair comparisons. In this work, we first revisit TTT assumptions and categorize TTT protocols by two key factors. Among the multiple protocols, we adopt a realistic sequential test-time training (sTTT) protocol, under which we further develop a test-time anchored clustering (TTAC) approach to enable stronger test-time feature learning. TTAC discovers clusters in both source and target domain and match the target clusters to the source ones to improve generalization. Pseudo label filtering and iterative updating are developed to improve the effectiveness and efficiency of anchored clustering. We demonstrate that under all TTT protocols TTAC consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on six TTT datasets. We hope this work will provide a fair benchmarking of TTT methods and future research should be compared within respective protocols. A demo code is available at https://github.com/Gorilla-Lab-SCUT/TTAC.
abstract_zh: 在受分布变化影响的目标域数据上部署模型需要进行调整。在无法访问完整源域数据且需要对目标域进行即时推理的现实场景下，测试时训练 (TTT) 作为这种适应的解决方案而出现。尽管在 TTT 方面做出了很多努力，但实验设置仍存在混乱，从而导致不公平的比较。在这项工作中，我们首先重新审视 TTT 假设，并根据两个关键因素对 TTT 协议进行分类。在多个协议中，我们采用了现实的顺序测试时间训练（sTTT）协议，在该协议下，我们进一步开发了测试时间锚定聚类（TTAC）方法，以实现更强的测试时间特征学习。 TTAC 发现源域和目标域中的集群，并将目标集群与源集群进行匹配以提高泛化能力。伪标签过滤和迭代更新的开发是为了提高锚定聚类的有效性和效率。我们证明，在所有 TTT 协议下，TTAC 在六个 TTT 数据集上始终优于最先进的方法。我们希望这项工作将为 TTT 方法提供公平的基准测试，并且未来的研究应该在各自的协议内进行比较。演示代码可在 https://github.com/Gorilla-Lab-SCUT/TTAC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了真实场景下的测试时训练（TTT），提出了一种基于锚定聚类的测试时适应方法（TTAC），以提升模型在目标域数据上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有TTT方法因实验设置不统一导致公平性不足，亟需明确协议分类并建立基准以推动研究进展。
AI.method: 提出顺序测试时训练（sTTT）协议，并设计TTAC方法：通过源域与目标域的聚类匹配实现特征学习，结合伪标签过滤和迭代更新提升效率与效果。
AI.result: TTAC在六个TTT数据集上均优于现有最先进方法，验证了其在不同协议下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为TTT方法提供了公平的基准，建议未来研究应在特定协议框架内进行对比，并开源了代码以促进研究。
