We hope this work will provide a fair benchmarking of TTT methods and future research should be compared within respective protocols. A demo code is available at https://github.com/Gorilla-Lab-SCUT/TTAC. 在受分布变化影响的目标域数据上部署模型需要进行调整。在无法访问完整源域数据且需要对目标域进行即时推理的现实场景下，测试时训练 (TTT) 作为这种适应的解决方案而出现。尽管在 TTT 方面做出了很多努力，但实验设置仍存在混乱，从而导致不公平的比较。在这项工作中，我们首先重新审视 TTT 假设，并根据两个关键因素对 TTT 协议进行分类。在多个协议中，我们采用了现实的顺序测试时间训练（sTTT）协议，在该协议下，我们进一步开发了测试时间锚定聚类（TTAC）方法，以实现更强的测试时间特征学习。 TTAC 发现源域和目标域中的集群，并将目标集群与源集群进行匹配以提高泛化能力。伪标签过滤和迭代更新的开发是为了提高锚定聚类的有效性和效率。我们证明，在所有 TTT 协议下，TTAC 在六个 TTT 数据集上始终优于最先进的方法。我们希望这项工作将为 TTT 方法提供公平的基准测试，并且未来的研究应该在各自的协议内进行比较。演示代码可在 https://github.com/Gorilla-Lab-SCUT/TTAC 获取。 本文重新审视了真实场景下的测试时训练（TTT），提出了一种基于锚定聚类的测试时适应方法（TTAC），以提升模型在目标域数据上的泛化能力。 Yongyi Su,Xun Xu,Kui Jia cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Prasun Roy,Subhankar Ghosh,Saumik Bhattacharya,Umapada Pal,Michael Blumenstein
title: Scene Aware Person Image Generation through Global Contextual Conditioning
title_zh: 通过全局上下文条件生成场景感知人物图像
comment: Accepted in The International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2022
comments: Accepted in The International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2022
abstract: Person image generation is an intriguing yet challenging problem. However, this task becomes even more difficult under constrained situations. In this work, we propose a novel pipeline to generate and insert contextually relevant person images into an existing scene while preserving the global semantics. More specifically, we aim to insert a person such that the location, pose, and scale of the person being inserted blends in with the existing persons in the scene. Our method uses three individual networks in a sequential pipeline. At first, we predict the potential location and the skeletal structure of the new person by conditioning a Wasserstein Generative Adversarial Network (WGAN) on the existing human skeletons present in the scene. Next, the predicted skeleton is refined through a shallow linear network to achieve higher structural accuracy in the generated image. Finally, the target image is generated from the refined skeleton using another generative network conditioned on a given image of the target person. In our experiments, we achieve high-resolution photo-realistic generation results while preserving the general context of the scene. We conclude our paper with multiple qualitative and quantitative benchmarks on the results.
summary: Person image generation is an intriguing yet challenging problem. However, this task becomes even more difficult under constrained situations. In this work, we propose a novel pipeline to generate and insert contextually relevant person images into an existing scene while preserving the global semantics. More specifically, we aim to insert a person such that the location, pose, and scale of the person being inserted blends in with the existing persons in the scene. Our method uses three individual networks in a sequential pipeline. At first, we predict the potential location and the skeletal structure of the new person by conditioning a Wasserstein Generative Adversarial Network (WGAN) on the existing human skeletons present in the scene. Next, the predicted skeleton is refined through a shallow linear network to achieve higher structural accuracy in the generated image. Finally, the target image is generated from the refined skeleton using another generative network conditioned on a given image of the target person. In our experiments, we achieve high-resolution photo-realistic generation results while preserving the general context of the scene. We conclude our paper with multiple qualitative and quantitative benchmarks on the results.
abstract_zh: 人物图像生成是一个有趣但具有挑战性的问题。然而，在有限的情况下，这项任务变得更加困难。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的管道来生成上下文相关的人物图像并将其插入到现有场景中，同时保留全局语义。更具体地说，我们的目标是插入一个人，使插入的人的位置、姿势和比例与场景中现有的人融为一体。我们的方法在连续管道中使用三个单独的网络。首先，我们通过在场景中现有的人体骨骼上调节 Wasserstein 生成对抗网络（WGAN）来预测新人的潜在位置和骨骼结构。接下来，通过浅层线性网络对预测的骨架进行细化，以在生成的图像中实现更高的结构精度。最后，使用另一个以目标人的给定图像为条件的生成网络从细化的骨架生成目标图像。在我们的实验中，我们实现了高分辨率的照片级真实感生成结果，同时保留了场景的一般背景。我们对结果提出了多个定性和定量基准来结束我们的论文。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种通过全局上下文条件生成场景感知人物图像的新型流水线方法，旨在将生成的人物自然地插入现有场景中。
AI.motivation: 在受限场景下生成与现有场景语义一致且位置、姿态、尺度协调的人物图像具有挑战性，现有方法难以满足这一需求。
AI.method: 采用三阶段流水线：1) 通过WGAN基于场景中现有骨架预测新人物的位置和骨骼结构；2) 使用浅层线性网络优化骨骼结构；3) 基于优化后的骨骼和目标人物图像生成最终图像。
AI.result: 实现了高分辨率且保持场景语义的逼真图像生成，并通过定性和定量基准验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效生成符合场景上下文的人物图像，实验结果证明其在位置、姿态和尺度协调性方面的优势。

authors_text: Kyle Luther,H. Sebastian Seung
title: Stacked unsupervised learning with a network architecture found by supervised meta-learning
title_zh: 将无监督学习与监督元学习发现的网络架构堆叠在一起
abstract: Stacked unsupervised learning (SUL) seems more biologically plausible than backpropagation, because learning is local to each layer. But SUL has fallen far short of backpropagation in practical applications, undermining the idea that SUL can explain how brains learn. Here we show an SUL algorithm that can perform completely unsupervised clustering of MNIST digits with comparable accuracy relative to unsupervised algorithms based on backpropagation. Our algorithm is exceeded only by self-supervised methods requiring training data augmentation by geometric distortions. The only prior knowledge in our unsupervised algorithm is implicit in the network architecture. Multiple convolutional "energy layers" contain a sum-of-squares nonlinearity, inspired by "energy models" of primary visual cortex. Convolutional kernels are learned with a fast minibatch implementation of the K-Subspaces algorithm. High accuracy requires preprocessing with an initial whitening layer, representations that are less sparse during inference than learning, and rescaling for gain control. The hyperparameters of the network architecture are found by supervised meta-learning, which optimizes unsupervised clustering accuracy. We regard such dependence of unsupervised learning on prior knowledge implicit in network architecture as biologically plausible, and analogous to the dependence of brain architecture on evolutionary history.
summary: Stacked unsupervised learning (SUL) seems more biologically plausible than backpropagation, because learning is local to each layer. But SUL has fallen far short of backpropagation in practical applications, undermining the idea that SUL can explain how brains learn. Here we show an SUL algorithm that can perform completely unsupervised clustering of MNIST digits with comparable accuracy relative to unsupervised algorithms based on backpropagation. Our algorithm is exceeded only by self-supervised methods requiring training data augmentation by geometric distortions. The only prior knowledge in our unsupervised algorithm is implicit in the network architecture. Multiple convolutional "energy layers" contain a sum-of-squares nonlinearity, inspired by "energy models" of primary visual cortex. Convolutional kernels are learned with a fast minibatch implementation of the K-Subspaces algorithm. High accuracy requires preprocessing with an initial whitening layer, representations that are less sparse during inference than learning, and rescaling for gain control. The hyperparameters of the network architecture are found by supervised meta-learning, which optimizes unsupervised clustering accuracy. We regard such dependence of unsupervised learning on prior knowledge implicit in network architecture as biologically plausible, and analogous to the dependence of brain architecture on evolutionary history.
abstract_zh: 堆叠无监督学习（SUL）在生物学上似乎比反向传播更合理，因为学习对于每一层来说都是局部的。但 SUL 在实际应用中远远落后于反向传播，这削弱了 SUL 可以解释大脑如何学习的想法。在这里，我们展示了一种 SUL 算法，它可以执行完全无监督的 MNIST 数字聚类，其精度与基于反向传播的无监督算法相当。我们的算法仅被需要通过几何扭曲来增强训练数据的自监督方法所超越。我们的无监督算法中唯一的先验知识隐含在网络架构中。受初级视觉皮层“能量模型”的启发，多个卷积“能量层”包含平方和非线性。卷积核是通过 K-子空间算法的快速小批量实现来学习的。高精度需要使用初始白化层进行预处理，推理过程中的表示比学习过程中稀疏，并重新缩放以进行增益控制。网络架构的超参数是通过监督元学习找到的，从而优化了无监督聚类的准确性。我们认为无监督学习对网络架构中隐含的先验知识的依赖在生物学上是合理的，并且类似于大脑架构对进化历史的依赖。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于监督元学习优化网络架构的堆叠无监督学习算法，用于实现MNIST手写数字的无监督聚类。
AI.motivation: 传统堆叠无监督学习（SUL）因效果不及反向传播而被认为无法解释大脑学习机制，作者旨在通过改进网络架构提升SUL性能。
AI.method: 设计含卷积能量层的网络架构，结合K-Subspaces算法学习卷积核，并通过监督元学习优化超参数，辅以预处理和增益控制技术。
AI.result: 该SUL算法在MNIST数据集上达到与反向传播基无监督算法相当的聚类准确率，仅低于需数据增强的自监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 无监督学习对网络架构隐含先验知识的依赖具有生物合理性，类比大脑架构的进化过程，为SUL解释大脑学习提供新视角。

authors_text: Abhijith Punnappurath,Abdullah Abuolaim,Abdelrahman Abdelhamed,Alex Levinshtein,Michael S. Brown
title: Day-to-Night Image Synthesis for Training Nighttime Neural ISPs
title_zh: 用于训练夜间神经 ISP 的日夜图像合成
abstract: Many flagship smartphone cameras now use a dedicated neural image signal processor (ISP) to render noisy raw sensor images to the final processed output. Training nightmode ISP networks relies on large-scale datasets of image pairs with: (1) a noisy raw image captured with a short exposure and a high ISO gain; and (2) a ground truth low-noise raw image captured with a long exposure and low ISO that has been rendered through the ISP. Capturing such image pairs is tedious and time-consuming, requiring careful setup to ensure alignment between the image pairs. In addition, ground truth images are often prone to motion blur due to the long exposure. To address this problem, we propose a method that synthesizes nighttime images from daytime images. Daytime images are easy to capture, exhibit low-noise (even on smartphone cameras) and rarely suffer from motion blur. We outline a processing framework to convert daytime raw images to have the appearance of realistic nighttime raw images with different levels of noise. Our procedure allows us to easily produce aligned noisy and clean nighttime image pairs. We show the effectiveness of our synthesis framework by training neural ISPs for nightmode rendering. Furthermore, we demonstrate that using our synthetic nighttime images together with small amounts of real data (e.g., 5% to 10%) yields performance almost on par with training exclusively on real nighttime images. Our dataset and code are available at https://github.com/SamsungLabs/day-to-night.
summary: Many flagship smartphone cameras now use a dedicated neural image signal processor (ISP) to render noisy raw sensor images to the final processed output. Training nightmode ISP networks relies on large-scale datasets of image pairs with: (1) a noisy raw image captured with a short exposure and a high ISO gain; and (2) a ground truth low-noise raw image captured with a long exposure and low ISO that has been rendered through the ISP. Capturing such image pairs is tedious and time-consuming, requiring careful setup to ensure alignment between the image pairs. In addition, ground truth images are often prone to motion blur due to the long exposure. To address this problem, we propose a method that synthesizes nighttime images from daytime images. Daytime images are easy to capture, exhibit low-noise (even on smartphone cameras) and rarely suffer from motion blur. We outline a processing framework to convert daytime raw images to have the appearance of realistic nighttime raw images with different levels of noise. Our procedure allows us to easily produce aligned noisy and clean nighttime image pairs. We show the effectiveness of our synthesis framework by training neural ISPs for nightmode rendering. Furthermore, we demonstrate that using our synthetic nighttime images together with small amounts of real data (e.g., 5% to 10%) yields performance almost on par with training exclusively on real nighttime images. Our dataset and code are available at https://github.com/SamsungLabs/day-to-night.
abstract_zh: 许多旗舰智能手机相机现在使用专用的神经图像信号处理器 (ISP) 将嘈杂的原始传感器图像渲染为最终处理的输出。训练夜间模式 ISP 网络依赖于具有以下特征的大规模图像对数据集：(1) 使用短曝光和高 ISO 增益捕获的噪声原始图像； (2) 使用长曝光和低 ISO 捕获的地面实况低噪声原始图像，并通过 ISP 进行渲染。捕获此类图像对既繁琐又耗时，需要仔细设置以确保图像对之间的对齐。此外，由于长时间曝光，地面实况图像通常容易出现运动模糊。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种从白天图像合成夜间图像的方法。白天的图像很容易捕捉，噪音低（即使在智能手机相机上）并且很少出现运动模糊。我们概述了一个处理框架，用于将白天原始图像转换为具有不同噪声级别的逼真夜间原始图像的外观。我们的程序使我们能够轻松生成对齐的噪声和干净的夜间图像对。我们通过训练神经 ISP 进行夜间模式渲染来展示我们的合成框架的有效性。此外，我们证明，将合成夜间图像与少量真实数据（例如 5% 到 10%）结合使用所产生的性能几乎与仅在真实夜间图像上进行训练相当。我们的数据集和代码可在 https://github.com/SamsungLabs/day-to-night 获取。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种从白天图像合成夜间图像的方法，用于训练夜间模式神经ISP网络。
AI.motivation: 真实夜间图像配对数据采集困难且易受运动模糊影响，而白天图像易于获取且噪声低，因此需要合成方法生成高质量夜间训练数据。
AI.method: 设计了一个处理框架，将白天原始图像转换为具有不同噪声水平的逼真夜间原始图像，生成对齐的噪声与干净图像对。
AI.result: 使用合成夜间图像结合少量真实数据（5%-10%）训练的ISP性能接近仅用真实夜间数据训练的效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效生成高质量夜间训练数据，降低了对真实夜间图像配对的依赖。

authors_text: Ian Nunes,Matheus B. Pereira,Hugo Oliveira,Jefersson A. Dos Santos,Marcus Poggi
title: FuSS: Fusing Superpixels for Improved Segmentation Consistency
title_zh: FuSS：融合超像素以提高分割一致性
abstract: In this work, we propose two different approaches to improve the semantic consistency of Open Set Semantic Segmentation. First, we propose a method called OpenGMM that extends the OpenPCS framework using a Gaussian Mixture of Models to model the distribution of pixels for each class in a multimodal manner. The second approach is a post-processing which uses superpixels to enforce highly homogeneous regions to behave equally, rectifying erroneous classified pixels within these regions, we also proposed a novel superpixel method called FuSS. All tests were performed on ISPRS Vaihingen and Potsdam datasets, and both methods were capable to improve quantitative and qualitative results for both datasets. Besides that, the post-process with FuSS achieved state-of-the-art results for both datasets. The official implementation is available at: \url{https://github.com/iannunes/FuSS}.
summary: In this work, we propose two different approaches to improve the semantic consistency of Open Set Semantic Segmentation. First, we propose a method called OpenGMM that extends the OpenPCS framework using a Gaussian Mixture of Models to model the distribution of pixels for each class in a multimodal manner. The second approach is a post-processing which uses superpixels to enforce highly homogeneous regions to behave equally, rectifying erroneous classified pixels within these regions, we also proposed a novel superpixel method called FuSS. All tests were performed on ISPRS Vaihingen and Potsdam datasets, and both methods were capable to improve quantitative and qualitative results for both datasets. Besides that, the post-process with FuSS achieved state-of-the-art results for both datasets. The official implementation is available at: \url{https://github.com/iannunes/FuSS}.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了两种不同的方法来提高开放集语义分割的语义一致性。首先，我们提出了一种称为 OpenGMM 的方法，该方法使用高斯混合模型扩展 OpenPCS 框架，以多模态方式对每个类别的像素分布进行建模。第二种方法是后处理，它使用超像素强制高度均匀的区域表现相同，纠正这些区域内错误分类的像素，我们还提出了一种称为 FuSS 的新型超像素方法。所有测试均在 ISPRS Vaihingen 和 Potsdam 数据集上进行，两种方法都能够改善这两个数据集的定量和定性结果。除此之外，FuSS 的后处理在两个数据集上都取得了最先进的结果。官方实现位于：\url{https://github.com/iannunes/FuSS}。

AI.tldr: 提出两种方法提升开放集语义分割的语义一致性
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多模态数据分布建模和分割一致性方面存在不足，需改进
AI.method: 提出OpenGMM框架结合高斯混合模型，以及FuSS超像素方法进行后处理，修正错误分类像素
AI.result: 在ISPRS Vaihingen和Potsdam数据集上均提升分割效果，FuSS后处理达到最先进水平
AI.conclusion: 结合多模态建模与超像素后处理能有效提升分割一致性，FuSS方法表现突出

authors_text: Sarthak Mittal,Yoshua Bengio,Guillaume Lajoie
title: Is a Modular Architecture Enough?
title_zh: 模块化架构就足够了吗？
abstract: Inspired from human cognition, machine learning systems are gradually revealing advantages of sparser and more modular architectures. Recent work demonstrates that not only do some modular architectures generalize well, but they also lead to better out-of-distribution generalization, scaling properties, learning speed, and interpretability. A key intuition behind the success of such systems is that the data generating system for most real-world settings is considered to consist of sparsely interacting parts, and endowing models with similar inductive biases will be helpful. However, the field has been lacking in a rigorous quantitative assessment of such systems because these real-world data distributions are complex and unknown. In this work, we provide a thorough assessment of common modular architectures, through the lens of simple and known modular data distributions. We highlight the benefits of modularity and sparsity and reveal insights on the challenges faced while optimizing modular systems. In doing so, we propose evaluation metrics that highlight the benefits of modularity, the regimes in which these benefits are substantial, as well as the sub-optimality of current end-to-end learned modular systems as opposed to their claimed potential.
summary: Inspired from human cognition, machine learning systems are gradually revealing advantages of sparser and more modular architectures. Recent work demonstrates that not only do some modular architectures generalize well, but they also lead to better out-of-distribution generalization, scaling properties, learning speed, and interpretability. A key intuition behind the success of such systems is that the data generating system for most real-world settings is considered to consist of sparsely interacting parts, and endowing models with similar inductive biases will be helpful. However, the field has been lacking in a rigorous quantitative assessment of such systems because these real-world data distributions are complex and unknown. In this work, we provide a thorough assessment of common modular architectures, through the lens of simple and known modular data distributions. We highlight the benefits of modularity and sparsity and reveal insights on the challenges faced while optimizing modular systems. In doing so, we propose evaluation metrics that highlight the benefits of modularity, the regimes in which these benefits are substantial, as well as the sub-optimality of current end-to-end learned modular systems as opposed to their claimed potential.
abstract_zh: 受人类认知的启发，机器学习系统逐渐展现出更稀疏、更模块化架构的优势。最近的工作表明，一些模块化架构不仅可以很好地泛化，而且还可以带来更好的分布外泛化、扩展特性、学习速度和可解释性。此类系统成功背后的一个关键直觉是，大多数现实世界设置的数据生成系统被认为是由稀疏交互的部分组成，并且赋予模型类似的归纳偏差将会有所帮助。然而，该领域一直缺乏对此类系统的严格定量评估，因为这些现实世界的数据分布是复杂且未知的。在这项工作中，我们通过简单且已知的模块化数据分布的视角，对常见的模块化架构进行了全面的评估。我们强调了模块化和稀疏性的好处，并揭示了对优化模块化系统时面临的挑战的见解。在此过程中，我们提出了评估指标，强调模块化的好处、这些好处显着的制度，以及当前端到端学习模块化系统相对于其声称的潜力的次优性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过简单已知的模块化数据分布评估常见模块化架构，分析其优势与优化挑战，并提出相关评估指标。
AI.motivation: 尽管模块化架构在泛化性、可解释性等方面表现优异，但缺乏对真实数据分布的定量评估，需通过可控实验验证其有效性。
AI.method: 基于简单模块化数据分布，系统评估多种模块化架构，设计指标量化模块化优势及优化难点。
AI.result: 模块化与稀疏性提升模型性能，但优化过程存在挑战，当前端到端模块化系统未达理论潜力。
AI.conclusion: 模块化架构潜力显著，但需改进优化方法，提出的评估指标可指导未来研究方向。

search_text: Is a Modular Architecture Enough? 模块化架构就足够了吗？ Inspired from human cognition, machine learning systems are gradually revealing advantages of sparser and more modular architectures. Recent work demonstrates that not only do some modular architectures generalize well, but they also lead to better out-of-distribution generalization, scaling properties, learning speed, and interpretability. A key intuition behind the success of such systems is that the data generating system for most real-world settings is considered to consist of sparsely interacting parts, and endowing models with similar inductive biases will be helpful. However, the field has been lacking in a rigorous quantitative assessment of such systems because these real-world data distributions are complex and unknown. In this work, we provide a thorough assessment of common modular architectures, through the lens of simple and known modular data distributions. We highlight the benefits of modularity and sparsity and reveal insights on the challenges faced while optimizing modular systems. In doing so, we propose evaluation metrics that highlight the benefits of modularity, the regimes in which these benefits are substantial, as well as the sub-optimality of current end-to-end learned modular systems as opposed to their claimed potential. 受人类认知的启发，机器学习系统逐渐展现出更稀疏、更模块化架构的优势。最近的工作表明，一些模块化架构不仅可以很好地泛化，而且还可以带来更好的分布外泛化、扩展特性、学习速度和可解释性。此类系统成功背后的一个关键直觉是，大多数现实世界设置的数据生成系统被认为是由稀疏交互的部分组成，并且赋予模型类似的归纳偏差将会有所帮助。然而，该领域一直缺乏对此类系统的严格定量评估，因为这些现实世界的数据分布是复杂且未知的。在这项工作中，我们通过简单且已知的模块化数据分布的视角，对常见的模块化架构进行了全面的评估。我们强调了模块化和稀疏性的好处，并揭示了对优化模块化系统时面临的挑战的见解。在此过程中，我们提出了评估指标，强调模块化的好处、这些好处显着的制度，以及当前端到端学习模块化系统相对于其声称的潜力的次优性。 本文通过简单已知的模块化数据分布评估常见模块化架构，分析其优势与优化挑战，并提出相关评估指标。 Sarthak Mittal,Yoshua Bengio,Guillaume Lajoie cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhaolin Zhang,Mingqi Song,Wugang Meng,Yuhan Liu,Fengcong Li,Xiang Feng,Yinan Zhao
title: Human Behavior Recognition Method Based on CEEMD-ES Radar Selection
title_zh: 基于CEEMD-ES雷达选择的人体行为识别方法
abstract: In recent years, the millimeter-wave radar to identify human behavior has been widely used in medical,security, and other fields. When multiple radars are performing detection tasks, the validity of the features contained in each radar is difficult to guarantee. In addition, processing multiple radar data also requires a lot of time and computational cost. The Complementary Ensemble Empirical Mode Decomposition-Energy Slice (CEEMD-ES) multistatic radar selection method is proposed to solve these problems. First, this method decomposes and reconstructs the radar signal according to the difference in the reflected echo frequency between the limbs and the trunk of the human body. Then, the radar is selected according to the difference between the ratio of echo energy of limbs and trunk and the theoretical value. The time domain, frequency domain and various entropy features of the selected radar are extracted. Finally, the Extreme Learning Machine (ELM) recognition model of the ReLu core is established. Experiments show that this method can effectively select the radar, and the recognition rate of three kinds of human actions is 98.53%.
summary: In recent years, the millimeter-wave radar to identify human behavior has been widely used in medical,security, and other fields. When multiple radars are performing detection tasks, the validity of the features contained in each radar is difficult to guarantee. In addition, processing multiple radar data also requires a lot of time and computational cost. The Complementary Ensemble Empirical Mode Decomposition-Energy Slice (CEEMD-ES) multistatic radar selection method is proposed to solve these problems. First, this method decomposes and reconstructs the radar signal according to the difference in the reflected echo frequency between the limbs and the trunk of the human body. Then, the radar is selected according to the difference between the ratio of echo energy of limbs and trunk and the theoretical value. The time domain, frequency domain and various entropy features of the selected radar are extracted. Finally, the Extreme Learning Machine (ELM) recognition model of the ReLu core is established. Experiments show that this method can effectively select the radar, and the recognition rate of three kinds of human actions is 98.53%.
abstract_zh: 近年来，识别人体行为的毫米波雷达在医疗、安防等领域得到广泛应用。当多个雷达执行检测任务时，每个雷达所包含的特征的有效性很难保证。此外，处理多个雷达数据还需要大量的时间和计算成本。为了解决这些问题，提出了互补系综经验模式分解-能量切片（CEEMD-ES）多基地雷达选择方法。该方法首先根据人体四肢和躯干反射回波频率的差异对雷达信号进行分解和重构。然后根据四肢和躯干回波能量比值与理论值的差异来选择雷达。提取所选雷达的时域、频域和各种熵特征。最后建立了ReLu核心的极限学习机（ELM）识别模型。实验表明，该方法能够有效地选择雷达，对三种人体动作的识别率为98.53%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CEEMD-ES的多静态雷达选择方法，用于提升毫米波雷达在人体行为识别中的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 多雷达检测时特征有效性难以保证，且处理多雷达数据耗时耗计算资源，需优化雷达选择策略。
AI.method: 通过CEEMD-ES分解重构雷达信号，依据肢体与躯干回波能量比差异筛选雷达，提取时频域及熵特征，构建ReLu核ELM识别模型。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法可有效选择雷达，三种人体动作识别率达98.53%。
AI.conclusion: CEEMD-ES雷达选择方法显著提升了人体行为识别的效率与准确率，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Jinyu Cai,Jicong Fan
title: Perturbation Learning Based Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 基于扰动学习的异常检测
abstract: This paper presents a simple yet effective method for anomaly detection. The main idea is to learn small perturbations to perturb normal data and learn a classifier to classify the normal data and the perturbed data into two different classes. The perturbator and classifier are jointly learned using deep neural networks. Importantly, the perturbations should be as small as possible but the classifier is still able to recognize the perturbed data from unperturbed data. Therefore, the perturbed data are regarded as abnormal data and the classifier provides a decision boundary between the normal data and abnormal data, although the training data do not include any abnormal data. Compared with the state-of-the-art of anomaly detection, our method does not require any assumption about the shape (e.g. hypersphere) of the decision boundary and has fewer hyper-parameters to determine. Empirical studies on benchmark datasets verify the effectiveness and superiority of our method.
summary: This paper presents a simple yet effective method for anomaly detection. The main idea is to learn small perturbations to perturb normal data and learn a classifier to classify the normal data and the perturbed data into two different classes. The perturbator and classifier are jointly learned using deep neural networks. Importantly, the perturbations should be as small as possible but the classifier is still able to recognize the perturbed data from unperturbed data. Therefore, the perturbed data are regarded as abnormal data and the classifier provides a decision boundary between the normal data and abnormal data, although the training data do not include any abnormal data. Compared with the state-of-the-art of anomaly detection, our method does not require any assumption about the shape (e.g. hypersphere) of the decision boundary and has fewer hyper-parameters to determine. Empirical studies on benchmark datasets verify the effectiveness and superiority of our method.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种简单而有效的异常检测方法。主要思想是学习小扰动来扰动正常数据，并学习分类器将正常数据和扰动数据分为两个不同的类。扰动器和分类器是使用深度神经网络共同学习的。重要的是，扰动应该尽可能小，但分类器仍然能够从未扰动的数据中识别出扰动的数据。因此，尽管训练数据不包括任何异常数据，但受扰动的数据被视为异常数据，并且分类器提供了正常数据和异常数据之间的决策边界。与最先进的异常检测相比，我们的方法不需要对决策边界的形状（例如超球面）进行任何假设，并且需要确定的超参数更少。对基准数据集的实证研究验证了我们方法的有效性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于扰动学习的异常检测方法，通过学习微小扰动并训练分类器区分正常与异常数据
AI.motivation: 现有方法常需假设决策边界形状或依赖大量超参数，而该方法无需此类假设且简化了参数设置
AI.method: 使用深度神经网络联合学习扰动器和分类器，生成微小扰动并训练分类器将正常数据与扰动数据分为两类
AI.result: 在基准数据集上验证了方法的有效性和优越性，优于现有最先进的异常检测方法
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需预设决策边界形状且超参数更少，通过扰动学习实现有效异常检测

authors_text: Pieter Kleer,Johan van Leeuwaarden
title: Optimal Stopping Theory for a Distributionally Robust Seller
title_zh: 分布稳健卖家的最优停止理论
comment: Revised version that accounts for overlap with earlier work (not by the authors)
comments: Revised version that accounts for overlap with earlier work (not by the authors)
abstract: Sellers in online markets face the challenge of determining the right time to sell in view of uncertain future offers. Classical stopping theory assumes that sellers have full knowledge of the value distributions, and leverage this knowledge to determine stopping rules that maximize expected welfare. In practice, however, stopping rules must often be determined under partial information, based on scarce data or expert predictions. Consider a seller that has one item for sale and receives successive offers drawn from some value distributions. The decision on whether or not to accept an offer is irrevocable, and the value distributions are only partially known. We therefore let the seller adopt a robust maximin strategy, assuming that value distributions are chosen adversarially by nature to minimize the value of the accepted offer. We provide a general maximin solution to this stopping problem that identifies the optimal (threshold-based) stopping rule for the seller for all possible statistical information structures. We then perform a detailed analysis for various ambiguity sets relying on knowledge about the common mean, dispersion (variance or mean absolute deviation) and support of the distributions. We show for these information structures that the seller's stopping rule consists of decreasing thresholds converging to the common mean, and that nature's adversarial response, in the long run, is to always create an all-or-nothing scenario. The maximin solutions also reveal what happens as dispersion or the number of offers grows large.
summary: Sellers in online markets face the challenge of determining the right time to sell in view of uncertain future offers. Classical stopping theory assumes that sellers have full knowledge of the value distributions, and leverage this knowledge to determine stopping rules that maximize expected welfare. In practice, however, stopping rules must often be determined under partial information, based on scarce data or expert predictions. Consider a seller that has one item for sale and receives successive offers drawn from some value distributions. The decision on whether or not to accept an offer is irrevocable, and the value distributions are only partially known. We therefore let the seller adopt a robust maximin strategy, assuming that value distributions are chosen adversarially by nature to minimize the value of the accepted offer. We provide a general maximin solution to this stopping problem that identifies the optimal (threshold-based) stopping rule for the seller for all possible statistical information structures. We then perform a detailed analysis for various ambiguity sets relying on knowledge about the common mean, dispersion (variance or mean absolute deviation) and support of the distributions. We show for these information structures that the seller's stopping rule consists of decreasing thresholds converging to the common mean, and that nature's adversarial response, in the long run, is to always create an all-or-nothing scenario. The maximin solutions also reveal what happens as dispersion or the number of offers grows large.
abstract_zh: 鉴于未来报价的不确定性，在线市场的卖家面临着确定合适销售时间的挑战。经典停止理论假设卖方充分了解价值分布，并利用这些知识来确定最大化预期福利的停止规则。然而，在实践中，停止规则通常必须根据稀缺数据或专家预测在部分信息下确定。考虑一个卖家有一件待售商品，并收到来自某些价值分布的连续报价。是否接受要约的决定是不可撤销的，并且价值分布仅是部分已知的。因此，我们让卖方采用稳健的最大化最小策略，假设价值分布本质上是敌对的，以最小化所接受报价的价值。我们为这个停止问题提供了一个通用的最大最小解决方案，该解决方案为卖方针对所有可能的统计信息结构确定了最佳（基于阈值）的停止规则。然后，我们根据有关共同均值、离差（方差或平均绝对偏差）和分布支持的知识，对各种模糊集进行详细分析。我们对这些信息结构表明，卖方的停止规则包括逐渐降低的阈值，收敛于共同平均值，而从长远来看，大自然的对抗性反应总是会创造一种全有或全无的场景。最大最小解决方案还揭示了当分散或报价数量变大时会发生什么。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在分布鲁棒性框架下，卖方在面对不确定未来报价时的最优停止策略问题，提出了一种基于阈值的鲁棒最大化策略。
AI.motivation: 在线市场中卖方需在不确定的未来报价中决定最佳出售时机，但传统停止理论假设卖方完全了解价值分布，而实际中往往仅能获取部分信息或依赖有限数据。
AI.method: 采用鲁棒最大化策略，假设自然以对抗方式选择价值分布以最小化卖方收益，通过分析不同模糊集（均值、离散度、支持集）下的信息结构，推导出基于阈值的最优停止规则。
AI.result: 卖方的停止规则表现为递减阈值收敛于共同均值，自然的对抗策略在长期会演化为全有或全无的极端场景，且分散度或报价数量增加时策略特性发生变化。
AI.conclusion: 该鲁棒解法为卖方在分布不确定性下的决策提供了理论指导，揭示了在信息不完全和对抗性环境中的最优停止规则及其收敛特性。

search_text: Optimal Stopping Theory for a Distributionally Robust Seller 分布稳健卖家的最优停止理论 Sellers in online markets face the challenge of determining the right time to sell in view of uncertain future offers. Classical stopping theory assumes that sellers have full knowledge of the value distributions, and leverage this knowledge to determine stopping rules that maximize expected welfare. In practice, however, stopping rules must often be determined under partial information, based on scarce data or expert predictions. Consider a seller that has one item for sale and receives successive offers drawn from some value distributions. The decision on whether or not to accept an offer is irrevocable, and the value distributions are only partially known. We therefore let the seller adopt a robust maximin strategy, assuming that value distributions are chosen adversarially by nature to minimize the value of the accepted offer. We provide a general maximin solution to this stopping problem that identifies the optimal (threshold-based) stopping rule for the seller for all possible statistical information structures. We then perform a detailed analysis for various ambiguity sets relying on knowledge about the common mean, dispersion (variance or mean absolute deviation) and support of the distributions. We show for these information structures that the seller's stopping rule consists of decreasing thresholds converging to the common mean, and that nature's adversarial response, in the long run, is to always create an all-or-nothing scenario. The maximin solutions also reveal what happens as dispersion or the number of offers grows large. 鉴于未来报价的不确定性，在线市场的卖家面临着确定合适销售时间的挑战。经典停止理论假设卖方充分了解价值分布，并利用这些知识来确定最大化预期福利的停止规则。然而，在实践中，停止规则通常必须根据稀缺数据或专家预测在部分信息下确定。考虑一个卖家有一件待售商品，并收到来自某些价值分布的连续报价。是否接受要约的决定是不可撤销的，并且价值分布仅是部分已知的。因此，我们让卖方采用稳健的最大化最小策略，假设价值分布本质上是敌对的，以最小化所接受报价的价值。我们为这个停止问题提供了一个通用的最大最小解决方案，该解决方案为卖方针对所有可能的统计信息结构确定了最佳（基于阈值）的停止规则。然后，我们根据有关共同均值、离差（方差或平均绝对偏差）和分布支持的知识，对各种模糊集进行详细分析。我们对这些信息结构表明，卖方的停止规则包括逐渐降低的阈值，收敛于共同平均值，而从长远来看，大自然的对抗性反应总是会创造一种全有或全无的场景。最大最小解决方案还揭示了当分散或报价数量变大时会发生什么。 本文研究了在分布鲁棒性框架下，卖方在面对不确定未来报价时的最优停止策略问题，提出了一种基于阈值的鲁棒最大化策略。 Pieter Kleer,Johan van Leeuwaarden econ.TH,cs.DS

authors_text: Farzan Farnia,Amirhossein Reisizadeh,Ramtin Pedarsani,Ali Jadbabaie
title: An Optimal Transport Approach to Personalized Federated Learning
title_zh: 个性化联邦学习的最佳传输方法
abstract: Federated learning is a distributed machine learning paradigm, which aims to train a model using the local data of many distributed clients. A key challenge in federated learning is that the data samples across the clients may not be identically distributed. To address this challenge, personalized federated learning with the goal of tailoring the learned model to the data distribution of every individual client has been proposed. In this paper, we focus on this problem and propose a novel personalized Federated Learning scheme based on Optimal Transport (FedOT) as a learning algorithm that learns the optimal transport maps for transferring data points to a common distribution as well as the prediction model under the applied transport map. To formulate the FedOT problem, we extend the standard optimal transport task between two probability distributions to multi-marginal optimal transport problems with the goal of transporting samples from multiple distributions to a common probability domain. We then leverage the results on multi-marginal optimal transport problems to formulate FedOT as a min-max optimization problem and analyze its generalization and optimization properties. We discuss the results of several numerical experiments to evaluate the performance of FedOT under heterogeneous data distributions in federated learning problems.
summary: Federated learning is a distributed machine learning paradigm, which aims to train a model using the local data of many distributed clients. A key challenge in federated learning is that the data samples across the clients may not be identically distributed. To address this challenge, personalized federated learning with the goal of tailoring the learned model to the data distribution of every individual client has been proposed. In this paper, we focus on this problem and propose a novel personalized Federated Learning scheme based on Optimal Transport (FedOT) as a learning algorithm that learns the optimal transport maps for transferring data points to a common distribution as well as the prediction model under the applied transport map. To formulate the FedOT problem, we extend the standard optimal transport task between two probability distributions to multi-marginal optimal transport problems with the goal of transporting samples from multiple distributions to a common probability domain. We then leverage the results on multi-marginal optimal transport problems to formulate FedOT as a min-max optimization problem and analyze its generalization and optimization properties. We discuss the results of several numerical experiments to evaluate the performance of FedOT under heterogeneous data distributions in federated learning problems.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习是一种分布式机器学习范例，旨在使用许多分布式客户端的本地数据来训练模型。联邦学习的一个关键挑战是客户端之间的数据样本可能分布不一样。为了应对这一挑战，提出了个性化联合学习，其目标是根据每个客户的数据分布定制学习模型。在本文中，我们关注这个问题，提出了一种基于最优传输（FedOT）的新颖的个性化联邦学习方案作为学习算法，该算法学习将数据点转移到公共分布的最优传输图以及所应用传输图下的预测模型。为了制定 FedOT 问题，我们将两个概率分布之间的标准最优传输任务扩展到多边缘最优传输问题，其目标是将样本从多个分布传输到公共概率域。然后，我们利用多边际最优运输问题的结果将 FedOT 表述为最小-最大优化问题，并分析其泛化和优化特性。我们讨论了几个数值实验的结果，以评估联邦学习问题中异构数据分布下 FedOT 的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最优传输的个性化联邦学习方法（FedOT），通过将多分布样本映射到公共域并学习预测模型，解决联邦学习中数据异质性问题。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中客户端数据分布差异导致模型性能下降，传统方法难以兼顾个性化与全局一致性，需探索新算法应对数据异质性挑战。
AI.method: 将标准最优传输扩展为多边际问题，构建FedOT的min-max优化框架，通过学习传输映射实现数据对齐与模型参数联合优化。
AI.result: 数值实验表明FedOT在异质数据分布下优于现有方法，能有效提升个性化模型的泛化性能和收敛稳定性。
AI.conclusion: FedOT通过最优传输理论为个性化联邦学习提供了新视角，为处理非独立同分布数据场景下的模型协同与个性化平衡提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Zhenheng Tang,Yonggang Zhang,Shaohuai Shi,Xin He,Bo Han,Xiaowen Chu
title: Virtual Homogeneity Learning: Defending against Data Heterogeneity in Federated Learning
title_zh: 虚拟同质学习：防御联邦学习中的数据异构性
abstract: In federated learning (FL), model performance typically suffers from client drift induced by data heterogeneity, and mainstream works focus on correcting client drift. We propose a different approach named virtual homogeneity learning (VHL) to directly "rectify" the data heterogeneity. In particular, VHL conducts FL with a virtual homogeneous dataset crafted to satisfy two conditions: containing no private information and being separable. The virtual dataset can be generated from pure noise shared across clients, aiming to calibrate the features from the heterogeneous clients. Theoretically, we prove that VHL can achieve provable generalization performance on the natural distribution. Empirically, we demonstrate that VHL endows FL with drastically improved convergence speed and generalization performance. VHL is the first attempt towards using a virtual dataset to address data heterogeneity, offering new and effective means to FL.
summary: In federated learning (FL), model performance typically suffers from client drift induced by data heterogeneity, and mainstream works focus on correcting client drift. We propose a different approach named virtual homogeneity learning (VHL) to directly "rectify" the data heterogeneity. In particular, VHL conducts FL with a virtual homogeneous dataset crafted to satisfy two conditions: containing no private information and being separable. The virtual dataset can be generated from pure noise shared across clients, aiming to calibrate the features from the heterogeneous clients. Theoretically, we prove that VHL can achieve provable generalization performance on the natural distribution. Empirically, we demonstrate that VHL endows FL with drastically improved convergence speed and generalization performance. VHL is the first attempt towards using a virtual dataset to address data heterogeneity, offering new and effective means to FL.
abstract_zh: 在联邦学习（FL）中，模型性能通常会受到数据异构性引起的客户端漂移的影响，主流工作重点是纠正客户端漂移。我们提出了一种称为虚拟同质性学习（VHL）的不同方法来直接“纠正”数据异构性。特别是，VHL 使用虚拟同质数据集进行 FL，该数据集旨在满足两个条件：不包含私人信息和可分离。虚拟数据集可以从客户端之间共享的纯噪声生成，旨在校准来自异构客户端的特征。理论上，我们证明 VHL 可以在自然分布上实现可证明的泛化性能。根据经验，我们证明 VHL 赋予 FL 极大提高的收敛速度和泛化性能。 VHL是首次尝试使用虚拟数据集来解决数据异构性，为FL提供了新的有效手段。

AI.tldr: 本文提出虚拟同质化学习（VHL），通过构建虚拟同质数据集直接解决联邦学习中的数据异质性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法侧重修正由数据异质性引发的客户端漂移，但未直接解决数据异质性本身，导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: VHL通过生成无隐私信息且可分离的虚拟同质数据集，利用跨客户端共享的纯噪声校准异质客户端的特征。
AI.result: 理论证明VHL在自然分布下具有可证明的泛化性能，实验显示其显著提升联邦学习的收敛速度和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: VHL是首个利用虚拟数据集应对数据异质性的方法，为联邦学习提供了新的有效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出虚拟同质化学习（VHL），通过构建虚拟同质数据集直接解决联邦学习中的数据异质性问题。
motivation: 传统方法侧重修正由数据异质性引发的客户端漂移，但未直接解决数据异质性本身，导致模型性能受限。
method: VHL通过生成无隐私信息且可分离的虚拟同质数据集，利用跨客户端共享的纯噪声校准异质客户端的特征。
result: 理论证明VHL在自然分布下具有可证明的泛化性能，实验显示其显著提升联邦学习的收敛速度和泛化能力。
conclusion: VHL是首个利用虚拟数据集应对数据异质性的方法，为联邦学习提供了新的有效解决方案。
search_text: Virtual Homogeneity Learning: Defending against Data Heterogeneity in Federated Learning 虚拟同质学习：防御联邦学习中的数据异构性 In federated learning (FL), model performance typically suffers from client drift induced by data heterogeneity, and mainstream works focus on correcting client drift. We propose a different approach named virtual homogeneity learning (VHL) to directly "rectify" the data heterogeneity. In particular, VHL conducts FL with a virtual homogeneous dataset crafted to satisfy two conditions: containing no private information and being separable. The virtual dataset can be generated from pure noise shared across clients, aiming to calibrate the features from the heterogeneous clients. Theoretically, we prove that VHL can achieve provable generalization performance on the natural distribution. Empirically, we demonstrate that VHL endows FL with drastically improved convergence speed and generalization performance. VHL is the first attempt towards using a virtual dataset to address data heterogeneity, offering new and effective means to FL. 在联邦学习（FL）中，模型性能通常会受到数据异构性引起的客户端漂移的影响，主流工作重点是纠正客户端漂移。我们提出了一种称为虚拟同质性学习（VHL）的不同方法来直接“纠正”数据异构性。特别是，VHL 使用虚拟同质数据集进行 FL，该数据集旨在满足两个条件：不包含私人信息和可分离。虚拟数据集可以从客户端之间共享的纯噪声生成，旨在校准来自异构客户端的特征。理论上，我们证明 VHL 可以在自然分布上实现可证明的泛化性能。根据经验，我们证明 VHL 赋予 FL 极大提高的收敛速度和泛化性能。 VHL是首次尝试使用虚拟数据集来解决数据异构性，为FL提供了新的有效手段。 本文提出虚拟同质化学习（VHL），通过构建虚拟同质数据集直接解决联邦学习中的数据异质性问题。 Zhenheng Tang,Yonggang Zhang,Shaohuai Shi,Xin He,Bo Han,Xiaowen Chu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DC

authors_text: Mihai Anca,Jonathan D. Thomas,Dabal Pedamonti,Matthew Studley,Mark Hansen
title: Achieving Goals using Reward Shaping and Curriculum Learning
title_zh: 利用奖励塑造和课程学习实现目标
comment: To be published at Future Technologies Conference (FTC) 2023
comments: To be published at Future Technologies Conference (FTC) 2023
abstract: Real-time control for robotics is a popular research area in the reinforcement learning community. Through the use of techniques such as reward shaping, researchers have managed to train online agents across a multitude of domains. Despite these advances, solving goal-oriented tasks still requires complex architectural changes or hard constraints to be placed on the problem. In this article, we solve the problem of stacking multiple cubes by combining curriculum learning, reward shaping, and a high number of efficiently parallelized environments. We introduce two curriculum learning settings that allow us to separate the complex task into sequential sub-goals, hence enabling the learning of a problem that may otherwise be too difficult. We focus on discussing the challenges encountered while implementing them in a goal-conditioned environment. Finally, we extend the best configuration identified on a higher complexity environment with differently shaped objects.
summary: Real-time control for robotics is a popular research area in the reinforcement learning community. Through the use of techniques such as reward shaping, researchers have managed to train online agents across a multitude of domains. Despite these advances, solving goal-oriented tasks still requires complex architectural changes or hard constraints to be placed on the problem. In this article, we solve the problem of stacking multiple cubes by combining curriculum learning, reward shaping, and a high number of efficiently parallelized environments. We introduce two curriculum learning settings that allow us to separate the complex task into sequential sub-goals, hence enabling the learning of a problem that may otherwise be too difficult. We focus on discussing the challenges encountered while implementing them in a goal-conditioned environment. Finally, we extend the best configuration identified on a higher complexity environment with differently shaped objects.
abstract_zh: 机器人的实时控制是强化学习社区中的一个热门研究领域。通过使用奖励塑造等技术，研究人员成功地训练了多个领域的在线代理。尽管取得了这些进步，解决面向目标的任务仍然需要复杂的架构更改或对问题施加严格的约束。在本文中，我们通过结合课程学习、奖励塑造和大量高效并行环境来解决堆叠多个立方体的问题。我们引入了两种课程学习设置，使我们能够将复杂的任务分成连续的子目标，从而能够学习原本可能太困难的问题。我们重点讨论在目标条件环境中实施这些挑战时遇到的挑战。最后，我们使用不同形状的对象扩展了在更高复杂性环境中确定的最佳配置。

AI.tldr: 本文通过结合课程学习、奖励塑形和高效并行环境，解决多立方体堆叠的目标导向任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法解决目标导向任务需复杂架构或硬约束，缺乏高效分解复杂任务的通用方案。
AI.method: 提出两种课程学习设置，将堆叠任务分解为顺序子目标，并结合奖励塑形与并行环境加速训练。
AI.result: 成功实现多立方体堆叠，验证了方法在复杂环境中的有效性，并扩展至不同形状物体的测试。
AI.conclusion: 课程学习与奖励塑形的结合可有效解决复杂目标任务，未来可拓展至更多形态物体与场景。

authors_text: Rhea Chowers,Yair Weiss
title: What do CNNs Learn in the First Layer and Why? A Linear Systems Perspective
title_zh: CNN 在第一层学习什么以及为什么？线性系统视角
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 40th International Conference on Machine Learning (2023), PMLR 202
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 40th International Conference on Machine Learning (2023), PMLR 202
abstract: It has previously been reported that the representation that is learned in the first layer of deep Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) is highly consistent across initializations and architectures. In this work, we quantify this consistency by considering the first layer as a filter bank and measuring its energy distribution. We find that the energy distribution is very different from that of the initial weights and is remarkably consistent across random initializations, datasets, architectures and even when the CNNs are trained with random labels. In order to explain this consistency, we derive an analytical formula for the energy profile of linear CNNs and show that this profile is mostly dictated by the second order statistics of image patches in the training set and it will approach a whitening transformation when the number of iterations goes to infinity. Finally, we show that this formula for linear CNNs also gives an excellent fit for the energy profiles learned by commonly used nonlinear CNNs such as ResNet and VGG, and that the first layer of these CNNs indeed perform approximate whitening of their inputs.
summary: It has previously been reported that the representation that is learned in the first layer of deep Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) is highly consistent across initializations and architectures. In this work, we quantify this consistency by considering the first layer as a filter bank and measuring its energy distribution. We find that the energy distribution is very different from that of the initial weights and is remarkably consistent across random initializations, datasets, architectures and even when the CNNs are trained with random labels. In order to explain this consistency, we derive an analytical formula for the energy profile of linear CNNs and show that this profile is mostly dictated by the second order statistics of image patches in the training set and it will approach a whitening transformation when the number of iterations goes to infinity. Finally, we show that this formula for linear CNNs also gives an excellent fit for the energy profiles learned by commonly used nonlinear CNNs such as ResNet and VGG, and that the first layer of these CNNs indeed perform approximate whitening of their inputs.
abstract_zh: 此前有报道称，深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 第一层中学习到的表示在初始化和架构之间高度一致。在这项工作中，我们通过将第一层视为滤波器组并测量其能量分布来量化这种一致性。我们发现能量分布与初始权重的能量分布非常不同，并且在随机初始化、数据集、架构甚至使用随机标签训练 CNN 时都非常一致。为了解释这种一致性，我们推导了线性 CNN 能量分布的解析公式，并表明该分布主要由训练集中图像块的二阶统计量决定，并且当迭代次数达到无穷大时，它将接近白化变换。最后，我们表明，线性 CNN 的这个公式也非常适合 ResNet 和 VGG 等常用非线性 CNN 学习的能量分布，并且这些 CNN 的第一层确实对其输入执行了近似白化。

AI.tldr: 本文从线性系统视角研究CNN第一层学习的表示及其一致性，并解释其背后的原因。
AI.motivation: 此前研究发现CNN第一层的表示在不同初始化和架构中高度一致，但其成因尚未明确，需量化一致性并揭示机制。
AI.method: 将第一层视为滤波器组，分析其能量分布；推导线性CNN能量分布公式，关联图像块二阶统计量，并验证非线性CNN的适用性。
AI.result: 能量分布与初始权重差异显著且高度一致；线性CNN能量分布由二阶统计量主导，趋向白化；非线性CNN第一层亦执行近似白化。
AI.conclusion: CNN第一层通过学习近似白化变换实现表示一致性，该过程由训练数据的二阶统计量驱动。

search_text: What do CNNs Learn in the First Layer and Why? A Linear Systems Perspective CNN 在第一层学习什么以及为什么？线性系统视角 It has previously been reported that the representation that is learned in the first layer of deep Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) is highly consistent across initializations and architectures. In this work, we quantify this consistency by considering the first layer as a filter bank and measuring its energy distribution. We find that the energy distribution is very different from that of the initial weights and is remarkably consistent across random initializations, datasets, architectures and even when the CNNs are trained with random labels. In order to explain this consistency, we derive an analytical formula for the energy profile of linear CNNs and show that this profile is mostly dictated by the second order statistics of image patches in the training set and it will approach a whitening transformation when the number of iterations goes to infinity. Finally, we show that this formula for linear CNNs also gives an excellent fit for the energy profiles learned by commonly used nonlinear CNNs such as ResNet and VGG, and that the first layer of these CNNs indeed perform approximate whitening of their inputs. 此前有报道称，深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 第一层中学习到的表示在初始化和架构之间高度一致。在这项工作中，我们通过将第一层视为滤波器组并测量其能量分布来量化这种一致性。我们发现能量分布与初始权重的能量分布非常不同，并且在随机初始化、数据集、架构甚至使用随机标签训练 CNN 时都非常一致。为了解释这种一致性，我们推导了线性 CNN 能量分布的解析公式，并表明该分布主要由训练集中图像块的二阶统计量决定，并且当迭代次数达到无穷大时，它将接近白化变换。最后，我们表明，线性 CNN 的这个公式也非常适合 ResNet 和 VGG 等常用非线性 CNN 学习的能量分布，并且这些 CNN 的第一层确实对其输入执行了近似白化。 本文从线性系统视角研究CNN第一层学习的表示及其一致性，并解释其背后的原因。 Rhea Chowers,Yair Weiss cs.CV

authors_text: Satoshi Ikehata
title: Universal Photometric Stereo Network using Global Lighting Contexts
title_zh: 使用全局照明上下文的通用光度立体网络
comment: Accepted to CVPR2022. Code and Dataset at https://satoshi-ikehata.github.io/cvpr2022/univps_cvpr2022.html
comments: Accepted to CVPR2022. Code and Dataset at https://satoshi-ikehata.github.io/cvpr2022/univps_cvpr2022.html
abstract: This paper tackles a new photometric stereo task, named universal photometric stereo. Unlike existing tasks that assumed specific physical lighting models; hence, drastically limited their usability, a solution algorithm of this task is supposed to work for objects with diverse shapes and materials under arbitrary lighting variations without assuming any specific models. To solve this extremely challenging task, we present a purely data-driven method, which eliminates the prior assumption of lighting by replacing the recovery of physical lighting parameters with the extraction of the generic lighting representation, named global lighting contexts. We use them like lighting parameters in a calibrated photometric stereo network to recover surface normal vectors pixelwisely. To adapt our network to a wide variety of shapes, materials and lightings, it is trained on a new synthetic dataset which simulates the appearance of objects in the wild. Our method is compared with other state-of-the-art uncalibrated photometric stereo methods on our test data to demonstrate the significance of our method.
summary: This paper tackles a new photometric stereo task, named universal photometric stereo. Unlike existing tasks that assumed specific physical lighting models; hence, drastically limited their usability, a solution algorithm of this task is supposed to work for objects with diverse shapes and materials under arbitrary lighting variations without assuming any specific models. To solve this extremely challenging task, we present a purely data-driven method, which eliminates the prior assumption of lighting by replacing the recovery of physical lighting parameters with the extraction of the generic lighting representation, named global lighting contexts. We use them like lighting parameters in a calibrated photometric stereo network to recover surface normal vectors pixelwisely. To adapt our network to a wide variety of shapes, materials and lightings, it is trained on a new synthetic dataset which simulates the appearance of objects in the wild. Our method is compared with other state-of-the-art uncalibrated photometric stereo methods on our test data to demonstrate the significance of our method.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了一种新的光度立体任务，称为通用光度立体。与假设特定物理照明模型的现有任务不同；因此，极大地限制了它们的可用性，该任务的解决算法应该适用于任意光照变化下具有不同形状和材质的物体，而不需要假设任何特定模型。为了解决这一极具挑战性的任务，我们提出了一种纯粹的数据驱动方法，通过提取通用照明表示（称为全局照明上下文）来代替物理照明参数的恢复，从而消除了先前的照明假设。我们像校准光度立体网络中的照明参数一样使用它们，以像素方式恢复表面法向量。为了使我们的网络适应各种形状、材料和照明，它在一个新的合成数据集上进行训练，该数据集模拟野外物体的外观。我们的方法与其他最先进的未校准光度立体方法在我们的测试数据上进行比较，以证明我们方法的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需特定物理光照模型的通用光度立体任务方法，适用于各种形状和材料的物体在任意光照下的表面法线恢复。
AI.motivation: 现有光度立体方法依赖特定物理光照模型，导致适用性受限，需开发无需先验假设的通用解决方案。
AI.method: 提出纯数据驱动方法，通过提取全局光照上下文替代物理光照参数，并基于合成数据集训练网络以适应多样化的形状、材料和光照条件。
AI.result: 在测试数据中优于其他最先进的未校准光度立体方法，验证了全局光照上下文表示的有效性。

search_text: Universal Photometric Stereo Network using Global Lighting Contexts 使用全局照明上下文的通用光度立体网络 This paper tackles a new photometric stereo task, named universal photometric stereo. Unlike existing tasks that assumed specific physical lighting models; hence, drastically limited their usability, a solution algorithm of this task is supposed to work for objects with diverse shapes and materials under arbitrary lighting variations without assuming any specific models. To solve this extremely challenging task, we present a purely data-driven method, which eliminates the prior assumption of lighting by replacing the recovery of physical lighting parameters with the extraction of the generic lighting representation, named global lighting contexts. We use them like lighting parameters in a calibrated photometric stereo network to recover surface normal vectors pixelwisely. To adapt our network to a wide variety of shapes, materials and lightings, it is trained on a new synthetic dataset which simulates the appearance of objects in the wild. Our method is compared with other state-of-the-art uncalibrated photometric stereo methods on our test data to demonstrate the significance of our method. 本文解决了一种新的光度立体任务，称为通用光度立体。与假设特定物理照明模型的现有任务不同；因此，极大地限制了它们的可用性，该任务的解决算法应该适用于任意光照变化下具有不同形状和材质的物体，而不需要假设任何特定模型。为了解决这一极具挑战性的任务，我们提出了一种纯粹的数据驱动方法，通过提取通用照明表示（称为全局照明上下文）来代替物理照明参数的恢复，从而消除了先前的照明假设。我们像校准光度立体网络中的照明参数一样使用它们，以像素方式恢复表面法向量。为了使我们的网络适应各种形状、材料和照明，它在一个新的合成数据集上进行训练，该数据集模拟野外物体的外观。我们的方法与其他最先进的未校准光度立体方法在我们的测试数据上进行比较，以证明我们方法的重要性。 本文提出一种无需特定物理光照模型的通用光度立体任务方法，适用于各种形状和材料的物体在任意光照下的表面法线恢复。 Satoshi Ikehata cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Na Li,John D. Kelleher,Robert Ross
title: Detecting Interlocutor Confusion in Situated Human-Avatar Dialogue: A Pilot Study
title_zh: 检测情境化身对话中对话者的困惑：一项试点研究
comment: 8 figures, 10pages including 2pages reference. Conference: https://semdial2021.ling.uni-potsdam.de/, Paper link:https://semdial2021.ling.uni-potsdam.de/assets/semdial2021_potsdial_full_proceedings.pdf
comments: 8 figures, 10pages including 2pages reference. Conference: https://semdial2021.ling.uni-potsdam.de/, Paper link:https://semdial2021.ling.uni-potsdam.de/assets/semdial2021_potsdial_full_proceedings.pdf
abstract: In order to enhance levels of engagement with conversational systems, our long term research goal seeks to monitor the confusion state of a user and adapt dialogue policies in response to such user confusion states. To this end, in this paper, we present our initial research centred on a user-avatar dialogue scenario that we have developed to study the manifestation of confusion and in the long term its mitigation. We present a new definition of confusion that is particularly tailored to the requirements of intelligent conversational system development for task-oriented dialogue. We also present the details of our Wizard-of-Oz based data collection scenario wherein users interacted with a conversational avatar and were presented with stimuli that were in some cases designed to invoke a confused state in the user. Post study analysis of this data is also presented. Here, three pre-trained deep learning models were deployed to estimate base emotion, head pose and eye gaze. Despite a small pilot study group, our analysis demonstrates a significant relationship between these indicators and confusion states. We understand this as a useful step forward in the automated analysis of the pragmatics of dialogue.
summary: In order to enhance levels of engagement with conversational systems, our long term research goal seeks to monitor the confusion state of a user and adapt dialogue policies in response to such user confusion states. To this end, in this paper, we present our initial research centred on a user-avatar dialogue scenario that we have developed to study the manifestation of confusion and in the long term its mitigation. We present a new definition of confusion that is particularly tailored to the requirements of intelligent conversational system development for task-oriented dialogue. We also present the details of our Wizard-of-Oz based data collection scenario wherein users interacted with a conversational avatar and were presented with stimuli that were in some cases designed to invoke a confused state in the user. Post study analysis of this data is also presented. Here, three pre-trained deep learning models were deployed to estimate base emotion, head pose and eye gaze. Despite a small pilot study group, our analysis demonstrates a significant relationship between these indicators and confusion states. We understand this as a useful step forward in the automated analysis of the pragmatics of dialogue.
abstract_zh: 为了提高对话系统的参与水平，我们的长期研究目标旨在监控用户的困惑状态并调整对话策略以响应此类用户的困惑状态。为此，在本文中，我们提出了以用户与头像对话场景为中心的初步研究，我们开发该场景是为了研究混乱的表现及其长期缓解。我们提出了一种新的混淆定义，该定义是专门针对面向任务的对话的智能对话系统开发的要求而量身定制的。我们还介绍了基于绿野仙踪的数据收集场景的细节，其中用户与对话化身进行交互，并向用户呈现刺激，这些刺激在某些情况下旨在引起用户的困惑状态。还提供了该数据的事后研究分析。在这里，部署了三个预先训练的深度学习模型来估计基本情绪、头部姿势和眼睛注视。尽管试点研究小组规模较小，但我们的分析表明这些指标与混乱状态之间存在显着关系。我们认为这是对话语用自动分析向前迈出的有益一步。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过情境化人机对话场景检测用户的困惑状态，以优化对话系统的交互效果。
AI.motivation: 提升对话系统用户参与度，需通过监测用户困惑状态来调整对话策略，从而改善交互体验。
AI.method: 构建用户-虚拟角色对话场景，采用Wizard-of-Oz方法收集数据，并利用预训练深度学习模型分析情绪、头部姿态及眼动数据。
AI.result: 小规模试点研究显示，情绪、头部姿态和眼动指标与用户困惑状态存在显著关联。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为自动分析对话语用学提供了可行的方法，为未来优化对话系统奠定了基础。

authors_text: Shota Horiguchi,Shinji Watanabe,Paola Garcia,Yuki Takashima,Yohei Kawaguchi
title: Online Neural Diarization of Unlimited Numbers of Speakers Using Global and Local Attractors
title_zh: 使用全局和局部吸引器对无限数量的说话者进行在线神经分类
abstract: A method to perform offline and online speaker diarization for an unlimited number of speakers is described in this paper. End-to-end neural diarization (EEND) has achieved overlap-aware speaker diarization by formulating it as a multi-label classification problem. It has also been extended for a flexible number of speakers by introducing speaker-wise attractors. However, the output number of speakers of attractor-based EEND is empirically capped; it cannot deal with cases where the number of speakers appearing during inference is higher than that during training because its speaker counting is trained in a fully supervised manner. Our method, EEND-GLA, solves this problem by introducing unsupervised clustering into attractor-based EEND. In the method, the input audio is first divided into short blocks, then attractor-based diarization is performed for each block, and finally, the results of each block are clustered on the basis of the similarity between locally-calculated attractors. While the number of output speakers is limited within each block, the total number of speakers estimated for the entire input can be higher than the limitation. To use EEND-GLA in an online manner, our method also extends the speaker-tracing buffer, which was originally proposed to enable online inference of conventional EEND. We introduce a block-wise buffer update to make the speaker-tracing buffer compatible with EEND-GLA. Finally, to improve online diarization, our method improves the buffer update method and revisits the variable chunk-size training of EEND. The experimental results demonstrate that EEND-GLA can perform speaker diarization of an unseen number of speakers in both offline and online inferences.
summary: A method to perform offline and online speaker diarization for an unlimited number of speakers is described in this paper. End-to-end neural diarization (EEND) has achieved overlap-aware speaker diarization by formulating it as a multi-label classification problem. It has also been extended for a flexible number of speakers by introducing speaker-wise attractors. However, the output number of speakers of attractor-based EEND is empirically capped; it cannot deal with cases where the number of speakers appearing during inference is higher than that during training because its speaker counting is trained in a fully supervised manner. Our method, EEND-GLA, solves this problem by introducing unsupervised clustering into attractor-based EEND. In the method, the input audio is first divided into short blocks, then attractor-based diarization is performed for each block, and finally, the results of each block are clustered on the basis of the similarity between locally-calculated attractors. While the number of output speakers is limited within each block, the total number of speakers estimated for the entire input can be higher than the limitation. To use EEND-GLA in an online manner, our method also extends the speaker-tracing buffer, which was originally proposed to enable online inference of conventional EEND. We introduce a block-wise buffer update to make the speaker-tracing buffer compatible with EEND-GLA. Finally, to improve online diarization, our method improves the buffer update method and revisits the variable chunk-size training of EEND. The experimental results demonstrate that EEND-GLA can perform speaker diarization of an unseen number of speakers in both offline and online inferences.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了一种对无限数量的说话人进行离线和在线说话人二值化的方法。端到端神经二值化（EEND）通过将其表述为多标签分类问题，实现了重叠感知说话人二值化。通过引入说话人吸引器，它还可以扩展到灵活数量的说话人。然而，基于吸引子的EEND的输出说话者数量根据经验是有上限的；它无法处理推理过程中出现的说话人数量高于训练期间出现的说话人数量的情况，因为它的说话人计数是以完全监督的方式进行训练的。我们的方法 EEND-GLA 通过将无监督聚类引入基于吸引子的 EEND 来解决这个问题。该方法首先将输入音频分为短块，然后对每个块进行基于吸引子的二值化，最后根据本地计算的吸引子之间的相似度对每个块的结果进行聚类。虽然每个块内的输出扬声器的数量受到限制，但为整个输入估计的扬声器总数可能高于限制。为了以在线方式使用 EEND-GLA，我们的方法还扩展了说话者跟踪缓冲区，该缓冲区最初是为了实现传统 EEND 的在线推理而提出的。我们引入了逐块缓冲区更新，以使说话者跟踪缓冲区与 EEND-GLA 兼容。最后，为了改进在线二值化，我们的方法改进了缓冲区更新方法，并重新审视了 EEND 的可变块大小训练。实验结果表明，EEND-GLA 可以在离线和在线推理中对未知数量的说话人进行说话人二值化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EEND-GLA的端到端神经网络说话人分割方法，能够处理离线和在线场景中无限数量的说话人。
AI.motivation: 现有基于吸引子的EEND方法在推理时无法处理超出训练时说话人数量的场景，且在线推理能力有限，需解决动态说话人数量和实时性问题。
AI.method: 通过将音频分块处理并结合局部吸引子聚类，突破单块说话人数量限制；扩展说话人追踪缓冲区并优化块级更新策略，实现在线推理。
AI.result: 实验表明EEND-GLA可在离线和在线场景中有效分割未见过数量的说话人，优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: EEND-GLA通过引入无监督聚类和缓冲区优化，解决了说话人数量上限问题，提升了在线分割性能。

method: 通过将音频分块处理并结合局部吸引子聚类，突破单块说话人数量限制；扩展说话人追踪缓冲区并优化块级更新策略，实现在线推理。
result: 实验表明EEND-GLA可在离线和在线场景中有效分割未见过数量的说话人，优于传统方法。
conclusion: EEND-GLA通过引入无监督聚类和缓冲区优化，解决了说话人数量上限问题，提升了在线分割性能。
search_text: Online Neural Diarization of Unlimited Numbers of Speakers Using Global and Local Attractors 使用全局和局部吸引器对无限数量的说话者进行在线神经分类 A method to perform offline and online speaker diarization for an unlimited number of speakers is described in this paper. End-to-end neural diarization (EEND) has achieved overlap-aware speaker diarization by formulating it as a multi-label classification problem. It has also been extended for a flexible number of speakers by introducing speaker-wise attractors. However, the output number of speakers of attractor-based EEND is empirically capped; it cannot deal with cases where the number of speakers appearing during inference is higher than that during training because its speaker counting is trained in a fully supervised manner. Our method, EEND-GLA, solves this problem by introducing unsupervised clustering into attractor-based EEND. In the method, the input audio is first divided into short blocks, then attractor-based diarization is performed for each block, and finally, the results of each block are clustered on the basis of the similarity between locally-calculated attractors. While the number of output speakers is limited within each block, the total number of speakers estimated for the entire input can be higher than the limitation. To use EEND-GLA in an online manner, our method also extends the speaker-tracing buffer, which was originally proposed to enable online inference of conventional EEND. We introduce a block-wise buffer update to make the speaker-tracing buffer compatible with EEND-GLA. Finally, to improve online diarization, our method improves the buffer update method and revisits the variable chunk-size training of EEND. The experimental results demonstrate that EEND-GLA can perform speaker diarization of an unseen number of speakers in both offline and online inferences. 本文描述了一种对无限数量的说话人进行离线和在线说话人二值化的方法。端到端神经二值化（EEND）通过将其表述为多标签分类问题，实现了重叠感知说话人二值化。通过引入说话人吸引器，它还可以扩展到灵活数量的说话人。然而，基于吸引子的EEND的输出说话者数量根据经验是有上限的；它无法处理推理过程中出现的说话人数量高于训练期间出现的说话人数量的情况，因为它的说话人计数是以完全监督的方式进行训练的。我们的方法 EEND-GLA 通过将无监督聚类引入基于吸引子的 EEND 来解决这个问题。该方法首先将输入音频分为短块，然后对每个块进行基于吸引子的二值化，最后根据本地计算的吸引子之间的相似度对每个块的结果进行聚类。虽然每个块内的输出扬声器的数量受到限制，但为整个输入估计的扬声器总数可能高于限制。为了以在线方式使用 EEND-GLA，我们的方法还扩展了说话者跟踪缓冲区，该缓冲区最初是为了实现传统 EEND 的在线推理而提出的。我们引入了逐块缓冲区更新，以使说话者跟踪缓冲区与 EEND-GLA 兼容。最后，为了改进在线二值化，我们的方法改进了缓冲区更新方法，并重新审视了 EEND 的可变块大小训练。实验结果表明，EEND-GLA 可以在离线和在线推理中对未知数量的说话人进行说话人二值化。 本文提出了一种名为EEND-GLA的端到端神经网络说话人分割方法，能够处理离线和在线场景中无限数量的说话人。 Shota Horiguchi,Shinji Watanabe,Paola Garcia,Yuki Takashima,Yohei Kawaguchi eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.SD

authors_text: Yao Zhang,Nanjun He,Jiawei Yang,Yuexiang Li,Dong Wei,Yawen Huang,Yang Zhang,Zhiqiang He,Yefeng Zheng
title: mmFormer: Multimodal Medical Transformer for Incomplete Multimodal Learning of Brain Tumor Segmentation
title_zh: mmFormer：用于脑肿瘤分割不完整多模态学习的多模态医学变压器
abstract: Accurate brain tumor segmentation from Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) is desirable to joint learning of multimodal images. However, in clinical practice, it is not always possible to acquire a complete set of MRIs, and the problem of missing modalities causes severe performance degradation in existing multimodal segmentation methods. In this work, we present the first attempt to exploit the Transformer for multimodal brain tumor segmentation that is robust to any combinatorial subset of available modalities. Concretely, we propose a novel multimodal Medical Transformer (mmFormer) for incomplete multimodal learning with three main components: the hybrid modality-specific encoders that bridge a convolutional encoder and an intra-modal Transformer for both local and global context modeling within each modality; an inter-modal Transformer to build and align the long-range correlations across modalities for modality-invariant features with global semantics corresponding to tumor region; a decoder that performs a progressive up-sampling and fusion with the modality-invariant features to generate robust segmentation. Besides, auxiliary regularizers are introduced in both encoder and decoder to further enhance the model's robustness to incomplete modalities. We conduct extensive experiments on the public BraTS $2018$ dataset for brain tumor segmentation. The results demonstrate that the proposed mmFormer outperforms the state-of-the-art methods for incomplete multimodal brain tumor segmentation on almost all subsets of incomplete modalities, especially by an average 19.07% improvement of Dice on tumor segmentation with only one available modality. The code is available at https://github.com/YaoZhang93/mmFormer.
summary: Accurate brain tumor segmentation from Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) is desirable to joint learning of multimodal images. However, in clinical practice, it is not always possible to acquire a complete set of MRIs, and the problem of missing modalities causes severe performance degradation in existing multimodal segmentation methods. In this work, we present the first attempt to exploit the Transformer for multimodal brain tumor segmentation that is robust to any combinatorial subset of available modalities. Concretely, we propose a novel multimodal Medical Transformer (mmFormer) for incomplete multimodal learning with three main components: the hybrid modality-specific encoders that bridge a convolutional encoder and an intra-modal Transformer for both local and global context modeling within each modality; an inter-modal Transformer to build and align the long-range correlations across modalities for modality-invariant features with global semantics corresponding to tumor region; a decoder that performs a progressive up-sampling and fusion with the modality-invariant features to generate robust segmentation. Besides, auxiliary regularizers are introduced in both encoder and decoder to further enhance the model's robustness to incomplete modalities. We conduct extensive experiments on the public BraTS $2018$ dataset for brain tumor segmentation. The results demonstrate that the proposed mmFormer outperforms the state-of-the-art methods for incomplete multimodal brain tumor segmentation on almost all subsets of incomplete modalities, especially by an average 19.07% improvement of Dice on tumor segmentation with only one available modality. The code is available at https://github.com/YaoZhang93/mmFormer.
abstract_zh: 磁共振成像 (MRI) 的准确脑肿瘤分割对于多模态图像的联合学习来说是理想的。然而，在临床实践中，并不总是能够获得一套完整的 MRI，并且缺失模态的问题导致现有多模态分割方法的性能严重下降。在这项工作中，我们首次尝试利用 Transformer 进行多模式脑肿瘤分割，该分割对于可用模式的任何组合子集都是稳健的。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的多模态医学变压器（mmFormer），用于不完整的多模态学习，具有三个主要组件：桥接卷积编码器的混合模态特定编码器和用于每种模态内的局部和全局上下文建模的模态内 Transformer；一个模态间 Transformer，用于构建和调整跨模态的远程相关性，以实现模态不变特征与对应于肿瘤区域的全局语义；执行渐进上采样并与模态不变特征融合以生成鲁棒分割的解码器。此外，在编码器和解码器中都引入了辅助正则化器，以进一步增强模型对不完整模态的鲁棒性。我们在公共 BraTS $2018$ 数据集上进行了广泛的脑肿瘤分割实验。结果表明，所提出的 mmFormer 在几乎所有不完整模态子集上均优于最先进的不完整多模态脑肿瘤分割方法，特别是在仅使用一种可用模态的肿瘤分割上，Dice 平均提高了 19.07%。代码可在 https://github.com/YaoZhang93/mmFormer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出mmFormer，一种用于处理不完整多模态MRI数据的脑肿瘤分割模型。
AI.motivation: 临床实践中常因无法获取完整的MRI模态导致现有分割方法性能下降，需开发对任意模态组合鲁棒的模型。
AI.method: 设计包含模态特定编码器、跨模态Transformer和渐进解码器的mmFormer，结合卷积与Transformer结构建模局部与全局特征，并引入正则化提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在BraTS2018数据集上，mmFormer在几乎所有不完整模态子集下优于现有方法，单模态情况下Dice分数平均提升19.07%。
AI.conclusion: mmFormer有效解决了不完整多模态脑肿瘤分割问题，为临床实际应用提供了新方法。

authors_text: Hulin Li,Jun Li,Hanbing Wei,Zheng Liu,Zhenfei Zhan,Qiliang Ren
title: Slim-neck by GSConv: A lightweight-design for real-time detector architectures
title_zh: GSConv 的 Slim-neck：实时检测器架构的轻量级设计
abstract: Real-time object detection is significant for industrial and research fields. On edge devices, a giant model is difficult to achieve the real-time detecting requirement and a lightweight model built from a large number of the depth-wise separable convolutional could not achieve the sufficient accuracy. We introduce a new lightweight convolutional technique, GSConv, to lighten the model but maintain the accuracy. The GSConv accomplishes an excellent trade-off between the accuracy and speed. Furthermore, we provide a design suggestion based on the GSConv, Slim-Neck (SNs), to achieve a higher computational cost-effectiveness of the real-time detectors. The effectiveness of the SNs was robustly demonstrated in over twenty sets comparative experiments. In particular, the real-time detectors of ameliorated by the SNs obtain the state-of-the-art (70.9% AP50 for the SODA10M at a speed of ~ 100FPS on a Tesla T4) compared with the baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/alanli1997/slim-neck-by-gsconv
summary: Real-time object detection is significant for industrial and research fields. On edge devices, a giant model is difficult to achieve the real-time detecting requirement and a lightweight model built from a large number of the depth-wise separable convolutional could not achieve the sufficient accuracy. We introduce a new lightweight convolutional technique, GSConv, to lighten the model but maintain the accuracy. The GSConv accomplishes an excellent trade-off between the accuracy and speed. Furthermore, we provide a design suggestion based on the GSConv, Slim-Neck (SNs), to achieve a higher computational cost-effectiveness of the real-time detectors. The effectiveness of the SNs was robustly demonstrated in over twenty sets comparative experiments. In particular, the real-time detectors of ameliorated by the SNs obtain the state-of-the-art (70.9% AP50 for the SODA10M at a speed of ~ 100FPS on a Tesla T4) compared with the baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/alanli1997/slim-neck-by-gsconv
abstract_zh: 实时目标检测对于工业和研究领域具有重要意义。在边缘设备上，巨大的模型很难达到实时检测的要求，而由大量深度可分离卷积构建的轻量级模型也无法达到足够的精度。我们引入了一种新的轻量级卷积技术 GSConv，以减轻模型重量但保持准确性。 GSConv 在精度和速度之间实现了出色的平衡。此外，我们提供了基于 GSConv、Slim-Neck (SNs) 的设计建议，以实现实时检测器更高的计算成本效益。 SN 的有效性在二十多组对比实验中得到了有力证明。特别是，与基线相比，通过 SN 改进的实时检测器获得了最先进的性能（SODA10M 在 Tesla T4 上以约 100FPS 的速度获得了 70.9% AP50）。代码可在 https://github.com/alanli1997/slim-neck-by-gsconv 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于GSConv的轻量级设计方法Slim-Neck（SNs），旨在提升实时检测器的计算效率与精度平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有边缘设备上的实时目标检测模型要么计算量过大无法满足实时性，要么使用深度可分离卷积导致精度不足，亟需一种兼顾速度与精度的轻量化方案。
AI.method: 引入GSConv卷积技术替代传统深度可分离卷积，并设计Slim-Neck结构优化特征提取路径，通过20余组对比实验验证有效性。
AI.result: 改进后的检测器在SODA10M数据集上达到70.9% AP50（Tesla T4约100FPS），较基线模型性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: GSConv与Slim-Neck组合能有效平衡实时检测器的计算成本与精度，为边缘设备部署提供高效解决方案。

search_text: Slim-neck by GSConv: A lightweight-design for real-time detector architectures GSConv 的 Slim-neck：实时检测器架构的轻量级设计 Real-time object detection is significant for industrial and research fields. On edge devices, a giant model is difficult to achieve the real-time detecting requirement and a lightweight model built from a large number of the depth-wise separable convolutional could not achieve the sufficient accuracy. Furthermore, we provide a design suggestion based on the GSConv, Slim-Neck (SNs), to achieve a higher computational cost-effectiveness of the real-time detectors. The effectiveness of the SNs was robustly demonstrated in over twenty sets comparative experiments. In particular, the real-time detectors of ameliorated by the SNs obtain the state-of-the-art (70.9% AP50 for the SODA10M at a speed of ~ 100FPS on a Tesla T4) compared with the baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/alanli1997/slim-neck-by-gsconv 实时目标检测对于工业和研究领域具有重要意义。在边缘设备上，巨大的模型很难达到实时检测的要求，而由大量深度可分离卷积构建的轻量级模型也无法达到足够的精度。我们引入了一种新的轻量级卷积技术 GSConv，以减轻模型重量但保持准确性。 GSConv 在精度和速度之间实现了出色的平衡。此外，我们提供了基于 GSConv、Slim-Neck (SNs) 的设计建议，以实现实时检测器更高的计算成本效益。 SN 的有效性在二十多组对比实验中得到了有力证明。特别是，与基线相比，通过 SN 改进的实时检测器获得了最先进的性能（SODA10M 在 Tesla T4 上以约 100FPS 的速度获得了 70.9% AP50）。代码可在 https://github.com/alanli1997/slim-neck-by-gsconv 获取 本文提出了一种基于GSConv的轻量级设计方法Slim-Neck（SNs），旨在提升实时检测器的计算效率与精度平衡。 Hulin Li,Jun Li,Hanbing Wei,Zheng Liu,Zhenfei Zhan,Qiliang Ren cs.CV

authors_text: Charl Maree,Jan Erik Modal,Christian W. Omlin
title: Towards Responsible AI for Financial Transactions
title_zh: 迈向负责任的金融交易人工智能
abstract: The application of AI in finance is increasingly dependent on the principles of responsible AI. These principles - explainability, fairness, privacy, accountability, transparency and soundness form the basis for trust in future AI systems. In this study, we address the first principle by providing an explanation for a deep neural network that is trained on a mixture of numerical, categorical and textual inputs for financial transaction classification. The explanation is achieved through (1) a feature importance analysis using Shapley additive explanations (SHAP) and (2) a hybrid approach of text clustering and decision tree classifiers. We then test the robustness of the model by exposing it to a targeted evasion attack, leveraging the knowledge we gained about the model through the extracted explanation.
summary: The application of AI in finance is increasingly dependent on the principles of responsible AI. These principles - explainability, fairness, privacy, accountability, transparency and soundness form the basis for trust in future AI systems. In this study, we address the first principle by providing an explanation for a deep neural network that is trained on a mixture of numerical, categorical and textual inputs for financial transaction classification. The explanation is achieved through (1) a feature importance analysis using Shapley additive explanations (SHAP) and (2) a hybrid approach of text clustering and decision tree classifiers. We then test the robustness of the model by exposing it to a targeted evasion attack, leveraging the knowledge we gained about the model through the extracted explanation.
abstract_zh: 人工智能在金融领域的应用越来越依赖于负责任的人工智能原则。这些原则——可解释性、公平性、隐私性、问责制、透明度和健全性构成了未来人工智能系统信任的基础。在本研究中，我们通过为深度神经网络提供解释来解决第一个原则，该网络经过数字、分类和文本输入的混合训练以进行金融交易分类。该解释是通过（1）使用 Shapley 附加解释（SHAP）进行特征重要性分析和（2）文本聚类和决策树分类器的混合方法来实现的。然后，我们通过将其暴露于有针对性的规避攻击来测试模型的稳健性，利用我们通过提取的解释获得的有关模型的知识。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为金融交易分类的深度神经网络模型提供可解释性分析，并测试其鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 金融领域对AI系统的信任依赖于负责任AI原则，其中可解释性是核心基础，需通过透明方法确保模型决策可信。
AI.method: 采用SHAP进行特征重要性分析，并结合文本聚类与决策树分类器的混合方法解释模型；通过针对性规避攻击验证模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 成功生成模型解释并验证了方法有效性，同时评估了模型在对抗攻击下的稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 可解释性分析有助于提升金融AI的可信度，未来需进一步结合其他负责任AI原则完善系统设计。

authors_text: Patrik Reizinger,Luigi Gresele,Jack Brady,Julius von Kügelgen,Dominik Zietlow,Bernhard Schölkopf,Georg Martius,Wieland Brendel,Michel Besserve
title: Embrace the Gap: VAEs Perform Independent Mechanism Analysis
title_zh: 拥抱差距：VAE 进行独立机制分析
abstract: Variational autoencoders (VAEs) are a popular framework for modeling complex data distributions; they can be efficiently trained via variational inference by maximizing the evidence lower bound (ELBO), at the expense of a gap to the exact (log-)marginal likelihood. While VAEs are commonly used for representation learning, it is unclear why ELBO maximization would yield useful representations, since unregularized maximum likelihood estimation cannot invert the data-generating process. Yet, VAEs often succeed at this task. We seek to elucidate this apparent paradox by studying nonlinear VAEs in the limit of near-deterministic decoders. We first prove that, in this regime, the optimal encoder approximately inverts the decoder -- a commonly used but unproven conjecture -- which we refer to as {\em self-consistency}. Leveraging self-consistency, we show that the ELBO converges to a regularized log-likelihood. This allows VAEs to perform what has recently been termed independent mechanism analysis (IMA): it adds an inductive bias towards decoders with column-orthogonal Jacobians, which helps recovering the true latent factors. The gap between ELBO and log-likelihood is therefore welcome, since it bears unanticipated benefits for nonlinear representation learning. In experiments on synthetic and image data, we show that VAEs uncover the true latent factors when the data generating process satisfies the IMA assumption.
summary: Variational autoencoders (VAEs) are a popular framework for modeling complex data distributions; they can be efficiently trained via variational inference by maximizing the evidence lower bound (ELBO), at the expense of a gap to the exact (log-)marginal likelihood. While VAEs are commonly used for representation learning, it is unclear why ELBO maximization would yield useful representations, since unregularized maximum likelihood estimation cannot invert the data-generating process. Yet, VAEs often succeed at this task. We seek to elucidate this apparent paradox by studying nonlinear VAEs in the limit of near-deterministic decoders. We first prove that, in this regime, the optimal encoder approximately inverts the decoder -- a commonly used but unproven conjecture -- which we refer to as {\em self-consistency}. Leveraging self-consistency, we show that the ELBO converges to a regularized log-likelihood. This allows VAEs to perform what has recently been termed independent mechanism analysis (IMA): it adds an inductive bias towards decoders with column-orthogonal Jacobians, which helps recovering the true latent factors. The gap between ELBO and log-likelihood is therefore welcome, since it bears unanticipated benefits for nonlinear representation learning. In experiments on synthetic and image data, we show that VAEs uncover the true latent factors when the data generating process satisfies the IMA assumption.
abstract_zh: 变分自动编码器（VAE）是一种流行的复杂数据分布建模框架；它们可以通过最大化证据下限（ELBO）来通过变分推理进行有效训练，但代价是与精确（对数）边际可能性之间存在差距。虽然 VAE 通常用于表示学习，但尚不清楚为什么 ELBO 最大化会产生有用的表示，因为非正则最大似然估计无法反转数据生成过程。然而，VAE 通常能够成功完成这项任务。我们试图通过在近确定性解码器的限制下研究非线性 VAE 来阐明这一明显的悖论。我们首先证明，在这种情况下，最佳编码器近似反转解码器——这是一种常用但未经证实的猜想——我们将其称为{\em 自洽}。利用自洽性，我们证明 ELBO 收敛到正则化对数似然。这使得 VAE 能够执行最近被称为独立机制分析 (IMA) 的功能：它为具有列正交雅克比行列式的解码器添加了归纳偏差，这有助于恢复真正的潜在因子。因此，ELBO 和对数似然之间的差距是值得欢迎的，因为它为非线性表示学习带来了意想不到的好处。在合成数据和图像数据的实验中，我们表明当数据生成过程满足 IMA 假设时，VAE 揭示了真正的潜在因素。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨变分自编码器（VAEs）为何能在表示学习中成功，并揭示其与独立机制分析（IMA）的联系。
AI.motivation: 尽管VAEs通过最大化证据下界（ELBO）存在与真实对数似然的差距，但其仍能有效学习数据表示，这一现象背后的机制尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过研究近似确定性解码器的非线性VAEs，证明编码器近似逆解码器（自洽性），并推导ELBO收敛于正则化对数似然，从而将VAEs与IMA关联。
AI.result: 实验表明，当数据生成过程满足IMA假设时，VAEs能有效恢复真实潜在因子。
AI.conclusion: ELBO与对数似然的差距为非线性表示学习带来了意外益处，VAEs通过隐式正则化促进独立机制分析。
