authors_text: Athanasios Vlontzos,Hadrien Reynaud,Bernhard Kainz
title: Is More Data All You Need? A Causal Exploration
title_zh: 您需要更多数据吗？因果探索
abstract: Curating a large scale medical imaging dataset for machine learning applications is both time consuming and expensive. Balancing the workload between model development, data collection and annotations is difficult for machine learning practitioners, especially under time constraints. Causal analysis is often used in medicine and economics to gain insights about the effects of actions and policies. In this paper we explore the effect of dataset interventions on the output of image classification models. Through a causal approach we investigate the effects of the quantity and type of data we need to incorporate in a dataset to achieve better performance for specific subtasks. The main goal of this paper is to highlight the potential of causal analysis as a tool for resource optimization for developing medical imaging ML applications. We explore this concept with a synthetic dataset and an exemplary use-case for Diabetic Retinopathy image analysis.
summary: Curating a large scale medical imaging dataset for machine learning applications is both time consuming and expensive. Balancing the workload between model development, data collection and annotations is difficult for machine learning practitioners, especially under time constraints. Causal analysis is often used in medicine and economics to gain insights about the effects of actions and policies. In this paper we explore the effect of dataset interventions on the output of image classification models. Through a causal approach we investigate the effects of the quantity and type of data we need to incorporate in a dataset to achieve better performance for specific subtasks. The main goal of this paper is to highlight the potential of causal analysis as a tool for resource optimization for developing medical imaging ML applications. We explore this concept with a synthetic dataset and an exemplary use-case for Diabetic Retinopathy image analysis.
abstract_zh: 为机器学习应用程序整理大规模医学成像数据集既耗时又昂贵。对于机器学习从业者来说，平衡模型开发、数据收集和注释之间的工作量很困难，特别是在时间限制的情况下。因果分析通常用于医学和经济学，以深入了解行动和政策的影响。在本文中，我们探讨了数据集干预对图像分类模型输出的影响。通过因果方法，我们研究了需要合并到数据集中的数据数量和类型的影响，以实现特定子任务的更好性能。本文的主要目标是强调因果分析作为开发医学成像 ML 应用程序的资源优化工具的潜力。我们通过合成数据集和糖尿病视网膜病变图像分析的示例用例来探索这个概念。

AI.tldr: 本文通过因果分析探讨数据集干预对图像分类模型性能的影响，旨在优化医疗影像机器学习应用的资源分配。
AI.motivation: 医疗影像数据集的构建耗时耗资，且在模型开发与数据收集间难以平衡工作量，需探索更高效的资源优化方法。
AI.method: 采用合成数据集与糖尿病视网膜病变案例，通过因果分析方法研究数据量及类型对模型性能的影响机制。
AI.result: 发现因果分析能有效识别关键数据干预因素，证明针对性数据优化可提升子任务性能，无需盲目增加数据量。
AI.conclusion: 因果分析为医疗影像ML的资源优化提供了理论依据，可指导实践中的数据采集与模型开发策略制定。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过因果分析探讨数据集干预对图像分类模型性能的影响，旨在优化医疗影像机器学习应用的资源分配。

search_text: Is More Data All You Need? A Causal Exploration 您需要更多数据吗？因果探索 Curating a large scale medical imaging dataset for machine learning applications is both time consuming and expensive. Balancing the workload between model development, data collection and annotations is difficult for machine learning practitioners, especially under time constraints. Causal analysis is often used in medicine and economics to gain insights about the effects of actions and policies. In this paper we explore the effect of dataset interventions on the output of image classification models. Through a causal approach we investigate the effects of the quantity and type of data we need to incorporate in a dataset to achieve better performance for specific subtasks. The main goal of this paper is to highlight the potential of causal analysis as a tool for resource optimization for developing medical imaging ML applications. We explore this concept with a synthetic dataset and an exemplary use-case for Diabetic Retinopathy image analysis. 为机器学习应用程序整理大规模医学成像数据集既耗时又昂贵。对于机器学习从业者来说，平衡模型开发、数据收集和注释之间的工作量很困难，特别是在时间限制的情况下。因果分析通常用于医学和经济学，以深入了解行动和政策的影响。在本文中，我们探讨了数据集干预对图像分类模型输出的影响。通过因果方法，我们研究了需要合并到数据集中的数据数量和类型的影响，以实现特定子任务的更好性能。本文的主要目标是强调因果分析作为开发医学成像 ML 应用程序的资源优化工具的潜力。我们通过合成数据集和糖尿病视网膜病变图像分析的示例用例来探索这个概念。 本文通过因果分析探讨数据集干预对图像分类模型性能的影响，旨在优化医疗影像机器学习应用的资源分配。 Athanasios Vlontzos,Hadrien Reynaud,Bernhard Kainz cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Qichao Ying,Hang Zhou,Xiaoxiao Hu,Zhenxing Qian,Sheng Li,Xinpeng Zhang
title: Image Protection for Robust Cropping Localization and Recovery
title_zh: 图像保护以实现稳健的裁剪本地化和恢复
abstract: Existing image cropping detection schemes ignore that recovering the cropped-out contents can unveil the purpose of the behaved cropping attack. This paper presents \textbf{CLR}-Net, a novel image protection scheme addressing the combined challenge of image \textbf{C}ropping \textbf{L}ocalization and \textbf{R}ecovery. We first protect the original image by introducing imperceptible perturbations. Then, typical image post-processing attacks are simulated to erode the protected image. On the recipient's side, we predict the cropping mask and recover the original image. Besides, we propose a novel \textbf{F}ine-\textbf{G}rained generative \textbf{JPEG} simulator (FG-JPEG) as well as a feature alignment network to improve the real-world robustness. Comprehensive experiments prove that the quality of the recovered image and the accuracy of crop localization are both satisfactory.
summary: Existing image cropping detection schemes ignore that recovering the cropped-out contents can unveil the purpose of the behaved cropping attack. This paper presents \textbf{CLR}-Net, a novel image protection scheme addressing the combined challenge of image \textbf{C}ropping \textbf{L}ocalization and \textbf{R}ecovery. We first protect the original image by introducing imperceptible perturbations. Then, typical image post-processing attacks are simulated to erode the protected image. On the recipient's side, we predict the cropping mask and recover the original image. Besides, we propose a novel \textbf{F}ine-\textbf{G}rained generative \textbf{JPEG} simulator (FG-JPEG) as well as a feature alignment network to improve the real-world robustness. Comprehensive experiments prove that the quality of the recovered image and the accuracy of crop localization are both satisfactory.
abstract_zh: 现有的图像裁剪检测方案忽略了恢复裁剪内容可以揭示行为裁剪攻击的目的。本文提出了 \textbf{CLR}-Net，这是一种新颖的图像保护方案，解决了图像 \textbf{C}ropping \textbf{L}ocalization 和 \textbf{R}ecovery 的综合挑战。我们首先通过引入难以察觉的扰动来保护原始图像。然后，模拟典型的图像后处理攻击以侵蚀受保护的图像。在接收方，我们预测裁剪蒙版并恢复原始图像。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的 \textbf{F}ine-\textbf{G}rained 生成 \textbf{JPEG} 模拟器（FG-JPEG）以及特征对齐网络来提高现实世界的鲁棒性。综合实验证明，恢复图像的质量和作物定位的精度都令人满意。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLR-Net，通过不可察觉的扰动保护图像，实现对图像裁剪区域的定位与恢复，提升抗攻击能力。
AI.motivation: 现有裁剪检测方案忽视了恢复被裁剪内容对揭示攻击意图的重要性，需同时解决裁剪定位与恢复的联合挑战。
AI.method: 引入不可感知扰动保护原始图像，模拟典型后处理攻击，设计FG-JPEG精细生成器及特征对齐网络增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明恢复图像质量与裁剪定位准确率均达到满意效果，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CLR-Net通过联合优化定位与恢复任务，有效提升了图像在真实场景下的抗裁剪攻击能力。

authors_text: Junran Wu,Shangzhe Li,Jianhao Li,Yicheng Pan,Ke Xu
title: A Simple yet Effective Method for Graph Classification
title_zh: 一种简单而有效的图分类方法
comment: Accepted by IJCAI2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2109.02027
comments: Accepted by IJCAI2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2109.02027
abstract: In deep neural networks, better results can often be obtained by increasing the complexity of previously developed basic models. However, it is unclear whether there is a way to boost performance by decreasing the complexity of such models. Intuitively, given a problem, a simpler data structure comes with a simpler algorithm. Here, we investigate the feasibility of improving graph classification performance while simplifying the learning process. Inspired by structural entropy on graphs, we transform the data sample from graphs to coding trees, which is a simpler but essential structure for graph data. Furthermore, we propose a novel message passing scheme, termed hierarchical reporting, in which features are transferred from leaf nodes to root nodes by following the hierarchical structure of coding trees. We then present a tree kernel and a convolutional network to implement our scheme for graph classification. With the designed message passing scheme, the tree kernel and convolutional network have a lower runtime complexity of $O(n)$ than Weisfeiler-Lehman subtree kernel and other graph neural networks of at least $O(hm)$. We empirically validate our methods with several graph classification benchmarks and demonstrate that they achieve better performance and lower computational consumption than competing approaches.
summary: In deep neural networks, better results can often be obtained by increasing the complexity of previously developed basic models. However, it is unclear whether there is a way to boost performance by decreasing the complexity of such models. Intuitively, given a problem, a simpler data structure comes with a simpler algorithm. Here, we investigate the feasibility of improving graph classification performance while simplifying the learning process. Inspired by structural entropy on graphs, we transform the data sample from graphs to coding trees, which is a simpler but essential structure for graph data. Furthermore, we propose a novel message passing scheme, termed hierarchical reporting, in which features are transferred from leaf nodes to root nodes by following the hierarchical structure of coding trees. We then present a tree kernel and a convolutional network to implement our scheme for graph classification. With the designed message passing scheme, the tree kernel and convolutional network have a lower runtime complexity of $O(n)$ than Weisfeiler-Lehman subtree kernel and other graph neural networks of at least $O(hm)$. We empirically validate our methods with several graph classification benchmarks and demonstrate that they achieve better performance and lower computational consumption than competing approaches.
abstract_zh: 在深度神经网络中，通常可以通过增加先前开发的基本模型的复杂性来获得更好的结果。然而，尚不清楚是否有办法通过降低此类模型的复杂性来提高性能。直观上，给定一个问题，更简单的数据结构伴随着更简单的算法。在这里，我们研究了在简化学习过程的同时提高图分类性能的可行性。受图结构熵的启发，我们将数据样本从图转换为编码树，这是图数据的更简单但必不可少的结构。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的消息传递方案，称为分层报告，其中特征通过遵循编码树的分层结构从叶节点转移到根节点。然后，我们提出一个树核和一个卷积网络来实现我们的图分类方案。通过设计的消息传递方案，树核和卷积网络的运行复杂度为 $O(n)$，比 Weisfeiler-Lehman 子树核和其他至少 $O(hm)$ 的图神经网络低。我们通过几个图分类基准对我们的方法进行了实证验证，并证明它们比竞争方法具有更好的性能和更低的计算消耗。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过简化学习过程来提升图分类性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过增加模型复杂度提升性能，但简化模型结构是否可行尚不明确。作者认为更简单的数据结构可能带来更高效的算法。
AI.method: 基于结构熵将图数据转化为编码树，提出分层报告消息传递机制，并设计树核和卷积网络实现图分类。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个基准数据集上优于现有方法，且时间复杂度降低至O(n)。
AI.conclusion: 简化模型结构可同时提升图分类性能并降低计算消耗，为图学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Taichi Sakaguchi,Yuki Okafuji,Kohei Matsumura,Jun Baba,Junya Nakanishi
title: An Estimation Framework for Passerby Engagement Interacting with Social Robots
title_zh: 路人与社交机器人互动的参与度估计框架
abstract: Social robots are expected to be a human labor support technology, and one application of them is an advertising medium in public spaces. When social robots provide information, such as recommended shops, adaptive communication according to the user's state is desired. User engagement, which is also defined as the level of interest in the robot, is likely to play an important role in adaptive communication. Therefore, in this paper, we propose a new framework to estimate user engagement. The proposed method focuses on four unsolved open problems: multi-party interactions, process of state change in engagement, difficulty in annotating engagement, and interaction dataset in the real world. The accuracy of the proposed method for estimating engagement was evaluated using interaction duration. The results show that the interaction duration can be accurately estimated by considering the influence of the behaviors of other people; this also implies that the proposed model accurately estimates the level of engagement during interaction with the robot.
summary: Social robots are expected to be a human labor support technology, and one application of them is an advertising medium in public spaces. When social robots provide information, such as recommended shops, adaptive communication according to the user's state is desired. User engagement, which is also defined as the level of interest in the robot, is likely to play an important role in adaptive communication. Therefore, in this paper, we propose a new framework to estimate user engagement. The proposed method focuses on four unsolved open problems: multi-party interactions, process of state change in engagement, difficulty in annotating engagement, and interaction dataset in the real world. The accuracy of the proposed method for estimating engagement was evaluated using interaction duration. The results show that the interaction duration can be accurately estimated by considering the influence of the behaviors of other people; this also implies that the proposed model accurately estimates the level of engagement during interaction with the robot.
abstract_zh: 社交机器人有望成为一种人类劳动力支持技术，其应用之一是公共场所的广告媒体。当社交机器人提供信息（例如推荐商店）时，需要根据用户的状态进行自适应通信。用户参与度也被定义为对机器人的兴趣程度，可能在自适应通信中发挥重要作用。 Therefore, in this paper, we propose a new framework to estimate user engagement.所提出的方法重点关注四个未解决的开放问题：多方交互、参与状态变化过程、标注参与的困难以及现实世界中的交互数据集。使用交互持续时间来评估所提出的估计参与度方法的准确性。结果表明，考虑其他人行为的影响可以准确估计互动持续时间；这也意味着所提出的模型准确地估计了与机器人交互期间的参与程度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于估计路人与社交机器人互动时参与度的新框架。
AI.motivation: 社交机器人作为公共空间广告媒介需根据用户状态进行自适应沟通，而用户参与度是关键因素，但存在多方互动、状态变化标注困难等挑战。
AI.method: 通过考虑其他人的行为影响，结合互动时长评估方法，解决多主体互动、参与度状态变化、标注难度及真实场景数据集等四个问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，模型能准确估计互动时长，验证了参与度水平评估的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可准确估计用户与机器人互动时的参与度，为自适应沟通提供支持。

search_text: An Estimation Framework for Passerby Engagement Interacting with Social Robots 路人与社交机器人互动的参与度估计框架 Social robots are expected to be a human labor support technology, and one application of them is an advertising medium in public spaces. When social robots provide information, such as recommended shops, adaptive communication according to the user's state is desired. User engagement, which is also defined as the level of interest in the robot, is likely to play an important role in adaptive communication. Therefore, in this paper, we propose a new framework to estimate user engagement. The proposed method focuses on four unsolved open problems: multi-party interactions, process of state change in engagement, difficulty in annotating engagement, and interaction dataset in the real world. The accuracy of the proposed method for estimating engagement was evaluated using interaction duration. The results show that the interaction duration can be accurately estimated by considering the influence of the behaviors of other people; this also implies that the proposed model accurately estimates the level of engagement during interaction with the robot. 社交机器人有望成为一种人类劳动力支持技术，其应用之一是公共场所的广告媒体。当社交机器人提供信息（例如推荐商店）时，需要根据用户的状态进行自适应通信。用户参与度也被定义为对机器人的兴趣程度，可能在自适应通信中发挥重要作用。 Therefore, in this paper, we propose a new framework to estimate user engagement.所提出的方法重点关注四个未解决的开放问题：多方交互、参与状态变化过程、标注参与的困难以及现实世界中的交互数据集。使用交互持续时间来评估所提出的估计参与度方法的准确性。结果表明，考虑其他人行为的影响可以准确估计互动持续时间；这也意味着所提出的模型准确地估计了与机器人交互期间的参与程度。 本文提出一种用于估计路人与社交机器人互动时参与度的新框架。 Taichi Sakaguchi,Yuki Okafuji,Kohei Matsumura,Jun Baba,Junya Nakanishi cs.RO

authors_text: Yunpeng Xiao,Youpeng Zhao,Ge Yang
title: Semi-Supervised Segmentation of Mitochondria from Electron Microscopy Images Using Spatial Continuity
title_zh: 使用空间连续性从电子显微镜图像中半监督线粒体分割
comment: 4 pages of main text, 5 pages of supplementary material and 1 page of references
comments: 4 pages of main text, 5 pages of supplementary material and 1 page of references
abstract: Morphology of mitochondria plays critical roles in mediating their physiological functions. Accurate segmentation of mitochondria from 3D electron microscopy (EM) images is essential to quantitative characterization of their morphology at the nanometer scale. Fully supervised deep learning models developed for this task achieve excellent performance but require substantial amounts of annotated data for training. However, manual annotation of EM images is laborious and time-consuming because of their large volumes, limited contrast, and low signal-to-noise ratios (SNRs). To overcome this challenge, we propose a semi-supervised deep learning model that segments mitochondria by leveraging the spatial continuity of their structural, morphological, and contextual information in both labeled and unlabeled images. We use random piecewise affine transformation to synthesize comprehensive and realistic mitochondrial morphology for augmentation of training data. Experiments on the EPFL dataset show that our model achieves performance similar as that of state-of-the-art fully supervised models but requires only ~20% of their annotated training data. Our semi-supervised model is versatile and can also accurately segment other spatially continuous structures from EM images. Data and code of this study are openly accessible at https://github.com/cbmi-group/MPP.
summary: Morphology of mitochondria plays critical roles in mediating their physiological functions. Accurate segmentation of mitochondria from 3D electron microscopy (EM) images is essential to quantitative characterization of their morphology at the nanometer scale. Fully supervised deep learning models developed for this task achieve excellent performance but require substantial amounts of annotated data for training. However, manual annotation of EM images is laborious and time-consuming because of their large volumes, limited contrast, and low signal-to-noise ratios (SNRs). To overcome this challenge, we propose a semi-supervised deep learning model that segments mitochondria by leveraging the spatial continuity of their structural, morphological, and contextual information in both labeled and unlabeled images. We use random piecewise affine transformation to synthesize comprehensive and realistic mitochondrial morphology for augmentation of training data. Experiments on the EPFL dataset show that our model achieves performance similar as that of state-of-the-art fully supervised models but requires only ~20% of their annotated training data. Our semi-supervised model is versatile and can also accurately segment other spatially continuous structures from EM images. Data and code of this study are openly accessible at https://github.com/cbmi-group/MPP.
abstract_zh: 线粒体的形态在调节其生理功能中起着关键作用。从 3D 电子显微镜 (EM) 图像中准确分割线粒体对于纳米尺度上线粒体形态的定量表征至关重要。为此任务开发的完全监督深度学习模型取得了优异的性能，但需要大量带注释的数据进行训练。然而，由于电镜图像体积大、对比度有限且信噪比 (SNR) 低，手动注释既费力又耗时。为了克服这一挑战，我们提出了一种半监督深度学习模型，该模型通过利用标记和未标记图像中结构、形态和上下文信息的空间连续性来分割线粒体。我们使用随机分段仿射变换来合成全面且真实的线粒体形态以增强训练数据。在 EPFL 数据集上的实验表明，我们的模型实现了与最先进的完全监督模型相似的性能，但仅需要约 20% 的带注释训练数据。我们的半监督模型用途广泛，还可以从电磁图像中准确分割其他空间连续结构。本研究的数据和代码可在 https://github.com/cbmi-group/MPP 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于空间连续性的半监督深度学习模型，用于从电子显微镜图像中分割线粒体。
AI.motivation: 全监督深度学习模型虽性能优异，但需大量标注数据，而电子显微镜图像的标注因体积大、对比度低、信噪比低而耗时费力。
AI.method: 利用标签和未标签图像中的结构、形态及上下文空间连续性，结合随机分段仿射变换生成多样化形态数据增强训练集。
AI.result: 在EPFL数据集上，模型性能与最先进的全监督模型相当，但仅需其约20%的标注数据，且可扩展分割其他空间连续结构。
AI.conclusion: 该半监督模型有效降低标注依赖，具有通用性，代码数据已开源。

authors_text: Abhinav Bhatia,Philip S. Thomas,Shlomo Zilberstein
title: Adaptive Rollout Length for Model-Based RL Using Model-Free Deep RL
title_zh: 使用无模型深度强化学习的基于模型强化学习的自适应推出长度
abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning promises to learn an optimal policy from fewer interactions with the environment compared to model-free reinforcement learning by learning an intermediate model of the environment in order to predict future interactions. When predicting a sequence of interactions, the rollout length, which limits the prediction horizon, is a critical hyperparameter as accuracy of the predictions diminishes in the regions that are further away from real experience. As a result, with a longer rollout length, an overall worse policy is learned in the long run. Thus, the hyperparameter provides a trade-off between quality and efficiency. In this work, we frame the problem of tuning the rollout length as a meta-level sequential decision-making problem that optimizes the final policy learned by model-based reinforcement learning given a fixed budget of environment interactions by adapting the hyperparameter dynamically based on feedback from the learning process, such as accuracy of the model and the remaining budget of interactions. We use model-free deep reinforcement learning to solve the meta-level decision problem and demonstrate that our approach outperforms common heuristic baselines on two well-known reinforcement learning environments.
summary: Model-based reinforcement learning promises to learn an optimal policy from fewer interactions with the environment compared to model-free reinforcement learning by learning an intermediate model of the environment in order to predict future interactions. When predicting a sequence of interactions, the rollout length, which limits the prediction horizon, is a critical hyperparameter as accuracy of the predictions diminishes in the regions that are further away from real experience. As a result, with a longer rollout length, an overall worse policy is learned in the long run. Thus, the hyperparameter provides a trade-off between quality and efficiency. In this work, we frame the problem of tuning the rollout length as a meta-level sequential decision-making problem that optimizes the final policy learned by model-based reinforcement learning given a fixed budget of environment interactions by adapting the hyperparameter dynamically based on feedback from the learning process, such as accuracy of the model and the remaining budget of interactions. We use model-free deep reinforcement learning to solve the meta-level decision problem and demonstrate that our approach outperforms common heuristic baselines on two well-known reinforcement learning environments.
abstract_zh: 与无模型强化学习相比，基于模型的强化学习有望通过学习环境的中间模型来预测未来的交互，从而从与环境的较少交互中学习最优策略。在预测一系列交互时，限制预测范围的推出长度是一个关键的超参数，因为在远离真实体验的区域中预测的准确性会降低。因此，随着推出时间的延长，从长远来看，整体上会学到更糟糕的策略。因此，超参数提供了质量和效率之间的权衡。在这项工作中，我们将调整推出长度的问题定义为元级顺序决策问题，在给定环境交互的固定预算的情况下，通过根据学习过程的反馈（例如模型的准确性和交互的剩余预算）动态调整超参数，优化基于模型的强化学习学习的最终策略。我们使用无模型深度强化学习来解决元级决策问题，并证明我们的方法在两个众所周知的强化学习环境上优于常见的启发式基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模型自由深度强化学习的动态调整滚动长度方法，以优化模型基强化学习的策略性能。
AI.motivation: 固定滚动长度会导致模型预测准确性下降，影响策略质量，需动态调整以平衡预测精度与交互效率。
AI.method: 将滚动长度调整建模为元级序列决策问题，利用模型自由深度强化学习根据模型精度和剩余交互预算动态调整滚动长度。
AI.result: 在两个经典强化学习环境中，该方法优于传统启发式基线，验证了动态调整策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 动态滚动长度调整方法能有效提升模型基强化学习的策略性能，为超参数优化提供新思路。

search_text: Adaptive Rollout Length for Model-Based RL Using Model-Free Deep RL 使用无模型深度强化学习的基于模型强化学习的自适应推出长度 Model-based reinforcement learning promises to learn an optimal policy from fewer interactions with the environment compared to model-free reinforcement learning by learning an intermediate model of the environment in order to predict future interactions. When predicting a sequence of interactions, the rollout length, which limits the prediction horizon, is a critical hyperparameter as accuracy of the predictions diminishes in the regions that are further away from real experience. As a result, with a longer rollout length, an overall worse policy is learned in the long run. Thus, the hyperparameter provides a trade-off between quality and efficiency. In this work, we frame the problem of tuning the rollout length as a meta-level sequential decision-making problem that optimizes the final policy learned by model-based reinforcement learning given a fixed budget of environment interactions by adapting the hyperparameter dynamically based on feedback from the learning process, such as accuracy of the model and the remaining budget of interactions. We use model-free deep reinforcement learning to solve the meta-level decision problem and demonstrate that our approach outperforms common heuristic baselines on two well-known reinforcement learning environments. 与无模型强化学习相比，基于模型的强化学习有望通过学习环境的中间模型来预测未来的交互，从而从与环境的较少交互中学习最优策略。在预测一系列交互时，限制预测范围的推出长度是一个关键的超参数，因为在远离真实体验的区域中预测的准确性会降低。因此，随着推出时间的延长，从长远来看，整体上会学到更糟糕的策略。因此，超参数提供了质量和效率之间的权衡。在这项工作中，我们将调整推出长度的问题定义为元级顺序决策问题，在给定环境交互的固定预算的情况下，通过根据学习过程的反馈（例如模型的准确性和交互的剩余预算）动态调整超参数，优化基于模型的强化学习学习的最终策略。我们使用无模型深度强化学习来解决元级决策问题，并证明我们的方法在两个众所周知的强化学习环境上优于常见的启发式基线。 本文提出一种基于模型自由深度强化学习的动态调整滚动长度方法，以优化模型基强化学习的策略性能。 Abhinav Bhatia,Philip S. Thomas,Shlomo Zilberstein cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Xin Wang,Xinzhe Luo,Xiahai Zhuang
title: BInGo: Bayesian Intrinsic Groupwise Registration via Explicit Hierarchical Disentanglement
title_zh: BInGo：通过显式分层解耦进行贝叶斯内在分组配准
abstract: Multimodal groupwise registration aligns internal structures in a group of medical images. Current approaches to this problem involve developing similarity measures over the joint intensity profile of all images, which may be computationally prohibitive for large image groups and unstable under various conditions. To tackle these issues, we propose BInGo, a general unsupervised hierarchical Bayesian framework based on deep learning, to learn intrinsic structural representations to measure the similarity of multimodal images. Particularly, a variational auto-encoder with a novel posterior is proposed, which facilitates the disentanglement learning of structural representations and spatial transformations, and characterizes the imaging process from the common structure with shape transition and appearance variation. Notably, BInGo is scalable to learn from small groups, whereas being tested for large-scale groupwise registration, thus significantly reducing computational costs. We compared BInGo with five iterative or deep learning methods on three public intrasubject and intersubject datasets, i.e. BraTS, MS-CMR of the heart, and Learn2Reg abdomen MR-CT, and demonstrated its superior accuracy and computational efficiency, even for very large group sizes (e.g., over 1300 2D images from MS-CMR in each group).
summary: Multimodal groupwise registration aligns internal structures in a group of medical images. Current approaches to this problem involve developing similarity measures over the joint intensity profile of all images, which may be computationally prohibitive for large image groups and unstable under various conditions. To tackle these issues, we propose BInGo, a general unsupervised hierarchical Bayesian framework based on deep learning, to learn intrinsic structural representations to measure the similarity of multimodal images. Particularly, a variational auto-encoder with a novel posterior is proposed, which facilitates the disentanglement learning of structural representations and spatial transformations, and characterizes the imaging process from the common structure with shape transition and appearance variation. Notably, BInGo is scalable to learn from small groups, whereas being tested for large-scale groupwise registration, thus significantly reducing computational costs. We compared BInGo with five iterative or deep learning methods on three public intrasubject and intersubject datasets, i.e. BraTS, MS-CMR of the heart, and Learn2Reg abdomen MR-CT, and demonstrated its superior accuracy and computational efficiency, even for very large group sizes (e.g., over 1300 2D images from MS-CMR in each group).
abstract_zh: 多模态分组配准对齐一组医学图像中的内部结构。当前解决此问题的方法涉及开发所有图像的联合强度分布的相似性度量，这对于大型图像组来说可能在计算上难以实现，并且在各种条件下不稳定。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 BInGo，一种基于深度学习的通用无监督分层贝叶斯框架，用于学习内在结构表示来测量多模态图像的相似性。特别是，提出了一种具有新颖后验的变分自动编码器，它有助于结构表示和空间变换的解耦学习，并通过形状过渡和外观变化来表征来自常见结构的成像过程。值得注意的是，BInGo 具有可扩展性，可以从小群体中学习，同时正在接受大规模分组注册测试，从而显着降低计算成本。我们在三个公共受试者内和受试者间数据集（即 BraTS、心脏 MS-CMR 和 Learn2Reg 腹部 MR-CT）上将 BInGo 与五种迭代或深度学习方法进行了比较，并证明了其卓越的准确性和计算效率，即使对于非常大的组规模（例如，每组中来自 MS-CMR 的 1300 多个 2D 图像）也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BInGo框架，解决多模态医学图像组配准问题，通过深度学习实现结构表示与空间变换的解耦学习。
AI.motivation: 现有组配准方法在处理大规模图像组时计算成本高且稳定性差，需更高效鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于深度学习的无监督分层贝叶斯框架，采用带新型后验的变分自编码器实现结构与变换的显式解耦。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上优于五种对比方法，尤其在超1300张图像的大规模组中展现更高精度与效率。
AI.conclusion: BInGo通过结构解耦学习有效提升多模态组配准性能，兼具小样本学习能力与大规模计算效率优势。

authors_text: Léo Lebrat,Rodrigo Santa Cruz,Frédéric de Gournay,Darren Fu,Pierrick Bourgeat,Jurgen Fripp,Clinton Fookes,Olivier Salvado
title: CorticalFlow: A Diffeomorphic Mesh Deformation Module for Cortical Surface Reconstruction
title_zh: CorticalFlow：用于皮质表面重建的微分同形网格变形模块
abstract: In this paper we introduce CorticalFlow, a new geometric deep-learning model that, given a 3-dimensional image, learns to deform a reference template towards a targeted object. To conserve the template mesh's topological properties, we train our model over a set of diffeomorphic transformations. This new implementation of a flow Ordinary Differential Equation (ODE) framework benefits from a small GPU memory footprint, allowing the generation of surfaces with several hundred thousand vertices. To reduce topological errors introduced by its discrete resolution, we derive numeric conditions which improve the manifoldness of the predicted triangle mesh. To exhibit the utility of CorticalFlow, we demonstrate its performance for the challenging task of brain cortical surface reconstruction. In contrast to current state-of-the-art, CorticalFlow produces superior surfaces while reducing the computation time from nine and a half minutes to one second. More significantly, CorticalFlow enforces the generation of anatomically plausible surfaces; the absence of which has been a major impediment restricting the clinical relevance of such surface reconstruction methods.
summary: In this paper we introduce CorticalFlow, a new geometric deep-learning model that, given a 3-dimensional image, learns to deform a reference template towards a targeted object. To conserve the template mesh's topological properties, we train our model over a set of diffeomorphic transformations. This new implementation of a flow Ordinary Differential Equation (ODE) framework benefits from a small GPU memory footprint, allowing the generation of surfaces with several hundred thousand vertices. To reduce topological errors introduced by its discrete resolution, we derive numeric conditions which improve the manifoldness of the predicted triangle mesh. To exhibit the utility of CorticalFlow, we demonstrate its performance for the challenging task of brain cortical surface reconstruction. In contrast to current state-of-the-art, CorticalFlow produces superior surfaces while reducing the computation time from nine and a half minutes to one second. More significantly, CorticalFlow enforces the generation of anatomically plausible surfaces; the absence of which has been a major impediment restricting the clinical relevance of such surface reconstruction methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 CorticalFlow，这是一种新的几何深度学习模型，在给定 3 维图像的情况下，它可以学习将参考模板变形为目标对象。为了保留模板网格的拓扑属性，我们通过一组微分同胚变换来训练我们的模型。这种流常微分方程 (ODE) 框架的新实现受益于较小的 GPU 内存占用，允许生成具有数十万个顶点的表面。为了减少其离散分辨率引入的拓扑误差，我们推导了提高预测三角形网格的流形性的数值条件。为了展示 CorticalFlow 的实用性，我们展示了其在大脑皮层表面重建这一挑战性任务中的性能。与当前最先进的技术相比，CorticalFlow 可以生成出色的表面，同时将计算时间从九分半钟减少到一秒。更重要的是，CorticalFlow 强制生成解剖学上合理的表面；缺乏这一点一直是限制此类表面重建方法的临床相关性的主要障碍。

AI.tldr: 提出CorticalFlow模型，通过微分同胚变换实现皮层表面重建，提高效率和解剖合理性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在计算效率和生成解剖学合理表面方面存在不足，需提升临床相关性。
AI.method: 基于流ODE框架，利用微分同胚变换和数值条件优化网格流形性，减少拓扑错误。
AI.result: 脑皮层重建任务中，计算时间缩短至1秒，生成更优且解剖合理的表面。
AI.conclusion: CorticalFlow有效提升重建效率与解剖合理性，解决临床相关性限制，具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Bharath Comandur
title: Sports Re-ID: Improving Re-Identification Of Players In Broadcast Videos Of Team Sports
title_zh: 体育重识别：改进团体运动广播视频中运动员的重新识别
abstract: This work focuses on player re-identification in broadcast videos of team sports. Specifically, we focus on identifying the same player in images captured from different camera viewpoints during any given moment of a match. This task differs from traditional applications of person re-id in a few important ways. Firstly, players from the same team wear highly similar clothes, thereby making it harder to tell them apart. Secondly, there are only a few number of samples for each identity, which makes it harder to train a re-id system. Thirdly, the resolutions of the images are often quite low and vary a lot. This combined with heavy occlusions and fast movements of players greatly increase the challenges for re-id. In this paper, we propose a simple but effective hierarchical data sampling procedure and a centroid loss function that, when used together, increase the mean average precision (mAP) by 7 - 11.5 and the rank-1 (R1) by 8.8 - 14.9 without any change in the network or hyper-parameters used. Our data sampling procedure improves the similarity of the training and test distributions, and thereby aids in creating better estimates of the centroids of the embeddings (or feature vectors). Surprisingly, our study shows that in the presence of severely limited data, as is the case for our application, a simple centroid loss function based on euclidean distances significantly outperforms the popular triplet-centroid loss function. We show comparable improvements for both convolutional networks and vision transformers. Our approach is among the top ranked methods in the SoccerNet Re-Identification Challenge 2022 leaderboard (test-split) with a mAP of 86.0 and a R1 of 81.5. On the sequestered challenge split, we achieve an mAP of 84.9 and a R1 of 80.1. Research on re-id for sports-related applications is very limited and our work presents one of the first discussions in the literature on this.

On the sequestered challenge split, we achieve an mAP of 84.9 and a R1 of 80.1. Research on re-id for sports-related applications is very limited and our work presents one of the first discussions in the literature on this.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的重点是团队运动广播视频中的球员重新识别。具体来说，我们专注于在比赛的任何给定时刻从不同摄像机视角拍摄的图像中识别同一名球员。该任务在几个重要方面与行人重新识别的传统应用有所不同。首先，来自同一支球队的球员穿着非常相似的衣服，因此很难区分他们。其次，每个身份的样本数量很少，这使得训练重识别系统变得更加困难。第三，图像的分辨率通常很低并且变化很大。这与严重遮挡和玩家快速移动相结合，大大增加了重新识别的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单但有效的分层数据采样程序和质心损失函数，当它们一起使用时，可以将平均精度（mAP）提高7-11.5，将Rank-1（R1）提高8.8-14.9，而无需对所使用的网络或超参数进行任何更改。我们的数据采样过程提高了训练和测试分布的相似性，从而有助于创建更好的嵌入质心（或特征向量）估计。令人惊讶的是，我们的研究表明，在数据严重有限的情况下（就像我们的应用程序的情况一样），基于欧几里德距离的简单质心损失函数明显优于流行的三重质心损失函数。我们展示了卷积网络和视觉转换器的类似改进。我们的方法是 2022 年 SoccerNet 重新识别挑战排行榜（测试分割）中排名最高的方法之一，mAP 为 86.0，R1 为 81.5。在隔离挑战赛中，我们的 mAP 为 84.9，R1 为 80.1。体育相关应用的重识别研究非常有限，我们的工作是这方面文献中最早的讨论之一。

AI.tldr: 本文针对团队运动赛事的电视转播视频，研究如何在不同摄像头视角下准确识别同一球员的重识别问题。
AI.motivation: 传统人重识别方法在团队运动场景中面临同队球员服装相似、样本量少、图像分辨率低及运动遮挡等挑战，亟需针对性改进方案。
AI.method: 提出分层数据采样策略与基于欧氏距离的中心损失函数，通过优化特征向量分布提升识别性能，且无需调整网络结构或超参数。
AI.result: 在SoccerNet 2022挑战赛中，mAP达86.0/R1达81.5；在测试集上mAP提升7-11.5，R1提升8.8-14.9，且优于三元组中心损失函数。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为体育场景重识别提供了首个系统性方案，证明在数据稀缺场景下中心损失函数的有效性，并在主流模型架构中均取得显著提升。

search_text: Sports Re-ID: Improving Re-Identification Of Players In Broadcast Videos Of Team Sports 体育重识别：改进团体运动广播视频中运动员的重新识别 This work focuses on player re-identification in broadcast videos of team sports. Specifically, we focus on identifying the same player in images captured from different camera viewpoints during any given moment of a match. This task differs from traditional applications of person re-id in a few important ways. Firstly, players from the same team wear highly similar clothes, thereby making it harder to tell them apart. Secondly, there are only a few number of samples for each identity, which makes it harder to train a re-id system. Thirdly, the resolutions of the images are often quite low and vary a lot. This combined with heavy occlusions and fast movements of players greatly increase the challenges for re-id. In this paper, we propose a simple but effective hierarchical data sampling procedure and a centroid loss function that, when used together, increase the mean average precision (mAP) by 7 - 11.5 and the rank-1 (R1) by 8.8 - 14.9 without any change in the network or hyper-parameters used. Our data sampling procedure improves the similarity of the training and test distributions, and thereby aids in creating better estimates of the centroids of the embeddings (or feature vectors). Surprisingly, our study shows that in the presence of severely limited data, as is the case for our application, a simple centroid loss function based on euclidean distances significantly outperforms the popular triplet-centroid loss function. We show comparable improvements for both convolutional networks and vision transformers. Our approach is among the top ranked methods in the SoccerNet Re-Identification Challenge 2022 leaderboard (test-split) with a mAP of 86.0 and a R1 of 81.5. On the sequestered challenge split, we achieve an mAP of 84.9 and a R1 of 80.1. Research on re-id for sports-related applications is very limited and our work presents one of the first discussions in the literature on this. 这项工作的重点是团队运动广播视频中的球员重新识别。具体来说，我们专注于在比赛的任何给定时刻从不同摄像机视角拍摄的图像中识别同一名球员。该任务在几个重要方面与行人重新识别的传统应用有所不同。首先，来自同一支球队的球员穿着非常相似的衣服，因此很难区分他们。其次，每个身份的样本数量很少，这使得训练重识别系统变得更加困难。第三，图像的分辨率通常很低并且变化很大。这与严重遮挡和玩家快速移动相结合，大大增加了重新识别的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单但有效的分层数据采样程序和质心损失函数，当它们一起使用时，可以将平均精度（mAP）提高7-11.5，将Rank-1（R1）提高8.8-14.9，而无需对所使用的网络或超参数进行任何更改。我们的数据采样过程提高了训练和测试分布的相似性，从而有助于创建更好的嵌入质心（或特征向量）估计。令人惊讶的是，我们的研究表明，在数据严重有限的情况下（就像我们的应用程序的情况一样），基于欧几里德距离的简单质心损失函数明显优于流行的三重质心损失函数。我们展示了卷积网络和视觉转换器的类似改进。我们的方法是 2022 年 SoccerNet 重新识别挑战排行榜（测试分割）中排名最高的方法之一，mAP 为 86.0，R1 为 81.5。在隔离挑战赛中，我们的 mAP 为 84.9，R1 为 80.1。体育相关应用的重识别研究非常有限，我们的工作是这方面文献中最早的讨论之一。 本文针对团队运动赛事的电视转播视频，研究如何在不同摄像头视角下准确识别同一球员的重识别问题。 Bharath Comandur cs.CV

authors_text: Alexandr Notchenko,Vladislav Ishimtsev,Alexey Artemov,Vadim Selyutin,Emil Bogomolov,Evgeny Burnaev
title: Scan2Part: Fine-grained and Hierarchical Part-level Understanding of Real-World 3D Scans
title_zh: Scan2Part：对真实世界 3D 扫描的细粒度和分层零件级理解
comment: In Proceedings of the 17th International Joint Conference on Computer Vision, Imaging and Computer Graphics Theory and Applications
comments: In Proceedings of the 17th International Joint Conference on Computer Vision, Imaging and Computer Graphics Theory and Applications
abstract: We propose Scan2Part, a method to segment individual parts of objects in real-world, noisy indoor RGB-D scans. To this end, we vary the part hierarchies of objects in indoor scenes and explore their effect on scene understanding models. Specifically, we use a sparse U-Net-based architecture that captures the fine-scale detail of the underlying 3D scan geometry by leveraging a multi-scale feature hierarchy. In order to train our method, we introduce the Scan2Part dataset, which is the first large-scale collection providing detailed semantic labels at the part level in the real-world setting. In total, we provide 242,081 correspondences between 53,618 PartNet parts of 2,477 ShapeNet objects and 1,506 ScanNet scenes, at two spatial resolutions of 2 cm$^3$ and 5 cm$^3$. As output, we are able to predict fine-grained per-object part labels, even when the geometry is coarse or partially missing.
summary: We propose Scan2Part, a method to segment individual parts of objects in real-world, noisy indoor RGB-D scans. To this end, we vary the part hierarchies of objects in indoor scenes and explore their effect on scene understanding models. Specifically, we use a sparse U-Net-based architecture that captures the fine-scale detail of the underlying 3D scan geometry by leveraging a multi-scale feature hierarchy. In order to train our method, we introduce the Scan2Part dataset, which is the first large-scale collection providing detailed semantic labels at the part level in the real-world setting. In total, we provide 242,081 correspondences between 53,618 PartNet parts of 2,477 ShapeNet objects and 1,506 ScanNet scenes, at two spatial resolutions of 2 cm$^3$ and 5 cm$^3$. As output, we are able to predict fine-grained per-object part labels, even when the geometry is coarse or partially missing.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Scan2Part，一种在现实世界、嘈杂的室内 RGB-D 扫描中分割物体各个部分的方法。为此，我们改变室内场景中对象的部分层次结构，并探讨它们对场景理解模型的影响。具体来说，我们使用基于稀疏 U-Net 的架构，通过利用多尺度特征层次结构来捕获底层 3D 扫描几何体的精细尺度细节。为了训练我们的方法，我们引入了 Scan2Part 数据集，这是第一个在现实世界环境中提供零件级别详细语义标签的大型集合。总共，我们提供了 2,477 个 ShapeNet 对象的 53,618 个 PartNet 部分和 1,506 个 ScanNet 场景之间的 242,081 个对应关系，两种空间分辨率分别为 2 cm$^3$ 和 5 cm$^3$。作为输出，即使几何体粗糙或部分缺失，我们也能够预测细粒度的每个对象部分标签。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Scan2Part方法，用于对真实世界中的噪声室内RGB-D扫描进行细粒度和层次化的物体部件分割。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理真实场景中复杂且噪声较大的3D扫描数据，缺乏针对部件层级的细粒度语义理解能力，需建立更符合实际场景的分割模型与数据集。
AI.method: 基于稀疏U-Net架构构建多尺度特征层次网络，结合Scan2Part数据集进行训练，该数据集包含242,081个部件级语义标签对应关系，覆盖2,477个ShapeNet物体与1,506个ScanNet场景。
AI.result: 实现对粗粒度或部分缺失几何结构的物体部件级细粒度预测，在真实场景下达到较高分割精度。
AI.conclusion: Scan2Part方法与数据集为真实世界3D扫描的部件级理解提供了新范式，推动了细粒度场景解析技术的发展。

authors_text: Owais Ali,Hazrat Ali,Syed Ayaz Ali Shah,Aamir Shahzad
title: Implementation of a Modified U-Net for Medical Image Segmentation on Edge Devices
title_zh: 在边缘设备上实现用于医学图像分割的改进 U-Net
comment: Preprint of paper accepted in IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems II: Express Brief
comments: Preprint of paper accepted in IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems II: Express Brief
abstract: Deep learning techniques, particularly convolutional neural networks, have shown great potential in computer vision and medical imaging applications. However, deep learning models are computationally demanding as they require enormous computational power and specialized processing hardware for model training. To make these models portable and compatible for prototyping, their implementation on low-power devices is imperative. In this work, we present the implementation of Modified U-Net on Intel Movidius Neural Compute Stick 2 (NCS-2) for the segmentation of medical images. We selected U-Net because, in medical image segmentation, U-Net is a prominent model that provides improved performance for medical image segmentation even if the dataset size is small. The modified U-Net model is evaluated for performance in terms of dice score. Experiments are reported for segmentation task on three medical imaging datasets: BraTs dataset of brain MRI, heart MRI dataset, and Ziehl-Neelsen sputum smear microscopy image (ZNSDB) dataset. For the proposed model, we reduced the number of parameters from 30 million in the U-Net model to 0.49 million in the proposed architecture. Experimental results show that the modified U-Net provides comparable performance while requiring significantly lower resources and provides inference on the NCS-2. The maximum dice scores recorded are 0.96 for the BraTs dataset, 0.94 for the heart MRI dataset, and 0.74 for the ZNSDB dataset.
summary: Deep learning techniques, particularly convolutional neural networks, have shown great potential in computer vision and medical imaging applications. However, deep learning models are computationally demanding as they require enormous computational power and specialized processing hardware for model training. To make these models portable and compatible for prototyping, their implementation on low-power devices is imperative. In this work, we present the implementation of Modified U-Net on Intel Movidius Neural Compute Stick 2 (NCS-2) for the segmentation of medical images. We selected U-Net because, in medical image segmentation, U-Net is a prominent model that provides improved performance for medical image segmentation even if the dataset size is small. The modified U-Net model is evaluated for performance in terms of dice score. Experiments are reported for segmentation task on three medical imaging datasets: BraTs dataset of brain MRI, heart MRI dataset, and Ziehl-Neelsen sputum smear microscopy image (ZNSDB) dataset. For the proposed model, we reduced the number of parameters from 30 million in the U-Net model to 0.49 million in the proposed architecture. Experimental results show that the modified U-Net provides comparable performance while requiring significantly lower resources and provides inference on the NCS-2. The maximum dice scores recorded are 0.96 for the BraTs dataset, 0.94 for the heart MRI dataset, and 0.74 for the ZNSDB dataset.
abstract_zh: 深度学习技术，特别是卷积神经网络，在计算机视觉和医学成像应用中显示出巨大的潜力。然而，深度学习模型对计算的要求很高，因为它们需要巨大的计算能力和专门的处理硬件来进行模型训练。为了使这些模型便携且兼容原型设计，它们在低功耗设备上的实现势在必行。在这项工作中，我们展示了在英特尔 Movidius 神经计算棒 2 (NCS-2) 上实现改进的 U-Net，用于医学图像分割。我们选择 U-Net 是因为，在医学图像分割中，U-Net 是一个突出的模型，即使数据集规模很小，它也可以为医学图像分割提供改进的性能。修改后的 U-Net 模型根据骰子得分来评估性能。报告了三个医学成像数据集上分割任务的实验：脑 MRI 的 BraTs 数据集、心脏 MRI 数据集和 Ziehl-Neelsen 痰涂片显微镜图像 (ZNSDB) 数据集。对于所提出的模型，我们将参数数量从 U-Net 模型中的 3000 万个减少到所提出架构中的 49 万个。实验结果表明，修改后的 U-Net 提供了可比的性能，同时所需的资源显着降低，并提供了对 NCS-2 的推理。 BraTs 数据集记录的最大骰子分数为 0.96，心脏 MRI 数据集为 0.94，ZNSDB 数据集为 0.74。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的U-Net模型，并在Intel Movidius NCS-2边缘设备上实现，用于医学图像分割任务。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型计算需求高，需依赖专用硬件，而医学图像分割需在低功耗设备上实现高效部署。
AI.method: 基于U-Net架构进行参数优化，将模型参数从3000万减少至49万，并在NCS-2边缘设备上验证分割性能。
AI.result: 在BraTs、心脏MRI和ZNSDB数据集上分别达到0.96、0.94和0.74的Dice系数，模型资源占用显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 改进的U-Net在保持分割精度的同时显著减少计算资源需求，适合边缘设备部署医学图像分割任务。

search_text: Implementation of a Modified U-Net for Medical Image Segmentation on Edge Devices 在边缘设备上实现用于医学图像分割的改进 U-Net Deep learning techniques, particularly convolutional neural networks, have shown great potential in computer vision and medical imaging applications. However, deep learning models are computationally demanding as they require enormous computational power and specialized processing hardware for model training. To make these models portable and compatible for prototyping, their implementation on low-power devices is imperative. In this work, we present the implementation of Modified U-Net on Intel Movidius Neural Compute Stick 2 (NCS-2) for the segmentation of medical images. We selected U-Net because, in medical image segmentation, U-Net is a prominent model that provides improved performance for medical image segmentation even if the dataset size is small. The modified U-Net model is evaluated for performance in terms of dice score. Experiments are reported for segmentation task on three medical imaging datasets: BraTs dataset of brain MRI, heart MRI dataset, and Ziehl-Neelsen sputum smear microscopy image (ZNSDB) dataset. For the proposed model, we reduced the number of parameters from 30 million in the U-Net model to 0.49 million in the proposed architecture. Experimental results show that the modified U-Net provides comparable performance while requiring significantly lower resources and provides inference on the NCS-2. The maximum dice scores recorded are 0.96 for the BraTs dataset, 0.94 for the heart MRI dataset, and 0.74 for the ZNSDB dataset. 深度学习技术，特别是卷积神经网络，在计算机视觉和医学成像应用中显示出巨大的潜力。然而，深度学习模型对计算的要求很高，因为它们需要巨大的计算能力和专门的处理硬件来进行模型训练。为了使这些模型便携且兼容原型设计，它们在低功耗设备上的实现势在必行。在这项工作中，我们展示了在英特尔 Movidius 神经计算棒 2 (NCS-2) 上实现改进的 U-Net，用于医学图像分割。我们选择 U-Net 是因为，在医学图像分割中，U-Net 是一个突出的模型，即使数据集规模很小，它也可以为医学图像分割提供改进的性能。修改后的 U-Net 模型根据骰子得分来评估性能。报告了三个医学成像数据集上分割任务的实验：脑 MRI 的 BraTs 数据集、心脏 MRI 数据集和 Ziehl-Neelsen 痰涂片显微镜图像 (ZNSDB) 数据集。对于所提出的模型，我们将参数数量从 U-Net 模型中的 3000 万个减少到所提出架构中的 49 万个。实验结果表明，修改后的 U-Net 提供了可比的性能，同时所需的资源显着降低，并提供了对 NCS-2 的推理。 BraTs 数据集记录的最大骰子分数为 0.96，心脏 MRI 数据集为 0.94，ZNSDB 数据集为 0.74。 本文提出了一种改进的U-Net模型，并在Intel Movidius NCS-2边缘设备上实现，用于医学图像分割任务。 Owais Ali,Hazrat Ali,Syed Ayaz Ali Shah,Aamir Shahzad eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.CV,eess.SY

authors_text: Chaoqi Chen,Jiongcheng Li,Hong-Yu Zhou,Xiaoguang Han,Yue Huang,Xinghao Ding,Yizhou Yu
title: Relation Matters: Foreground-aware Graph-based Relational Reasoning for Domain Adaptive Object Detection
title_zh: 关系很重要：用于域自适应对象检测的基于前景感知图的关系推理
abstract: Domain Adaptive Object Detection (DAOD) focuses on improving the generalization ability of object detectors via knowledge transfer. Recent advances in DAOD strive to change the emphasis of the adaptation process from global to local in virtue of fine-grained feature alignment methods. However, both the global and local alignment approaches fail to capture the topological relations among different foreground objects as the explicit dependencies and interactions between and within domains are neglected. In this case, only seeking one-vs-one alignment does not necessarily ensure the precise knowledge transfer. Moreover, conventional alignment-based approaches may be vulnerable to catastrophic overfitting regarding those less transferable regions (e.g. backgrounds) due to the accumulation of inaccurate localization results in the target domain. To remedy these issues, we first formulate DAOD as an open-set domain adaptation problem, in which the foregrounds and backgrounds are seen as the ``known classes'' and ``unknown class'' respectively. Accordingly, we propose a new and general framework for DAOD, named Foreground-aware Graph-based Relational Reasoning (FGRR), which incorporates graph structures into the detection pipeline to explicitly model the intra- and inter-domain foreground object relations on both pixel and semantic spaces, thereby endowing the DAOD model with the capability of relational reasoning beyond the popular alignment-based paradigm. The inter-domain visual and semantic correlations are hierarchically modeled via bipartite graph structures, and the intra-domain relations are encoded via graph attention mechanisms. Empirical results demonstrate that the proposed FGRR exceeds the state-of-the-art performance on four DAOD benchmarks.
summary: Domain Adaptive Object Detection (DAOD) focuses on improving the generalization ability of object detectors via knowledge transfer. Recent advances in DAOD strive to change the emphasis of the adaptation process from global to local in virtue of fine-grained feature alignment methods. However, both the global and local alignment approaches fail to capture the topological relations among different foreground objects as the explicit dependencies and interactions between and within domains are neglected. In this case, only seeking one-vs-one alignment does not necessarily ensure the precise knowledge transfer. Moreover, conventional alignment-based approaches may be vulnerable to catastrophic overfitting regarding those less transferable regions (e.g. backgrounds) due to the accumulation of inaccurate localization results in the target domain. To remedy these issues, we first formulate DAOD as an open-set domain adaptation problem, in which the foregrounds and backgrounds are seen as the ``known classes'' and ``unknown class'' respectively. Accordingly, we propose a new and general framework for DAOD, named Foreground-aware Graph-based Relational Reasoning (FGRR), which incorporates graph structures into the detection pipeline to explicitly model the intra- and inter-domain foreground object relations on both pixel and semantic spaces, thereby endowing the DAOD model with the capability of relational reasoning beyond the popular alignment-based paradigm. The inter-domain visual and semantic correlations are hierarchically modeled via bipartite graph structures, and the intra-domain relations are encoded via graph attention mechanisms. Empirical results demonstrate that the proposed FGRR exceeds the state-of-the-art performance on four DAOD benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 领域自适应目标检测（DAOD）专注于通过知识迁移来提高目标检测器的泛化能力。 DAOD 的最新进展致力于利用细粒度的特征对齐方法将适应过程的重点从全局转移到局部。然而，全局和局部对齐方法都无法捕获不同前景对象之间的拓扑关系，因为域之间和域内的显式依赖关系和交互被忽略。在这种情况下，仅仅寻求一对一的对齐并不能保证精确的知识转移。此外，由于目标域中不准确的定位结果的积累，传统的基于对齐的方法可能容易对那些不易转移的区域（例如背景）发生灾难性的过度拟合。为了解决这些问题，我们首先将 DAOD 表述为开放集域适应问题，其中前景和背景分别被视为“已知类”和“未知类”。因此，我们提出了一种新的通用 DAOD 框架，名为前景感知图基关系推理（FGRR），它将图结构合并到检测管道中，以显式地建模像素和语义空间上的域内和域间前景对象关系，从而赋予 DAOD 模型超越流行的基于对齐范式的关系推理能力。域间视觉和语义相关性通过二分图结构进行分层建模，域内关系通过图注意机制进行编码。实证结果表明，所提出的 FGRR 超过了四个 DAOD 基准的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于前景感知图结构的关系推理框架，用于提升领域自适应目标检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应目标检测方法未能有效捕捉不同前景对象间的拓扑关系，且易因背景区域的不准确定位导致灾难性过拟合。
AI.method: 将DAOD建模为开放集领域适应问题，设计前景感知图关系推理框架（FGRR），通过双图结构建模跨领域视觉语义关联，利用图注意力机制编码领域内关系。
AI.result: 在四个DAOD基准数据集上超越现有最先进方法，验证了框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模前景对象间关系，FGRR框架解决了传统对齐方法的局限性，为领域自适应检测提供了新范式。

authors_text: Shohreh Deldari,Hao Xue,Aaqib Saeed,Jiayuan He,Daniel V. Smith,Flora D. Salim
title: Beyond Just Vision: A Review on Self-Supervised Representation Learning on Multimodal and Temporal Data
title_zh: 超越视觉：多模态和时态数据的自监督表示学习综述
abstract: Recently, Self-Supervised Representation Learning (SSRL) has attracted much attention in the field of computer vision, speech, natural language processing (NLP), and recently, with other types of modalities, including time series from sensors. The popularity of self-supervised learning is driven by the fact that traditional models typically require a huge amount of well-annotated data for training. Acquiring annotated data can be a difficult and costly process. Self-supervised methods have been introduced to improve the efficiency of training data through discriminative pre-training of models using supervisory signals that have been freely obtained from the raw data. Unlike existing reviews of SSRL that have pre-dominately focused upon methods in the fields of CV or NLP for a single modality, we aim to provide the first comprehensive review of multimodal self-supervised learning methods for temporal data. To this end, we 1) provide a comprehensive categorization of existing SSRL methods, 2) introduce a generic pipeline by defining the key components of a SSRL framework, 3) compare existing models in terms of their objective function, network architecture and potential applications, and 4) review existing multimodal techniques in each category and various modalities. Finally, we present existing weaknesses and future opportunities. We believe our work develops a perspective on the requirements of SSRL in domains that utilise multimodal and/or temporal data
summary: Recently, Self-Supervised Representation Learning (SSRL) has attracted much attention in the field of computer vision, speech, natural language processing (NLP), and recently, with other types of modalities, including time series from sensors. The popularity of self-supervised learning is driven by the fact that traditional models typically require a huge amount of well-annotated data for training. Acquiring annotated data can be a difficult and costly process. Self-supervised methods have been introduced to improve the efficiency of training data through discriminative pre-training of models using supervisory signals that have been freely obtained from the raw data. Unlike existing reviews of SSRL that have pre-dominately focused upon methods in the fields of CV or NLP for a single modality, we aim to provide the first comprehensive review of multimodal self-supervised learning methods for temporal data. To this end, we 1) provide a comprehensive categorization of existing SSRL methods, 2) introduce a generic pipeline by defining the key components of a SSRL framework, 3) compare existing models in terms of their objective function, network architecture and potential applications, and 4) review existing multimodal techniques in each category and various modalities. Finally, we present existing weaknesses and future opportunities. We believe our work develops a perspective on the requirements of SSRL in domains that utilise multimodal and/or temporal data
abstract_zh: 最近，自监督表示学习（SSRL）在计算机视觉、语音、自然语言处理（NLP）领域以及其他类型的模态（包括传感器的时间序列）领域引起了广泛关注。自监督学习的流行是由于传统模型通常需要大量注释良好的数据进行训练。获取带注释的数据可能是一个困难且成本高昂的过程。引入了自监督方法，通过使用从原始数据中自由获得的监督信号对模型进行判别性预训练来提高训练数据的效率。与 SSRL 的现有评论主要关注单一模态的 CV 或 NLP 领域的方法不同，我们的目标是提供对时态数据的多模态自监督学习方法的首次全面评论。为此，我们 1) 提供现有 SSRL 方法的全面分类，2) 通过定义 SSRL 框架的关键组件来引入通用管道，3) 比较现有模型的目标函数、网络架构和潜在应用，以及 4) 审查每个类别和各种模态中的现有多模态技术。最后，我们提出了现有的弱点和未来的机会。我们相信我们的工作对利用多模态和/或时态数据的领域中 SSRL 的要求提出了新的看法

AI.tldr: 本文旨在全面回顾多模态和时序数据的自监督表示学习方法，分类现有技术，分析其框架、目标函数及应用场景，并探讨未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习依赖大量标注数据，而标注成本高且难以获取。自监督学习通过利用数据自身信号提升效率，但现有综述多聚焦单模态领域，缺乏对多模态时序数据的系统性分析。
AI.method: 1) 分类现有自监督学习方法；2) 定义通用框架的关键组件；3) 对比模型的目标函数、网络结构及应用；4) 回顾多模态技术在各类别和模态中的实现。
AI.result: 总结了多模态自监督学习的当前技术路线、优势与局限性，指出现有方法在跨模态对齐、时序建模及可扩展性上的不足，并提出未来研究机会。
AI.conclusion: 本文为多模态与时序数据的自监督学习提供了系统性综述，明确了技术发展需求，为后续研究提供了方向与参考。

search_text: Beyond Just Vision: A Review on Self-Supervised Representation Learning on Multimodal and Temporal Data 超越视觉：多模态和时态数据的自监督表示学习综述 Recently, Self-Supervised Representation Learning (SSRL) has attracted much attention in the field of computer vision, speech, natural language processing (NLP), and recently, with other types of modalities, including time series from sensors. The popularity of self-supervised learning is driven by the fact that traditional models typically require a huge amount of well-annotated data for training. Acquiring annotated data can be a difficult and costly process. Self-supervised methods have been introduced to improve the efficiency of training data through discriminative pre-training of models using supervisory signals that have been freely obtained from the raw data. Unlike existing reviews of SSRL that have pre-dominately focused upon methods in the fields of CV or NLP for a single modality, we aim to provide the first comprehensive review of multimodal self-supervised learning methods for temporal data. To this end, we 1) provide a comprehensive categorization of existing SSRL methods, 2) introduce a generic pipeline by defining the key components of a SSRL framework, 3) compare existing models in terms of their objective function, network architecture and potential applications, and 4) review existing multimodal techniques in each category and various modalities. Finally, we present existing weaknesses and future opportunities. We believe our work develops a perspective on the requirements of SSRL in domains that utilise multimodal and/or temporal data 最近，自监督表示学习（SSRL）在计算机视觉、语音、自然语言处理（NLP）领域以及其他类型的模态（包括传感器的时间序列）领域引起了广泛关注。自监督学习的流行是由于传统模型通常需要大量注释良好的数据进行训练。获取带注释的数据可能是一个困难且成本高昂的过程。引入了自监督方法，通过使用从原始数据中自由获得的监督信号对模型进行判别性预训练来提高训练数据的效率。与 SSRL 的现有评论主要关注单一模态的 CV 或 NLP 领域的方法不同，我们的目标是提供对时态数据的多模态自监督学习方法的首次全面评论。为此，我们 1) 提供现有 SSRL 方法的全面分类，2) 通过定义 SSRL 框架的关键组件来引入通用管道，3) 比较现有模型的目标函数、网络架构和潜在应用，以及 4) 审查每个类别和各种模态中的现有多模态技术。最后，我们提出了现有的弱点和未来的机会。我们相信我们的工作对利用多模态和/或时态数据的领域中 SSRL 的要求提出了新的看法 本文旨在全面回顾多模态和时序数据的自监督表示学习方法，分类现有技术，分析其框架、目标函数及应用场景，并探讨未来研究方向。 Shohreh Deldari,Hao Xue,Aaqib Saeed,Jiayuan He,Daniel V. authors_text: Yicong Li,Xiang Wang,Junbin Xiao,Wei Ji,Tat-Seng Chua
title: Invariant Grounding for Video Question Answering
title_zh: 视频问答的不变基础
abstract: Video Question Answering (VideoQA) is the task of answering questions about a video. At its core is understanding the alignments between visual scenes in video and linguistic semantics in question to yield the answer. In leading VideoQA models, the typical learning objective, empirical risk minimization (ERM), latches on superficial correlations between video-question pairs and answers as the alignments. However, ERM can be problematic, because it tends to over-exploit the spurious correlations between question-irrelevant scenes and answers, instead of inspecting the causal effect of question-critical scenes. As a result, the VideoQA models suffer from unreliable reasoning. In this work, we first take a causal look at VideoQA and argue that invariant grounding is the key to ruling out the spurious correlations. Towards this end, we propose a new learning framework, Invariant Grounding for VideoQA (IGV), to ground the question-critical scene, whose causal relations with answers are invariant across different interventions on the complement. With IGV, the VideoQA models are forced to shield the answering process from the negative influence of spurious correlations, which significantly improves the reasoning ability. Experiments on three benchmark datasets validate the superiority of IGV in terms of accuracy, visual explainability, and generalization ability over the leading baselines.
summary: Video Question Answering (VideoQA) is the task of answering questions about a video. At its core is understanding the alignments between visual scenes in video and linguistic semantics in question to yield the answer. In leading VideoQA models, the typical learning objective, empirical risk minimization (ERM), latches on superficial correlations between video-question pairs and answers as the alignments. However, ERM can be problematic, because it tends to over-exploit the spurious correlations between question-irrelevant scenes and answers, instead of inspecting the causal effect of question-critical scenes. As a result, the VideoQA models suffer from unreliable reasoning. In this work, we first take a causal look at VideoQA and argue that invariant grounding is the key to ruling out the spurious correlations. Towards this end, we propose a new learning framework, Invariant Grounding for VideoQA (IGV), to ground the question-critical scene, whose causal relations with answers are invariant across different interventions on the complement. With IGV, the VideoQA models are forced to shield the answering process from the negative influence of spurious correlations, which significantly improves the reasoning ability. Experiments on three benchmark datasets validate the superiority of IGV in terms of accuracy, visual explainability, and generalization ability over the leading baselines.
abstract_zh: 视频问答（VideoQA）是回答有关视频的问题的任务。其核心是理解视频中的视觉场景与相关语言语义之间的一致性，以得出答案。在领先的 VideoQA 模型中，典型的学习目标，经验风险最小化 (ERM)，锁定视频问题对和答案之间的表面相关性作为对齐。然而，ERM 可能存在问题，因为它倾向于过度利用与问题无关的场景和答案之间的虚假相关性，而不是检查问题关键场景的因果效应。因此，VideoQA 模型的推理不可靠。在这项工作中，我们首先对 VideoQA 进行因果分析，并认为不变基础是排除虚假相关性的关键。为此，我们提出了一个新的学习框架，视频问答不变基础（IGV），以地面关键问题场景，其与答案的因果关系在补体上的不同干预中是不变的。通过 IGV，VideoQA 模型被迫保护回答过程免受虚假相关性的负面影响，从而显着提高了推理能力。在三个基准数据集上的实验验证了 IGV 在准确性、视觉可解释性和泛化能力方面相对于领先基线的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为IGV的新框架，通过消除视频问答中无关场景的虚假相关性，提升模型的推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频问答模型依赖经验风险最小化（ERM），容易过度利用与问题无关的场景与答案之间的虚假相关性，导致推理不可靠。
AI.method: 提出不变性 grounding 框架（IGV），强制模型关注与答案存在因果关系的问题关键场景，通过干预互补信息消除虚假相关性。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上，IGV在准确率、视觉可解释性和泛化能力上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 不变性 grounding 是提升视频问答模型可靠性的关键，IGV通过因果推理有效解决了虚假相关性问题。

authors_text: Shivam Gupta,Jasper C. H. Lee,Eric Price,Paul Valiant
title: Finite-Sample Maximum Likelihood Estimation of Location
title_zh: 位置的有限样本最大似然估计
comment: Corrected an inaccuracy in the description of the experimental setup. Also updated funding acknowledgements
comments: Corrected an inaccuracy in the description of the experimental setup. Also updated funding acknowledgements
abstract: We consider 1-dimensional location estimation, where we estimate a parameter $λ$ from $n$ samples $λ+ η_i$, with each $η_i$ drawn i.i.d. from a known distribution $f$. For fixed $f$ the maximum-likelihood estimate (MLE) is well-known to be optimal in the limit as $n \to \infty$: it is asymptotically normal with variance matching the Cramér-Rao lower bound of $\frac{1}{n\mathcal{I}}$, where $\mathcal{I}$ is the Fisher information of $f$. However, this bound does not hold for finite $n$, or when $f$ varies with $n$. We show for arbitrary $f$ and $n$ that one can recover a similar theory based on the Fisher information of a smoothed version of $f$, where the smoothing radius decays with $n$.
summary: We consider 1-dimensional location estimation, where we estimate a parameter $λ$ from $n$ samples $λ+ η_i$, with each $η_i$ drawn i.i.d. from a known distribution $f$. For fixed $f$ the maximum-likelihood estimate (MLE) is well-known to be optimal in the limit as $n \to \infty$: it is asymptotically normal with variance matching the Cramér-Rao lower bound of $\frac{1}{n\mathcal{I}}$, where $\mathcal{I}$ is the Fisher information of $f$. However, this bound does not hold for finite $n$, or when $f$ varies with $n$. We show for arbitrary $f$ and $n$ that one can recover a similar theory based on the Fisher information of a smoothed version of $f$, where the smoothing radius decays with $n$.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑一维位置估计，其中我们从 $n$ 个样本 $λ+ η_i$ 估计参数 $λ$，每个 $η_i$ 绘制独立同分布。来自已知分布 $f$。对于固定的 $f$，最大似然估计 (MLE) 众所周知在 $n \to \infty$ 的限制内是最优的：它是渐近正态的，方差与 $\frac{1}{n\mathcal{I}}$ 的 Cramér-Rao 下界匹配，其中 $\mathcal{I}$ 是 $f$ 的 Fisher 信息。然而，这个界限对于有限的 $n$ 或当 $f$ 随 $n$ 变化时不成立。我们证明，对于任意 $f$ 和 $n$，人们可以根据 $f$ 的平滑版本的费舍尔信息恢复类似的理论，其中平滑半径随 $n$ 衰减。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在有限样本情况下，通过平滑分布函数的 Fisher 信息来改进位置参数的最大似然估计理论。
AI.motivation: 经典最大似然估计在样本量趋于无穷时最优，但实际应用中样本有限或分布随样本变化时，Cramér-Rao 下界不再适用，需寻找有限样本下的理论保证。
AI.method: 对已知分布函数进行平滑处理，使平滑半径随样本量衰减，并基于平滑后的 Fisher 信息构建理论分析框架。
AI.result: 证明对于任意分布和样本量，通过平滑处理可恢复类似渐近理论的结果，从而在有限样本下实现参数估计的理论分析。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为有限样本场景下的参数估计提供了新的理论工具，通过平滑 Fisher 信息弥合了经典渐近理论与实际应用间的差距。

search_text: Finite-Sample Maximum Likelihood Estimation of Location 位置的有限样本最大似然估计 We consider 1-dimensional location estimation, where we estimate a parameter $λ$ from $n$ samples $λ+ η_i$, with each $η_i$ drawn i.i.d. from a known distribution $f$. For fixed $f$ the maximum-likelihood estimate (MLE) is well-known to be optimal in the limit as $n \to \infty$: it is asymptotically normal with variance matching the Cramér-Rao lower bound of $\frac{1}{n\mathcal{I}}$, where $\mathcal{I}$ is the Fisher information of $f$. However, this bound does not hold for finite $n$, or when $f$ varies with $n$. We show for arbitrary $f$ and $n$ that one can recover a similar theory based on the Fisher information of a smoothed version of $f$, where the smoothing radius decays with $n$. 我们考虑一维位置估计，其中我们从 $n$ 个样本 $λ+ η_i$ 估计参数 $λ$，每个 $η_i$ 绘制独立同分布。来自已知分布 $f$。对于固定的 $f$，最大似然估计 (MLE) 众所周知在 $n \to \infty$ 的限制内是最优的：它是渐近正态的，方差与 $\frac{1}{n\mathcal{I}}$ 的 Cramér-Rao 下界匹配，其中 $\mathcal{I}$ 是 $f$ 的 Fisher 信息。然而，这个界限对于有限的 $n$ 或当 $f$ 随 $n$ 变化时不成立。我们证明，对于任意 $f$ 和 $n$，人们可以根据 $f$ 的平滑版本的费舍尔信息恢复类似的理论，其中平滑半径随 $n$ 衰减。 本文研究在有限样本情况下，通过平滑分布函数的 Fisher 信息来改进位置参数的最大似然估计理论。 Shivam Gupta,Jasper C. H. Lee,Eric Price,Paul Valiant math.ST,cs.DS,cs.IT,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Dongsheng Ding,Kaiqing Zhang,Jiali Duan,Tamer Başar,Mihailo R. Jovanović
title: Convergence and sample complexity of natural policy gradient primal-dual methods for constrained MDPs
title_zh: 约束 MDP 的自然策略梯度原对偶方法的收敛性和样本复杂性
comment: 76 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables; Journal version of the NeurIPS 2020 paper; Accepted to JMLR
comments: 76 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables; Journal version of the NeurIPS 2020 paper; Accepted to JMLR
abstract: We study the sequential decision making problem of maximizing the expected total reward while satisfying a constraint on the expected total utility. We employ the natural policy gradient method to solve the discounted infinite-horizon optimal control problem for Constrained Markov Decision Processes (constrained MDPs). Specifically, we propose a new Natural Policy Gradient Primal-Dual (NPG-PD) method that updates the primal variable via natural policy gradient ascent and the dual variable via projected subgradient descent. Although the underlying maximization involves a nonconcave objective function and a nonconvex constraint set, under the softmax policy parametrization, we prove that our method achieves global convergence with sublinear rates regarding both the optimality gap and the constraint violation. Such convergence is independent of the size of the state-action space, i.e., it is~dimension-free. Furthermore, for log-linear and general smooth policy parametrizations, we establish sublinear convergence rates up to a function approximation error caused by restricted policy parametrization. We also provide convergence and finite-sample complexity guarantees for two sample-based NPG-PD algorithms. We use a set of computational experiments to showcase the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: We study the sequential decision making problem of maximizing the expected total reward while satisfying a constraint on the expected total utility. We employ the natural policy gradient method to solve the discounted infinite-horizon optimal control problem for Constrained Markov Decision Processes (constrained MDPs). Specifically, we propose a new Natural Policy Gradient Primal-Dual (NPG-PD) method that updates the primal variable via natural policy gradient ascent and the dual variable via projected subgradient descent. Although the underlying maximization involves a nonconcave objective function and a nonconvex constraint set, under the softmax policy parametrization, we prove that our method achieves global convergence with sublinear rates regarding both the optimality gap and the constraint violation. Such convergence is independent of the size of the state-action space, i.e., it is~dimension-free. Furthermore, for log-linear and general smooth policy parametrizations, we establish sublinear convergence rates up to a function approximation error caused by restricted policy parametrization. We also provide convergence and finite-sample complexity guarantees for two sample-based NPG-PD algorithms. We use a set of computational experiments to showcase the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 我们研究在满足预期总效用约束的同时最大化预期总回报的顺序决策问题。我们采用自然策略梯度方法来解决约束马尔可夫决策过程（约束 MDP）的贴现无限视野最优控制问题。具体来说，我们提出了一种新的自然策略梯度原始-对偶（NPG-PD）方法，该方法通过自然策略梯度上升更新原始变量，并通过投影次梯度下降更新对偶变量。尽管底层的最大化涉及非凹目标函数和非凸约束集，但在 softmax 策略参数化下，我们证明我们的方法在最优性差距和约束违反方面以次线性速率实现了全局收敛。这种收敛与状态-动作空间的大小无关，即它是无维的。此外，对于对数线性和一般平滑策略参数化，我们建立了次线性收敛速率，直至由受限策略参数化引起的函数逼近误差。我们还为两种基于样本的 NPG-PD 算法提供收敛和有限样本复杂性保证。我们使用一组计算实验来展示我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在满足约束条件的情况下，如何通过自然策略梯度方法最大化预期总奖励的问题。
AI.motivation: 在约束马尔可夫决策过程（constrained MDPs）中，如何在满足约束条件的同时最大化预期总奖励是一个具有挑战性的问题。传统方法在处理非凸约束和非凹目标函数时存在困难，因此需要一种新的方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的自然策略梯度对偶方法（NPG-PD），通过自然策略梯度上升更新主变量，并通过投影次梯度下降更新对偶变量。
AI.result: 在softmax策略参数化下，该方法实现了全局收敛，并且收敛率是次线性的，与状态-动作空间的大小无关。对于log-linear和一般平滑策略参数化，也建立了次线性收敛率，直到受限策略参数化引起的近似误差。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在处理约束MDPs时表现出良好的效果，并且具有样本复杂度的保证，实验结果验证了其有效性。

authors_text: Haowei He,Jiaye Teng,Yang Yuan
title: Anomaly Detection with Test Time Augmentation and Consistency Evaluation
title_zh: 通过增加测试时间和一致性评估进行异常检测
abstract: Deep neural networks are known to be vulnerable to unseen data: they may wrongly assign high confidence stcores to out-distribuion samples. Recent works try to solve the problem using representation learning methods and specific metrics. In this paper, we propose a simple, yet effective post-hoc anomaly detection algorithm named Test Time Augmentation Anomaly Detection (TTA-AD), inspired by a novel observation. Specifically, we observe that in-distribution data enjoy more consistent predictions for its original and augmented versions on a trained network than out-distribution data, which separates in-distribution and out-distribution samples. Experiments on various high-resolution image benchmark datasets demonstrate that TTA-AD achieves comparable or better detection performance under dataset-vs-dataset anomaly detection settings with a 60%~90\% running time reduction of existing classifier-based algorithms. We provide empirical verification that the key to TTA-AD lies in the remaining classes between augmented features, which has long been partially ignored by previous works. Additionally, we use RUNS as a surrogate to analyze our algorithm theoretically.
summary: Deep neural networks are known to be vulnerable to unseen data: they may wrongly assign high confidence stcores to out-distribuion samples. Recent works try to solve the problem using representation learning methods and specific metrics. In this paper, we propose a simple, yet effective post-hoc anomaly detection algorithm named Test Time Augmentation Anomaly Detection (TTA-AD), inspired by a novel observation. Specifically, we observe that in-distribution data enjoy more consistent predictions for its original and augmented versions on a trained network than out-distribution data, which separates in-distribution and out-distribution samples. Experiments on various high-resolution image benchmark datasets demonstrate that TTA-AD achieves comparable or better detection performance under dataset-vs-dataset anomaly detection settings with a 60%~90\% running time reduction of existing classifier-based algorithms. We provide empirical verification that the key to TTA-AD lies in the remaining classes between augmented features, which has long been partially ignored by previous works. Additionally, we use RUNS as a surrogate to analyze our algorithm theoretically.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，深度神经网络容易受到看不见的数据的影响：它们可能会错误地将高置信度分数分配给分布外的样本。最近的工作尝试使用表示学习方法和特定指标来解决该问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单但有效的事后异常检测算法，名为测试时间增强异常检测（TTA-AD），其灵感来自于一项新颖的观察。具体来说，我们观察到分布内数据在经过训练的网络上对其原始版本和增强版本的预测比分布外数据更一致，分布内数据和分布外样本分开。在各种高分辨率图像基准数据集上的实验表明，TTA-AD 在数据集与数据集异常检测设置下实现了相当或更好的检测性能，并且运行时间比现有基于分类器的算法减少了 60%~90\%。我们提供的实证验证表明，TTA-AD 的关键在于增强特征之间的剩余类别，而这一点长期以来一直被以前的工作所部分忽略。此外，我们使用 RUNS 作为替代来从理论上分析我们的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于测试时增强和一致性评估的异常检测算法TTA-AD，用于检测深度神经网络对未见数据的高置信度错误预测。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在面对未见数据时容易产生高置信度的错误预测，现有方法在检测性能和运行效率上仍有不足，因此需要一种简单有效的后处理异常检测方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为TTA-AD的后处理异常检测算法，其核心思想是利用测试时增强（Test Time Augmentation）生成数据的不同增强版本，并通过一致性评估区分分布内和分布外样本。
AI.result: 实验表明，TTA-AD在多个高分辨率图像数据集上实现了与现有分类器方法相当或更优的检测性能，并且运行时间减少了60%~90%。
AI.conclusion: TTA-AD通过增强特征之间剩余类别的关键作用，有效提升了异常检测性能，并为后续研究提供了理论支持。

conclusion: TTA-AD通过增强特征之间剩余类别的关键作用，有效提升了异常检测性能，并为后续研究提供了理论支持。
search_text: Anomaly Detection with Test Time Augmentation and Consistency Evaluation 通过增加测试时间和一致性评估进行异常检测 Deep neural networks are known to be vulnerable to unseen data: they may wrongly assign high confidence stcores to out-distribuion samples. Recent works try to solve the problem using representation learning methods and specific metrics. In this paper, we propose a simple, yet effective post-hoc anomaly detection algorithm named Test Time Augmentation Anomaly Detection (TTA-AD), inspired by a novel observation. Specifically, we observe that in-distribution data enjoy more consistent predictions for its original and augmented versions on a trained network than out-distribution data, which separates in-distribution and out-distribution samples. Experiments on various high-resolution image benchmark datasets demonstrate that TTA-AD achieves comparable or better detection performance under dataset-vs-dataset anomaly detection settings with a 60%~90\% running time reduction of existing classifier-based algorithms. We provide empirical verification that the key to TTA-AD lies in the remaining classes between augmented features, which has long been partially ignored by previous works. Additionally, we use RUNS as a surrogate to analyze our algorithm theoretically. 众所周知，深度神经网络容易受到看不见的数据的影响：它们可能会错误地将高置信度分数分配给分布外的样本。最近的工作尝试使用表示学习方法和特定指标来解决该问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单但有效的事后异常检测算法，名为测试时间增强异常检测（TTA-AD），其灵感来自于一项新颖的观察。具体来说，我们观察到分布内数据在经过训练的网络上对其原始版本和增强版本的预测比分布外数据更一致，分布内数据和分布外样本分开。在各种高分辨率图像基准数据集上的实验表明，TTA-AD 在数据集与数据集异常检测设置下实现了相当或更好的检测性能，并且运行时间比现有基于分类器的算法减少了 60%~90\%。我们提供的实证验证表明，TTA-AD 的关键在于增强特征之间的剩余类别，而这一点长期以来一直被以前的工作所部分忽略。此外，我们使用 RUNS 作为替代来从理论上分析我们的算法。 本文提出了一种基于测试时增强和一致性评估的异常检测算法TTA-AD，用于检测深度神经网络对未见数据的高置信度错误预测。 Haowei He,Jiaye Teng,Yang Yuan cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Chinmay Maheshwari,Eric Mazumdar,Shankar Sastry
title: Decentralized, Communication- and Coordination-free Learning in Structured Matching Markets
title_zh: 结构化匹配市场中的去中心化、无沟通和协调的学习
abstract: We study the problem of online learning in competitive settings in the context of two-sided matching markets. In particular, one side of the market, the agents, must learn about their preferences over the other side, the firms, through repeated interaction while competing with other agents for successful matches. We propose a class of decentralized, communication- and coordination-free algorithms that agents can use to reach to their stable match in structured matching markets. In contrast to prior works, the proposed algorithms make decisions based solely on an agent's own history of play and requires no foreknowledge of the firms' preferences. Our algorithms are constructed by splitting up the statistical problem of learning one's preferences, from noisy observations, from the problem of competing for firms. We show that under realistic structural assumptions on the underlying preferences of the agents and firms, the proposed algorithms incur a regret which grows at most logarithmically in the time horizon. Our results show that, in the case of matching markets, competition need not drastically affect the performance of decentralized, communication and coordination free online learning algorithms.
summary: We study the problem of online learning in competitive settings in the context of two-sided matching markets. In particular, one side of the market, the agents, must learn about their preferences over the other side, the firms, through repeated interaction while competing with other agents for successful matches. We propose a class of decentralized, communication- and coordination-free algorithms that agents can use to reach to their stable match in structured matching markets. In contrast to prior works, the proposed algorithms make decisions based solely on an agent's own history of play and requires no foreknowledge of the firms' preferences. Our algorithms are constructed by splitting up the statistical problem of learning one's preferences, from noisy observations, from the problem of competing for firms. We show that under realistic structural assumptions on the underlying preferences of the agents and firms, the proposed algorithms incur a regret which grows at most logarithmically in the time horizon. Our results show that, in the case of matching markets, competition need not drastically affect the performance of decentralized, communication and coordination free online learning algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们研究双边匹配市场背景下竞争环境中的在线学习问题。特别是，市场的一方（代理商）必须通过反复互动，在与其他代理商竞争成功匹配的同时，了解他们相对于另一方（公司）的偏好。我们提出了一类去中心化、无通信和协调的算法，代理可以使用它们在结构化匹配市场中达到稳定的匹配。与之前的工作相比，所提出的算法仅根据代理人自己的游戏历史做出决策，并且不需要预先了解公司的偏好。我们的算法是通过将学习个人偏好的统计问题、从嘈杂的观察中、从企业竞争问题中分离出来而构建的。我们表明，在对代理人和公司的潜在偏好的现实结构假设下，所提出的算法会产生在时间范围内最多以对数方式增长的遗憾。我们的结果表明，在匹配市场的情况下，竞争不需要极大地影响去中心化、无通信和协调的在线学习算法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了双边匹配市场中代理在无需通信和协调的情况下，通过在线学习实现稳定匹配的算法设计问题。
AI.motivation: 传统匹配市场算法通常依赖中心化协调或先验偏好信息，而实际场景中代理可能无法获取这些信息且需自主决策。
AI.method: 提出将偏好学习与竞争决策解耦的算法框架，仅基于代理自身历史交互数据进行决策，无需预知对方偏好。
AI.result: 在合理偏好结构假设下，算法的累积遗憾随时间呈对数增长，证明了竞争环境下的学习有效性。
AI.conclusion: 竞争环境不会显著影响去中心化学习算法的性能，为实际匹配市场提供了可扩展的自主决策方案。
