authors_text: Ye Liu,Changchong Lu,Chen Lin,Di Yin,Bo Ren
title: Contrastive Graph Multimodal Model for Text Classification in Videos
title_zh: 用于视频中文本分类的对比图多模态模型
abstract: The extraction of text information in videos serves as a critical step towards semantic understanding of videos. It usually involved in two steps: (1) text recognition and (2) text classification. To localize texts in videos, we can resort to large numbers of text recognition methods based on OCR technology. However, to our knowledge, there is no existing work focused on the second step of video text classification, which will limit the guidance to downstream tasks such as video indexing and browsing. In this paper, we are the first to address this new task of video text classification by fusing multimodal information to deal with the challenging scenario where different types of video texts may be confused with various colors, unknown fonts and complex layouts. In addition, we tailor a specific module called CorrelationNet to reinforce feature representation by explicitly extracting layout information. Furthermore, contrastive learning is utilized to explore inherent connections between samples using plentiful unlabeled videos. Finally, we construct a new well-defined industrial dataset from the news domain, called TI-News, which is dedicated to building and evaluating video text recognition and classification applications. Extensive experiments on TI-News demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
summary: The extraction of text information in videos serves as a critical step towards semantic understanding of videos. It usually involved in two steps: (1) text recognition and (2) text classification. To localize texts in videos, we can resort to large numbers of text recognition methods based on OCR technology. However, to our knowledge, there is no existing work focused on the second step of video text classification, which will limit the guidance to downstream tasks such as video indexing and browsing. In this paper, we are the first to address this new task of video text classification by fusing multimodal information to deal with the challenging scenario where different types of video texts may be confused with various colors, unknown fonts and complex layouts. In addition, we tailor a specific module called CorrelationNet to reinforce feature representation by explicitly extracting layout information. Furthermore, contrastive learning is utilized to explore inherent connections between samples using plentiful unlabeled videos. Finally, we construct a new well-defined industrial dataset from the news domain, called TI-News, which is dedicated to building and evaluating video text recognition and classification applications. Extensive experiments on TI-News demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 视频中文本信息的提取是视频语义理解的关键一步。它通常涉及两个步骤：（1）文本识别和（2）文本分类。为了对视频中的文本进行本地化，我们可以求助于大量基于OCR技术的文本识别方法。然而，据我们所知，目前还没有针对视频文本分类第二步的工作，这将限制对视频索引和浏览等下游任务的指导。在本文中，我们首次通过融合多模态信息来解决视频文本分类的新任务，以应对不同类型的视频文本可能与各种颜色、未知字体和复杂布局混淆的具有挑战性的场景。此外，我们定制了一个名为 CorrelationNet 的特定模块，通过显式提取布局信息来强化特征表示。此外，对比学习用于使用大量未标记的视频来探索样本之间的内在联系。最后，我们从新闻领域构建了一个新的定义明确的工业数据集，称为 TI-News，该数据集致力于构建和评估视频文本识别和分类应用程序。 TI-News 上的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合多模态信息的对比图模型，用于解决视频文本分类中的复杂场景问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对视频文本分类的关注，导致下游任务如视频索引和浏览的指导不足。
AI.method: 设计CorrelationNet模块提取布局信息，结合对比学习利用未标记数据，并构建工业级数据集TI-News进行验证。
AI.result: 在TI-News数据集上的实验表明，该方法在视频文本分类任务中表现有效。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型和数据集为视频文本分类任务提供了新思路和基准资源。

authors_text: Shenhong Li,Sheng He,San Jiang,Wanshou Jiang,Lin Zhang
title: WHU-Stereo: A Challenging Benchmark for Stereo Matching of High-Resolution Satellite Images
title_zh: WHU-Stereo：高分辨率卫星图像立体匹配的挑战性基准
abstract: Stereo matching of high-resolution satellite images (HRSI) is still a fundamental but challenging task in the field of photogrammetry and remote sensing. Recently, deep learning (DL) methods, especially convolutional neural networks (CNNs), have demonstrated tremendous potential for stereo matching on public benchmark datasets. However, datasets for stereo matching of satellite images are scarce. To facilitate further research, this paper creates and publishes a challenging dataset, termed WHU-Stereo, for stereo matching DL network training and testing. This dataset is created by using airborne LiDAR point clouds and high-resolution stereo imageries taken from the Chinese GaoFen-7 satellite (GF-7). The WHU-Stereo dataset contains more than 1700 epipolar rectified image pairs, which cover six areas in China and includes various kinds of landscapes. We have assessed the accuracy of ground-truth disparity maps, and it is proved that our dataset achieves comparable precision compared with existing state-of-the-art stereo matching datasets. To verify its feasibility, in experiments, the hand-crafted SGM stereo matching algorithm and recent deep learning networks have been tested on the WHU-Stereo dataset. Experimental results show that deep learning networks can be well trained and achieves higher performance than hand-crafted SGM algorithm, and the dataset has great potential in remote sensing application. The WHU-Stereo dataset can serve as a challenging benchmark for stereo matching of high-resolution satellite images, and performance evaluation of deep learning models. Our dataset is available at https://github.com/Sheng029/WHU-Stereo

The WHU-Stereo dataset can serve as a challenging benchmark for stereo matching of high-resolution satellite images, and performance evaluation of deep learning models. Our dataset is available at https://github.com/Sheng029/WHU-Stereo
abstract_zh: 高分辨率卫星图像（HRSI）的立体匹配仍然是摄影测量和遥感领域的一项基本但具有挑战性的任务。最近，深度学习（DL）方法，特别是卷积神经网络（CNN），在公共基准数据集上展示了立体匹配的巨大潜力。然而，卫星图像立体匹配的数据集很少。为了促进进一步的研究，本文创建并发布了一个具有挑战性的数据集，称为 WHU-Stereo，用于立体匹配深度学习网络的训练和测试。该数据集是使用机载激光雷达点云和从中国高分七号卫星（GF-7）获取的高分辨率立体图像创建的。 WHU-Stereo数据集包含1700多对极线校正图像对，覆盖中国六个地区，包含各种景观。我们评估了地面实况视差图的准确性，并证明我们的数据集与现有最先进的立体匹配数据集相比达到了可比的精度。为了验证其可行性，在实验中，手工制作的 SGM 立体匹配算法和最新的深度学习网络已在 WHU-Stereo 数据集上进行了测试。实验结果表明，深度学习网络可以很好地训练，并且比手工制作的SGM算法获得更高的性能，该数据集在遥感应用中具有巨大的潜力。 WHU-Stereo 数据集可以作为高分辨率卫星图像立体匹配和深度学习模型性能评估的具有挑战性的基准。我们的数据集可在 https://github.com/Sheng029/WHU-Stereo 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出WHU-Stereo数据集，用于高分辨率卫星图像的立体匹配研究，推动深度学习方法在遥感领域的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有卫星图像立体匹配数据集稀缺，限制了相关算法的研究与优化，需建立更具挑战性的基准数据集。
AI.method: 基于中国高分七号卫星影像与机载LiDAR点云数据，构建包含1700余对影像对的数据集，并验证传统SGM算法与深度学习模型的性能。
AI.result: 深度学习模型在WHU-Stereo数据集上训练后性能优于传统SGM算法，数据集精度与主流数据集相当。
AI.conclusion: WHU-Stereo可作为高分辨率卫星图像立体匹配的挑战性基准，助力深度学习模型的性能评估与优化。

search_text: WHU-Stereo: A Challenging Benchmark for Stereo Matching of High-Resolution Satellite Images WHU-Stereo：高分辨率卫星图像立体匹配的挑战性基准 Stereo matching of high-resolution satellite images (HRSI) is still a fundamental but challenging task in the field of photogrammetry and remote sensing. Recently, deep learning (DL) methods, especially convolutional neural networks (CNNs), have demonstrated tremendous potential for stereo matching on public benchmark datasets. However, datasets for stereo matching of satellite images are scarce. To facilitate further research, this paper creates and publishes a challenging dataset, termed WHU-Stereo, for stereo matching DL network training and testing. This dataset is created by using airborne LiDAR point clouds and high-resolution stereo imageries taken from the Chinese GaoFen-7 satellite (GF-7). The WHU-Stereo dataset contains more than 1700 epipolar rectified image pairs, which cover six areas in China and includes various kinds of landscapes. We have assessed the accuracy of ground-truth disparity maps, and it is proved that our dataset achieves comparable precision compared with existing state-of-the-art stereo matching datasets. To verify its feasibility, in experiments, the hand-crafted SGM stereo matching algorithm and recent deep learning networks have been tested on the WHU-Stereo dataset. Experimental results show that deep learning networks can be well trained and achieves higher performance than hand-crafted SGM algorithm, and the dataset has great potential in remote sensing application. The WHU-Stereo dataset can serve as a challenging benchmark for stereo matching of high-resolution satellite images, and performance evaluation of deep learning models. Our dataset is available at https://github.com/Sheng029/WHU-Stereo 高分辨率卫星图像（HRSI）的立体匹配仍然是摄影测量和遥感领域的一项基本但具有挑战性的任务。最近，深度学习（DL）方法，特别是卷积神经网络（CNN），在公共基准数据集上展示了立体匹配的巨大潜力。然而，卫星图像立体匹配的数据集很少。为了促进进一步的研究，本文创建并发布了一个具有挑战性的数据集，称为 WHU-Stereo，用于立体匹配深度学习网络的训练和测试。该数据集是使用机载激光雷达点云和从中国高分七号卫星（GF-7）获取的高分辨率立体图像创建的。 WHU-Stereo数据集包含1700多对极线校正图像对，覆盖中国六个地区，包含各种景观。我们评估了地面实况视差图的准确性，并证明我们的数据集与现有最先进的立体匹配数据集相比达到了可比的精度。为了验证其可行性，在实验中，手工制作的 SGM 立体匹配算法和最新的深度学习网络已在 WHU-Stereo 数据集上进行了测试。实验结果表明，深度学习网络可以很好地训练，并且比手工制作的SGM算法获得更高的性能，该数据集在遥感应用中具有巨大的潜力。 WHU-Stereo 数据集可以作为高分辨率卫星图像立体匹配和深度学习模型性能评估的具有挑战性的基准。我们的数据集可在 https://github.com/Sheng029/WHU-Stereo 获取 本文提出WHU-Stereo数据集，用于高分辨率卫星图像的立体匹配研究，推动深度学习方法在遥感领域的应用。 Shenhong Li,Sheng He,San Jiang,Wanshou Jiang,Lin Zhang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yu Fang,Jiancheng Liu,Mingrui Zhang,Jiasheng Zhang,Yidong Ma,Minchen Li,Yuanming Hu,Chenfanfu Jiang,Tiantian Liu
title: Complex Locomotion Skill Learning via Differentiable Physics
title_zh: 通过可微分物理学习复杂的运动技能
abstract: Differentiable physics enables efficient gradient-based optimizations of neural network (NN) controllers. However, existing work typically only delivers NN controllers with limited capability and generalizability. We present a practical learning framework that outputs unified NN controllers capable of tasks with significantly improved complexity and diversity. To systematically improve training robustness and efficiency, we investigated a suite of improvements over the baseline approach, including periodic activation functions, and tailored loss functions. In addition, we find our adoption of batching and an Adam optimizer effective in training complex locomotion tasks. We evaluate our framework on differentiable mass-spring and material point method (MPM) simulations, with challenging locomotion tasks and multiple robot designs. Experiments show that our learning framework, based on differentiable physics, delivers better results than reinforcement learning and converges much faster. We demonstrate that users can interactively control soft robot locomotion and switch among multiple goals with specified velocity, height, and direction instructions using a unified NN controller trained in our system. Code is available at https://github.com/erizmr/Complex-locomotion-skill-learning-via-differentiable-physics.
summary: Differentiable physics enables efficient gradient-based optimizations of neural network (NN) controllers. However, existing work typically only delivers NN controllers with limited capability and generalizability. We present a practical learning framework that outputs unified NN controllers capable of tasks with significantly improved complexity and diversity. To systematically improve training robustness and efficiency, we investigated a suite of improvements over the baseline approach, including periodic activation functions, and tailored loss functions. In addition, we find our adoption of batching and an Adam optimizer effective in training complex locomotion tasks. We evaluate our framework on differentiable mass-spring and material point method (MPM) simulations, with challenging locomotion tasks and multiple robot designs. Experiments show that our learning framework, based on differentiable physics, delivers better results than reinforcement learning and converges much faster. We demonstrate that users can interactively control soft robot locomotion and switch among multiple goals with specified velocity, height, and direction instructions using a unified NN controller trained in our system. Code is available at https://github.com/erizmr/Complex-locomotion-skill-learning-via-differentiable-physics.
abstract_zh: 可微物理场可实现神经网络 (NN) 控制器基于梯度的高效优化。然而，现有的工作通常只能提供功能和通用性有限的神经网络控制器。我们提出了一个实用的学习框架，该框架输出统一的神经网络控制器，该控制器能够完成复杂性和多样性显着提高的任务。为了系统地提高训练的稳健性和效率，我们研究了一系列对基线方法的改进，包括周期性激活函数和定制损失函数。此外，我们发现采用批处理和 Adam 优化器可以有效训练复杂的运动任务。我们通过可微分质量弹簧和材料点法（MPM）模拟评估我们的框架，其中包括具有挑战性的运动任务和多种机器人设计。实验表明，我们基于可微物理的学习框架比强化学习能提供更好的结果，并且收敛速度更快。我们证明，用户可以使用在我们的系统中训练的统一神经网络控制器，以交互方式控制软机器人运动，并以指定的速度、高度和方向指令在多个目标之间切换。代码可在 https://github.com/erizmr/Complex-locomotion-skill-learning-via- Differentiable-physicals 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于可微分物理的框架，实现复杂运动技能学习，输出统一神经网络控制器以处理多样化任务。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络控制器在复杂性和泛化性上存在不足，需提升训练鲁棒性与效率以应对复杂运动任务。
AI.method: 改进基线方法，引入周期性激活函数、定制损失函数，结合批处理与Adam优化器，基于可微分物理进行训练。
AI.result: 框架在可微分仿真中优于强化学习，收敛更快，并支持用户交互控制软体机器人多目标运动。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效提升复杂运动技能学习效率，验证了可微分物理在机器人控制中的潜力。
